title: Visual Speech Recognition for Multiple Languages in the Wild
title_zh: 多种语言的视觉语音识别
abstract: Visual speech recognition (VSR) aims to recognize the content of speech based on lip movements, without relying on the audio stream. Advances in deep learning and the availability of large audio-visual datasets have led to the development of much more accurate and robust VSR models than ever before. However, these advances are usually due to the larger training sets rather than the model design. Here we demonstrate that designing better models is equally as important as using larger training sets. We propose the addition of prediction-based auxiliary tasks to a VSR model, and highlight the importance of hyperparameter optimization and appropriate data augmentations. We show that such a model works for different languages and outperforms all previous methods trained on publicly available datasets by a large margin. It even outperforms models that were trained on non-publicly available datasets containing up to to 21 times more data. We show, furthermore, that using additional training data, even in other languages or with automatically generated transcriptions, results in further improvement.
summary: Visual speech recognition (VSR) aims to recognize the content of speech based on lip movements, without relying on the audio stream. Advances in deep learning and the availability of large audio-visual datasets have led to the development of much more accurate and robust VSR models than ever before. However, these advances are usually due to the larger training sets rather than the model design. Here we demonstrate that designing better models is equally as important as using larger training sets. We propose the addition of prediction-based auxiliary tasks to a VSR model, and highlight the importance of hyperparameter optimization and appropriate data augmentations. We show that such a model works for different languages and outperforms all previous methods trained on publicly available datasets by a large margin. It even outperforms models that were trained on non-publicly available datasets containing up to to 21 times more data. We show, furthermore, that using additional training data, even in other languages or with automatically generated transcriptions, results in further improvement.
abstract_zh: 视觉语音识别（VSR）旨在基于嘴唇运动来识别语音内容，而不依赖于音频流。深度学习的进步和大型视听数据集的可用性导致了比以往更准确、更强大的 VSR 模型的开发。然而，这些进步通常是由于更大的训练集而不是模型设计。在这里，我们证明设计更好的模型与使用更大的训练集同样重要。我们建议在 VSR 模型中添加基于预测的辅助任务，并强调超参数优化和适当数据增强的重要性。我们表明，这样的模型适用于不同的语言，并且大大优于之前在公开数据集上训练的所有方法。它甚至优于在包含多达 21 倍数据的非公开数据集上训练的模型。此外，我们还表明，使用额外的训练数据，即使是其他语言或自动生成的转录数据，也能带来进一步的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多语言视觉语音识别模型，能够在无音频流的情况下通过唇部运动识别语音内容，并强调模型设计的重要性。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有视觉语音识别（VSR）模型依赖大规模数据集取得进展，但作者认为模型设计的改进同样关键，且未被充分重视。
AI.method: 提出基于预测的辅助任务，结合超参数优化和数据增强技术，设计跨语言VSR模型，并利用多语言训练数据和自动转录文本进一步提升性能。
AI.result: 该模型在公开数据集上大幅超越现有方法，甚至优于使用21倍数据量的非公开数据训练的模型，且多语言数据和自动转录文本的引入进一步提升了效果。
AI.conclusion: 模型设计优化与数据增强相结合可显著提升VSR性能，证明了精心设计的模型架构在跨语言场景中的有效性，超越单纯依赖数据量的提升。

title: An Improved Deep Learning Approach For Product Recognition on Racks in Retail Stores
title_zh: 用于零售店货架上产品识别的改进深度学习方法
comment: submitted to Machine Vision and Applications, Springer
comments: submitted to Machine Vision and Applications, Springer
abstract: Automated product recognition in retail stores is an important real-world application in the domain of Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition. In this paper, we consider the problem of automatically identifying the classes of the products placed on racks in retail stores from an image of the rack and information about the query/product images. We improve upon the existing approaches in terms of effectiveness and memory requirement by developing a two-stage object detection and recognition pipeline comprising of a Faster-RCNN-based object localizer that detects the object regions in the rack image and a ResNet-18-based image encoder that classifies the detected regions into the appropriate classes. Each of the models is fine-tuned using appropriate data sets for better prediction and data augmentation is performed on each query image to prepare an extensive gallery set for fine-tuning the ResNet-18-based product recognition model. This encoder is trained using a triplet loss function following the strategy of online-hard-negative-mining for improved prediction. The proposed models are lightweight and can be connected in an end-to-end manner during deployment for automatically identifying each product object placed in a rack image. Extensive experiments using Grozi-32k and GP-180 data sets verify the effectiveness of the proposed model.
summary: Automated product recognition in retail stores is an important real-world application in the domain of Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition. In this paper, we consider the problem of automatically identifying the classes of the products placed on racks in retail stores from an image of the rack and information about the query/product images. We improve upon the existing approaches in terms of effectiveness and memory requirement by developing a two-stage object detection and recognition pipeline comprising of a Faster-RCNN-based object localizer that detects the object regions in the rack image and a ResNet-18-based image encoder that classifies the detected regions into the appropriate classes. Each of the models is fine-tuned using appropriate data sets for better prediction and data augmentation is performed on each query image to prepare an extensive gallery set for fine-tuning the ResNet-18-based product recognition model. This encoder is trained using a triplet loss function following the strategy of online-hard-negative-mining for improved prediction. The proposed models are lightweight and can be connected in an end-to-end manner during deployment for automatically identifying each product object placed in a rack image. Extensive experiments using Grozi-32k and GP-180 data sets verify the effectiveness of the proposed model.
abstract_zh: 零售商店中的自动产品识别是计算机视觉和模式识别领域的重要现实应用。在本文中，我们考虑根据货架图像和有关查询/产品图像的信息自动识别零售店货架上放置的产品类别的问题。我们通过开发一个两阶段的对象检测和识别管道，在有效性和内存需求方面改进了现有方法，该管道包括一个基于 Faster-RCNN 的对象定位器（用于检测机架图像中的对象区域）和一个基于 ResNet-18 的图像编码器（用于将检测到的区域分类为适当的类别）。每个模型都使用适当的数据集进行微调，以实现更好的预测，并对每个查询图像执行数据增强，以准备一个广泛的图库集，用于微调基于 ResNet-18 的产品识别模型。该编码器使用三元组损失函数进行训练，遵循在线硬负挖掘策略以改进预测。所提出的模型是轻量级的，并且可以在部署期间以端到端的方式连接，以自动识别放置在货架图像中的每个产品对象。使用 Grozi-32k 和 GP-180 数据集进行的大量实验验证了所提出模型的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的深度学习方法，用于零售商店货架上的产品识别，通过两阶段管道实现高效准确的分类。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在产品识别效果和内存需求上存在不足，需开发更高效且轻量的解决方案以适应实际零售场景。
AI.method: 采用两阶段流程：基于Faster-RCNN的物体定位器检测货架图像中的目标区域，结合ResNet-18图像编码器进行分类；通过数据增强和在线难样本挖掘策略优化模型训练。
AI.result: 在Grozi-32k和GP-180数据集上的实验验证了该方法在识别准确率和模型轻量化方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的轻量级端到端模型可有效提升零售环境中货架产品自动识别的性能，具有实际部署价值。

The proposed models are lightweight and can be connected in an end-to-end manner during deployment for automatically identifying each product object placed in a rack image. Extensive experiments using Grozi-32k and GP-180 data sets verify the effectiveness of the proposed model. 零售商店中的自动产品识别是计算机视觉和模式识别领域的重要现实应用。在本文中，我们考虑根据货架图像和有关查询/产品图像的信息自动识别零售店货架上放置的产品类别的问题。我们通过开发一个两阶段的对象检测和识别管道，在有效性和内存需求方面改进了现有方法，该管道包括一个基于 Faster-RCNN 的对象定位器（用于检测机架图像中的对象区域）和一个基于 ResNet-18 的图像编码器（用于将检测到的区域分类为适当的类别）。每个模型都使用适当的数据集进行微调，以实现更好的预测，并对每个查询图像执行数据增强，以准备一个广泛的图库集，用于微调基于 ResNet-18 的产品识别模型。该编码器使用三元组损失函数进行训练，遵循在线硬负挖掘策略以改进预测。所提出的模型是轻量级的，并且可以在部署期间以端到端的方式连接，以自动识别放置在货架图像中的每个产品对象。使用 Grozi-32k 和 GP-180 数据集进行的大量实验验证了所提出模型的有效性。 本文提出一种改进的深度学习方法，用于零售商店货架上的产品识别，通过两阶段管道实现高效准确的分类。 Ankit Sinha,Soham Banerjee,Pratik Chattopadhyay cs.CV

authors_text: Aybora Koksal,Onder Tuzcuoglu,Kutalmis Gokalp Ince,Yoldas Ataseven,A. Aydin Alatan
title: Improved Hard Example Mining Approach for Single Shot Object Detectors
title_zh: 改进的单次目标检测器的困难示例挖掘方法
comment: ICIP 2022. 5 pages, 2 figures, 7 tables. The codes are available at https://github.com/aybora/yolov5Loss
comments: ICIP 2022. 5 pages, 2 figures, 7 tables. The codes are available at https://github.com/aybora/yolov5Loss
abstract: Hard example mining methods generally improve the performance of the object detectors, which suffer from imbalanced training sets. In this work, two existing hard example mining approaches (LRM and focal loss, FL) are adapted and combined in a state-of-the-art real-time object detector, YOLOv5. The effectiveness of the proposed approach for improving the performance on hard examples is extensively evaluated. The proposed method increases mAP by 3% compared to using the original loss function and around 1-2% compared to using the hard-mining methods (LRM or FL) individually on 2021 Anti-UAV Challenge Dataset.
summary: Hard example mining methods generally improve the performance of the object detectors, which suffer from imbalanced training sets. In this work, two existing hard example mining approaches (LRM and focal loss, FL) are adapted and combined in a state-of-the-art real-time object detector, YOLOv5. The effectiveness of the proposed approach for improving the performance on hard examples is extensively evaluated. The proposed method increases mAP by 3% compared to using the original loss function and around 1-2% compared to using the hard-mining methods (LRM or FL) individually on 2021 Anti-UAV Challenge Dataset.
abstract_zh: 硬样本挖掘方法通常可以提高目标检测器的性能，而目标检测器会受到训练集不平衡的影响。在这项工作中，两种现有的硬示例挖掘方法（LRM 和焦点损失，FL）在最先进的实时对象检测器 YOLOv5 中进行了调整和组合。所提出的提高困难示例性能的方法的有效性得到了广泛的评估。与使用原始损失函数相比，所提出的方法将 mAP 提高了 3%，与在 2021 年反无人机挑战数据集上单独使用硬挖掘方法（LRM 或 FL）相比，mAP 提高了约 1-2%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的硬例挖掘方法，结合LRM和focal loss应用于YOLOv5，以提升单阶段目标检测器在不平衡数据集上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有硬例挖掘方法在处理训练集不平衡问题时效果有限，需探索更有效的融合策略以提升检测器对困难样本的识别能力。
AI.method: 将LRM（损失加权）与focal loss两种硬例挖掘方法结合，集成到YOLOv5框架中，通过联合优化损失函数增强模型对困难样本的学习能力。
AI.result: 在2021 Anti-UAV数据集上，该方法使mAP相比原始YOLOv5提升3%，优于单独使用LRM或focal loss的1-2%提升。
AI.conclusion: 融合LRM与focal loss的硬例挖掘策略能有效提升单阶段检测器性能，尤其在复杂场景下对困难样本的检测效果显著。

title: SWIS: Self-Supervised Representation Learning For Writer Independent Offline Signature Verification
title_zh: SWIS：用于作者独立离线签名验证的自监督表示学习
abstract: Writer independent offline signature verification is one of the most challenging tasks in pattern recognition as there is often a scarcity of training data. To handle such data scarcity problem, in this paper, we propose a novel self-supervised learning (SSL) framework for writer independent offline signature verification. To our knowledge, this is the first attempt to utilize self-supervised setting for the signature verification task. The objective of self-supervised representation learning from the signature images is achieved by minimizing the cross-covariance between two random variables belonging to different feature directions and ensuring a positive cross-covariance between the random variables denoting the same feature direction. This ensures that the features are decorrelated linearly and the redundant information is discarded. Through experimental results on different data sets, we obtained encouraging results.
summary: Writer independent offline signature verification is one of the most challenging tasks in pattern recognition as there is often a scarcity of training data. To handle such data scarcity problem, in this paper, we propose a novel self-supervised learning (SSL) framework for writer independent offline signature verification. To our knowledge, this is the first attempt to utilize self-supervised setting for the signature verification task. The objective of self-supervised representation learning from the signature images is achieved by minimizing the cross-covariance between two random variables belonging to different feature directions and ensuring a positive cross-covariance between the random variables denoting the same feature direction. This ensures that the features are decorrelated linearly and the redundant information is discarded. Through experimental results on different data sets, we obtained encouraging results.
abstract_zh: 独立于作者的离线签名验证是模式识别中最具挑战性的任务之一，因为通常缺乏训练数据。为了解决这种数据稀缺问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的自监督学习（SSL）框架，用于独立于作者的离线签名验证。据我们所知，这是首次尝试利用自监督设置来执行签名验证任务。通过最小化属于不同特征方向的两个随机变量之间的互协方差并确保表示相同特征方向的随机变量之间的正互协方差来实现从签名图像中进行自监督表示学习的目标。这确保了特征线性去相关并且冗余信息被丢弃。通过在不同数据集上的实验结果，我们获得了令人鼓舞的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督学习框架SWIS，用于解决无作者依赖的离线签名验证中训练数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 离线签名验证因训练数据稀缺难以建模作者间差异，传统方法依赖大量标注数据，而自监督学习可缓解数据不足问题。
AI.method: 通过最小化不同特征方向的交叉协方差并最大化相同方向的正协方差，实现特征去相关与冗余信息过滤的自监督表征学习。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实验验证了该方法的有效性，取得了令人鼓舞的验证结果。
AI.conclusion: SWIS框架为签名验证提供了新思路，证明自监督学习在数据稀缺场景下的可行性，可能推广至其他模式识别任务。

title: Utility and Feasibility of a Center Surround Event Camera
title_zh: 中心环绕事件摄像机的实用性和可行性
comment: 5 pages, submitted to 29th IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (IEEE ICIP 2022)
comments: 5 pages, submitted to 29th IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (IEEE ICIP 2022)
abstract: Standard dynamic vision sensor (DVS) event cameras output a stream of spatially-independent log-intensity brightness change events so they cannot suppress spatial redundancy. Nearly all biological retinas use an antagonistic center-surround organization. This paper proposes a practical method of implementing a compact, energy-efficient Center Surround DVS (CSDVS) with a surround smoothing network that uses compact polysilicon resistors for lateral resistance. The paper includes behavioral simulation results for the CSDVS (see sites.google.com/view/csdvs/home). The CSDVS would significantly reduce events caused by low spatial frequencies, but amplify the informative high frequency spatiotemporal events.
summary: Standard dynamic vision sensor (DVS) event cameras output a stream of spatially-independent log-intensity brightness change events so they cannot suppress spatial redundancy. Nearly all biological retinas use an antagonistic center-surround organization. This paper proposes a practical method of implementing a compact, energy-efficient Center Surround DVS (CSDVS) with a surround smoothing network that uses compact polysilicon resistors for lateral resistance. The paper includes behavioral simulation results for the CSDVS (see sites.google.com/view/csdvs/home). The CSDVS would significantly reduce events caused by low spatial frequencies, but amplify the informative high frequency spatiotemporal events.
abstract_zh: 标准动态视觉传感器 (DVS) 事件相机输出空间独立的对数强度亮度变化事件流，因此它们无法抑制空间冗余。几乎所有的生物视网膜都采用对抗性的中心-周围组织。本文提出了一种实用方法，通过使用紧凑的多晶硅电阻器作为横向电阻的环绕平滑网络来实现紧凑、节能的中心环绕 DVS (CSDVS)。该论文包含 CSDVS 的行为模拟结果（请参阅sites.google.com/view/csdvs/home）。 CSDVS 将显着减少由低空间频率引起的事件，但放大信息丰富的高频时空事件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并验证了一种紧凑节能的中心周边事件相机（CSDVS）的可行性与实用性。
AI.motivation: 传统动态视觉传感器（DVS）无法抑制空间冗余，而生物视网膜的中心-周边结构能有效处理视觉信息，需借鉴该机制改进事件相机。
AI.method: 设计包含周边平滑网络的CSDVS，利用紧凑多晶硅电阻实现横向电阻，通过行为模拟验证其性能。
AI.result: CSDVS显著减少低空间频率引起的事件，同时增强高频率时空事件的检测能力。
AI.conclusion: CSDVS在能效和信息提取方面优于传统DVS，具有潜在应用价值。

search_text: Utility and Feasibility of a Center Surround Event Camera 中心环绕事件摄像机的实用性和可行性 Standard dynamic vision sensor (DVS) event cameras output a stream of spatially-independent log-intensity brightness change events so they cannot suppress spatial redundancy. Nearly all biological retinas use an antagonistic center-surround organization. This paper proposes a practical method of implementing a compact, energy-efficient Center Surround DVS (CSDVS) with a surround smoothing network that uses compact polysilicon resistors for lateral resistance. The paper includes behavioral simulation results for the CSDVS (see sites.google.com/view/csdvs/home). The CSDVS would significantly reduce events caused by low spatial frequencies, but amplify the informative high frequency spatiotemporal events. 标准动态视觉传感器 (DVS) 事件相机输出空间独立的对数强度亮度变化事件流，因此它们无法抑制空间冗余。几乎所有的生物视网膜都采用对抗性的中心-周围组织。本文提出了一种实用方法，通过使用紧凑的多晶硅电阻器作为横向电阻的环绕平滑网络来实现紧凑、节能的中心环绕 DVS (CSDVS)。该论文包含 CSDVS 的行为模拟结果（请参阅sites.google.com/view/csdvs/home）。 CSDVS 将显着减少由低空间频率引起的事件，但放大信息丰富的高频时空事件。 本文提出并验证了一种紧凑节能的中心周边事件相机（CSDVS）的可行性与实用性。 Tobi Delbruck,Chenghan Li,Rui Graca,Brian Mcreynolds cs.CV,cs.AR

title: Neuro-Inspired Deep Neural Networks with Sparse, Strong Activations
title_zh: 具有稀疏、强激活的神经启发深度神经网络
abstract: While end-to-end training of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) yields state of the art performance in an increasing array of applications, it does not provide insight into, or control over, the features being extracted. We report here on a promising neuro-inspired approach to DNNs with sparser and stronger activations. We use standard stochastic gradient training, supplementing the end-to-end discriminative cost function with layer-wise costs promoting Hebbian ("fire together," "wire together") updates for highly active neurons, and anti-Hebbian updates for the remaining neurons. Instead of batch norm, we use divisive normalization of activations (suppressing weak outputs using strong outputs), along with implicit $\ell_2$ normalization of neuronal weights. Experiments with standard image classification tasks on CIFAR-10 demonstrate that, relative to baseline end-to-end trained architectures, our proposed architecture (a) leads to sparser activations (with only a slight compromise on accuracy), (b) exhibits more robustness to noise (without being trained on noisy data), (c) exhibits more robustness to adversarial perturbations (without adversarial training).
summary: While end-to-end training of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) yields state of the art performance in an increasing array of applications, it does not provide insight into, or control over, the features being extracted. We report here on a promising neuro-inspired approach to DNNs with sparser and stronger activations. We use standard stochastic gradient training, supplementing the end-to-end discriminative cost function with layer-wise costs promoting Hebbian ("fire together," "wire together") updates for highly active neurons, and anti-Hebbian updates for the remaining neurons. Instead of batch norm, we use divisive normalization of activations (suppressing weak outputs using strong outputs), along with implicit $\ell_2$ normalization of neuronal weights. Experiments with standard image classification tasks on CIFAR-10 demonstrate that, relative to baseline end-to-end trained architectures, our proposed architecture (a) leads to sparser activations (with only a slight compromise on accuracy), (b) exhibits more robustness to noise (without being trained on noisy data), (c) exhibits more robustness to adversarial perturbations (without adversarial training).
abstract_zh: 虽然深度神经网络 (DNN) 的端到端训练在越来越多的应用中产生了最先进的性能，但它无法提供对所提取特征的洞察或控制。我们在这里报告了一种有前途的神经启发方法，用于具有更稀疏和更强激活的 DNN。我们使用标准随机梯度训练，用分层成本补充端到端判别成本函数，促进高度活跃神经元的赫布（“一起发射”，“连线在一起”）更新，以及其余神经元的反赫布更新。我们不使用批量归一化，而是使用激活的除法归一化（使用强输出抑制弱输出），以及神经元权重的隐式 $\ell_2$ 归一化。 CIFAR-10 上标准图像分类任务的实验表明，相对于基线端到端训练架构，我们提出的架构 (a) 导致更稀疏的激活（仅在准确性上略有妥协），(b) 对噪声表现出更强的鲁棒性（无需对噪声数据进行训练），(c) 对对抗性扰动表现出更强的鲁棒性（无需对抗性训练）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受神经启发的深度神经网络方法，通过稀疏且强激活机制提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统端到端训练的DNN缺乏对特征提取过程的控制，难以实现稀疏激活，且对噪声和对抗扰动鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 在标准梯度下降训练中引入分层成本函数，采用Hebbian规则强化高激活神经元、anti-Hebbian规则抑制低激活神经元，用分母归一化替代批量归一化，并结合隐式ℓ2权重归一化。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10图像分类任务中，相比基线模型实现了更稀疏的激活（精度仅轻微下降），且在未训练噪声数据情况下对噪声和对抗扰动更具鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该神经启发方法通过生物可解释的激活机制，有效提升了模型的稀疏性与鲁棒性，为DNN设计提供了新思路。

title: Global Instance Tracking: Locating Target More Like Humans
title_zh: 全局实例跟踪：更像人类一样定位目标
comment: This paper is published in IEEE TPAMI (refer to DOI). Please cite the published IEEE TPAMI
comments: This paper is published in IEEE TPAMI (refer to DOI). Please cite the published IEEE TPAMI
abstract: Target tracking, the essential ability of the human visual system, has been simulated by computer vision tasks. However, existing trackers perform well in austere experimental environments but fail in challenges like occlusion and fast motion. The massive gap indicates that researches only measure tracking performance rather than intelligence. How to scientifically judge the intelligence level of trackers? Distinct from decision-making problems, lacking three requirements (a challenging task, a fair environment, and a scientific evaluation procedure) makes it strenuous to answer the question. In this article, we first propose the global instance tracking (GIT) task, which is supposed to search an arbitrary user-specified instance in a video without any assumptions about camera or motion consistency, to model the human visual tracking ability. Whereafter, we construct a high-quality and large-scale benchmark VideoCube to create a challenging environment. Finally, we design a scientific evaluation procedure using human capabilities as the baseline to judge tracking intelligence. Additionally, we provide an online platform with toolkit and an updated leaderboard. Although the experimental results indicate a definite gap between trackers and humans, we expect to take a step forward to generate authentic human-like trackers. The database, toolkit, evaluation server, and baseline results are available at http://videocube.aitestunion.com.
summary: Target tracking, the essential ability of the human visual system, has been simulated by computer vision tasks. However, existing trackers perform well in austere experimental environments but fail in challenges like occlusion and fast motion. The massive gap indicates that researches only measure tracking performance rather than intelligence. How to scientifically judge the intelligence level of trackers? Distinct from decision-making problems, lacking three requirements (a challenging task, a fair environment, and a scientific evaluation procedure) makes it strenuous to answer the question. In this article, we first propose the global instance tracking (GIT) task, which is supposed to search an arbitrary user-specified instance in a video without any assumptions about camera or motion consistency, to model the human visual tracking ability. Whereafter, we construct a high-quality and large-scale benchmark VideoCube to create a challenging environment. Finally, we design a scientific evaluation procedure using human capabilities as the baseline to judge tracking intelligence. Additionally, we provide an online platform with toolkit and an updated leaderboard. Although the experimental results indicate a definite gap between trackers and humans, we expect to take a step forward to generate authentic human-like trackers. The database, toolkit, evaluation server, and baseline results are available at http://videocube.aitestunion.com.
abstract_zh: 目标跟踪是人类视觉系统的必备能力，已通过计算机视觉任务进行模拟。然而，现有的跟踪器在严峻的实验环境中表现良好，但在遮挡和快速运动等挑战中却失败了。巨大的差距表明研究只衡量跟踪性能而不是智力。如何科学判断追踪者的智力水平？与决策问题不同，缺乏挑战性的任务、公平的环境、科学的评估程序这三个要求，使得回答起来很吃力。在本文中，我们首先提出全局实例跟踪（GIT）任务，该任务应该在视频中搜索任意用户指定的实例，而不需要对相机或运动一致性进行任何假设，以对人类视觉跟踪能力进行建模。此后，我们构建了一个高质量、大规模的基准VideoCube，以创造一个具有挑战性的环境。最后，我们设计了一个科学的评估程序，以人的能力为基准来判断跟踪智能。此外，我们还提供一个带有工具包和更新的排行榜的在线平台。尽管实验结果表明跟踪器和人类之间存在一定的差距，但我们期望向前迈出一步，以生成真正的类人跟踪器。数据库、工具包、评估服务器和基线结果可在 http://videocube.aitestunion.com 上获取。

AI.tldr: 提出全局实例跟踪任务（GIT），模拟人类视觉系统在无假设条件下的目标定位能力。
AI.motivation: 现有跟踪器在复杂环境（如遮挡、快速运动）下表现不足，且缺乏科学评估方法来衡量跟踪器的智能水平。
AI.method: 提出GIT任务并构建大规模基准VideoCube，设计以人类能力为基准的评估流程，提供在线平台与工具包。
AI.result: 实验显示跟踪器与人类存在明显差距，但验证了GIT任务的有效性，推动了类人跟踪器的研发。
AI.conclusion: 通过GIT任务与VideoCube基准，为开发更接近人类智能的跟踪器提供新方向与工具支持。

authors_text: Wentao Zhu,Hang Shang,Tingxun Lv,Chao Liao,Sen Yang,Ji Liu
title: Adversarial Contrastive Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 对抗性对比自我监督学习
abstract: Recently, learning from vast unlabeled data, especially self-supervised learning, has been emerging and attracted widespread attention. Self-supervised learning followed by the supervised fine-tuning on a few labeled examples can significantly improve label efficiency and outperform standard supervised training using fully annotated data. In this work, we present a novel self-supervised deep learning paradigm based on online hard negative pair mining. Specifically, we design a student-teacher network to generate multi-view of the data for self-supervised learning and integrate hard negative pair mining into the training. Then we derive a new triplet-like loss considering both positive sample pairs and mined hard negative sample pairs. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method and its components on ILSVRC-2012.
summary: Recently, learning from vast unlabeled data, especially self-supervised learning, has been emerging and attracted widespread attention. Self-supervised learning followed by the supervised fine-tuning on a few labeled examples can significantly improve label efficiency and outperform standard supervised training using fully annotated data. In this work, we present a novel self-supervised deep learning paradigm based on online hard negative pair mining. Specifically, we design a student-teacher network to generate multi-view of the data for self-supervised learning and integrate hard negative pair mining into the training. Then we derive a new triplet-like loss considering both positive sample pairs and mined hard negative sample pairs. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method and its components on ILSVRC-2012.
abstract_zh: 近年来，从大量无标签数据中进行学习，特别是自监督学习不断兴起并引起广泛关注。自监督学习，然后对一些标记示例进行监督微调，可以显着提高标签效率，并且优于使用完全注释数据的标准监督训练。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于在线硬负对挖掘的新型自监督深度学习范式。具体来说，我们设计了一个学生-教师网络来生成用于自监督学习的多视图数据，并将困难负对挖掘集成到训练中。然后，考虑正样本对和挖掘的硬负样本对，我们得出一个新的三重态损失。大量实验证明了所提出的方法及其组件在 ILSVRC-2012 上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对抗对比自监督学习的新方法，通过学生-教师网络和困难负样本挖掘提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习依赖大量标注数据，而自监督学习虽能利用未标注数据但存在负样本挖掘不足和多视图生成效率低的问题。
AI.method: 设计学生-教师网络生成多视图数据，结合在线困难负样本挖掘机制，并提出融合正样本与负样本对的三元组损失函数。
AI.result: 在ILSVRC-2012数据集上验证了方法有效性，证明其组件设计对提升模型性能具有显著作用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过对抗对比学习框架和困难负样本挖掘策略，有效提升了自监督学习的表征能力与标签效率。

search_text: Adversarial Contrastive Self-Supervised Learning 对抗性对比自我监督学习 Recently, learning from vast unlabeled data, especially self-supervised learning, has been emerging and attracted widespread attention. Self-supervised learning followed by the supervised fine-tuning on a few labeled examples can significantly improve label efficiency and outperform standard supervised training using fully annotated data. In this work, we present a novel self-supervised deep learning paradigm based on online hard negative pair mining. Specifically, we design a student-teacher network to generate multi-view of the data for self-supervised learning and integrate hard negative pair mining into the training. Then we derive a new triplet-like loss considering both positive sample pairs and mined hard negative sample pairs. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method and its components on ILSVRC-2012. 近年来，从大量无标签数据中进行学习，特别是自监督学习不断兴起并引起广泛关注。自监督学习，然后对一些标记示例进行监督微调，可以显着提高标签效率，并且优于使用完全注释数据的标准监督训练。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于在线硬负对挖掘的新型自监督深度学习范式。具体来说，我们设计了一个学生-教师网络来生成用于自监督学习的多视图数据，并将困难负对挖掘集成到训练中。然后，考虑正样本对和挖掘的硬负样本对，我们得出一个新的三重态损失。大量实验证明了所提出的方法及其组件在 ILSVRC-2012 上的有效性。 本文提出一种基于对抗对比自监督学习的新方法，通过学生-教师网络和困难负样本挖掘提升模型性能。 Wentao Zhu,Hang Shang,Tingxun Lv,Chao Liao,Sen Yang,Ji Liu cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Berk Kaya,Suryansh Kumar,Carlos Oliveira,Vittorio Ferrari,Luc Van Gool
title: Uncertainty-Aware Deep Multi-View Photometric Stereo
title_zh: 不确定性感知深度多视图光度立体
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE/CVF CVPR 2022. (11 Pages, 6 Figures, 3 Tables)
comments: Accepted for publication in IEEE/CVF CVPR 2022. (11 Pages, 6 Figures, 3 Tables)
abstract: This paper presents a simple and effective solution to the longstanding classical multi-view photometric stereo (MVPS) problem. It is well-known that photometric stereo (PS) is excellent at recovering high-frequency surface details, whereas multi-view stereo (MVS) can help remove the low-frequency distortion due to PS and retain the global geometry of the shape. This paper proposes an approach that can effectively utilize such complementary strengths of PS and MVS. Our key idea is to combine them suitably while considering the per-pixel uncertainty of their estimates. To this end, we estimate per-pixel surface normals and depth using an uncertainty-aware deep-PS network and deep-MVS network, respectively. Uncertainty modeling helps select reliable surface normal and depth estimates at each pixel which then act as a true representative of the dense surface geometry. At each pixel, our approach either selects or discards deep-PS and deep-MVS network prediction depending on the prediction uncertainty measure. For dense, detailed, and precise inference of the object's surface profile, we propose to learn the implicit neural shape representation via a multilayer perceptron (MLP). Our approach encourages the MLP to converge to a natural zero-level set surface using the confident prediction from deep-PS and deep-MVS networks, providing superior dense surface reconstruction. Extensive experiments on the DiLiGenT-MV benchmark dataset show that our method provides high-quality shape recovery with a much lower memory footprint while outperforming almost all of the existing approaches.
summary: This paper presents a simple and effective solution to the longstanding classical multi-view photometric stereo (MVPS) problem. It is well-known that photometric stereo (PS) is excellent at recovering high-frequency surface details, whereas multi-view stereo (MVS) can help remove the low-frequency distortion due to PS and retain the global geometry of the shape. This paper proposes an approach that can effectively utilize such complementary strengths of PS and MVS. Our key idea is to combine them suitably while considering the per-pixel uncertainty of their estimates. To this end, we estimate per-pixel surface normals and depth using an uncertainty-aware deep-PS network and deep-MVS network, respectively. Uncertainty modeling helps select reliable surface normal and depth estimates at each pixel which then act as a true representative of the dense surface geometry. At each pixel, our approach either selects or discards deep-PS and deep-MVS network prediction depending on the prediction uncertainty measure. For dense, detailed, and precise inference of the object's surface profile, we propose to learn the implicit neural shape representation via a multilayer perceptron (MLP). Our approach encourages the MLP to converge to a natural zero-level set surface using the confident prediction from deep-PS and deep-MVS networks, providing superior dense surface reconstruction. Extensive experiments on the DiLiGenT-MV benchmark dataset show that our method provides high-quality shape recovery with a much lower memory footprint while outperforming almost all of the existing approaches.
abstract_zh: 本文针对长期存在的经典多视图光度立体（MVPS）问题提出了一种简单有效的解决方案。众所周知，光度立体（PS）在恢复高频表面细节方面表现出色，而多视图立体（MVS）可以帮助消除PS引起的低频失真并保留形状的全局几何形状。本文提出了一种可以有效利用 PS 和 MVS 互补优势的方法。我们的关键想法是在考虑其估计的每像素不确定性的同时将它们适当地组合起来。为此，我们分别使用不确定性感知深度 PS 网络和深度 MVS 网络来估计每像素表面法线和深度。不确定性建模有助于在每个像素处选择可靠的表面法线和深度估计，然后将其作为密集表面几何形状的真实代表。在每个像素处，我们的方法根据预测不确定性度量选择或丢弃深度 PS 和深度 MVS 网络预测。为了对物体表面轮廓进行密集、详细和精确的推断，我们建议通过多层感知器（MLP）学习隐式神经形状表示。我们的方法鼓励 MLP 使用深度 PS 和深度 MVS 网络的置信预测收敛到自然的零水平集表面，从而提供卓越的密集表面重建。对 DiLiGenT-MV 基准数据集的大量实验表明，我们的方法提供了高质量的形状恢复，且内存占用少得多，同时性能优于几乎所有现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合光度立体法（PS）和多视角立体法（MVS）优势的深度不确定性感知多视角光度立体方法，以实现高质量的表面重建。
AI.motivation: 传统PS擅长恢复高频表面细节但存在低频失真，MVS能保留全局几何但缺乏细节。现有方法未能有效融合两者优势且未考虑预测不确定性。
AI.method: 通过深度不确定性感知网络分别估计表面法线和深度，基于像素级不确定性选择可靠预测，并利用MLP学习隐式神经形状表示以融合PS与MVS结果。
AI.result: 在DiLiGenT-MV基准数据集上，该方法在保持较低内存占用的同时显著优于现有方法，实现了高精度表面重建。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合PS与MVS的互补优势并引入不确定性建模，本文提出的方法有效提升了多视角光度立体的表面重建质量与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Sulong Ge,Zhihua Xia,Jianwei Fei,Xingming Sun,Jian Weng
title: A Robust Document Image Watermarking Scheme using Deep Neural Network
title_zh: 使用深度神经网络的鲁棒文档图像水印方案
abstract: Watermarking is an important copyright protection technology which generally embeds the identity information into the carrier imperceptibly. Then the identity can be extracted to prove the copyright from the watermarked carrier even after suffering various attacks. Most of the existing watermarking technologies take the nature images as carriers. Different from the natural images, document images are not so rich in color and texture, and thus have less redundant information to carry watermarks. This paper proposes an end-to-end document image watermarking scheme using the deep neural network. Specifically, an encoder and a decoder are designed to embed and extract the watermark. A noise layer is added to simulate the various attacks that could be encountered in reality, such as the Cropout, Dropout, Gaussian blur, Gaussian noise, Resize, and JPEG Compression. A text-sensitive loss function is designed to limit the embedding modification on characters. An embedding strength adjustment strategy is proposed to improve the quality of watermarked image with little loss of extraction accuracy. Experimental results show that the proposed document image watermarking technology outperforms three state-of-the-arts in terms of the robustness and image quality.
summary: Watermarking is an important copyright protection technology which generally embeds the identity information into the carrier imperceptibly. Then the identity can be extracted to prove the copyright from the watermarked carrier even after suffering various attacks. Most of the existing watermarking technologies take the nature images as carriers. Different from the natural images, document images are not so rich in color and texture, and thus have less redundant information to carry watermarks. This paper proposes an end-to-end document image watermarking scheme using the deep neural network. Specifically, an encoder and a decoder are designed to embed and extract the watermark. A noise layer is added to simulate the various attacks that could be encountered in reality, such as the Cropout, Dropout, Gaussian blur, Gaussian noise, Resize, and JPEG Compression. A text-sensitive loss function is designed to limit the embedding modification on characters. An embedding strength adjustment strategy is proposed to improve the quality of watermarked image with little loss of extraction accuracy. Experimental results show that the proposed document image watermarking technology outperforms three state-of-the-arts in terms of the robustness and image quality.
abstract_zh: 水印是一种重要的版权保护技术，一般将身份信息不知不觉地嵌入到载体中。然后，即使遭受各种攻击，也可以从水印载体中提取身份来证明版权。现有的水印技术大多以自然图像为载体。与自然图像不同，文档图像的颜色和纹理不那么丰富，因此携带水印的冗余信息较少。本文提出了一种使用深度神经网络的端到端文档图像水印方案。具体来说，编码器和解码器被设计来嵌入和提取水印。添加噪声层来模拟现实中可能遇到的各种攻击，例如Cropout、Dropout、高斯模糊、高斯噪声、Resize、JPEG 压缩等。文本敏感损失函数旨在限制对字符的嵌入修改。提出了一种嵌入强度调整策略，以在不损失提取精度的情况下提高水印图像的质量。实验结果表明，所提出的文档图像水印技术在鲁棒性和图像质量方面优于三种最先进的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络的文档图像水印方案，旨在解决文档图像因颜色和纹理信息较少导致的水印嵌入与提取难题。
AI.motivation: 现有水印技术多针对自然图像，而文档图像因缺乏丰富的颜色和纹理信息，难以有效承载水印且易受攻击。需设计专门针对文档图像的鲁棒水印方法。
AI.method: 设计编码器-解码器结构实现水印嵌入与提取，引入噪声层模拟现实攻击（如裁剪、模糊、压缩等），提出文本敏感损失函数限制字符区域修改，并优化嵌入强度策略以平衡图像质量与提取精度。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在鲁棒性和图像质量指标上优于三种现有最先进的水印技术。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的深度学习水印方案有效解决了文档图像水印嵌入的特殊挑战，为文档版权保护提供了更优的技术路径。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络的文档图像水印方案，旨在解决文档图像因颜色和纹理信息较少导致的水印嵌入与提取难题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有水印技术多针对自然图像，而文档图像因缺乏丰富的颜色和纹理信息，难以有效承载水印且易受攻击。需设计专门针对文档图像的鲁棒水印方法。
ai_content.method: 设计编码器-解码器结构实现水印嵌入与提取，引入噪声层模拟现实攻击（如裁剪、模糊、压缩等），提出文本敏感损失函数限制字符区域修改，并优化嵌入强度策略以平衡图像质量与提取精度。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，该方法在鲁棒性和图像质量指标上优于三种现有最先进的水印技术。
ai_content.conclusion: 本文提出的深度学习水印方案有效解决了文档图像水印嵌入的特殊挑战，为文档版权保护提供了更优的技术路径。

search_text: A Robust Document Image Watermarking Scheme using Deep Neural Network 使用深度神经网络的鲁棒文档图像水印方案 Watermarking is an important copyright protection technology which generally embeds the identity information into the carrier imperceptibly. Then the identity can be extracted to prove the copyright from the watermarked carrier even after suffering various attacks. Most of the existing watermarking technologies take the nature images as carriers. Different from the natural images, document images are not so rich in color and texture, and thus have less redundant information to carry watermarks. This paper proposes an end-to-end document image watermarking scheme using the deep neural network. Specifically, an encoder and a decoder are designed to embed and extract the watermark. A noise layer is added to simulate the various attacks that could be encountered in reality, such as the Cropout, Dropout, Gaussian blur, Gaussian noise, Resize, and JPEG Compression. A text-sensitive loss function is designed to limit the embedding modification on characters. An embedding strength adjustment strategy is proposed to improve the quality of watermarked image with little loss of extraction accuracy. Experimental results show that the proposed document image watermarking technology outperforms three state-of-the-arts in terms of the robustness and image quality. 水印是一种重要的版权保护技术，一般将身份信息不知不觉地嵌入到载体中。然后，即使遭受各种攻击，也可以从水印载体中提取身份来证明版权。现有的水印技术大多以自然图像为载体。与自然图像不同，文档图像的颜色和纹理不那么丰富，因此携带水印的冗余信息较少。本文提出了一种使用深度神经网络的端到端文档图像水印方案。具体来说，编码器和解码器被设计来嵌入和提取水印。添加噪声层来模拟现实中可能遇到的各种攻击，例如Cropout、Dropout、高斯模糊、高斯噪声、Resize、JPEG 压缩等。文本敏感损失函数旨在限制对字符的嵌入修改。提出了一种嵌入强度调整策略，以在不损失提取精度的情况下提高水印图像的质量。实验结果表明，所提出的文档图像水印技术在鲁棒性和图像质量方面优于三种最先进的技术。 本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络的文档图像水印方案，旨在解决文档图像因颜色和纹理信息较少导致的水印嵌入与提取难题。 Sulong Ge,Zhihua Xia,Jianwei Fei,Xingming Sun,Jian Weng cs.CV

authors_text: Yi Ren,Xu Tan,Tao Qin,Zhou Zhao,Tie-Yan Liu
title: Revisiting Over-Smoothness in Text to Speech
title_zh: 重新审视文本转语音的过度平滑度
abstract: Non-autoregressive text to speech (NAR-TTS) models have attracted much attention from both academia and industry due to their fast generation speed. One limitation of NAR-TTS models is that they ignore the correlation in time and frequency domains while generating speech mel-spectrograms, and thus cause blurry and over-smoothed results. In this work, we revisit this over-smoothing problem from a novel perspective: the degree of over-smoothness is determined by the gap between the complexity of data distributions and the capability of modeling methods. Both simplifying data distributions and improving modeling methods can alleviate the problem. Accordingly, we first study methods reducing the complexity of data distributions. Then we conduct a comprehensive study on NAR-TTS models that use some advanced modeling methods. Based on these studies, we find that 1) methods that provide additional condition inputs reduce the complexity of data distributions to model, thus alleviating the over-smoothing problem and achieving better voice quality. 2) Among advanced modeling methods, Laplacian mixture loss performs well at modeling multimodal distributions and enjoys its simplicity, while GAN and Glow achieve the best voice quality while suffering from increased training or model complexity. 3) The two categories of methods can be combined to further alleviate the over-smoothness and improve the voice quality. 4) Our experiments on the multi-speaker dataset lead to similar conclusions as above and providing more variance information can reduce the difficulty of modeling the target data distribution and alleviate the requirements for model capacity.
summary: Non-autoregressive text to speech (NAR-TTS) models have attracted much attention from both academia and industry due to their fast generation speed. One limitation of NAR-TTS models is that they ignore the correlation in time and frequency domains while generating speech mel-spectrograms, and thus cause blurry and over-smoothed results. In this work, we revisit this over-smoothing problem from a novel perspective: the degree of over-smoothness is determined by the gap between the complexity of data distributions and the capability of modeling methods. Both simplifying data distributions and improving modeling methods can alleviate the problem. Accordingly, we first study methods reducing the complexity of data distributions. Then we conduct a comprehensive study on NAR-TTS models that use some advanced modeling methods. Based on these studies, we find that 1) methods that provide additional condition inputs reduce the complexity of data distributions to model, thus alleviating the over-smoothing problem and achieving better voice quality. 2) Among advanced modeling methods, Laplacian mixture loss performs well at modeling multimodal distributions and enjoys its simplicity, while GAN and Glow achieve the best voice quality while suffering from increased training or model complexity. 3) The two categories of methods can be combined to further alleviate the over-smoothness and improve the voice quality. 4) Our experiments on the multi-speaker dataset lead to similar conclusions as above and providing more variance information can reduce the difficulty of modeling the target data distribution and alleviate the requirements for model capacity.
abstract_zh: 非自回归文本转语音（NAR-TTS）模型由于其快速的生成速度而引起了学术界和工业界的广泛关注。 NAR-TTS 模型的局限性之一是它们在生成语音梅尔频谱图时忽略了时域和频域的相关性，从而导致结果模糊和过度平滑。在这项工作中，我们从一个新的角度重新审视这个过度平滑问题：过度平滑的程度是由数据分布的复杂性和建模方法的能力之间的差距决定的。简化数据分布和改进建模方法都可以缓解这个问题。因此，我们首先研究降低数据分布复杂性的方法。然后我们对使用一些先进建模方法的 NAR-TTS 模型进行了全面的研究。基于这些研究，我们发现：1）提供额外条件输入的方法降低了建模数据分布的复杂性，从而减轻了过度平滑问题并实现了更好的语音质量。 2）在先进的建模方法中，拉普拉斯混合损失在建模多模态分布方面表现良好，并且简单，而GAN和Glow实现了最好的语音质量，但受到训练或模型复杂性增加的影响。 3）这两类方法可以结合起来，进一步缓解过度平滑，提高语音质量。 4）我们在多说话人数据集上的实验得到了与上述类似的结论，提供更多的方差信息可以降低目标数据分布建模的难度，减轻对模型容量的要求。

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视非自回归文本到语音（NAR-TTS）模型中过度平滑的问题，并提出解决方法。
AI.motivation: NAR-TTS模型虽然生成速度快，但忽略了时间和频率域的相关性，导致语音模糊和过度平滑。因此，需要研究如何缓解这一问题。
AI.method: 本文通过降低数据分布复杂性和改进建模方法两种途径解决过度平滑问题。研究了附加条件输入方法和先进的建模方法，如拉普拉斯混合损失、GAN和Glow。
AI.result: 附加条件输入方法能有效降低数据分布复杂性，从而改善语音质量；拉普拉斯混合损失在建模多峰分布方面表现良好，而GAN和Glow则在语音质量上表现最佳，但训练和模型复杂度更高。两种方法结合可进一步缓解过度平滑问题。
AI.conclusion: 通过降低数据分布复杂性和改进建模方法，可以有效缓解NAR-TTS模型的过度平滑问题，提高语音质量。

title: An End-to-End Transformer Model for Crowd Localization
title_zh: 用于人群定位的端到端 Transformer 模型
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2022. The project page is at https://dk-liang.github.io/CLTR/
comments: Accepted by ECCV 2022. The project page is at https://dk-liang.github.io/CLTR/
abstract: Crowd localization, predicting head positions, is a more practical and high-level task than simply counting. Existing methods employ pseudo-bounding boxes or pre-designed localization maps, relying on complex post-processing to obtain the head positions. In this paper, we propose an elegant, end-to-end Crowd Localization Transformer named CLTR that solves the task in the regression-based paradigm. The proposed method views the crowd localization as a direct set prediction problem, taking extracted features and trainable embeddings as input of the transformer-decoder. To reduce the ambiguous points and generate more reasonable matching results, we introduce a KMO-based Hungarian matcher, which adopts the nearby context as the auxiliary matching cost. Extensive experiments conducted on five datasets in various data settings show the effectiveness of our method. In particular, the proposed method achieves the best localization performance on the NWPU-Crowd, UCF-QNRF, and ShanghaiTech Part A datasets.
summary: Crowd localization, predicting head positions, is a more practical and high-level task than simply counting. Existing methods employ pseudo-bounding boxes or pre-designed localization maps, relying on complex post-processing to obtain the head positions. In this paper, we propose an elegant, end-to-end Crowd Localization Transformer named CLTR that solves the task in the regression-based paradigm. The proposed method views the crowd localization as a direct set prediction problem, taking extracted features and trainable embeddings as input of the transformer-decoder. To reduce the ambiguous points and generate more reasonable matching results, we introduce a KMO-based Hungarian matcher, which adopts the nearby context as the auxiliary matching cost. Extensive experiments conducted on five datasets in various data settings show the effectiveness of our method. In particular, the proposed method achieves the best localization performance on the NWPU-Crowd, UCF-QNRF, and ShanghaiTech Part A datasets.
abstract_zh: 人群定位，即预测头部位置，是比简单计数更实用、更高级的任务。现有方法采用伪边界框或预先设计的定位图，依靠复杂的后处理来获取头部位置。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 CLTR 的优雅的端到端人群定位转换器，它可以解决基于回归的范例中的任务。所提出的方法将人群定位视为直接集合预测问题，将提取的特征和可训练的嵌入作为变压器解码器的输入。为了减少歧义点并生成更合理的匹配结果，我们引入了一种基于KMO的匈牙利匹配器，它采用附近的上下文作为辅助匹配成本。在不同数据设置的五个数据集上进行的广泛实验表明了我们方法的有效性。特别是，所提出的方法在 NWPU-Crowd、UCF-QNRF 和 ShanghaiTech Part A 数据集上实现了最佳定位性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的Transformer模型CLTR，用于解决人群定位任务，通过直接预测头部位置来替代传统方法中的复杂后处理步骤。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖伪边界框或预设定位图，并需要复杂后处理才能获得头部位置，过程繁琐且不够高效。因此，作者提出一种更简洁的端到端解决方案。
AI.method: 将人群定位视为直接集合预测问题，采用Transformer解码器处理提取的特征和可训练嵌入，并引入基于KMO的匈牙利匹配器，利用邻近上下文作为辅助匹配成本以减少模糊点。
AI.result: 在五个不同数据集上的实验表明，CLTR在NWPU-Crowd、UCF-QNRF和ShanghaiTech Part A数据集上取得了最佳定位性能。
AI.conclusion: CLTR通过端到端框架和改进的匹配策略，有效提升了人群定位的准确性和效率，为相关研究提供了新思路。

search_text: An End-to-End Transformer Model for Crowd Localization 用于人群定位的端到端 Transformer 模型 Crowd localization, predicting head positions, is a more practical and high-level task than simply counting. Existing methods employ pseudo-bounding boxes or pre-designed localization maps, relying on complex post-processing to obtain the head positions. In this paper, we propose an elegant, end-to-end Crowd Localization Transformer named CLTR that solves the task in the regression-based paradigm. The proposed method views the crowd localization as a direct set prediction problem, taking extracted features and trainable embeddings as input of the transformer-decoder. To reduce the ambiguous points and generate more reasonable matching results, we introduce a KMO-based Hungarian matcher, which adopts the nearby context as the auxiliary matching cost. Extensive experiments conducted on five datasets in various data settings show the effectiveness of our method. In particular, the proposed method achieves the best localization performance on the NWPU-Crowd, UCF-QNRF, and ShanghaiTech Part A datasets. 人群定位，即预测头部位置，是比简单计数更实用、更高级的任务。现有方法采用伪边界框或预先设计的定位图，依靠复杂的后处理来获取头部位置。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 CLTR 的优雅的端到端人群定位转换器，它可以解决基于回归的范例中的任务。所提出的方法将人群定位视为直接集合预测问题，将提取的特征和可训练的嵌入作为变压器解码器的输入。为了减少歧义点并生成更合理的匹配结果，我们引入了一种基于KMO的匈牙利匹配器，它采用附近的上下文作为辅助匹配成本。在不同数据设置的五个数据集上进行的广泛实验表明了我们方法的有效性。特别是，所提出的方法在 NWPU-Crowd、UCF-QNRF 和 ShanghaiTech Part A 数据集上实现了最佳定位性能。 本文提出了一种端到端的Transformer模型CLTR，用于解决人群定位任务，通过直接预测头部位置来替代传统方法中的复杂后处理步骤。 Dingkang Liang,Wei Xu,Xiang Bai cs.CV

title: Watch Me Calibrate My Force-Sensing Shoes!
title_zh: 看我校准我的力感应鞋！
abstract: This paper presents a novel method for smaller-sized humanoid robots to self-calibrate their foot force sensors. The method consists of two steps: 1. The robot is commanded to move along planned whole-body trajectories in different double support configurations. 2. The sensor parameters are determined by minimizing the error between the measured and modeled center of pressure (CoP) and ground reaction force (GRF) during the robot's movement using optimization. This is the first proposed autonomous calibration method for foot force-sensing devices in smaller humanoid robots. Furthermore, we introduce a high-accuracy manual calibration method to establish CoP ground truth, which is used to validate the measured CoP using self-calibration. The results show that the self-calibration can accurately estimate CoP and GRF without any manual intervention. Our method is demonstrated using a NAO humanoid platform and our previously presented force-sensing shoes.
summary: This paper presents a novel method for smaller-sized humanoid robots to self-calibrate their foot force sensors. The method consists of two steps: 1. The robot is commanded to move along planned whole-body trajectories in different double support configurations. 2. The sensor parameters are determined by minimizing the error between the measured and modeled center of pressure (CoP) and ground reaction force (GRF) during the robot's movement using optimization. This is the first proposed autonomous calibration method for foot force-sensing devices in smaller humanoid robots. Furthermore, we introduce a high-accuracy manual calibration method to establish CoP ground truth, which is used to validate the measured CoP using self-calibration. The results show that the self-calibration can accurately estimate CoP and GRF without any manual intervention. Our method is demonstrated using a NAO humanoid platform and our previously presented force-sensing shoes.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种小型人形机器人自校准足部力传感器的新方法。该方法包括两个步骤： 1.命令机器人在不同的双支撑配置中沿着规划的全身轨迹移动。 2. 通过优化在机器人运动过程中最小化测量和建模的压力中心 (CoP) 与地面反作用力 (GRF) 之间的误差来确定传感器参数。这是第一个提出的小型人形机器人足力传感装置的自主校准方法。此外，我们引入了一种高精度手动校准方法来建立 CoP 地面实况，用于通过自校准验证测量的 CoP。结果表明，自校准可以准确估计CoP和GRF，无需任何人工干预。我们的方法是使用 NAO 人形平台和我们之前推出的力感应鞋进行演示的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种小型人形机器人自主校准足部力传感器的新方法，通过优化算法实现无需人工干预的自动校准。
AI.motivation: 现有足部力传感器校准方法依赖人工操作，难以满足小型人形机器人自主运行需求，需开发自动化校准方案。
AI.method: 分两步实现：1. 控制机器人沿预设全身轨迹移动至不同双支撑姿态；2. 通过优化算法最小化实测与理论计算的质心压力（CoP）和地面反作用力（GRF）误差，确定传感器参数。并引入高精度手动校准法作为验证基准。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法可准确估计CoP和GRF，无需人工干预，在NAO人形机器人平台上验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 首次提出适用于小型人形机器人的自主校准方法，结合手动校准验证，为足部力传感器自动化标定提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Tomoki Ando,Hiroto Iino,Hiroki Mori,Ryota Torishima,Kuniyuki Takahashi,Shoichiro Yamaguchi,Daisuke Okanohara,Tetsuya Ogata
title: Learning-based Collision-free Planning on Arbitrary Optimization Criteria in the Latent Space through cGANs
title_zh: 通过 cGAN 在潜在空间中进行基于学习的任意优化标准的无碰撞规划
comment: 19 pages, 7 figures. An accompanying video is available at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IJUxdmaSwy0. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2202.07203
comments: 19 pages, 7 figures. An accompanying video is available at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IJUxdmaSwy0. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2202.07203
abstract: We propose a new method for collision-free planning using Conditional Generative Adversarial Networks (cGANs) to transform between the robot's joint space and a latent space that captures only collision-free areas of the joint space, conditioned by an obstacle map. Generating multiple plausible trajectories is convenient in applications such as the manipulation of a robot arm by enabling the selection of trajectories that avoids collision with the robot or surrounding environment. In the proposed method, various trajectories that avoid obstacles can be generated by connecting the start and goal state with arbitrary line segments in this generated latent space. Our method provides this collision-free latent space, after which any planner, using any optimization conditions, can be used to generate the most suitable paths on the fly. We successfully verified this method with a simulated and actual UR5e 6-DoF robotic arm. We confirmed that different trajectories could be generated depending on optimization conditions.
summary: We propose a new method for collision-free planning using Conditional Generative Adversarial Networks (cGANs) to transform between the robot's joint space and a latent space that captures only collision-free areas of the joint space, conditioned by an obstacle map. Generating multiple plausible trajectories is convenient in applications such as the manipulation of a robot arm by enabling the selection of trajectories that avoids collision with the robot or surrounding environment. In the proposed method, various trajectories that avoid obstacles can be generated by connecting the start and goal state with arbitrary line segments in this generated latent space. Our method provides this collision-free latent space, after which any planner, using any optimization conditions, can be used to generate the most suitable paths on the fly. We successfully verified this method with a simulated and actual UR5e 6-DoF robotic arm. We confirmed that different trajectories could be generated depending on optimization conditions.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的无碰撞规划方法，使用条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）在机器人的关节空间和潜在空间之间进行转换，该潜在空间仅捕获关节空间的无碰撞区域，并以障碍物图为条件。通过选择避免与机器人或周围环境发生碰撞的轨迹，生成多个合理的轨迹在机器人手臂的操纵等应用中非常方便。在所提出的方法中，可以通过将起始状态和目标状态与生成的潜在空间中的任意线段连接起来来生成避开障碍物的各种轨迹。我们的方法提供了这种无碰撞的潜在空间，之后任何规划器，使用任何优化条件，都可以用来动态生成最合适的路径。我们使用模拟和实际的 UR5e 6-DoF 机械臂成功验证了该方法。我们确认可以根据优化条件生成不同的轨迹。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于条件生成对抗网络（cGANs）的方法，在潜空间中生成避障轨迹，实现机器人关节空间与避障潜空间的转换。
AI.motivation: 传统路径规划方法在复杂环境中的避障能力有限，且难以满足多样化优化需求，需更灵活的轨迹生成方案。
AI.method: 利用cGANs构建关节空间与仅包含避障区域的潜空间映射，通过连接起点和目标点的潜空间线段生成多条可行轨迹，支持任意优化条件下的路径规划。
AI.result: 在模拟和实际UR5e机械臂实验中验证了方法有效性，不同优化条件下可生成多样化避障轨迹。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过构建避障潜空间，实现了灵活的实时路径规划，适用于多种优化需求的机器人运动控制场景。

title: Initialization of Latent Space Coordinates via Random Linear Projections for Learning Robotic Sensory-Motor Sequences
title_zh: 通过随机线性投影初始化潜在空间坐标以学习机器人感觉运动序列
abstract: Robot kinematics data, despite being a high dimensional process, is highly correlated, especially when considering motions grouped in certain primitives. These almost linear correlations within primitives allow us to interpret the motions as points drawn close to a union of low-dimensional linear subspaces in the space of all motions. Motivated by results of embedding theory, in particular, generalizations of Whitney embedding theorem, we show that random linear projection of motor sequences into low dimensional space loses very little information about structure of kinematics data. Projected points are very good initial guess for values of latent variables in generative model for robot sensory-motor behaviour primitives. We conducted series of experiments where we trained a recurrent neural network to generate sensory-motor sequences for robotic manipulator with 9 degrees of freedom. Experimental results demonstrate substantial improvement in generalisation abilities for unobserved samples in the case of initialization of latent variables with random linear projection of motor data over initialization with zero or random values. Moreover, latent space is well-structured wherein samples belonging to different primitives are well separated from the onset of training process.
summary: Robot kinematics data, despite being a high dimensional process, is highly correlated, especially when considering motions grouped in certain primitives. These almost linear correlations within primitives allow us to interpret the motions as points drawn close to a union of low-dimensional linear subspaces in the space of all motions. Motivated by results of embedding theory, in particular, generalizations of Whitney embedding theorem, we show that random linear projection of motor sequences into low dimensional space loses very little information about structure of kinematics data. Projected points are very good initial guess for values of latent variables in generative model for robot sensory-motor behaviour primitives. We conducted series of experiments where we trained a recurrent neural network to generate sensory-motor sequences for robotic manipulator with 9 degrees of freedom. Experimental results demonstrate substantial improvement in generalisation abilities for unobserved samples in the case of initialization of latent variables with random linear projection of motor data over initialization with zero or random values. Moreover, latent space is well-structured wherein samples belonging to different primitives are well separated from the onset of training process.
abstract_zh: 机器人运动学数据尽管是高维过程，但具有高度相关性，特别是在考虑按某些基元分组的运动时。基元内的这些几乎线性的相关性使我们能够将运动解释为接近所有运动空间中低维线性子空间的并集的点。受嵌入理论结果的启发，特别是惠特尼嵌入定理的推广，我们表明，将运动序列随机线性投影到低维空间中，丢失的关于运动学数据结构的信息非常少。投影点是对机器人感觉运动行为基元生成模型中潜在变量值的非常好的初始猜测。我们进行了一系列实验，训练循环神经网络为 9 自由度的机器人操纵器生成感觉运动序列。实验结果表明，在使用运动数据的随机线性投影初始化潜在变量的情况下，与使用零或随机值初始化相比，未观察到的样本的泛化能力有了显着提高。此外，潜在空间结构良好，其中属于不同基元的样本与训练过程的开始很好地分开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过随机线性投影初始化潜在空间坐标，以提升机器人感觉运动序列学习的性能。
AI.motivation: 机器人运动学数据虽高维但存在强相关性，可视为低维线性子空间的联合。基于嵌入理论，随机投影能保留运动结构信息，为生成模型提供更好的潜在变量初始化。
AI.method: 将运动序列通过随机线性投影到低维空间，作为递归神经网络生成机器人感觉运动序列的潜在变量初始值。
AI.result: 实验表明，与零初始化或随机初始化相比，该方法显著提升了模型对未见样本的泛化能力，且潜在空间结构清晰，不同运动原语样本初始即分离。
AI.conclusion: 随机线性投影能有效初始化潜在变量，促进生成模型学习结构化潜在空间，提升机器人运动序列生成性能。

title: Deep Depth from Focal Stack with Defocus Model for Camera-Setting Invariance
title_zh: 具有相机设置不变性的散焦模型的焦距堆栈深度
abstract: We propose a learning-based depth from focus/defocus (DFF), which takes a focal stack as input for estimating scene depth. Defocus blur is a useful cue for depth estimation. However, the size of the blur depends on not only scene depth but also camera settings such as focus distance, focal length, and f-number. Current learning-based methods without any defocus models cannot estimate a correct depth map if camera settings are different at training and test times. Our method takes a plane sweep volume as input for the constraint between scene depth, defocus images, and camera settings, and this intermediate representation enables depth estimation with different camera settings at training and test times. This camera-setting invariance can enhance the applicability of learning-based DFF methods. The experimental results also indicate that our method is robust against a synthetic-to-real domain gap, and exhibits state-of-the-art performance.
summary: We propose a learning-based depth from focus/defocus (DFF), which takes a focal stack as input for estimating scene depth. Defocus blur is a useful cue for depth estimation. However, the size of the blur depends on not only scene depth but also camera settings such as focus distance, focal length, and f-number. Current learning-based methods without any defocus models cannot estimate a correct depth map if camera settings are different at training and test times. Our method takes a plane sweep volume as input for the constraint between scene depth, defocus images, and camera settings, and this intermediate representation enables depth estimation with different camera settings at training and test times. This camera-setting invariance can enhance the applicability of learning-based DFF methods. The experimental results also indicate that our method is robust against a synthetic-to-real domain gap, and exhibits state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于学习的聚焦/散焦深度（DFF），它将焦点堆栈作为估计场景深度的输入。散焦模糊对于深度估计来说是一个有用的线索。然而，模糊的大小不仅取决于场景深度，还取决于焦距、焦距和光圈值等相机设置。如果训练和测试时相机设置不同，当前没有任何散焦模型的基于学习的方法无法估计正确的深度图。我们的方法采用平面扫描体积作为场景深度、散焦图像和相机设置之间的约束的输入，并且这种中间表示可以在训练和测试时使用不同的相机设置进行深度估计。这种相机设置不变性可以增强基于学习的 DFF 方法的适用性。实验结果还表明，我们的方法对于合成与真实域差距具有鲁棒性，并且表现出最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于焦平面堆栈和失焦模型的深度估计方法，旨在实现不同相机设置下的深度估计不变性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的深度估计方法在训练与测试相机设置不一致时无法准确估计深度，需通过引入失焦模型解决相机设置变化带来的误差问题。
AI.method: 采用平面扫描体作为输入，结合场景深度、失焦图像与相机参数的约束关系，构建中间表示以实现跨相机设置的深度估计。
AI.result: 实验表明方法对合成到真实场景的领域差异具有鲁棒性，在深度估计任务中达到最先进性能水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合失焦模型与平面扫描体表示，本文方法有效解决了相机设置变化导致的深度估计问题，提升了方法的适用性与准确性。

title: Optical flow-based branch segmentation for complex orchard environments
title_zh: 基于光流的复杂果园环境分支分割
abstract: Machine vision is a critical subsystem for enabling robots to be able to perform a variety of tasks in orchard environments. However, orchards are highly visually complex environments, and computer vision algorithms operating in them must be able to contend with variable lighting conditions and background noise. Past work on enabling deep learning algorithms to operate in these environments has typically required large amounts of hand-labeled data to train a deep neural network or physically controlling the conditions under which the environment is perceived. In this paper, we train a neural network system in simulation only using simulated RGB data and optical flow. This resulting neural network is able to perform foreground segmentation of branches in a busy orchard environment without additional real-world training or using any special setup or equipment beyond a standard camera. Our results show that our system is highly accurate and, when compared to a network using manually labeled RGBD data, achieves significantly more consistent and robust performance across environments that differ from the training set.
summary: Machine vision is a critical subsystem for enabling robots to be able to perform a variety of tasks in orchard environments. However, orchards are highly visually complex environments, and computer vision algorithms operating in them must be able to contend with variable lighting conditions and background noise. Past work on enabling deep learning algorithms to operate in these environments has typically required large amounts of hand-labeled data to train a deep neural network or physically controlling the conditions under which the environment is perceived. In this paper, we train a neural network system in simulation only using simulated RGB data and optical flow. This resulting neural network is able to perform foreground segmentation of branches in a busy orchard environment without additional real-world training or using any special setup or equipment beyond a standard camera. Our results show that our system is highly accurate and, when compared to a network using manually labeled RGBD data, achieves significantly more consistent and robust performance across environments that differ from the training set.
abstract_zh: 机器视觉是使机器人能够在果园环境中执行各种任务的关键子系统。然而，果园是视觉上高度复杂的环境，在其中运行的计算机视觉算法必须能够应对可变的照明条件和背景噪音。过去使深度学习算法能够在这些环境中运行的工作通常需要大量手工标记的数据来训练深度神经网络或物理控制感知环境的条件。在本文中，我们仅使用模拟 RGB 数据和光流来模拟训练神经网络系统。由此产生的神经网络能够在繁忙的果园环境中执行树枝的前景分割，而无需额外的现实世界训练或使用标准相机之外的任何特殊设置或设备。我们的结果表明，我们的系统非常准确，与使用手动标记 RGBD 数据的网络相比，我们的系统在不同于训练集的环境中实现了更加一致和稳健的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出基于光流的神经网络方法，在复杂果园环境中实现枝条分割，无需真实世界训练数据。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖大量标注数据或控制环境条件，而本文旨在开发无需真实世界训练数据的高效分割方法。
AI.method: 仅使用模拟RGB数据和光流在仿真环境中训练神经网络，无需额外真实数据或特殊设备。
AI.result: 系统在复杂环境下分割准确率高，且比使用手工标注RGBD数据的网络更具环境适应性和稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 证明仅通过仿真数据训练的模型可有效应用于真实复杂果园环境，为机器人视觉提供新思路。

motivation: 传统方法依赖大量标注数据或控制环境条件，而本文旨在开发无需真实世界训练数据的高效分割方法。
method: 仅使用模拟RGB数据和光流在仿真环境中训练神经网络，无需额外真实数据或特殊设备。
result: 系统在复杂环境下分割准确率高，且比使用手工标注RGBD数据的网络更具环境适应性和稳定性。
conclusion: 证明仅通过仿真数据训练的模型可有效应用于真实复杂果园环境，为机器人视觉提供新思路。
search_text: Optical flow-based branch segmentation for complex orchard environments 基于光流的复杂果园环境分支分割 Machine vision is a critical subsystem for enabling robots to be able to perform a variety of tasks in orchard environments. However, orchards are highly visually complex environments, and computer vision algorithms operating in them must be able to contend with variable lighting conditions and background noise. Past work on enabling deep learning algorithms to operate in these environments has typically required large amounts of hand-labeled data to train a deep neural network or physically controlling the conditions under which the environment is perceived. In this paper, we train a neural network system in simulation only using simulated RGB data and optical flow. This resulting neural network is able to perform foreground segmentation of branches in a busy orchard environment without additional real-world training or using any special setup or equipment beyond a standard camera. Our results show that our system is highly accurate and, when compared to a network using manually labeled RGBD data, achieves significantly more consistent and robust performance across environments that differ from the training set. 机器视觉是使机器人能够在果园环境中执行各种任务的关键子系统。然而，果园是视觉上高度复杂的环境，在其中运行的计算机视觉算法必须能够应对可变的照明条件和背景噪音。过去使深度学习算法能够在这些环境中运行的工作通常需要大量手工标记的数据来训练深度神经网络或物理控制感知环境的条件。在本文中，我们仅使用模拟 RGB 数据和光流来模拟训练神经网络系统。由此产生的神经网络能够在繁忙的果园环境中执行树枝的前景分割，而无需额外的现实世界训练或使用标准相机之外的任何特殊设置或设备。我们的结果表明，我们的系统非常准确，与使用手动标记 RGBD 数据的网络相比，我们的系统在不同于训练集的环境中实现了更加一致和稳健的性能。 提出基于光流的神经网络方法，在复杂果园环境中实现枝条分割，无需真实世界训练数据。 Alexander You,Cindy Grimm,Joseph R. Davidson cs.CV

authors_text: Gangshan Jing,He Bai,Jemin George,Aranya Chakrabortty,Piyush K. Sharma
title: Distributed Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning Based on Graph-Induced Local Value Functions
title_zh: 基于图诱导局部值函数的分布式多智能体强化学习
comment: This paper has been accepted by IEEE Transactions on Automatic Control as a full paper and published online. Different from the published paper, the arxiv version contains more results. Moreover, we will continuously update the arxiv version if we find any typos in the published paper. So we suggest you to read this arxiv paper instead of the published one. Thank you for your interest in our work
comments: This paper has been accepted by IEEE Transactions on Automatic Control as a full paper and published online. Different from the published paper, the arxiv version contains more results. Moreover, we will continuously update the arxiv version if we find any typos in the published paper. So we suggest you to read this arxiv paper instead of the published one. abstract: Achieving distributed reinforcement learning (RL) for large-scale cooperative multi-agent systems (MASs) is challenging because: (i) each agent has access to only limited information; (ii) issues on convergence or computational complexity emerge due to the curse of dimensionality. In this paper, we propose a general computationally efficient distributed framework for cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) by utilizing the structures of graphs involved in this problem. We introduce three coupling graphs describing three types of inter-agent couplings in MARL, namely, the state graph, the observation graph and the reward graph. By further considering a communication graph, we propose two distributed RL approaches based on local value-functions derived from the coupling graphs. The first approach is able to reduce sample complexity significantly under specific conditions on the aforementioned four graphs. The second approach provides an approximate solution and can be efficient even for problems with dense coupling graphs. Here there is a trade-off between minimizing the approximation error and reducing the computational complexity. Simulations show that our RL algorithms have a significantly improved scalability to large-scale MASs compared with centralized and consensus-based distributed RL algorithms.
summary: Achieving distributed reinforcement learning (RL) for large-scale cooperative multi-agent systems (MASs) is challenging because: (i) each agent has access to only limited information; (ii) issues on convergence or computational complexity emerge due to the curse of dimensionality. In this paper, we propose a general computationally efficient distributed framework for cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) by utilizing the structures of graphs involved in this problem. We introduce three coupling graphs describing three types of inter-agent couplings in MARL, namely, the state graph, the observation graph and the reward graph. By further considering a communication graph, we propose two distributed RL approaches based on local value-functions derived from the coupling graphs. The first approach is able to reduce sample complexity significantly under specific conditions on the aforementioned four graphs. The second approach provides an approximate solution and can be efficient even for problems with dense coupling graphs. Here there is a trade-off between minimizing the approximation error and reducing the computational complexity. Simulations show that our RL algorithms have a significantly improved scalability to large-scale MASs compared with centralized and consensus-based distributed RL algorithms.
abstract_zh: 为大规模协作多智能体系统（MAS）实现分布式强化学习（RL）具有挑战性，因为：（i）每个智能体只能访问有限的信息； (ii) 由于维数灾难而出现收敛或计算复杂性的问题。在本文中，我们利用该问题中涉及的图结构，提出了一种用于协作多智能体强化学习（MARL）的通用计算高效分布式框架。我们引入了三个耦合图来描述 MARL 中三种类型的主体间耦合，即状态图、观察图和奖励图。通过进一步考虑通信图，我们提出了两种基于从耦合图导出的局部值函数的分布式强化学习方法。第一种方法能够在上述四张图的特定条件下显着降低样本复杂性。第二种方法提供了近似解决方案，即使对于具有密集耦合图的问题也很有效。这里需要在最小化近似误差和降低计算复杂度之间进行权衡。模拟表明，与集中式和基于共识的分布式强化学习算法相比，我们的强化学习算法对大规模 MAS 的可扩展性显着提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图结构的分布式多智能体强化学习框架，通过局部价值函数解决大规模协作系统的挑战。
AI.motivation: 大规模协作多智能体系统面临信息受限和维度灾难导致的收敛困难，现有方法在计算效率和可扩展性上存在不足。
AI.method: 引入状态图、观测图、奖励图及通信图，设计两种基于局部价值函数的分布式RL算法，分别优化样本复杂度和密集耦合场景效率。
AI.result: 仿真表明算法在大型MAS中的可扩展性显著优于集中式和共识型分布式方法，有效平衡了近似误差与计算复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 图诱导框架为分布式MARL提供了高效解决方案，在保持计算可行性的同时提升了大规模系统的协作性能。

title: Generalized Label Shift Correction via Minimum Uncertainty Principle: Theory and Algorithm
title_zh: 通过最小不确定性原理进行广义标签偏移校正：理论与算法
abstract: As a fundamental problem in machine learning, dataset shift induces a paradigm to learn and transfer knowledge under changing environment. Previous methods assume the changes are induced by covariate, which is less practical for complex real-world data. We consider the Generalized Label Shift (GLS), which provides an interpretable insight into the learning and transfer of desirable knowledge. Current GLS methods: 1) are not well-connected with the statistical learning theory; 2) usually assume the shifting conditional distributions will be matched with an implicit transformation, but its explicit modeling is unexplored. In this paper, we propose a conditional adaptation framework to deal with these challenges. From the perspective of learning theory, we prove that the generalization error of conditional adaptation is lower than previous covariate adaptation. Following the theoretical results, we propose the minimum uncertainty principle to learn conditional invariant transformation via discrepancy optimization. Specifically, we propose the \textit{conditional metric operator} on Hilbert space to characterize the distinctness of conditional distributions. For finite observations, we prove that the empirical estimation is always well-defined and will converge to underlying truth as sample size increases. The results of extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed model achieves competitive performance under different GLS scenarios.
summary: As a fundamental problem in machine learning, dataset shift induces a paradigm to learn and transfer knowledge under changing environment. Previous methods assume the changes are induced by covariate, which is less practical for complex real-world data. We consider the Generalized Label Shift (GLS), which provides an interpretable insight into the learning and transfer of desirable knowledge. Current GLS methods: 1) are not well-connected with the statistical learning theory; 2) usually assume the shifting conditional distributions will be matched with an implicit transformation, but its explicit modeling is unexplored. In this paper, we propose a conditional adaptation framework to deal with these challenges. From the perspective of learning theory, we prove that the generalization error of conditional adaptation is lower than previous covariate adaptation. Following the theoretical results, we propose the minimum uncertainty principle to learn conditional invariant transformation via discrepancy optimization. Specifically, we propose the \textit{conditional metric operator} on Hilbert space to characterize the distinctness of conditional distributions. For finite observations, we prove that the empirical estimation is always well-defined and will converge to underlying truth as sample size increases. The results of extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed model achieves competitive performance under different GLS scenarios.
abstract_zh: 作为机器学习中的一个基本问题，数据集转移引发了在不断变化的环境下学习和转移知识的范式。以前的方法假设变化是由协变量引起的，这对于复杂的现实世界数据不太实用。我们考虑广义标签转移（GLS），它为所需知识的学习和迁移提供了可解释的见解。目前的GLS方法：1）与统计学习理论没有很好的联系； 2）通常假设移动条件分布将与隐式变换相匹配，但其显式建模尚未探索。在本文中，我们提出了一个条件适应框架来应对这些挑战。从学习理论的角度来看，我们证明条件适应的泛化误差低于之前的协变量适应。根据理论结果，我们提出了最小不确定性原理，通过差异优化来学习条件不变变换。具体来说，我们提出希尔伯特空间上的 \textit{条件度量算子} 来表征条件分布的独特性。对于有限的观察，我们证明经验估计总是明确定义的，并且随着样本量的增加将收敛到潜在的事实。大量实验的结果表明，所提出的模型在不同的 GLS 场景下实现了有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于最小不确定性原理的条件自适应框架，用于解决广义标签偏移（GLS）问题，并通过理论分析和算法设计改进了现有方法的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有GLS方法缺乏与统计学习理论的紧密联系，且未对条件分布偏移进行显式建模，导致实际应用中效果受限。传统协变量偏移方法也难以处理复杂现实数据的环境变化。
AI.method: 提出条件自适应框架，结合最小不确定性原理通过差异优化学习条件不变变换；引入希尔伯特空间上的条件度量算子刻画条件分布差异，并证明有限样本下的经验估计一致性。
AI.result: 在多种GLS场景下实验表明，所提模型性能优于现有方法，验证了理论分析的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过理论与算法设计，为GLS问题提供了更严谨的理论支撑和更有效的解决方案，推动了领域自适应研究的进展。

The results of extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed model achieves competitive performance under different GLS scenarios. 作为机器学习中的一个基本问题，数据集转移引发了在不断变化的环境下学习和转移知识的范式。以前的方法假设变化是由协变量引起的，这对于复杂的现实世界数据不太实用。我们考虑广义标签转移（GLS），它为所需知识的学习和迁移提供了可解释的见解。目前的GLS方法：1）与统计学习理论没有很好的联系； 2）通常假设移动条件分布将与隐式变换相匹配，但其显式建模尚未探索。在本文中，我们提出了一个条件适应框架来应对这些挑战。从学习理论的角度来看，我们证明条件适应的泛化误差低于之前的协变量适应。根据理论结果，我们提出了最小不确定性原理，通过差异优化来学习条件不变变换。具体来说，我们提出希尔伯特空间上的 \textit{条件度量算子} 来表征条件分布的独特性。对于有限的观察，我们证明经验估计总是明确定义的，并且随着样本量的增加将收敛到潜在的事实。大量实验的结果表明，所提出的模型在不同的 GLS 场景下实现了有竞争力的性能。 本文提出了一种基于最小不确定性原理的条件自适应框架，用于解决广义标签偏移（GLS）问题，并通过理论分析和算法设计改进了现有方法的不足。 You-Wei Luo,Chuan-Xian Ren cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Wensheng Gan,Guoting Chen,Hongzhi Yin,Philippe Fournier-Viger,Chien-Ming Chen,Philip S. Yu
title: Towards Revenue Maximization with Popular and Profitable Products
title_zh: 通过受欢迎且有利可图的产品实现收入最大化
comment: ACM/IMS Transactions on Data Science. 4 figures, 5 tables
comments: ACM/IMS Transactions on Data Science. 4 figures, 5 tables
abstract: Economic-wise, a common goal for companies conducting marketing is to maximize the return revenue/profit by utilizing the various effective marketing strategies. Consumer behavior is crucially important in economy and targeted marketing, in which behavioral economics can provide valuable insights to identify the biases and profit from customers. Finding credible and reliable information on products' profitability is, however, quite difficult since most products tends to peak at certain times w.r.t. seasonal sales cycle in a year. On-Shelf Availability (OSA) plays a key factor for performance evaluation. Besides, staying ahead of hot product trends means we can increase marketing efforts without selling out the inventory. To fulfill this gap, in this paper, we first propose a general profit-oriented framework to address the problem of revenue maximization based on economic behavior, and compute the 0n-shelf Popular and most Profitable Products (OPPPs) for the targeted marketing. To tackle the revenue maximization problem, we model the k-satisfiable product concept and propose an algorithmic framework for searching OPPP and its variants. Extensive experiments are conducted on several real-world datasets to evaluate the effectiveness and efficiency of the proposed algorithm.
summary: Economic-wise, a common goal for companies conducting marketing is to maximize the return revenue/profit by utilizing the various effective marketing strategies. Consumer behavior is crucially important in economy and targeted marketing, in which behavioral economics can provide valuable insights to identify the biases and profit from customers. On-Shelf Availability (OSA) plays a key factor for performance evaluation. Besides, staying ahead of hot product trends means we can increase marketing efforts without selling out the inventory. To fulfill this gap, in this paper, we first propose a general profit-oriented framework to address the problem of revenue maximization based on economic behavior, and compute the 0n-shelf Popular and most Profitable Products (OPPPs) for the targeted marketing. To tackle the revenue maximization problem, we model the k-satisfiable product concept and propose an algorithmic framework for searching OPPP and its variants. Extensive experiments are conducted on several real-world datasets to evaluate the effectiveness and efficiency of the proposed algorithm.
abstract_zh: 从经济角度来看，企业进行营销的共同目标是通过利用各种有效的营销策略来最大化回报收入/利润。消费者行为在经济和定向营销中至关重要，行为经济学可以提供有价值的见解来识别客户的偏见和利润。然而，找到有关产品盈利能力的可信且可靠的信息相当困难，因为大多数产品往往在特定时间达到峰值。一年中的季节性销售周期。货架可用性 (OSA) 是性能评估的关键因素。此外，保持领先的产品趋势意味着我们可以在不售空库存的情况下加大营销力度。为了弥补这一差距，在本文中，我们首先提出了一个通用的以利润为导向的框架来解决基于经济行为的收入最大化问题，并计算有针对性的营销的0n架热门和最有利可图的产品（OPPP）。为了解决收入最大化问题，我们对 k-可满足产品概念进行了建模，并提出了一个用于搜索 OPPP 及其变体的算法框架。在几个现实世界的数据集上进行了大量的实验，以评估所提出算法的有效性和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于经济行为的利润导向框架，用于识别货架上流行且盈利的产品（OPPPs），以实现收入最大化。
AI.motivation: 现有产品盈利信息难以可靠获取，因产品销量受季节性影响显著，需通过预测热门趋势优化库存与营销策略。
AI.method: 提出k-satisfiable产品概念，构建算法框架搜索OPPP及其变体，并基于真实数据集验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在多个实际数据集上能有效提升收入，算法效率与准确性优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 本研究填补了动态市场环境下盈利产品识别的研究空白，为针对性营销提供了理论与技术支撑。

title: Iterative Genetic Improvement: Scaling Stochastic Program Synthesis
title_zh: 迭代遗传改进：缩放随机程序合成
abstract: Program synthesis aims to {\it automatically} find programs from an underlying programming language that satisfy a given specification. While this has the potential to revolutionize computing, how to search over the vast space of programs efficiently is an unsolved challenge in program synthesis. In cases where large programs are required for a solution, it is generally believed that {\it stochastic} search has advantages over other classes of search techniques. Unfortunately, existing stochastic program synthesizers do not meet this expectation very well, suffering from the scalability issue. Here we propose a new framework for stochastic program synthesis, called iterative genetic improvement to overcome this problem, a technique inspired by the practice of the software development process. The key idea of iterative genetic improvement is to apply genetic improvement to improve a current reference program, and then iteratively replace the reference program by the best program found. Compared to traditional stochastic synthesis approaches, iterative genetic improvement can build up the complexity of programs incrementally in a more robust way. We evaluate the approach on two program synthesis domains: list manipulation and string transformation. Our empirical results indicate that this method has considerable advantages over several representative stochastic program synthesizer techniques, both in terms of scalability and of solution quality.
summary: Program synthesis aims to {\it automatically} find programs from an underlying programming language that satisfy a given specification. While this has the potential to revolutionize computing, how to search over the vast space of programs efficiently is an unsolved challenge in program synthesis. In cases where large programs are required for a solution, it is generally believed that {\it stochastic} search has advantages over other classes of search techniques. Unfortunately, existing stochastic program synthesizers do not meet this expectation very well, suffering from the scalability issue. Here we propose a new framework for stochastic program synthesis, called iterative genetic improvement to overcome this problem, a technique inspired by the practice of the software development process. The key idea of iterative genetic improvement is to apply genetic improvement to improve a current reference program, and then iteratively replace the reference program by the best program found. Compared to traditional stochastic synthesis approaches, iterative genetic improvement can build up the complexity of programs incrementally in a more robust way. We evaluate the approach on two program synthesis domains: list manipulation and string transformation. Our empirical results indicate that this method has considerable advantages over several representative stochastic program synthesizer techniques, both in terms of scalability and of solution quality.
abstract_zh: 程序综合的目的是{\自动}从底层编程语言中查找满足给定规范的程序。虽然这有可能彻底改变计算，但如何有效地搜索广阔的程序空间是程序综合中尚未解决的挑战。在解决方案需要大型程序的情况下，通常认为随机搜索比其他类别的搜索技术具有优势。不幸的是，现有的随机程序合成器并不能很好地满足这一期望，受到可扩展性问题的困扰。在这里，我们提出了一种新的随机程序合成框架，称为迭代遗传改进来克服这个问题，这是一种受到软件开发过程实践启发的技术。迭代遗传改进的关键思想是应用遗传改进来改进当前的参考程序，然后迭代地用找到的最佳程序替换参考程序。与传统的随机综合方法相比，迭代遗传改进可以以更稳健的方式逐步增加程序的复杂性。我们在两个程序综合领域评估该方法：列表操作和字符串转换。我们的实证结果表明，该方法在可扩展性和解决方案质量方面比几种代表性的随机程序合成器技术具有相当大的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为迭代基因改进的新框架，用于解决随机程序合成中的可扩展性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有随机程序合成方法在处理大规模程序时面临可扩展性挑战，难以高效搜索庞大的程序空间。
AI.method: 通过受软件开发流程启发的迭代基因改进技术，逐步优化参考程序并增量构建复杂度。
AI.result: 在列表操作和字符串转换领域实验表明，该方法在可扩展性和解的质量上优于现有随机程序合成技术。
AI.conclusion: 迭代基因改进框架有效解决了随机程序合成的可扩展性问题，提供了更优的解决方案。
