authors_text: Negar Rostamzadeh,Diana Mincu,Subhrajit Roy,Andrew Smart,Lauren Wilcox,Mahima Pushkarna,Jessica Schrouff,Razvan Amironesei,Nyalleng Moorosi,Katherine Heller
title: Healthsheet: Development of a Transparency Artifact for Health Datasets
title_zh: Healthsheet：开发健康数据集的透明度工件
abstract: Machine learning (ML) approaches have demonstrated promising results in a wide range of healthcare applications. Data plays a crucial role in developing ML-based healthcare systems that directly affect people's lives. Many of the ethical issues surrounding the use of ML in healthcare stem from structural inequalities underlying the way we collect, use, and handle data. Developing guidelines to improve documentation practices regarding the creation, use, and maintenance of ML healthcare datasets is therefore of critical importance. In this work, we introduce Healthsheet, a contextualized adaptation of the original datasheet questionnaire ~\cite{gebru2018datasheets} for health-specific applications. Through a series of semi-structured interviews, we adapt the datasheets for healthcare data documentation. As part of the Healthsheet development process and to understand the obstacles researchers face in creating datasheets, we worked with three publicly-available healthcare datasets as our case studies, each with different types of structured data: Electronic health Records (EHR), clinical trial study data, and smartphone-based performance outcome measures. Our findings from the interviewee study and case studies show 1) that datasheets should be contextualized for healthcare, 2) that despite incentives to adopt accountability practices such as datasheets, there is a lack of consistency in the broader use of these practices 3) how the ML for health community views datasheets and particularly \textit{Healthsheets} as diagnostic tool to surface the limitations and strength of datasets and 4) the relative importance of different fields in the datasheet to healthcare concerns.

As part of the Healthsheet development process and to understand the obstacles researchers face in creating datasheets, we worked with three publicly-available healthcare datasets as our case studies, each with different types of structured data: Electronic health Records (EHR), clinical trial study data, and smartphone-based performance outcome measures. Our findings from the interviewee study and case studies show 1) that datasheets should be contextualized for healthcare, 2) that despite incentives to adopt accountability practices such as datasheets, there is a lack of consistency in the broader use of these practices 3) how the ML for health community views datasheets and particularly \textit{Healthsheets} as diagnostic tool to surface the limitations and strength of datasets and 4) the relative importance of different fields in the datasheet to healthcare concerns.
abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 方法已在广泛的医疗保健应用中展现出有希望的结果。数据在开发直接影响人们生活的基于机器学习的医疗保健系统中发挥着至关重要的作用。围绕在医疗保健中使用机器学习的许多道德问题源于我们收集、使用和处理数据方式背后的结构性不平等。因此，制定指南来改进有关 ML 医疗数据集的创建、使用和维护的文档实践至关重要。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 Healthsheet，它是原始数据表调查问卷的上下文改编版 ~\cite{gebru2018datasheets}，用于特定于健康的应用。通过一系列半结构化访谈，我们将数据表改编为医疗保健数据文档。作为健康表开发过程的一部分，为了了解研究人员在创建数据表时面临的障碍，我们使用了三个公开的医疗数据集作为案例研究，每个数据集都有不同类型的结构化数据：电子健康记录 (EHR)、临床试验研究数据和基于智能手机的绩效结果衡量标准。我们从受访者研究和案例研究中得出的结果表明：1) 数据表应该与医疗保健相关联，2) 尽管有采用数据表等问责实践的激励措施，但这些实践的更广泛使用缺乏一致性，3) 健康界的机器学习如何看待数据表，特别是 \textit{Healthsheets} 作为诊断工具来揭示数据集的局限性和强度，4) 数据表中不同字段对医疗保健问题的相对重要性。

AI.tldr: 开发Healthsheet工具以提高医疗数据集的透明度和文档规范
AI.motivation: 解决医疗数据使用中的伦理问题，通过改进文档实践提升透明度和一致性
AI.method: 通过半结构化访谈和三个医疗数据集的案例研究，调整原有Datasheet以适应医疗领域
AI.result: 发现Healthsheet需医疗定制，实践中存在不一致，其被视为诊断数据优劣的工具，且不同字段重要性不同
AI.conclusion: Healthsheet有助于提升医疗数据透明度，需推动标准化文档实践以解决伦理问题

search_text: Healthsheet: Development of a Transparency Artifact for Health Datasets Healthsheet：开发健康数据集的透明度工件 Machine learning (ML) approaches have demonstrated promising results in a wide range of healthcare applications. Data plays a crucial role in developing ML-based healthcare systems that directly affect people's lives. Many of the ethical issues surrounding the use of ML in healthcare stem from structural inequalities underlying the way we collect, use, and handle data. Developing guidelines to improve documentation practices regarding the creation, use, and maintenance of ML healthcare datasets is therefore of critical importance. In this work, we introduce Healthsheet, a contextualized adaptation of the original datasheet questionnaire ~\cite{gebru2018datasheets} for health-specific applications. Through a series of semi-structured interviews, we adapt the datasheets for healthcare data documentation. As part of the Healthsheet development process and to understand the obstacles researchers face in creating datasheets, we worked with three publicly-available healthcare datasets as our case studies, each with different types of structured data: Electronic health Records (EHR), clinical trial study data, and smartphone-based performance outcome measures. Our findings from the interviewee study and case studies show 1) that datasheets should be contextualized for healthcare, 2) that despite incentives to adopt accountability practices such as datasheets, there is a lack of consistency in the broader use of these practices 3) how the ML for health community views datasheets and particularly \textit{Healthsheets} as diagnostic tool to surface the limitations and strength of datasets and 4) the relative importance of different fields in the datasheet to healthcare concerns. 机器学习 (ML) 方法已在广泛的医疗保健应用中展现出有希望的结果。数据在开发直接影响人们生活的基于机器学习的医疗保健系统中发挥着至关重要的作用。围绕在医疗保健中使用机器学习的许多道德问题源于我们收集、使用和处理数据方式背后的结构性不平等。因此，制定指南来改进有关 ML 医疗数据集的创建、使用和维护的文档实践至关重要。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 Healthsheet，它是原始数据表调查问卷的上下文改编版 ~\cite{gebru2018datasheets}，用于特定于健康的应用。通过一系列半结构化访谈，我们将数据表改编为医疗保健数据文档。作为健康表开发过程的一部分，为了了解研究人员在创建数据表时面临的障碍，我们使用了三个公开的医疗数据集作为案例研究，每个数据集都有不同类型的结构化数据：电子健康记录 (EHR)、临床试验研究数据和基于智能手机的绩效结果衡量标准。我们从受访者研究和案例研究中得出的结果表明：1) 数据表应该与医疗保健相关联，2) 尽管有采用数据表等问责实践的激励措施，但这些实践的更广泛使用缺乏一致性，3) 健康界的机器学习如何看待数据表，特别是 \textit{Healthsheets} 作为诊断工具来揭示数据集的局限性和强度，4) 数据表中不同字段对医疗保健问题的相对重要性。 开发Healthsheet工具以提高医疗数据集的透明度和文档规范 Negar Rostamzadeh,Diana Mincu,Subhrajit Roy,Andrew Smart,Lauren Wilcox,Mahima Pushkarna,Jessica Schrouff,Razvan Amironesei,Nyalleng Moorosi,Katherine Heller cs.AI,cs.HC

title: ASSIST: Towards Label Noise-Robust Dialogue State Tracking
title_zh: ASSIST：迈向标签噪声稳健的对话状态跟踪
abstract: The MultiWOZ 2.0 dataset has greatly boosted the research on dialogue state tracking (DST). However, substantial noise has been discovered in its state annotations. Such noise brings about huge challenges for training DST models robustly. Although several refined versions, including MultiWOZ 2.1-2.4, have been published recently, there are still lots of noisy labels, especially in the training set. Besides, it is costly to rectify all the problematic annotations. In this paper, instead of improving the annotation quality further, we propose a general framework, named ASSIST (lAbel noiSe-robuSt dIalogue State Tracking), to train DST models robustly from noisy labels. ASSIST first generates pseudo labels for each sample in the training set by using an auxiliary model trained on a small clean dataset, then puts the generated pseudo labels and vanilla noisy labels together to train the primary model. We show the validity of ASSIST theoretically. Experimental results also demonstrate that ASSIST improves the joint goal accuracy of DST by up to $28.16\%$ on MultiWOZ 2.0 and $8.41\%$ on MultiWOZ 2.4, compared to using only the vanilla noisy labels.
summary: The MultiWOZ 2.0 dataset has greatly boosted the research on dialogue state tracking (DST). However, substantial noise has been discovered in its state annotations. Such noise brings about huge challenges for training DST models robustly. Although several refined versions, including MultiWOZ 2.1-2.4, have been published recently, there are still lots of noisy labels, especially in the training set. Besides, it is costly to rectify all the problematic annotations. In this paper, instead of improving the annotation quality further, we propose a general framework, named ASSIST (lAbel noiSe-robuSt dIalogue State Tracking), to train DST models robustly from noisy labels. ASSIST first generates pseudo labels for each sample in the training set by using an auxiliary model trained on a small clean dataset, then puts the generated pseudo labels and vanilla noisy labels together to train the primary model. We show the validity of ASSIST theoretically. Experimental results also demonstrate that ASSIST improves the joint goal accuracy of DST by up to $28.16\%$ on MultiWOZ 2.0 and $8.41\%$ on MultiWOZ 2.4, compared to using only the vanilla noisy labels.
abstract_zh: MultiWOZ 2.0数据集极大地推动了对话状态跟踪（DST）的研究。然而，在其状态注释中发现了大量噪音。这种噪声给 DST 模型的稳健训练带来了巨大的挑战。尽管最近发布了包括 MultiWOZ 2.1-2.4 在内的多个改进版本，但仍然存在大量噪声标签，尤其是在训练集中。此外，纠正所有有问题的注释的成本很高。在本文中，我们没有进一步提高注释质量，而是提出了一个名为 ASSIST（lAbel 噪声鲁棒对话状态跟踪）的通用框架，用于从噪声标签中稳健地训练 DST 模型。 ASSIST 首先使用在小型干净数据集上训练的辅助模型为训练集中的每个样本生成伪标签，然后将生成的伪标签和普通噪声标签放在一起来训练主模型。我们从理论上证明了 ASSIST 的有效性。实验结果还表明，与仅使用普通噪声标签相比，ASSIST 在 MultiWOZ 2.0 上将 DST 的联合目标精度提高了高达 $28.16\%$，在 MultiWOZ 2.4 上提高了 $8.41\%$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ASSIST框架，通过处理带有标签噪声的对话状态跟踪（DST）数据集，提升DST模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对话状态跟踪数据集（如MultiWOZ）存在大量标签噪声，且修正成本高昂，现有方法难以有效应对噪声标签带来的训练挑战。
AI.method: ASSIST框架利用小规模干净数据训练辅助模型生成伪标签，并将伪标签与原始噪声标签结合训练主模型，通过理论分析和实验验证其有效性。
AI.result: 在MultiWOZ 2.0上联合目标准确率提升28.16%，在MultiWOZ 2.4上提升8.41%，显著优于仅使用噪声标签的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: ASSIST通过伪标签生成与融合策略，无需依赖高质量标注数据即可有效提升DST模型在噪声环境下的性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出ASSIST框架，通过处理带有标签噪声的对话状态跟踪（DST）数据集，提升DST模型的鲁棒性。

title: Building a visual semantics aware object hierarchy
title_zh: 构建视觉语义感知的对象层次结构
abstract: The semantic gap is defined as the difference between the linguistic representations of the same concept, which usually leads to misunderstanding between individuals with different knowledge backgrounds. Since linguistically annotated images are extensively used for training machine learning models, semantic gap problem (SGP) also results in inevitable bias on image annotations and further leads to poor performance on current computer vision tasks. To address this problem, we propose a novel unsupervised method to build visual semantics aware object hierarchy, aiming to get a classification model by learning from pure-visual information and to dissipate the bias of linguistic representations caused by SGP. Our intuition in this paper comes from real-world knowledge representation where concepts are hierarchically organized, and each concept can be described by a set of features rather than a linguistic annotation, namely visual semantic. The evaluation consists of two parts, firstly we apply the constructed hierarchy on the object recognition task and then we compare our visual hierarchy and existing lexical hierarchies to show the validity of our method. The preliminary results reveal the efficiency and potential of our proposed method.
summary: The semantic gap is defined as the difference between the linguistic representations of the same concept, which usually leads to misunderstanding between individuals with different knowledge backgrounds. Since linguistically annotated images are extensively used for training machine learning models, semantic gap problem (SGP) also results in inevitable bias on image annotations and further leads to poor performance on current computer vision tasks. To address this problem, we propose a novel unsupervised method to build visual semantics aware object hierarchy, aiming to get a classification model by learning from pure-visual information and to dissipate the bias of linguistic representations caused by SGP. Our intuition in this paper comes from real-world knowledge representation where concepts are hierarchically organized, and each concept can be described by a set of features rather than a linguistic annotation, namely visual semantic. The evaluation consists of two parts, firstly we apply the constructed hierarchy on the object recognition task and then we compare our visual hierarchy and existing lexical hierarchies to show the validity of our method. The preliminary results reveal the efficiency and potential of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 语义差距被定义为同一概念的语言表示之间的差异，这通常会导致具有不同知识背景的个体之间的误解。由于语言注释图像广泛用于训练机器学习模型，语义间隙问题（SGP）也导致图像注释不可避免的偏差，并进一步导致当前计算机视觉任务的性能不佳。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的无监督方法来构建视觉语义感知对象层次结构，旨在通过学习纯视觉信息来获得分类模型，并消除 SGP 引起的语言表示偏差。我们在本文中的直觉来自现实世界的知识表示，其中概念是分层组织的，每个概念都可以通过一组特征而不是语言注释来描述，即视觉语义。评估由两部分组成，首先我们将构建的层次结构应用于对象识别任务，然后比较我们的视觉层次结构和现有的词汇层次结构以显示我们方法的有效性。初步结果揭示了我们提出的方法的效率和潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督方法构建视觉语义感知的对象层次结构，以减少语言注释偏差并提升计算机视觉任务性能。
AI.motivation: 语言注释的语义鸿沟导致图像标注存在不可避免的偏见，进而影响计算机视觉任务效果，需通过纯视觉信息学习消除此类偏差。
AI.method: 基于现实世界知识表示的层次化概念组织原理，通过纯视觉特征而非语言注释构建对象层次结构，采用无监督学习方法实现分类模型训练。
AI.result: 在目标识别任务中验证了构建层次结构的有效性，并通过与现有词典层次的对比实验展示了方法的效率和潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功缓解了语义鸿沟导致的标注偏差问题，为视觉语义学习提供了新思路，具有进一步优化和应用的前景。

search_text: Building a visual semantics aware object hierarchy 构建视觉语义感知的对象层次结构 The semantic gap is defined as the difference between the linguistic representations of the same concept, which usually leads to misunderstanding between individuals with different knowledge backgrounds. Since linguistically annotated images are extensively used for training machine learning models, semantic gap problem (SGP) also results in inevitable bias on image annotations and further leads to poor performance on current computer vision tasks. To address this problem, we propose a novel unsupervised method to build visual semantics aware object hierarchy, aiming to get a classification model by learning from pure-visual information and to dissipate the bias of linguistic representations caused by SGP. Our intuition in this paper comes from real-world knowledge representation where concepts are hierarchically organized, and each concept can be described by a set of features rather than a linguistic annotation, namely visual semantic. The evaluation consists of two parts, firstly we apply the constructed hierarchy on the object recognition task and then we compare our visual hierarchy and existing lexical hierarchies to show the validity of our method. The preliminary results reveal the efficiency and potential of our proposed method. 语义差距被定义为同一概念的语言表示之间的差异，这通常会导致具有不同知识背景的个体之间的误解。由于语言注释图像广泛用于训练机器学习模型，语义间隙问题（SGP）也导致图像注释不可避免的偏差，并进一步导致当前计算机视觉任务的性能不佳。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的无监督方法来构建视觉语义感知对象层次结构，旨在通过学习纯视觉信息来获得分类模型，并消除 SGP 引起的语言表示偏差。我们在本文中的直觉来自现实世界的知识表示，其中概念是分层组织的，每个概念都可以通过一组特征而不是语言注释来描述，即视觉语义。评估由两部分组成，首先我们将构建的层次结构应用于对象识别任务，然后比较我们的视觉层次结构和现有的词汇层次结构以显示我们方法的有效性。初步结果揭示了我们提出的方法的效率和潜力。 本文提出一种无监督方法构建视觉语义感知的对象层次结构，以减少语言注释偏差并提升计算机视觉任务性能。 Xiaolei Diao cs.CV

authors_text: Jie Mei,Suzanne Romain,Craig Rose,Kelsey Magrane,Jenq-Neng Hwang
title: HCIL: Hierarchical Class Incremental Learning for Longline Fishing Visual Monitoring
title_zh: HCIL：延绳钓视觉监控的分层类增量学习
abstract: The goal of electronic monitoring of longline fishing is to visually monitor the fish catching activities on fishing vessels based on cameras, either for regulatory compliance or catch counting. The previous hierarchical classification method demonstrates efficient fish species identification of catches from longline fishing, where fishes are under severe deformation and self-occlusion during the catching process. Although the hierarchical classification mitigates the laborious efforts of human reviews by providing confidence scores in different hierarchical levels, its performance drops dramatically under the class incremental learning (CIL) scenario. A CIL system should be able to learn about more and more classes over time from a stream of data, i.e., only the training data for a small number of classes have to be present at the beginning and new classes can be added progressively. In this work, we introduce a Hierarchical Class Incremental Learning (HCIL) model, which significantly improves the state-of-the-art hierarchical classification methods under the CIL scenario.
summary: The goal of electronic monitoring of longline fishing is to visually monitor the fish catching activities on fishing vessels based on cameras, either for regulatory compliance or catch counting. The previous hierarchical classification method demonstrates efficient fish species identification of catches from longline fishing, where fishes are under severe deformation and self-occlusion during the catching process. Although the hierarchical classification mitigates the laborious efforts of human reviews by providing confidence scores in different hierarchical levels, its performance drops dramatically under the class incremental learning (CIL) scenario. A CIL system should be able to learn about more and more classes over time from a stream of data, i.e., only the training data for a small number of classes have to be present at the beginning and new classes can be added progressively. In this work, we introduce a Hierarchical Class Incremental Learning (HCIL) model, which significantly improves the state-of-the-art hierarchical classification methods under the CIL scenario.
abstract_zh: 延绳钓电子监控的目标是基于摄像头对渔船上的捕鱼活动进行可视化监控，以符合法规要求或捕获量计数。先前的分层分类方法证明了对延绳钓渔获物的有效鱼种识别，其中鱼类在捕捞过程中处于严重变形和自闭塞状态。尽管层次分类通过提供不同层次级别的置信度分数减轻了人工审查的繁重工作，但其性能在类增量学习（CIL）场景下急剧下降。 CIL 系统应该能够随着时间的推移从数据流中了解越来越多的类，即，只需在开始时提供少量类的训练数据，并且可以逐步添加新类。在这项工作中，我们引入了分层类增量学习（HCIL）模型，该模型显着改进了 CIL 场景下最先进的分层分类方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层增量学习模型（HCIL），用于解决延绳钓捕鱼视觉监控中随时间逐步增加鱼类分类类别时的性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有分层分类方法在应对持续新增鱼类类别（CIL场景）时表现显著下降，无法适应长期数据流中逐步扩展的分类需求。
AI.method: 设计HCIL模型通过分层结构动态整合新旧类别知识，缓解增量学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.result: HCIL在CIL场景下相较现有方法显著提升了鱼类分类的准确率与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: HCIL有效解决了分层分类在增量学习中的性能瓶颈，为长期动态扩展的渔业监控系统提供了可行方案。

title: Multi-view Gradient Consistency for SVBRDF Estimation of Complex Scenes under Natural Illumination
title_zh: 自然光照下复杂场景SVBRDF估计的多视图梯度一致性
abstract: This paper presents a process for estimating the spatially varying surface reflectance of complex scenes observed under natural illumination. In contrast to previous methods, our process is not limited to scenes viewed under controlled lighting conditions but can handle complex indoor and outdoor scenes viewed under arbitrary illumination conditions. An end-to-end process uses a model of the scene's geometry and several images capturing the scene's surfaces from arbitrary viewpoints and under various natural illumination conditions. We develop a differentiable path tracer that leverages least-square conformal mapping for handling multiple disjoint objects appearing in the scene. We follow a two-step optimization process and introduce a multi-view gradient consistency loss which results in up to 30-50% improvement in the image reconstruction loss and can further achieve better disentanglement of the diffuse and specular BRDFs compared to other state-of-the-art. We demonstrate the process in real-world indoor and outdoor scenes from images in the wild and show that we can produce realistic renders consistent with actual images using the estimated reflectance properties. Experiments show that our technique produces realistic results for arbitrary outdoor scenes with complex geometry. The source code is publicly available at: https://gitlab.com/alen.joy/multi-view-gradient-consistency-for-svbrdf-estimation-of-complex-scenes-under-natural-illumination
summary: This paper presents a process for estimating the spatially varying surface reflectance of complex scenes observed under natural illumination. In contrast to previous methods, our process is not limited to scenes viewed under controlled lighting conditions but can handle complex indoor and outdoor scenes viewed under arbitrary illumination conditions. An end-to-end process uses a model of the scene's geometry and several images capturing the scene's surfaces from arbitrary viewpoints and under various natural illumination conditions. We develop a differentiable path tracer that leverages least-square conformal mapping for handling multiple disjoint objects appearing in the scene. We follow a two-step optimization process and introduce a multi-view gradient consistency loss which results in up to 30-50% improvement in the image reconstruction loss and can further achieve better disentanglement of the diffuse and specular BRDFs compared to other state-of-the-art. We demonstrate the process in real-world indoor and outdoor scenes from images in the wild and show that we can produce realistic renders consistent with actual images using the estimated reflectance properties. Experiments show that our technique produces realistic results for arbitrary outdoor scenes with complex geometry. The source code is publicly available at: https://gitlab.com/alen.joy/multi-view-gradient-consistency-for-svbrdf-estimation-of-complex-scenes-under-natural-illumination
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种估计自然光照下观察到的复杂场景的空间变化表面反射率的过程。与以前的方法相比，我们的过程不仅限于在受控照明条件下查看的场景，还可以处理在任意照明条件下查看的复杂室内和室外场景。端到端过程使用场景几何模型和在各种自然照明条件下从任意视点捕获场景表面的多个图像。我们开发了一种可微的路径追踪器，它利用最小二乘共形映射来处理场景中出现的多个不相交的对象。我们遵循两步优化过程，并引入多视图梯度一致性损失，这使得图像重建损失提高了 30-50%，并且与其他最先进的技术相比，可以进一步实现漫反射和镜面 BRDF 的更好解缠结。我们通过野外图像在现实世界的室内和室外场景中演示了该过程，并表明我们可以使用估计的反射率属性生成与实际图像一致的逼真渲染。实验表明，我们的技术可以为具有复杂几何形状的任意室外场景产生逼真的结果。源代码可公开获取：https://gitlab.com/alen.joy/multi-view-gradient-consistency-for-svbrdf-estimation-of-complex-scenes-under-natural-Illumination

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在自然光照下估计复杂场景空间变化表面反射率（SVBRDF）的方法，适用于任意光照条件下的室内外场景。
AI.motivation: 传统方法受限于受控光照条件，难以处理真实复杂场景。本文旨在开发一种适用于自然光照下任意复杂场景的SVBRDF估计方法。
AI.method: 基于场景几何模型和多视角图像，结合可微路径追踪器与最小二乘共形映射技术，提出多视角梯度一致性损失函数的两步优化流程。
AI.result: 在真实室内外场景中实现图像重建损失降低30-50%，并显著提升漫反射与镜面反射分离效果，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了复杂几何场景在自然光照下的SVBRDF估计问题，为真实感渲染提供了可靠解决方案。

We demonstrate the process in real-world indoor and outdoor scenes from images in the wild and show that we can produce realistic renders consistent with actual images using the estimated reflectance properties. Experiments show that our technique produces realistic results for arbitrary outdoor scenes with complex geometry. The source code is publicly available at: https://gitlab.com/alen.joy/multi-view-gradient-consistency-for-svbrdf-estimation-of-complex-scenes-under-natural-illumination 本文提出了一种估计自然光照下观察到的复杂场景的空间变化表面反射率的过程。与以前的方法相比，我们的过程不仅限于在受控照明条件下查看的场景，还可以处理在任意照明条件下查看的复杂室内和室外场景。端到端过程使用场景几何模型和在各种自然照明条件下从任意视点捕获场景表面的多个图像。我们开发了一种可微的路径追踪器，它利用最小二乘共形映射来处理场景中出现的多个不相交的对象。我们遵循两步优化过程，并引入多视图梯度一致性损失，这使得图像重建损失提高了 30-50%，并且与其他最先进的技术相比，可以进一步实现漫反射和镜面 BRDF 的更好解缠结。我们通过野外图像在现实世界的室内和室外场景中演示了该过程，并表明我们可以使用估计的反射率属性生成与实际图像一致的逼真渲染。实验表明，我们的技术可以为具有复杂几何形状的任意室外场景产生逼真的结果。源代码可公开获取：https://gitlab.com/alen.joy/multi-view-gradient-consistency-for-svbrdf-estimation-of-complex-scenes-under-natural-Illumination 本文提出了一种在自然光照下估计复杂场景空间变化表面反射率（SVBRDF）的方法，适用于任意光照条件下的室内外场景。 Alen Joy,Charalambos Poullis cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Édouard Bonnet,Jan Dreier,Jakub Gajarský,Stephan Kreutzer,Nikolas Mählmann,Pierre Simon,Szymon Toruńczyk
title: Model Checking on Interpretations of Classes of Bounded Local Cliquewidth
title_zh: 有界局部团宽度类解释的模型检查
abstract: We present a fixed-parameter tractable algorithm for first-order model checking on interpretations of graph classes with bounded local cliquewidth. Notably, this includes interpretations of planar graphs, and more generally, of classes of bounded genus. To obtain this result we develop a new tool which works in a very general setting of dependent classes and which we believe can be an important ingredient in achieving similar results in the future.
summary: We present a fixed-parameter tractable algorithm for first-order model checking on interpretations of graph classes with bounded local cliquewidth. Notably, this includes interpretations of planar graphs, and more generally, of classes of bounded genus. To obtain this result we develop a new tool which works in a very general setting of dependent classes and which we believe can be an important ingredient in achieving similar results in the future.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种固定参数易处理的算法，用于对具有有限局部团宽度的图类的解释进行一阶模型检查。值得注意的是，这包括平面图的解释，更一般地说，包括有界属类的解释。为了获得这个结果，我们开发了一种新工具，它可以在非常通用的依赖类设置中工作，我们相信它可以成为未来实现类似结果的重要组成部分。

AI.tldr: 提出一种固定参数可追踪算法，用于在具有有界局部团宽的图类的解释上进行一阶模型检测。
AI.motivation: 解决平面图及有界流形等图类的模型检测问题，提升算法效率并拓展理论工具。
AI.method: 开发适用于依赖类的通用工具，通过局部团宽约束设计参数化算法框架。
AI.result: 实现针对有界局部团宽图类的固定参数可追踪算法，并为未来研究提供通用工具。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为处理依赖类的模型检测问题提供了通用框架，具有广泛的应用前景。

title: Characterization of a Meso-Scale Wearable Robot for Bathing Assistance
title_zh: 用于沐浴辅助的中型可穿戴机器人的表征
abstract: Robotic bathing assistance has long been considered an important and practical task in healthcare. Yet, achieving flexible and efficient cleaning tasks on the human body is challenging, since washing the body involves direct human-robot physical contact and simple, safe, and effective devices are needed for bathing and hygiene. In this paper, we present a meso-scale wearable robot that can locomote along the human body to provide bathing and skin care assistance. We evaluated the cleaning performance of the robot system under different scenarios. The experiments on the pipe show that the robot can achieve cleaning percentage over 92% with two types of stretchable fabrics. The robot removed most of the debris with average values of 94% on a human arm and 93% on a manikin torso. The results demonstrate that the robot exhibits high performance in cleaning tasks.
summary: Robotic bathing assistance has long been considered an important and practical task in healthcare. Yet, achieving flexible and efficient cleaning tasks on the human body is challenging, since washing the body involves direct human-robot physical contact and simple, safe, and effective devices are needed for bathing and hygiene. In this paper, we present a meso-scale wearable robot that can locomote along the human body to provide bathing and skin care assistance. We evaluated the cleaning performance of the robot system under different scenarios. The experiments on the pipe show that the robot can achieve cleaning percentage over 92% with two types of stretchable fabrics. The robot removed most of the debris with average values of 94% on a human arm and 93% on a manikin torso. The results demonstrate that the robot exhibits high performance in cleaning tasks.
abstract_zh: 机器人沐浴辅助长期以来一直被认为是医疗保健领域的一项重要且实用的任务。然而，实现灵活高效的人体清洁任务具有挑战性，因为清洗身体涉及人与机器人的直接身体接触，并且需要简单、安全、有效的设备来实现沐浴和卫生。在本文中，我们提出了一种中尺度可穿戴机器人，它可以沿着人体移动，提供沐浴和皮肤护理帮助。我们评估了机器人系统在不同场景下的清洁性能。在管道上的实验表明，机器人使用两种弹性织物可以实现92%以上的清洁率。机器人清除了大部分碎片，人臂上的平均值为 94%，人体模型躯干上的平均值为 93%。结果表明，该机器人在清洁任务中表现出高性能。

AI.tldr: 开发一种介观尺度的可穿戴机器人，用于辅助沐浴和皮肤护理，解决传统方法中灵活性和效率不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统沐浴辅助方法存在灵活性不足、安全性低的问题，需要开发更高效、安全的设备来满足医疗护理需求。
AI.method: 设计并测试了一种介观尺度的可穿戴机器人，通过管道实验和人体/人偶测试评估其清洁效果。
AI.result: 机器人清洁效果显著，管道实验清洁率超92%，人体手臂和人偶躯干清洁率分别为94%和93%。
AI.conclusion: 该机器人展示了在清洁任务中的高效率，为医疗护理中的自主清洁提供了可行方案。

title: Compressed Matrix Computations
title_zh: 压缩矩阵计算
abstract: Frugal computing is becoming an important topic for environmental reasons. In this context, several techniques have been proposed to reduce the storage of scientific data by dedicated compression methods specially tailored for arrays of floating-point numbers. While these techniques are quite efficient to save memory, they introduce additional computations to compress and decompress the data before processing them. In this article, we introduce a new lossy, fixed-rate compression technique for 2D-arrays of floating-point numbers which allows one to compute directly on the compressed data, without decompressing them. We obtain important speedups since less operations are needed to compute among the compressed data and since no decompression and re-compression is needed. More precisely, our technique makes it possible to perform basic linear algebra operations such as addition, multiplication by a constant among compressed matrices and dot product and matrix multiplication among partly uncompressed matrices. This work has been implemented into a tool named blaz and a comparison with the well-known compressor zfp in terms of execution-time and accuracy is presented.
summary: Frugal computing is becoming an important topic for environmental reasons. In this context, several techniques have been proposed to reduce the storage of scientific data by dedicated compression methods specially tailored for arrays of floating-point numbers. While these techniques are quite efficient to save memory, they introduce additional computations to compress and decompress the data before processing them. In this article, we introduce a new lossy, fixed-rate compression technique for 2D-arrays of floating-point numbers which allows one to compute directly on the compressed data, without decompressing them. We obtain important speedups since less operations are needed to compute among the compressed data and since no decompression and re-compression is needed. More precisely, our technique makes it possible to perform basic linear algebra operations such as addition, multiplication by a constant among compressed matrices and dot product and matrix multiplication among partly uncompressed matrices. This work has been implemented into a tool named blaz and a comparison with the well-known compressor zfp in terms of execution-time and accuracy is presented.
abstract_zh: 由于环境原因，节俭计算正在成为一个重要话题。在这种情况下，已经提出了几种技术来通过专门为浮点数数组定制的专用压缩方法来减少科学数据的存储。虽然这些技术对于节省内存非常有效，但它们在处理数据之前引入了额外的计算来压缩和解压缩数据。在本文中，我们介绍了一种用于二维浮点数数组的新的有损固定速率压缩技术，该技术允许直接对压缩数据进行计算，而无需解压缩它们。我们获得了重要的加速，因为在压缩数据之间进行计算所需的操作较少，并且不需要解压缩和重新压缩。更准确地说，我们的技术使得执行基本的线性代数运算成为可能，例如压缩矩阵之间的加法、乘以常数以及部分未压缩矩阵之间的点积和矩阵乘法。这项工作已被实施到名为 blaz 的工具中，并在执行时间和准确性方面与著名的压缩器 zfp 进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的固定率压缩技术，允许直接在压缩的2D浮点数组上执行线性代数运算，无需解压缩。
AI.motivation: 为应对环境问题，需减少科学计算中的存储和计算开销，但现有压缩方法需额外压缩/解压缩步骤，增加计算负担。
AI.method: 开发了一种有损固定率压缩算法，支持在压缩数据上直接进行矩阵加法、标量乘法、点积和部分矩阵乘法，并实现名为blaz的工具。
AI.result: 与zfp压缩器对比实验显示，该方法在执行时间上具有显著优势，同时保持可接受的精度水平。
AI.conclusion: 该压缩技术通过减少数据处理步骤，有效提升了矩阵计算效率，在计算速度和存储节省之间实现了良好平衡。

We obtain important speedups since less operations are needed to compute among the compressed data and since no decompression and re-compression is needed. More precisely, our technique makes it possible to perform basic linear algebra operations such as addition, multiplication by a constant among compressed matrices and dot product and matrix multiplication among partly uncompressed matrices. This work has been implemented into a tool named blaz and a comparison with the well-known compressor zfp in terms of execution-time and accuracy is presented. 由于环境原因，节俭计算正在成为一个重要话题。在这种情况下，已经提出了几种技术来通过专门为浮点数数组定制的专用压缩方法来减少科学数据的存储。虽然这些技术对于节省内存非常有效，但它们在处理数据之前引入了额外的计算来压缩和解压缩数据。在本文中，我们介绍了一种用于二维浮点数数组的新的有损固定速率压缩技术，该技术允许直接对压缩数据进行计算，而无需解压缩它们。我们获得了重要的加速，因为在压缩数据之间进行计算所需的操作较少，并且不需要解压缩和重新压缩。更准确地说，我们的技术使得执行基本的线性代数运算成为可能，例如压缩矩阵之间的加法、乘以常数以及部分未压缩矩阵之间的点积和矩阵乘法。这项工作已被实施到名为 blaz 的工具中，并在执行时间和准确性方面与著名的压缩器 zfp 进行了比较。 本文提出一种新的固定率压缩技术，允许直接在压缩的2D浮点数组上执行线性代数运算，无需解压缩。 Matthieu Martel cs.DS,cs.MS

title: Weakly Supervised Instance Segmentation using Motion Information via Optical Flow
title_zh: 通过光流使用运动信息进行弱监督实例分割
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, submitted to the 29th IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP)
comments: 5 pages, 3 figures, submitted to the 29th IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP)
abstract: Weakly supervised instance segmentation has gained popularity because it reduces high annotation cost of pixel-level masks required for model training. Recent approaches for weakly supervised instance segmentation detect and segment objects using appearance information obtained from a static image. However, it poses the challenge of identifying objects with a non-discriminatory appearance. In this study, we address this problem by using motion information from image sequences. We propose a two-stream encoder that leverages appearance and motion features extracted from images and optical flows. Additionally, we propose a novel pairwise loss that considers both appearance and motion information to supervise segmentation. We conducted extensive evaluations on the YouTube-VIS 2019 benchmark dataset. Our results demonstrate that the proposed method improves the Average Precision of the state-of-the-art method by 3.1.
summary: Weakly supervised instance segmentation has gained popularity because it reduces high annotation cost of pixel-level masks required for model training. Recent approaches for weakly supervised instance segmentation detect and segment objects using appearance information obtained from a static image. However, it poses the challenge of identifying objects with a non-discriminatory appearance. In this study, we address this problem by using motion information from image sequences. We propose a two-stream encoder that leverages appearance and motion features extracted from images and optical flows. Additionally, we propose a novel pairwise loss that considers both appearance and motion information to supervise segmentation. We conducted extensive evaluations on the YouTube-VIS 2019 benchmark dataset. Our results demonstrate that the proposed method improves the Average Precision of the state-of-the-art method by 3.1.
abstract_zh: 弱监督实例分割越来越受欢迎，因为它降低了模型训练所需的像素级掩模的高注释成本。最近的弱监督实例分割方法使用从静态图像获得的外观信息来检测和分割对象。然而，它提出了识别具有非歧视性外观的物体的挑战。在本研究中，我们通过使用图像序列中的运动信息来解决这个问题。我们提出了一种双流编码器，利用从图像和光流中提取的外观和运动特征。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的成对损失，它考虑外观和运动信息来监督分割。我们对 YouTube-VIS 2019 基准数据集进行了广泛的评估。我们的结果表明，所提出的方法将最先进方法的平均精度提高了 3.1。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用光流运动信息的弱监督实例分割方法，通过结合图像和光流特征提升分割效果。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督实例分割方法依赖静态图像的外观信息，难以区分外观相似的物体，而运动信息可提供额外区分特征。
AI.method: 设计双流编码器提取图像外观特征和光流运动特征，并提出结合外观与运动信息的新型成对损失函数进行分割监督。
AI.result: 在YouTube-VIS 2019数据集上，平均精度较现有最佳方法提升3.1。
AI.conclusion: 运动信息有效增强了弱监督实例分割性能，尤其在外观相似物体的区分上表现显著。

title: Intelligent Vision-based Autonomous Ship Landing of VTOL UAVs
title_zh: 基于智能视觉的垂直起降无人机自主船舶着陆
abstract: The paper discusses an intelligent vision-based control solution for autonomous tracking and landing of Vertical Take-Off and Landing (VTOL) capable Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) on ships without utilizing GPS signal. The central idea involves automating the Navy helicopter ship landing procedure where the pilot utilizes the ship as the visual reference for long-range tracking; however, refers to a standardized visual cue installed on most Navy ships called the "horizon bar" for the final approach and landing phases. This idea is implemented using a uniquely designed nonlinear controller integrated with machine vision. The vision system utilizes machine learning-based object detection for long-range ship tracking and classical computer vision for the estimation of aircraft relative position and orientation utilizing the horizon bar during the final approach and landing phases. The nonlinear controller operates based on the information estimated by the vision system and has demonstrated robust tracking performance even in the presence of uncertainties. The developed autonomous ship landing system was implemented on a quad-rotor UAV equipped with an onboard camera, and approach and landing were successfully demonstrated on a moving deck, which imitates realistic ship deck motions. Extensive simulations and flight tests were conducted to demonstrate vertical landing safety, tracking capability, and landing accuracy.
summary: The paper discusses an intelligent vision-based control solution for autonomous tracking and landing of Vertical Take-Off and Landing (VTOL) capable Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) on ships without utilizing GPS signal. The central idea involves automating the Navy helicopter ship landing procedure where the pilot utilizes the ship as the visual reference for long-range tracking; however, refers to a standardized visual cue installed on most Navy ships called the "horizon bar" for the final approach and landing phases. This idea is implemented using a uniquely designed nonlinear controller integrated with machine vision. The vision system utilizes machine learning-based object detection for long-range ship tracking and classical computer vision for the estimation of aircraft relative position and orientation utilizing the horizon bar during the final approach and landing phases. The nonlinear controller operates based on the information estimated by the vision system and has demonstrated robust tracking performance even in the presence of uncertainties. The developed autonomous ship landing system was implemented on a quad-rotor UAV equipped with an onboard camera, and approach and landing were successfully demonstrated on a moving deck, which imitates realistic ship deck motions. Extensive simulations and flight tests were conducted to demonstrate vertical landing safety, tracking capability, and landing accuracy.
abstract_zh: 本文讨论了一种基于视觉的智能控制解决方案，用于在不使用 GPS 信号的情况下，在船上实现垂直起降 (VTOL) 无人机 (UAV) 的自主跟踪和着陆。其中心思想涉及自动化海军直升机舰艇着陆程序，飞行员利用舰船作为远程跟踪的视觉参考；然而，“地平线”指的是大多数海军舰艇上安装的标准化视觉提示，称为“地平线”，用于最后进场和着陆阶段。这个想法是通过使用独特设计的与机器视觉集成的非线性控制器来实现的。该视觉系统利用基于机器学习的目标检测进行远程船舶跟踪，并利用经典计算机视觉在最终进近和着陆阶段利用地平线来估计飞机的相对位置和方向。非线性控制器基于视觉系统估计的信息进行操作，即使在存在不确定性的情况下也表现出鲁棒的跟踪性能。所开发的自主船舶着陆系统在配备机载摄像头的四旋翼无人机上实现，并在模拟真实船舶甲板运动的移动甲板上成功演示了进场和着陆。进行了广泛的模拟和飞行测试，以验证垂直着陆安全性、跟踪能力和着陆精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉的智能控制方案，用于在没有GPS信号的情况下实现垂直起降无人机（VTOL UAVs）在船上的自主追踪和降落。
AI.motivation: 在没有GPS信号的环境下，实现无人机在移动甲板上的自主降落是一个具有挑战性的问题，尤其是在海军直升机降落过程中，需要依赖视觉参考。
AI.method: 该方法采用了一种非线性控制器，结合了基于机器学习的对象检测用于远程船舶追踪，并利用经典计算机视觉技术来估计飞机在最终接近和着陆阶段的相对位置和方向。
AI.result: 该自主着陆系统已在配备摄像头的四旋翼无人机上实现，并成功在模拟真实船舶甲板运动的移动甲板上进行了接近和着陆测试。
AI.conclusion: 该系统展示了在存在不确定性的情况下，具有鲁棒追踪性能的垂直降落安全性、追踪能力和降落精度。

title: Decision Making in Non-Stationary Environments with Policy-Augmented Monte Carlo Tree Search
title_zh: 使用策略增强蒙特卡罗树搜索在非平稳环境中进行决策
abstract: Decision-making under uncertainty (DMU) is present in many important problems. An open challenge is DMU in non-stationary environments, where the dynamics of the environment can change over time. Reinforcement Learning (RL), a popular approach for DMU problems, learns a policy by interacting with a model of the environment offline. Unfortunately, if the environment changes the policy can become stale and take sub-optimal actions, and relearning the policy for the updated environment takes time and computational effort. An alternative is online planning approaches such as Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS), which perform their computation at decision time. Given the current environment, MCTS plans using high-fidelity models to determine promising action trajectories. These models can be updated as soon as environmental changes are detected to immediately incorporate them into decision making. However, MCTS's convergence can be slow for domains with large state-action spaces. In this paper, we present a novel hybrid decision-making approach that combines the strengths of RL and planning while mitigating their weaknesses. Our approach, called Policy Augmented MCTS (PA-MCTS), integrates a policy's actin-value estimates into MCTS, using the estimates to seed the action trajectories favored by the search. We hypothesize that PA-MCTS will converge more quickly than standard MCTS while making better decisions than the policy can make on its own when faced with nonstationary environments. We test our hypothesis by comparing PA-MCTS with pure MCTS and an RL agent applied to the classical CartPole environment. We find that PC-MCTS can achieve higher cumulative rewards than the policy in isolation under several environmental shifts while converging in significantly fewer iterations than pure MCTS.

These models can be updated as soon as environmental changes are detected to immediately incorporate them into decision making. However, MCTS's convergence can be slow for domains with large state-action spaces. In this paper, we present a novel hybrid decision-making approach that combines the strengths of RL and planning while mitigating their weaknesses. We test our hypothesis by comparing PA-MCTS with pure MCTS and an RL agent applied to the classical CartPole environment. We find that PC-MCTS can achieve higher cumulative rewards than the policy in isolation under several environmental shifts while converging in significantly fewer iterations than pure MCTS.
abstract_zh: 不确定性决策（DMU）存在于许多重要问题中。一个开放的挑战是非静态环境中的 DMU，其中环境的动态可能随时间而变化。强化学习 (RL) 是解决 DMU 问题的一种流行方法，它通过与离线环境模型交互来学习策略。不幸的是，如果环境发生变化，策略可能会变得过时并采取次优的操作，并且重新学习更新环境的策略需要时间和计算量。另一种选择是在线规划方法，例如蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS），它在决策时执行计算。鉴于当前环境，MCTS 计划使用高保真模型来确定有希望的行动轨迹。一旦检测到环境变化，这些模型就可以立即更新，以便立即将其纳入决策中。然而，对于具有较大状态动作空间的域，MCTS 的收敛可能会很慢。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的混合决策方法，该方法结合了强化学习和规划的优点，同时减轻了它们的缺点。我们的方法称为策略增强 MCTS (PA-MCTS)，将策略的肌动蛋白值估计集成到 MCTS 中，使用这些估计来播种搜索所青睐的动作轨迹。我们假设 PA-MCTS 将比标准 MCTS 收敛得更快，同时在面对非平稳环境时做出比策略本身更好的决策。我们通过将 PA-MCTS 与纯 MCTS 以及应用于经典 CartPole 环境的 RL 代理进行比较来检验我们的假设。我们发现，在几个环境变化下，PC-MCTS 可以比孤立的策略获得更高的累积奖励，同时收敛的迭代次数明显少于纯 MCTS。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合强化学习与蒙特卡洛树搜索的混合决策方法PA-MCTS，用于解决非平稳环境中的决策问题。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在非平稳环境中易因策略过时导致次优决策，而MCTS虽能实时调整但收敛速度慢，需开发更高效的混合方法。
AI.method: 将策略的行动价值估计整合至MCTS中，利用价值估计引导搜索轨迹，加速收敛并提升决策质量。
AI.result: 在CartPole环境中，PA-MCTS相比纯MCTS和RL策略，在环境变化下取得更高累积奖励且收敛迭代次数显著减少。
AI.conclusion: PA-MCTS有效融合RL与规划优势，在非平稳环境中实现更优决策与更快收敛。

search_text: Decision Making in Non-Stationary Environments with Policy-Augmented Monte Carlo Tree Search 使用策略增强蒙特卡罗树搜索在非平稳环境中进行决策 Decision-making under uncertainty (DMU) is present in many important problems. An open challenge is DMU in non-stationary environments, where the dynamics of the environment can change over time. Reinforcement Learning (RL), a popular approach for DMU problems, learns a policy by interacting with a model of the environment offline. Unfortunately, if the environment changes the policy can become stale and take sub-optimal actions, and relearning the policy for the updated environment takes time and computational effort. An alternative is online planning approaches such as Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS), which perform their computation at decision time. Given the current environment, MCTS plans using high-fidelity models to determine promising action trajectories. These models can be updated as soon as environmental changes are detected to immediately incorporate them into decision making. However, MCTS's convergence can be slow for domains with large state-action spaces. In this paper, we present a novel hybrid decision-making approach that combines the strengths of RL and planning while mitigating their weaknesses. Our approach, called Policy Augmented MCTS (PA-MCTS), integrates a policy's actin-value estimates into MCTS, using the estimates to seed the action trajectories favored by the search. We hypothesize that PA-MCTS will converge more quickly than standard MCTS while making better decisions than the policy can make on its own when faced with nonstationary environments. We test our hypothesis by comparing PA-MCTS with pure MCTS and an RL agent applied to the classical CartPole environment. We find that PC-MCTS can achieve higher cumulative rewards than the policy in isolation under several environmental shifts while converging in significantly fewer iterations than pure MCTS. 不确定性决策（DMU）存在于许多重要问题中。一个开放的挑战是非静态环境中的 DMU，其中环境的动态可能随时间而变化。强化学习 (RL) 是解决 DMU 问题的一种流行方法，它通过与离线环境模型交互来学习策略。不幸的是，如果环境发生变化，策略可能会变得过时并采取次优的操作，并且重新学习更新环境的策略需要时间和计算量。另一种选择是在线规划方法，例如蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS），它在决策时执行计算。鉴于当前环境，MCTS 计划使用高保真模型来确定有希望的行动轨迹。一旦检测到环境变化，这些模型就可以立即更新，以便立即将其纳入决策中。然而，对于具有较大状态动作空间的域，MCTS 的收敛可能会很慢。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的混合决策方法，该方法结合了强化学习和规划的优点，同时减轻了它们的缺点。我们的方法称为策略增强 MCTS (PA-MCTS)，将策略的肌动蛋白值估计集成到 MCTS 中，使用这些估计来播种搜索所青睐的动作轨迹。我们假设 PA-MCTS 将比标准 MCTS 收敛得更快，同时在面对非平稳环境时做出比策略本身更好的决策。我们通过将 PA-MCTS 与纯 MCTS 以及应用于经典 CartPole 环境的 RL 代理进行比较来检验我们的假设。我们发现，在几个环境变化下，PC-MCTS 可以比孤立的策略获得更高的累积奖励，同时收敛的迭代次数明显少于纯 MCTS。 本文提出一种结合强化学习与蒙特卡洛树搜索的混合决策方法PA-MCTS，用于解决非平稳环境中的决策问题。 Geoffrey Pettet,Ayan Mukhopadhyay,Abhishek Dubey cs.AI

authors_text: Luis R. Soenksen,Yu Ma,Cynthia Zeng,Leonard D. J. Boussioux,Kimberly Villalobos Carballo,Liangyuan Na,Holly M. Wiberg,Michael L. Li,Ignacio Fuentes,Dimitris Bertsimas
title: Integrated multimodal artificial intelligence framework for healthcare applications
title_zh: 用于医疗保健应用的集成多模式人工智能框架
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) systems hold great promise to improve healthcare over the next decades. Specifically, AI systems leveraging multiple data sources and input modalities are poised to become a viable method to deliver more accurate results and deployable pipelines across a wide range of applications. In this work, we propose and evaluate a unified Holistic AI in Medicine (HAIM) framework to facilitate the generation and testing of AI systems that leverage multimodal inputs. Our approach uses generalizable data pre-processing and machine learning modeling stages that can be readily adapted for research and deployment in healthcare environments. We evaluate our HAIM framework by training and characterizing 14,324 independent models based on HAIM-MIMIC-MM, a multimodal clinical database (N=34,537 samples) containing 7,279 unique hospitalizations and 6,485 patients, spanning all possible input combinations of 4 data modalities (i.e., tabular, time-series, text, and images), 11 unique data sources and 12 predictive tasks. We show that this framework can consistently and robustly produce models that outperform similar single-source approaches across various healthcare demonstrations (by 6-33%), including 10 distinct chest pathology diagnoses, along with length-of-stay and 48-hour mortality predictions. We also quantify the contribution of each modality and data source using Shapley values, which demonstrates the heterogeneity in data modality importance and the necessity of multimodal inputs across different healthcare-relevant tasks. The generalizable properties and flexibility of our Holistic AI in Medicine (HAIM) framework could offer a promising pathway for future multimodal predictive systems in clinical and operational healthcare settings.
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) systems hold great promise to improve healthcare over the next decades. Specifically, AI systems leveraging multiple data sources and input modalities are poised to become a viable method to deliver more accurate results and deployable pipelines across a wide range of applications. In this work, we propose and evaluate a unified Holistic AI in Medicine (HAIM) framework to facilitate the generation and testing of AI systems that leverage multimodal inputs. Our approach uses generalizable data pre-processing and machine learning modeling stages that can be readily adapted for research and deployment in healthcare environments. We evaluate our HAIM framework by training and characterizing 14,324 independent models based on HAIM-MIMIC-MM, a multimodal clinical database (N=34,537 samples) containing 7,279 unique hospitalizations and 6,485 patients, spanning all possible input combinations of 4 data modalities (i.e., tabular, time-series, text, and images), 11 unique data sources and 12 predictive tasks. We show that this framework can consistently and robustly produce models that outperform similar single-source approaches across various healthcare demonstrations (by 6-33%), including 10 distinct chest pathology diagnoses, along with length-of-stay and 48-hour mortality predictions. We also quantify the contribution of each modality and data source using Shapley values, which demonstrates the heterogeneity in data modality importance and the necessity of multimodal inputs across different healthcare-relevant tasks. The generalizable properties and flexibility of our Holistic AI in Medicine (HAIM) framework could offer a promising pathway for future multimodal predictive systems in clinical and operational healthcare settings.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 系统有望在未来几十年改善医疗保健。具体来说，利用多个数据源和输入模式的人工智能系统有望成为一种可行的方法，可以在广泛的应用程序中提供更准确的结果和可部署的管道。在这项工作中，我们提出并评估了一个统一的整体医学人工智能（HAIM）框架，以促进利用多模式输入的人工智能系统的生成和测试。我们的方法使用通用数据预处理和机器学习建模阶段，可以轻松适应医疗环境中的研究和部署。我们通过训练和表征基于 HAIM-MIMIC-MM 的 14,324 个独立模型来评估我们的 HAIM 框架，HAIM-MIMIC-MM 是一个多模式临床数据库（N = 34,537 个样本），包含 7,279 名独特的住院病例和 6,485 名患者，涵盖 4 种数据模式（即表格、时间序列、文本和图像）、11 个独特数据源和 12 个预测任务的所有可能输入组合。我们表明，该框架可以一致且稳健地生成模型，这些模型在各种医疗保健演示中优于类似的单一来源方法（6-33%），包括 10 种不同的胸部病理诊断，以及住院时间和 48 小时死亡率预测。我们还使用 Shapley 值量化每种模态和数据源的贡献，这证明了数据模态重要性的异质性以及跨不同医疗保健相关任务的多模态输入的必要性。我们的整体医学人工智能 (HAIM) 框架的通用特性和灵活性可以为临床和运营医疗保健环境中的未来多模式预测系统提供一条有前途的途径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为HAIM的统一框架，用于整合多模态数据（如表格、时间序列、文本和图像）以提升医疗健康领域的人工智能系统性能。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗AI系统通常仅依赖单一数据源，难以充分利用多模态数据的潜在价值，导致预测准确性和适用性受限。
AI.method: 构建了一种通用的多模态数据预处理和机器学习建模框架，并基于包含34,537个样本的多模态临床数据库HAIM-MIMIC-MM，训练和评估了14,324个独立模型，结合Shapley值量化各数据模态的贡献。
AI.result: HAIM框架在10种胸部病理诊断、住院时长预测及48小时死亡率预测等任务中，相较单一数据源方法性能提升6-33%，并揭示了不同任务中数据模态重要性的异质性。
AI.conclusion: HAIM框架通过灵活整合多模态数据，为临床和医疗运营场景中的多模态预测系统提供了通用且可扩展的解决方案。

authors_text: Daniel L. Marino,Chathurika S. Wickramasinghe,Craig Rieger,Milos Manic
title: Self-Supervised and Interpretable Anomaly Detection using Network Transformers
title_zh: 使用网络变压器进行自我监督和可解释的异常检测
abstract: Monitoring traffic in computer networks is one of the core approaches for defending critical infrastructure against cyber attacks. Machine Learning (ML) and Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have been proposed in the past as a tool to identify anomalies in computer networks. Although detecting these anomalies provides an indication of an attack, just detecting an anomaly is not enough information for a user to understand the anomaly. The black-box nature of off-the-shelf ML models prevents extracting important information that is fundamental to isolate the source of the fault/attack and take corrective measures. In this paper, we introduce the Network Transformer (NeT), a DNN model for anomaly detection that incorporates the graph structure of the communication network in order to improve interpretability. The presented approach has the following advantages: 1) enhanced interpretability by incorporating the graph structure of computer networks; 2) provides a hierarchical set of features that enables analysis at different levels of granularity; 3) self-supervised training that does not require labeled data. The presented approach was tested by evaluating the successful detection of anomalies in an Industrial Control System (ICS). The presented approach successfully identified anomalies, the devices affected, and the specific connections causing the anomalies, providing a data-driven hierarchical approach to analyze the behavior of a cyber network.

abstract_zh: 监控计算机网络流量是保护关键基础设施免受网络攻击的核心方法之一。机器学习 (ML) 和深度神经网络 (DNN) 过去曾被提议作为识别计算机网络异常的工具。尽管检测到这些异常提供了攻击的指示，但仅检测到异常不足以为用户提供了解异常的信息。现成的 ML 模型的黑盒性质阻碍了提取对于隔离故障/攻击源并采取纠正措施至关重要的重要信息。在本文中，我们介绍了 Network Transformer (NeT)，这是一种用于异常检测的 DNN 模型，它结合了通信网络的图结构以提高可解释性。所提出的方法具有以下优点：1）通过结合计算机网络的图结构增强了可解释性； 2) 提供了一组分层功能，可以在不同粒度级别进行分析； 3）不需要标记数据的自监督训练。通过评估工业控制系统 (ICS) 中异常情况的成功检测来测试所提出的方法。所提出的方法成功地识别了异常、受影响的设备以及导致异常的特定连接，提供了数据驱动的分层方法来分析网络网络的行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于网络变换器（NeT）的自监督且可解释的网络异常检测方法，通过结合通信网络的图结构提升检测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习模型在检测网络异常时缺乏可解释性，难以定位攻击源和具体连接，阻碍了有效应对措施的制定。
AI.method: 设计网络变换器（NeT）模型，整合计算机网络的图结构，通过自监督训练无需标注数据，并提供多层级特征以支持不同粒度的分析。
AI.result: 在工业控制系统（ICS）中成功检测出异常，准确识别受影响设备及具体连接，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: NeT通过图结构整合与分层特征分析，为网络行为提供了数据驱动的可解释异常检测框架，提升了网络安全防护能力。

title: Near Optimal Reconstruction of Spherical Harmonic Expansions
title_zh: 球谐展开式的近乎最优重建
abstract: We propose an algorithm for robust recovery of the spherical harmonic expansion of functions defined on the d-dimensional unit sphere $\mathbb{S}^{d-1}$ using a near-optimal number of function evaluations. We show that for any $f \in L^2(\mathbb{S}^{d-1})$, the number of evaluations of $f$ needed to recover its degree-$q$ spherical harmonic expansion equals the dimension of the space of spherical harmonics of degree at most $q$ up to a logarithmic factor. Moreover, we develop a simple yet efficient algorithm to recover degree-$q$ expansion of $f$ by only evaluating the function on uniformly sampled points on $\mathbb{S}^{d-1}$. Our algorithm is based on the connections between spherical harmonics and Gegenbauer polynomials and leverage score sampling methods. Unlike the prior results on fast spherical harmonic transform, our proposed algorithm works efficiently using a nearly optimal number of samples in any dimension d. We further illustrate the empirical performance of our algorithm on numerical examples.
summary: We propose an algorithm for robust recovery of the spherical harmonic expansion of functions defined on the d-dimensional unit sphere $\mathbb{S}^{d-1}$ using a near-optimal number of function evaluations. We show that for any $f \in L^2(\mathbb{S}^{d-1})$, the number of evaluations of $f$ needed to recover its degree-$q$ spherical harmonic expansion equals the dimension of the space of spherical harmonics of degree at most $q$ up to a logarithmic factor. Moreover, we develop a simple yet efficient algorithm to recover degree-$q$ expansion of $f$ by only evaluating the function on uniformly sampled points on $\mathbb{S}^{d-1}$. Our algorithm is based on the connections between spherical harmonics and Gegenbauer polynomials and leverage score sampling methods. Unlike the prior results on fast spherical harmonic transform, our proposed algorithm works efficiently using a nearly optimal number of samples in any dimension d. We further illustrate the empirical performance of our algorithm on numerical examples.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种算法，使用接近最佳数量的函数评估来鲁棒地恢复在 d 维单位球 $\mathbb{S}^{d-1}$ 上定义的函数的球谐展开。我们证明，对于任何$f \in L^2(\mathbb{S}^{d-1})$，恢复其$q$次球谐展开所需的$f$求值次数等于最多$q$次球谐函数空间的维数，最多为对数因子。此外，我们开发了一种简单而有效的算法，通过仅在 $\mathbb{S}^{d-1}$ 上的均匀采样点上评估函数来恢复 $f$ 的度 $q$ 扩展。我们的算法基于球谐函数和 Gegenbauer 多项式之间的联系，并利用分数采样方法。与快速球谐变换的先前结果不同，我们提出的算法可以在任何维度 d 中使用近乎最佳数量的样本来有效地工作。我们进一步说明了我们的算法在数值示例上的经验性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种使用近似最优函数评估数量来恢复定义在d维单位球面上函数的球谐展开的算法。
AI.motivation: 现有的球谐变换方法在样本数量上不够高效，因此需要一种更高效的算法来恢复球谐展开。
AI.method: 该算法基于球谐函数与Gegenbauer多项式之间的联系，并利用杠杆得分抽样方法，仅通过在球面上均匀采样点进行函数评估。
AI.result: 该算法能够以近似最优的样本数量恢复函数的度数为q的球谐展开，并在数值例子中验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的算法在任何维度d上都能高效工作，且样本数量接近最优，为球谐展开的恢复提供了新的方法。

title: Attacks and Faults Injection in Self-Driving Agents on the Carla Simulator -- Experience Report
title_zh: Carla 模拟器上自动驾驶代理的攻击和故障注入——经验报告
comment: submitted version; appeared at: International Conference on Computer Safety, Reliability, and Security. Springer, Cham, 2021
comments: submitted version; appeared at: International Conference on Computer Safety, Reliability, and Security. Springer, Cham, 2021
abstract: Machine Learning applications are acknowledged at the foundation of autonomous driving, because they are the enabling technology for most driving tasks. However, the inclusion of trained agents in automotive systems exposes the vehicle to novel attacks and faults, that can result in safety threats to the driv-ing tasks. In this paper we report our experimental campaign on the injection of adversarial attacks and software faults in a self-driving agent running in a driving simulator. We show that adversarial attacks and faults injected in the trained agent can lead to erroneous decisions and severely jeopardize safety. The paper shows a feasible and easily-reproducible approach based on open source simula-tor and tools, and the results clearly motivate the need of both protective measures and extensive testing campaigns.
summary: Machine Learning applications are acknowledged at the foundation of autonomous driving, because they are the enabling technology for most driving tasks. However, the inclusion of trained agents in automotive systems exposes the vehicle to novel attacks and faults, that can result in safety threats to the driv-ing tasks. In this paper we report our experimental campaign on the injection of adversarial attacks and software faults in a self-driving agent running in a driving simulator. We show that adversarial attacks and faults injected in the trained agent can lead to erroneous decisions and severely jeopardize safety. The paper shows a feasible and easily-reproducible approach based on open source simula-tor and tools, and the results clearly motivate the need of both protective measures and extensive testing campaigns.
abstract_zh: 机器学习应用程序被认为是自动驾驶的基础，因为它们是大多数驾驶任务的支持技术。然而，在汽车系统中加入经过训练的代理会使车辆面临新的攻击和故障，这可能会对驾驶任务造成安全威胁。在本文中，我们报告了在驾驶模拟器中运行的自动驾驶代理中注入对抗性攻击和软件故障的实验活动。我们表明，对抗性攻击和注入训练有素的代理中的错误可能会导致错误的决策并严重危害安全。该论文展示了一种基于开源模拟器和工具的可行且易于重现的方法，其结果显然激发了保护措施和广泛测试活动的需要。

AI.tldr: 本文通过在Carla模拟器中注入对抗攻击和软件故障，验证自动驾驶代理的安全风险，并提出可复现的测试方法。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶依赖机器学习技术，但训练好的代理可能面临新型攻击和故障，导致安全威胁，需通过实验验证并推动防护措施。
AI.method: 基于开源Carla模拟器和工具，设计并实施对抗攻击与软件故障注入实验，评估自动驾驶代理的决策安全。
AI.result: 实验表明注入的攻击和故障使代理做出错误决策，显著降低安全性，验证了方法的可复现性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: 结论指出需加强自动驾驶系统的防护机制，并开展全面测试以确保安全。

ai_content_json.result: 实验表明注入的攻击和故障使代理做出错误决策，显著降低安全性，验证了方法的可复现性和有效性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 结论指出需加强自动驾驶系统的防护机制，并开展全面测试以确保安全。

tldr: 本文通过在Carla模拟器中注入对抗攻击和软件故障，验证自动驾驶代理的安全风险，并提出可复现的测试方法。
motivation: 自动驾驶依赖机器学习技术，但训练好的代理可能面临新型攻击和故障，导致安全威胁，需通过实验验证并推动防护措施。
method: 基于开源Carla模拟器和工具，设计并实施对抗攻击与软件故障注入实验，评估自动驾驶代理的决策安全。
result: 实验表明注入的攻击和故障使代理做出错误决策，显著降低安全性，验证了方法的可复现性和有效性。
conclusion: 结论指出需加强自动驾驶系统的防护机制，并开展全面测试以确保安全。
search_text: Attacks and Faults Injection in Self-Driving Agents on the Carla Simulator -- Experience Report Carla 模拟器上自动驾驶代理的攻击和故障注入——经验报告 Machine Learning applications are acknowledged at the foundation of autonomous driving, because they are the enabling technology for most driving tasks. However, the inclusion of trained agents in automotive systems exposes the vehicle to novel attacks and faults, that can result in safety threats to the driv-ing tasks. In this paper we report our experimental campaign on the injection of adversarial attacks and software faults in a self-driving agent running in a driving simulator. We show that adversarial attacks and faults injected in the trained agent can lead to erroneous decisions and severely jeopardize safety. The paper shows a feasible and easily-reproducible approach based on open source simula-tor and tools, and the results clearly motivate the need of both protective measures and extensive testing campaigns. 机器学习应用程序被认为是自动驾驶的基础，因为它们是大多数驾驶任务的支持技术。然而，在汽车系统中加入经过训练的代理会使车辆面临新的攻击和故障，这可能会对驾驶任务造成安全威胁。在本文中，我们报告了在驾驶模拟器中运行的自动驾驶代理中注入对抗性攻击和软件故障的实验活动。我们表明，对抗性攻击和注入训练有素的代理中的错误可能会导致错误的决策并严重危害安全。该论文展示了一种基于开源模拟器和工具的可行且易于重现的方法，其结果显然激发了保护措施和广泛测试活动的需要。 本文通过在Carla模拟器中注入对抗攻击和软件故障，验证自动驾驶代理的安全风险，并提出可复现的测试方法。 Niccolò Piazzesi,Massimo Hong,Andrea Ceccarelli cs.AI,cs.CR

title: A Brief Survey on Adaptive Video Streaming Quality Assessment
title_zh: 自适应视频流质量评估简介
abstract: Quality of experience (QoE) assessment for adaptive video streaming plays a significant role in advanced network management systems. It is especially challenging in case of dynamic adaptive streaming schemes over HTTP (DASH) which has increasingly complex characteristics including additional playback issues. In this paper, we provide a brief overview of adaptive video streaming quality assessment. Upon our review of related works, we analyze and compare different variations of objective QoE assessment models with or without using machine learning techniques for adaptive video streaming. Through the performance analysis, we observe that hybrid models perform better than both quality-of-service (QoS) driven QoE approaches and signal fidelity measurement. Moreover, the machine learning-based model slightly outperforms the model without using machine learning for the same setting. In addition, we find that existing video streaming QoE assessment models still have limited performance, which makes it difficult to be applied in practical communication systems. Therefore, based on the success of deep learned feature representations for traditional video quality prediction, we also apply the off-the-shelf deep convolutional neural network (DCNN) to evaluate the perceptual quality of streaming videos, where the spatio-temporal properties of streaming videos are taken into consideration. Experiments demonstrate its superiority, which sheds light on the future development of specifically designed deep learning frameworks for adaptive video streaming quality assessment. We believe this survey can serve as a guideline for QoE assessment of adaptive video streaming.

It is especially challenging in case of dynamic adaptive streaming schemes over HTTP (DASH) which has increasingly complex characteristics including additional playback issues. In this paper, we provide a brief overview of adaptive video streaming quality assessment. Upon our review of related works, we analyze and compare different variations of objective QoE assessment models with or without using machine learning techniques for adaptive video streaming. Through the performance analysis, we observe that hybrid models perform better than both quality-of-service (QoS) driven QoE approaches and signal fidelity measurement. Moreover, the machine learning-based model slightly outperforms the model without using machine learning for the same setting. In addition, we find that existing video streaming QoE assessment models still have limited performance, which makes it difficult to be applied in practical communication systems. Therefore, based on the success of deep learned feature representations for traditional video quality prediction, we also apply the off-the-shelf deep convolutional neural network (DCNN) to evaluate the perceptual quality of streaming videos, where the spatio-temporal properties of streaming videos are taken into consideration. Experiments demonstrate its superiority, which sheds light on the future development of specifically designed deep learning frameworks for adaptive video streaming quality assessment. We believe this survey can serve as a guideline for QoE assessment of adaptive video streaming.
abstract_zh: 自适应视频流的体验质量 (QoE) 评估在高级网络管理系统中发挥着重要作用。在 HTTP 上的动态自适应流方案 (DASH) 的情况下尤其具有挑战性，该方案具有越来越复杂的特征，包括额外的播放问题。在本文中，我们简要概述了自适应视频流质量评估。在回顾相关工作后，我们分析并比较了使用或不使用自适应视频流机器学习技术的客观 QoE 评估模型的不同变体。通过性能分析，我们观察到混合模型的性能优于服务质量 (QoS) 驱动的 QoE 方法和信号保真度测量。此外，在相同设置下，基于机器学习的模型略优于不使用机器学习的模型。此外，我们发现现有的视频流QoE评估模型仍然具有有限的性能，这使得其难以在实际通信系统中应用。因此，基于深度学习特征表示在传统视频质量预测方面的成功，我们还应用现成的深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）来评估流视频的感知质量，其中考虑了流视频的时空属性。实验证明了它的优越性，这为专门设计的用于自适应视频流质量评估的深度学习框架的未来发展提供了线索。我们相信这项调查可以作为自适应视频流的 QoE 评估指南。

AI.tldr: 本文对自适应视频流质量评估方法进行综述，比较分析不同客观QoE模型的性能，并探讨深度学习技术的应用。
AI.motivation: 自适应视频流（如DASH）因复杂特性导致QoE评估困难，现有模型在实际应用中存在性能局限，需探索更优解决方案。
AI.method: 通过文献回顾比较传统QoS驱动模型与信号保真度测量方法，分析混合模型及机器学习模型的性能，并应用深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）评估视频感知质量。
AI.result: 混合模型优于传统方法，机器学习模型表现略优；现有模型实际效果有限，而DCNN在考虑时空特性后实验表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 当前QoE模型存在性能瓶颈，基于深度学习的特征表示方法展现潜力，未来需设计专用深度学习框架以提升评估效果。

authors_text: Robin Dupont,Mohammed Amine Alaoui,Hichem Sahbi,Alice Lebois
title: Extracting Effective Subnetworks with Gumbel-Softmax
title_zh: 使用 Gumbel-Softmax 提取有效子网络
comment: 5 pages, 1 table. Published at ICIP 2022, Oral Session
comments: 5 pages, 1 table. Published at ICIP 2022, Oral Session
abstract: Large and performant neural networks are often overparameterized and can be drastically reduced in size and complexity thanks to pruning. Pruning is a group of methods, which seeks to remove redundant or unnecessary weights or groups of weights in a network. These techniques allow the creation of lightweight networks, which are particularly critical in embedded or mobile applications. In this paper, we devise an alternative pruning method that allows extracting effective subnetworks from larger untrained ones. Our method is stochastic and extracts subnetworks by exploring different topologies which are sampled using Gumbel Softmax. The latter is also used to train probability distributions which measure the relevance of weights in the sampled topologies. The resulting subnetworks are further enhanced using a highly efficient rescaling mechanism that reduces training time and improves performance. Extensive experiments conducted on CIFAR show the outperformance of our subnetwork extraction method against the related work.
summary: Large and performant neural networks are often overparameterized and can be drastically reduced in size and complexity thanks to pruning. Pruning is a group of methods, which seeks to remove redundant or unnecessary weights or groups of weights in a network. These techniques allow the creation of lightweight networks, which are particularly critical in embedded or mobile applications. In this paper, we devise an alternative pruning method that allows extracting effective subnetworks from larger untrained ones. Our method is stochastic and extracts subnetworks by exploring different topologies which are sampled using Gumbel Softmax. The latter is also used to train probability distributions which measure the relevance of weights in the sampled topologies. The resulting subnetworks are further enhanced using a highly efficient rescaling mechanism that reduces training time and improves performance. Extensive experiments conducted on CIFAR show the outperformance of our subnetwork extraction method against the related work.
abstract_zh: 大型且高性能的神经网络通常会过度参数化，并且通过修剪可以大大减小尺寸和复杂性。剪枝是一组方法，旨在删除网络中冗余或不必要的权重或权重组。这些技术允许创建轻量级网络，这在嵌入式或移动应用程序中尤其重要。在本文中，我们设计了一种替代剪枝方法，该方法允许从较大的未经训练的子网络中提取有效的子网络。我们的方法是随机的，通过探索使用 Gumbel Softmax 采样的不同拓扑来提取子网络。后者还用于训练概率分布，以测量采样拓扑中权重的相关性。使用高效的缩放机制进一步增强生成的子网络，从而减少训练时间并提高性能。在 CIFAR 上进行的大量实验表明，我们的子网提取方法优于相关工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Gumbel-Softmax的随机子网络提取方法，从未训练的大规模神经网络中高效获取轻量化子网络。
AI.motivation: 大型神经网络存在参数冗余问题，传统剪枝方法依赖预训练模型且效率低下，需探索无需预训练的轻量化子网络构建新途径。
AI.method: 采用Gumbel-Softmax采样拓扑结构，通过概率分布评估权重重要性，并结合高效缩放机制优化子网络性能。
AI.result: 在CIFAR数据集上实验表明，该方法在子网络提取效果上优于现有相关工作。
AI.conclusion: 提出的随机拓扑采样与概率分布训练框架，为轻量化网络设计提供了新思路和有效解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Gumbel-Softmax的随机子网络提取方法，从未训练的大规模神经网络中高效获取轻量化子网络。

authors_text: Ali Furkan Biten,Rubèn Tito,Lluis Gomez,Ernest Valveny,Dimosthenis Karatzas
title: OCR-IDL: OCR Annotations for Industry Document Library Dataset
title_zh: OCR-IDL：行业文档库数据集的 OCR 注释
abstract: Pretraining has proven successful in Document Intelligence tasks where deluge of documents are used to pretrain the models only later to be finetuned on downstream tasks. One of the problems of the pretraining approaches is the inconsistent usage of pretraining data with different OCR engines leading to incomparable results between models. In other words, it is not obvious whether the performance gain is coming from diverse usage of amount of data and distinct OCR engines or from the proposed models. To remedy the problem, we make public the OCR annotations for IDL documents using commercial OCR engine given their superior performance over open source OCR models. The contributed dataset (OCR-IDL) has an estimated monetary value over 20K US$. It is our hope that OCR-IDL can be a starting point for future works on Document Intelligence. All of our data and its collection process with the annotations can be found in https://github.com/furkanbiten/idl_data.
summary: Pretraining has proven successful in Document Intelligence tasks where deluge of documents are used to pretrain the models only later to be finetuned on downstream tasks. One of the problems of the pretraining approaches is the inconsistent usage of pretraining data with different OCR engines leading to incomparable results between models. In other words, it is not obvious whether the performance gain is coming from diverse usage of amount of data and distinct OCR engines or from the proposed models. To remedy the problem, we make public the OCR annotations for IDL documents using commercial OCR engine given their superior performance over open source OCR models. The contributed dataset (OCR-IDL) has an estimated monetary value over 20K US$. It is our hope that OCR-IDL can be a starting point for future works on Document Intelligence. All of our data and its collection process with the annotations can be found in https://github.com/furkanbiten/idl_data.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，预训练在文档智能任务中是成功的，其中使用大量文档来预训练模型，然后在下游任务中进行微调。预训练方法的问题之一是不同 OCR 引擎对预训练数据的使用不一致，导致模型之间的结果无法比较。换句话说，性能提升是来自数据量的不同使用和不同的 OCR 引擎，还是来自所提出的模型，这一点并不明显。为了解决这个问题，我们使用商业 OCR 引擎公开了 IDL 文档的 OCR 注释，因为它们比开源 OCR 模型具有优越的性能。贡献的数据集 (OCR-IDL) 的估计货币价值超过 2 万美元。我们希望 OCR-IDL 能够成为未来文档智能工作的起点。我们所有的数据及其带有注释的收集过程都可以在 https://github.com/furkanbiten/idl_data 中找到。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出OCR-IDL数据集，通过商业OCR引擎对工业文档库进行标注，解决预训练模型中因OCR引擎不一致导致的结果不可比问题。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练方法因使用不同OCR引擎导致模型性能提升原因难以区分，需统一OCR数据以确保实验结果的可比性。
AI.method: 使用商业OCR引擎对Industry Document Library (IDL)文档进行OCR标注，生成OCR-IDL数据集。
AI.result: 发布OCR-IDL数据集（估值超2万美元），提供数据及标注方法，为文档智能研究提供基准资源。
AI.conclusion: OCR-IDL数据集通过标准化OCR标注，为未来文档智能任务的模型开发与评估提供了可靠起点。

authors_text: Frances Cleary,Witawas Srisa-an,Beatriz Gil,Jaideep Kesavan,Tobias Engel,David C. Henshall,Sasitharan Balasubramaniam
title: Wearable uBrain: Fabric Based-Spiking Neural Network
title_zh: 可穿戴 uBrain：基于织物的尖峰神经网络
abstract: On garment intelligence influenced by artificial neural networks and neuromorphic computing is emerging as a research direction in the e-textile sector. In particular, bio inspired Spiking Neural Networks mimicking the workings of the brain show promise in recent ICT research applications. Taking such technological advancements and new research directions driving forward the next generation of e-textiles and smart materials, we present a wearable micro Brain capable of event driven artificial spiking neural network computation in a fabric based environment. We demonstrate a wearable Brain SNN prototype with multi-layer computation, enabling scalability and flexibility in terms of modifications for hidden layers to be augmented to the network. The wearable micro Brain provides a low size, weight and power artificial on-garment intelligent wearable solution with embedded functionality enabling offline adaptive learning through the provision of interchangeable resistor synaptic weightings. The prototype has been evaluated for fault tolerance, where we have determine the robustness of the circuit when certain parts are damaged. Validations were also conducted for movements to determine if the circuit can still perform accurate computation.
summary: On garment intelligence influenced by artificial neural networks and neuromorphic computing is emerging as a research direction in the e-textile sector. In particular, bio inspired Spiking Neural Networks mimicking the workings of the brain show promise in recent ICT research applications. Taking such technological advancements and new research directions driving forward the next generation of e-textiles and smart materials, we present a wearable micro Brain capable of event driven artificial spiking neural network computation in a fabric based environment. We demonstrate a wearable Brain SNN prototype with multi-layer computation, enabling scalability and flexibility in terms of modifications for hidden layers to be augmented to the network. The wearable micro Brain provides a low size, weight and power artificial on-garment intelligent wearable solution with embedded functionality enabling offline adaptive learning through the provision of interchangeable resistor synaptic weightings. The prototype has been evaluated for fault tolerance, where we have determine the robustness of the circuit when certain parts are damaged. Validations were also conducted for movements to determine if the circuit can still perform accurate computation.
abstract_zh: 受人工神经网络和神经形态计算影响的服装智能正在成为电子纺织品领域的一个研究方向。特别是，模仿大脑工作原理的生物启发尖峰神经网络在最近的 ICT 研究应用中显示出前景。利用此类技术进步和新的研究方向推动下一代电子纺织品和智能材料，我们提出了一种可穿戴微大脑，能够在基于织物的环境中进行事件驱动的人工尖峰神经网络计算。我们展示了具有多层计算的可穿戴大脑 SNN 原型，在修改隐藏层以增强网络方面实现了可扩展性和灵活性。可穿戴微大脑提供了一种尺寸小、重量轻、功耗低的人工服装智能可穿戴解决方案，具有嵌入式功能，通过提供可互换的电阻器突触权重，实现离线自适应学习。原型已经过容错能力评估，我们确定了某些部件损坏时电路的鲁棒性。还对运动进行了验证，以确定电路是否仍然可以执行准确的计算。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于织物的可穿戴微脑（uBrain），利用脉冲神经网络（SNN）实现在服装上的事件驱动计算。
AI.motivation: 随着电子纺织品的发展，需要将仿生脉冲神经网络与可穿戴设备结合，以实现低功耗、自适应的智能服装功能。
AI.method: 设计多层计算结构的可穿戴SNN原型，通过可替换电阻模拟突触权重，实现网络可扩展性，并测试其故障容错性与运动场景下的计算准确性。
AI.result: 原型验证了在部分损坏情况下的鲁棒性，且在运动状态下仍能保持计算精度，同时具备低尺寸、重量和功耗的特性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为智能服装提供了可扩展、自适应的神经形态计算方案，推动了电子纺织品向更高效、可靠的方向发展。

title: Learning physics-informed simulation models for soft robotic manipulation: A case study with dielectric elastomer actuators
title_zh: 学习用于软机器人操作的基于物理的仿真模型：介电弹性体执行器的案例研究
abstract: Soft actuators offer a safe, adaptable approach to tasks like gentle grasping and dexterous manipulation. Creating accurate models to control such systems however is challenging due to the complex physics of deformable materials. Accurate Finite Element Method (FEM) models incur prohibitive computational complexity for closed-loop use. Using a differentiable simulator is an attractive alternative, but their applicability to soft actuators and deformable materials remains underexplored. This paper presents a framework that combines the advantages of both. We learn a differentiable model consisting of a material properties neural network and an analytical dynamics model of the remainder of the manipulation task. This physics-informed model is trained using data generated from FEM, and can be used for closed-loop control and inference. We evaluate our framework on a dielectric elastomer actuator (DEA) coin-pulling task. We simulate the task of using DEA to pull a coin along a surface with frictional contact, using FEM, and evaluate the physics-informed model for simulation, control, and inference. Our model attains < 5% simulation error compared to FEM, and we use it as the basis for an MPC controller that requires fewer iterations to converge than model-free actor-critic, PD, and heuristic policies.
summary: Soft actuators offer a safe, adaptable approach to tasks like gentle grasping and dexterous manipulation. Creating accurate models to control such systems however is challenging due to the complex physics of deformable materials. Accurate Finite Element Method (FEM) models incur prohibitive computational complexity for closed-loop use. Using a differentiable simulator is an attractive alternative, but their applicability to soft actuators and deformable materials remains underexplored. This paper presents a framework that combines the advantages of both. We learn a differentiable model consisting of a material properties neural network and an analytical dynamics model of the remainder of the manipulation task. This physics-informed model is trained using data generated from FEM, and can be used for closed-loop control and inference. We evaluate our framework on a dielectric elastomer actuator (DEA) coin-pulling task. We simulate the task of using DEA to pull a coin along a surface with frictional contact, using FEM, and evaluate the physics-informed model for simulation, control, and inference. Our model attains < 5% simulation error compared to FEM, and we use it as the basis for an MPC controller that requires fewer iterations to converge than model-free actor-critic, PD, and heuristic policies.
abstract_zh: 软执行器为轻柔抓取和灵巧操作等任务提供了一种安全、适应性强的方法。然而，由于可变形材料的复杂物理原理，创建精确的模型来控制此类系统具有挑战性。精确的有限元法 (FEM) 模型对于闭环使用来说会产生过高的计算复杂性。使用可微分模拟器是一种有吸引力的替代方案，但它们对软执行器和可变形材料的适用性仍未得到充分探索。本文提出了一个结合了两者优点的框架。我们学习一个由材料属性神经网络和其余操作任务的分析动力学模型组成的可微模型。该物理模型使用 FEM 生成的数据进行训练，可用于闭环控制和推理。我们在介电弹性体致动器（DEA）拉币任务上评估我们的框架。我们使用 FEM 模拟使用 DEA 沿摩擦接触表面拉动硬币的任务，并评估用于模拟、控制和推理的物理模型。与 FEM 相比，我们的模型实现了 < 5% 的模拟误差，并且我们将其用作 MPC 控制器的基础，与无模型的 actor-critic、PD 和启发式策略相比，该控制器需要更少的迭代来收敛。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种结合物理模型和神经网络的框架，用于软体机器人操作中的精确仿真与控制，以介电弹性体致动器为例。
AI.motivation: 软体执行器在安全操作中有潜力，但准确建模困难，传统FEM计算复杂，可微分仿真器应用不足，需结合两者优势。
AI.method: 提出一个可微分模型，包含材料属性神经网络和分析动力学模型，使用FEM数据训练，用于仿真和控制。
AI.result: 模拟误差低于5%，MPC控制器收敛速度优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效结合物理模型与学习方法，提升软体机器人控制的准确性和效率。
