search_text: Learning physics-informed simulation models for soft robotic manipulation: A case study with dielectric elastomer actuators 学习用于软机器人操作的基于物理的仿真模型：介电弹性体执行器的案例研究 Soft actuators offer a safe, adaptable approach to tasks like gentle grasping and dexterous manipulation. Creating accurate models to control such systems however is challenging due to the complex physics of deformable materials. Accurate Finite Element Method (FEM) models incur prohibitive computational complexity for closed-loop use. Using a differentiable simulator is an attractive alternative, but their applicability to soft actuators and deformable materials remains underexplored. This paper presents a framework that combines the advantages of both. We learn a differentiable model consisting of a material properties neural network and an analytical dynamics model of the remainder of the manipulation task. This physics-informed model is trained using data generated from FEM, and can be used for closed-loop control and inference. We evaluate our framework on a dielectric elastomer actuator (DEA) coin-pulling task. We simulate the task of using DEA to pull a coin along a surface with frictional contact, using FEM, and evaluate the physics-informed model for simulation, control, and inference. Our model attains < 5% simulation error compared to FEM, and we use it as the basis for an MPC controller that requires fewer iterations to converge than model-free actor-critic, PD, and heuristic policies. 软执行器为轻柔抓取和灵巧操作等任务提供了一种安全、适应性强的方法。然而，由于可变形材料的复杂物理原理，创建精确的模型来控制此类系统具有挑战性。精确的有限元法 (FEM) 模型对于闭环使用来说会产生过高的计算复杂性。使用可微分模拟器是一种有吸引力的替代方案，但它们对软执行器和可变形材料的适用性仍未得到充分探索。本文提出了一个结合了两者优点的框架。我们学习一个由材料属性神经网络和其余操作任务的分析动力学模型组成的可微模型。该物理模型使用 FEM 生成的数据进行训练，可用于闭环控制和推理。我们在介电弹性体致动器（DEA）拉币任务上评估我们的框架。我们使用 FEM 模拟使用 DEA 沿摩擦接触表面拉动硬币的任务，并评估用于模拟、控制和推理的物理模型。与 FEM 相比，我们的模型实现了 < 5% 的模拟误差，并且我们将其用作 MPC 控制器的基础，与无模型的 actor-critic、PD 和启发式策略相比，该控制器需要更少的迭代来收敛。 本论文提出了一种结合物理模型和神经网络的框架，用于软体机器人操作中的精确仿真与控制，以介电弹性体致动器为例。 Manu Lahariya,Craig Innes,Chris Develder,Subramanian Ramamoorthy cs.RO,cs.AI

title: FSGANv2: Improved Subject Agnostic Face Swapping and Reenactment
title_zh: FSGANv2：改进的与主题无关的面部交换和重演
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1908.05932
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1908.05932
abstract: We present Face Swapping GAN (FSGAN) for face swapping and reenactment. Unlike previous work, we offer a subject agnostic swapping scheme that can be applied to pairs of faces without requiring training on those faces. We derive a novel iterative deep learning--based approach for face reenactment which adjusts significant pose and expression variations that can be applied to a single image or a video sequence. For video sequences, we introduce a continuous interpolation of the face views based on reenactment, Delaunay Triangulation, and barycentric coordinates. Occluded face regions are handled by a face completion network. Finally, we use a face blending network for seamless blending of the two faces while preserving the target skin color and lighting conditions. This network uses a novel Poisson blending loss combining Poisson optimization with a perceptual loss. We compare our approach to existing state-of-the-art systems and show our results to be both qualitatively and quantitatively superior. This work describes extensions of the FSGAN method, proposed in an earlier conference version of our work, as well as additional experiments and results.
summary: We present Face Swapping GAN (FSGAN) for face swapping and reenactment. Unlike previous work, we offer a subject agnostic swapping scheme that can be applied to pairs of faces without requiring training on those faces. We derive a novel iterative deep learning--based approach for face reenactment which adjusts significant pose and expression variations that can be applied to a single image or a video sequence. For video sequences, we introduce a continuous interpolation of the face views based on reenactment, Delaunay Triangulation, and barycentric coordinates. Occluded face regions are handled by a face completion network. Finally, we use a face blending network for seamless blending of the two faces while preserving the target skin color and lighting conditions. This network uses a novel Poisson blending loss combining Poisson optimization with a perceptual loss. We compare our approach to existing state-of-the-art systems and show our results to be both qualitatively and quantitatively superior. This work describes extensions of the FSGAN method, proposed in an earlier conference version of our work, as well as additional experiments and results.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了用于面部交换和重演的面部交换 GAN (FSGAN)。与之前的工作不同，我们提供了一种与主题无关的交换方案，可以应用于成对的面孔，而不需要对这些面孔进行训练。我们推导出一种新颖的基于迭代深度学习的面部重演方法，该方法可以调整可应用于单个图像或视频序列的重要姿势和表情变化。对于视频序列，我们引入了基于重演、Delaunay 三角测量和重心坐标的面部视图的连续插值。被遮挡的面部区域由面部补全网络处理。最后，我们使用面部混合网络来无缝混合两个面部，同时保留目标肤色和光照条件。该网络使用一种新颖的泊松混合损失，将泊松优化与感知损失相结合。我们将我们的方法与现有最先进的系统进行比较，并表明我们的结果在质量和数量上都更加优越。这项工作描述了我们工作的早期会议版本中提出的 FSGAN 方法的扩展，以及其他实验和结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FSGANv2方法，实现无需特定训练数据的跨人脸换脸与重演，支持单图及视频序列处理，并解决姿态、表情变化及遮挡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有换脸技术依赖特定训练数据且难以处理复杂姿态/表情变化，视频处理中存在连续性不足及遮挡区域处理缺陷。
AI.method: 提出迭代深度学习框架调整姿态表情，结合Delaunay三角剖分与重心坐标实现视频连续插值，采用补全网络处理遮挡，融合网络通过泊松优化与感知损失实现肤色/光照保持。
AI.result: 在定性与定量指标上均优于现有SOTA方法，扩展了FSGAN方法并补充更多实验验证效果。
AI.conclusion: FSGANv2有效解决了跨人脸换脸的通用性、视频连续性及遮挡处理难题，为实际应用提供更鲁棒的解决方案。

Unlike previous work, we offer a subject agnostic swapping scheme that can be applied to pairs of faces without requiring training on those faces. This network uses a novel Poisson blending loss combining Poisson optimization with a perceptual loss. We compare our approach to existing state-of-the-art systems and show our results to be both qualitatively and quantitatively superior. This work describes extensions of the FSGAN method, proposed in an earlier conference version of our work, as well as additional experiments and results. 我们提出了用于面部交换和重演的面部交换 GAN (FSGAN)。与之前的工作不同，我们提供了一种与主题无关的交换方案，可以应用于成对的面孔，而不需要对这些面孔进行训练。我们推导出一种新颖的基于迭代深度学习的面部重演方法，该方法可以调整可应用于单个图像或视频序列的重要姿势和表情变化。对于视频序列，我们引入了基于重演、Delaunay 三角测量和重心坐标的面部视图的连续插值。被遮挡的面部区域由面部补全网络处理。最后，我们使用面部混合网络来无缝混合两个面部，同时保留目标肤色和光照条件。该网络使用一种新颖的泊松混合损失，将泊松优化与感知损失相结合。我们将我们的方法与现有最先进的系统进行比较，并表明我们的结果在质量和数量上都更加优越。这项工作描述了我们工作的早期会议版本中提出的 FSGAN 方法的扩展，以及其他实验和结果。 本文提出FSGANv2方法，实现无需特定训练数据的跨人脸换脸与重演，支持单图及视频序列处理，并解决姿态、表情变化及遮挡问题。 Yuval Nirkin,Yosi Keller,Tal Hassner cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.LG

authors_text: Souradeep Dutta,Kaustubh Sridhar,Osbert Bastani,Edgar Dobriban,James Weimer,Insup Lee,Julia Parish-Morris
title: Exploring with Sticky Mittens: Reinforcement Learning with Expert Interventions via Option Templates
title_zh: 用粘性手套进行探索：通过选项模板进行专家干预的强化学习
abstract: Long horizon robot learning tasks with sparse rewards pose a significant challenge for current reinforcement learning algorithms. A key feature enabling humans to learn challenging control tasks is that they often receive expert intervention that enables them to understand the high-level structure of the task before mastering low-level control actions. We propose a framework for leveraging expert intervention to solve long-horizon reinforcement learning tasks. We consider \emph{option templates}, which are specifications encoding a potential option that can be trained using reinforcement learning. We formulate expert intervention as allowing the agent to execute option templates before learning an implementation. This enables them to use an option, before committing costly resources to learning it. We evaluate our approach on three challenging reinforcement learning problems, showing that it outperforms state-of-the-art approaches by two orders of magnitude. Videos of trained agents and our code can be found at: https://sites.google.com/view/stickymittens
summary: Long horizon robot learning tasks with sparse rewards pose a significant challenge for current reinforcement learning algorithms. A key feature enabling humans to learn challenging control tasks is that they often receive expert intervention that enables them to understand the high-level structure of the task before mastering low-level control actions. We propose a framework for leveraging expert intervention to solve long-horizon reinforcement learning tasks. We consider \emph{option templates}, which are specifications encoding a potential option that can be trained using reinforcement learning. We formulate expert intervention as allowing the agent to execute option templates before learning an implementation. This enables them to use an option, before committing costly resources to learning it. We evaluate our approach on three challenging reinforcement learning problems, showing that it outperforms state-of-the-art approaches by two orders of magnitude. Videos of trained agents and our code can be found at: https://sites.google.com/view/stickymittens
abstract_zh: 奖励稀疏的长视野机器人学习任务对当前的强化学习算法提出了重大挑战。使人类能够学习具有挑战性的控制任务的一个关键特征是，他们经常接受专家的干预，使他们能够在掌握低级控制操作之前了解任务的高级结构。我们提出了一个利用专家干预来解决长期强化学习任务的框架。我们考虑\emph{选项模板}，它们是编码可以使用强化学习进行训练的潜在选项的规范。我们将专家干预制定为允许代理在学习实施之前执行选项模板。这使他们能够在投入昂贵的资源来学习某个选项之前使用该选项。我们在三个具有挑战性的强化学习问题上评估了我们的方法，表明它的性能比最先进的方法高出两个数量级。训练有素的代理和我们的代码的视频可以在以下位置找到：https://sites.google.com/view/stickymittens

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过专家干预和选项模板解决长时域稀疏奖励强化学习任务的框架。
AI.motivation: 当前强化学习算法在处理长时域且稀疏奖励的任务时表现不佳，而人类通过专家干预理解任务高层结构来学习复杂控制任务。
AI.method: 引入选项模板（option templates）作为潜在选项的编码规范，允许智能体在学习前执行专家提供的模板，减少资源消耗。
AI.result: 在三个挑战性任务中，该方法性能优于最先进算法两个数量级，并提供训练视频和代码。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合专家干预与选项模板，框架有效解决了长时域稀疏奖励任务的挑战，显著提升学习效率。

search_text: Exploring with Sticky Mittens: Reinforcement Learning with Expert Interventions via Option Templates 用粘性手套进行探索：通过选项模板进行专家干预的强化学习 Long horizon robot learning tasks with sparse rewards pose a significant challenge for current reinforcement learning algorithms. A key feature enabling humans to learn challenging control tasks is that they often receive expert intervention that enables them to understand the high-level structure of the task before mastering low-level control actions. We propose a framework for leveraging expert intervention to solve long-horizon reinforcement learning tasks. We consider \emph{option templates}, which are specifications encoding a potential option that can be trained using reinforcement learning. We formulate expert intervention as allowing the agent to execute option templates before learning an implementation. This enables them to use an option, before committing costly resources to learning it. We evaluate our approach on three challenging reinforcement learning problems, showing that it outperforms state-of-the-art approaches by two orders of magnitude. Videos of trained agents and our code can be found at: https://sites.google.com/view/stickymittens 奖励稀疏的长视野机器人学习任务对当前的强化学习算法提出了重大挑战。使人类能够学习具有挑战性的控制任务的一个关键特征是，他们经常接受专家的干预，使他们能够在掌握低级控制操作之前了解任务的高级结构。我们提出了一个利用专家干预来解决长期强化学习任务的框架。我们考虑\emph{选项模板}，它们是编码可以使用强化学习进行训练的潜在选项的规范。我们将专家干预制定为允许代理在学习实施之前执行选项模板。这使他们能够在投入昂贵的资源来学习某个选项之前使用该选项。我们在三个具有挑战性的强化学习问题上评估了我们的方法，表明它的性能比最先进的方法高出两个数量级。训练有素的代理和我们的代码的视频可以在以下位置找到：https://sites.google.com/view/stickymittens 本文提出一种通过专家干预和选项模板解决长时域稀疏奖励强化学习任务的框架。 Souradeep Dutta,Kaustubh Sridhar,Osbert Bastani,Edgar Dobriban,James Weimer,Insup Lee,Julia Parish-Morris cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

title: Image reconstruction algorithms in radio interferometry: from handcrafted to learned regularization denoisers
title_zh: 无线电干涉测量中的图像重建算法：从手工制作到学习正则化降噪器
comment: To match revision for MNRAS publication. The new version includes the development of, and benchmarking with, a pure end-to-end DNN approach
comments: To match revision for MNRAS publication. The new version includes the development of, and benchmarking with, a pure end-to-end DNN approach
abstract: We introduce a new class of iterative image reconstruction algorithms for radio interferometry, at the interface of convex optimization and deep learning, inspired by plug-and-play methods. The approach consists in learning a prior image model by training a deep neural network (DNN) as a denoiser, and substituting it for the handcrafted proximal regularization operator of an optimization algorithm. The proposed AIRI (``AI for Regularization in radio-interferometric Imaging'') framework, for imaging complex intensity structure with diffuse and faint emission from visibility data, inherits the robustness and interpretability of optimization, and the learning power and speed of networks. Our approach relies on three steps. Firstly, we design a low dynamic range training database from optical intensity images. Secondly, we train a DNN denoiser at a noise level inferred from the signal-to-noise ratio of the data. We use training losses enhanced with a nonexpansiveness term ensuring algorithm convergence, and including on-the-fly database dynamic range enhancement via exponentiation. Thirdly, we plug the learned denoiser into the forward-backward optimization algorithm, resulting in a simple iterative structure alternating a denoising step with a gradient-descent data-fidelity step. We have validated AIRI against CLEAN, optimization algorithms of the SARA family, and a DNN trained to reconstruct the image directly from visibility data. Simulation results show that AIRI is competitive in imaging quality with SARA and its unconstrained forward-backward-based version uSARA, while providing significant acceleration. CLEAN remains faster but offers lower quality. The end-to-end DNN offers further acceleration, but with far lower quality than AIRI.
summary: We introduce a new class of iterative image reconstruction algorithms for radio interferometry, at the interface of convex optimization and deep learning, inspired by plug-and-play methods. The approach consists in learning a prior image model by training a deep neural network (DNN) as a denoiser, and substituting it for the handcrafted proximal regularization operator of an optimization algorithm. The proposed AIRI (``AI for Regularization in radio-interferometric Imaging'') framework, for imaging complex intensity structure with diffuse and faint emission from visibility data, inherits the robustness and interpretability of optimization, and the learning power and speed of networks. Our approach relies on three steps. Firstly, we design a low dynamic range training database from optical intensity images. Secondly, we train a DNN denoiser at a noise level inferred from the signal-to-noise ratio of the data. We use training losses enhanced with a nonexpansiveness term ensuring algorithm convergence, and including on-the-fly database dynamic range enhancement via exponentiation. Thirdly, we plug the learned denoiser into the forward-backward optimization algorithm, resulting in a simple iterative structure alternating a denoising step with a gradient-descent data-fidelity step. We have validated AIRI against CLEAN, optimization algorithms of the SARA family, and a DNN trained to reconstruct the image directly from visibility data. Simulation results show that AIRI is competitive in imaging quality with SARA and its unconstrained forward-backward-based version uSARA, while providing significant acceleration. CLEAN remains faster but offers lower quality. The end-to-end DNN offers further acceleration, but with far lower quality than AIRI.
abstract_zh: 受即插即用方法的启发，我们在凸优化和深度学习的接口上引入了一种用于无线电干涉测量的新型迭代图像重建算法。该方法包括通过训练深度神经网络 (DNN) 作为降噪器来学习先验图像模型，并将其替换为优化算法的手工制作的近端正则化算子。所提出的 AIRI（“无线电干涉成像中的人工智能正则化”）框架，用于对可见性数据中具有漫射和微弱发射的复杂强度结构进行成像，继承了优化的鲁棒性和可解释性，以及网络的学习能力和速度。我们的方法依赖于三个步骤。首先，我们根据光强度图像设计一个低动态范围训练数据库。其次，我们在从数据信噪比推断的噪声水平上训练 DNN 降噪器。我们使用通过非扩展性项增强的训练损失，确保算法收敛，并包括通过求幂来增强动态数据库动态范围。第三，我们将学习到的降噪器插入前向-后向优化算法中，从而产生一个简单的迭代结构，将降噪步骤与梯度下降数据保真步骤交替。我们已经针对 CLEAN、SARA 系列优化算法以及经过训练可直接从可见性数据重建图像的 DNN 验证了 AIRI。仿真结果表明，AIRI 在成像质量方面与 SARA 及其基于无约束前向-后向版本 uSARA 具有竞争力，同时提供显着的加速。 CLEAN 仍然更快，但质量较低。端到端 DNN 提供了进一步的加速，但质量远低于 AIRI。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合凸优化与深度学习的新型迭代图像重建算法AIRI，用于射电干涉成像中的复杂强度结构重建。
AI.motivation: 传统射电干涉成像方法（如CLEAN算法）速度较快但质量较低，而端到端深度学习方法虽加速但重建质量显著下降，需平衡速度与质量。
AI.method: 分三步：1）构建低动态范围训练数据库；2）训练带非扩张性约束的去噪神经网络；3）将学习到的去噪器嵌入前向-反向优化算法，交替进行去噪与梯度下降步骤。
AI.result: AIRI在成像质量上优于CLEAN，与SARA家族算法相当且速度更快；端到端DNN虽更快但质量远低于AIRI。
AI.conclusion: AIRI通过融合优化算法的鲁棒性与深度学习的高效性，在射电干涉成像中实现了质量与速度的平衡。

The approach consists in learning a prior image model by training a deep neural network (DNN) as a denoiser, and substituting it for the handcrafted proximal regularization operator of an optimization algorithm. We have validated AIRI against CLEAN, optimization algorithms of the SARA family, and a DNN trained to reconstruct the image directly from visibility data. Simulation results show that AIRI is competitive in imaging quality with SARA and its unconstrained forward-backward-based version uSARA, while providing significant acceleration. title: Deep Neural Network for Automatic Assessment of Dysphonia
title_zh: 用于自动评估发声困难的深度神经网络
abstract: The purpose of this work is to contribute to the understanding and improvement of deep neural networks in the field of vocal quality. A neural network that predicts the perceptual assessment of overall severity of dysphonia in GRBAS scale is obtained. The design focuses on amplitude perturbations, frequency perturbations, and noise. Results are compared with performance of human raters on the same data. Both the precision and the mean absolute error of the neural network are close to human intra-rater performance, exceeding inter-rater performance.
summary: The purpose of this work is to contribute to the understanding and improvement of deep neural networks in the field of vocal quality. A neural network that predicts the perceptual assessment of overall severity of dysphonia in GRBAS scale is obtained. The design focuses on amplitude perturbations, frequency perturbations, and noise. Results are compared with performance of human raters on the same data. Both the precision and the mean absolute error of the neural network are close to human intra-rater performance, exceeding inter-rater performance.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的目的是为理解和改进声音质量领域的深度神经网络做出贡献。获得了预测 GRBAS 量表中发声困难总体严重程度感知评估的神经网络。该设计重点关注振幅扰动、频率扰动和噪声。将结果与人类评估者在相同数据上的表现进行比较。神经网络的精度和平均绝对误差都接近人类评分者内的表现，超过了评分者间的表现。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种深度神经网络模型，用于自动评估语音障碍（dysphonia）的严重程度，并在GRBAS评分标准下与人类评分者进行比较。
AI.motivation: 旨在提升深度神经网络在语音质量分析领域的应用，开发一种能够替代或辅助人类评分的自动评估系统，以提高评估的一致性和效率。
AI.method: 设计神经网络模型，重点分析语音中的振幅波动、频率波动和噪声特征，通过比较模型与人类评分者的精度和平均绝对误差来验证性能。
AI.result: 神经网络的精度和平均绝对误差接近人类内部评分者的表现，且优于人类评分者之间的差异性表现。
AI.conclusion: 深度神经网络在自动评估语音障碍严重程度任务中表现出与人类相当的性能，为临床语音障碍评估提供了可靠的技术支持。

authors_text: Anthony Sarah,Daniel Cummings,Sharath Nittur Sridhar,Sairam Sundaresan,Maciej Szankin,Tristan Webb,J. Pablo Munoz
title: A Hardware-Aware System for Accelerating Deep Neural Network Optimization
title_zh: 用于加速深度神经网络优化的硬件感知系统
abstract: Recent advances in Neural Architecture Search (NAS) which extract specialized hardware-aware configurations (a.k.a. "sub-networks") from a hardware-agnostic "super-network" have become increasingly popular. While considerable effort has been employed towards improving the first stage, namely, the training of the super-network, the search for derivative high-performing sub-networks is still largely under-explored. For example, some recent network morphism techniques allow a super-network to be trained once and then have hardware-specific networks extracted from it as needed. These methods decouple the super-network training from the sub-network search and thus decrease the computational burden of specializing to different hardware platforms. We propose a comprehensive system that automatically and efficiently finds sub-networks from a pre-trained super-network that are optimized to different performance metrics and hardware configurations. By combining novel search tactics and algorithms with intelligent use of predictors, we significantly decrease the time needed to find optimal sub-networks from a given super-network. Further, our approach does not require the super-network to be refined for the target task a priori, thus allowing it to interface with any super-network. We demonstrate through extensive experiments that our system works seamlessly with existing state-of-the-art super-network training methods in multiple domains. Moreover, we show how novel search tactics paired with evolutionary algorithms can accelerate the search process for ResNet50, MobileNetV3 and Transformer while maintaining objective space Pareto front diversity and demonstrate an 8x faster search result than the state-of-the-art Bayesian optimization WeakNAS approach.
summary: Recent advances in Neural Architecture Search (NAS) which extract specialized hardware-aware configurations (a.k.a. "sub-networks") from a hardware-agnostic "super-network" have become increasingly popular. While considerable effort has been employed towards improving the first stage, namely, the training of the super-network, the search for derivative high-performing sub-networks is still largely under-explored. For example, some recent network morphism techniques allow a super-network to be trained once and then have hardware-specific networks extracted from it as needed. These methods decouple the super-network training from the sub-network search and thus decrease the computational burden of specializing to different hardware platforms. We propose a comprehensive system that automatically and efficiently finds sub-networks from a pre-trained super-network that are optimized to different performance metrics and hardware configurations. By combining novel search tactics and algorithms with intelligent use of predictors, we significantly decrease the time needed to find optimal sub-networks from a given super-network. Further, our approach does not require the super-network to be refined for the target task a priori, thus allowing it to interface with any super-network. We demonstrate through extensive experiments that our system works seamlessly with existing state-of-the-art super-network training methods in multiple domains. Moreover, we show how novel search tactics paired with evolutionary algorithms can accelerate the search process for ResNet50, MobileNetV3 and Transformer while maintaining objective space Pareto front diversity and demonstrate an 8x faster search result than the state-of-the-art Bayesian optimization WeakNAS approach.
abstract_zh: 神经架构搜索（NAS）的最新进展越来越受欢迎，它从与硬件无关的“超级网络”中提取专门的硬件感知配置（也称为“子网络”）。尽管在改进第一阶段（即超级网络的训练）方面付出了相当大的努力，但对派生的高性能子网络的搜索仍然在很大程度上尚未得到充分探索。例如，最近的一些网络态射技术允许对超级网络进行一次训练，然后根据需要从中提取特定于硬件的网络。这些方法将超级网络训练与子网络搜索解耦，从而减少专门针对不同硬件平台的计算负担。我们提出了一个综合系统，可以自动有效地从预先训练的超级网络中找到子网络，并针对不同的性能指标和硬件配置进行了优化。通过将新颖的搜索策略和算法与预测器的智能使用相结合，我们显着减少了从给定超级网络中找到最佳子网络所需的时间。此外，我们的方法不需要先验地针对目标任务对超级网络进行细化，从而允许它与任何超级网络进行交互。我们通过广泛的实验证明，我们的系统可以与多个领域现有的最先进的超级网络训练方法无缝协作。此外，我们还展示了新颖的搜索策略与进化算法相结合如何加速 ResNet50、MobileNetV3 和 Transformer 的搜索过程，同时保持目标空间 Pareto 前沿多样性，并展示比最先进的贝叶斯优化 WeakNAS 方法快 8 倍的搜索结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种硬件感知系统，通过从预训练的超网络中自动高效寻找优化子网络，以加速深度神经网络的优化过程。
AI.motivation: 尽管超网络训练已取得进展，但针对不同硬件配置和性能指标的子网络搜索仍存在效率低下问题，现有方法难以兼顾搜索速度与解的多样性。
AI.method: 结合新型搜索策略、算法及预测器，利用进化算法加速ResNet50、MobileNetV3和Transformer等模型的子网络搜索，无需预先优化超网络即可适配多种硬件配置。
AI.result: 实验表明系统可无缝兼容现有超网络训练方法，在保持Pareto前沿多样性的同时，搜索速度较WeakNAS方法提升8倍。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过创新搜索技术与预测机制，实现了跨硬件平台的高效子网络优化，为深度学习模型的硬件适配提供了通用解决方案。

title: Model Attribution of Face-swap Deepfake Videos
title_zh: 换脸 Deepfake 视频的模型归因
abstract: AI-created face-swap videos, commonly known as Deepfakes, have attracted wide attention as powerful impersonation attacks. Existing research on Deepfakes mostly focuses on binary detection to distinguish between real and fake videos. However, it is also important to determine the specific generation model for a fake video, which can help attribute it to the source for forensic investigation. In this paper, we fill this gap by studying the model attribution problem of Deepfake videos. We first introduce a new dataset with DeepFakes from Different Models (DFDM) based on several Autoencoder models. Specifically, five generation models with variations in encoder, decoder, intermediate layer, input resolution, and compression ratio have been used to generate a total of 6,450 Deepfake videos based on the same input. Then we take Deepfakes model attribution as a multiclass classification task and propose a spatial and temporal attention based method to explore the differences among Deepfakes in the new dataset. Experimental evaluation shows that most existing Deepfakes detection methods failed in Deepfakes model attribution, while the proposed method achieved over 70% accuracy on the high-quality DFDM dataset.
summary: AI-created face-swap videos, commonly known as Deepfakes, have attracted wide attention as powerful impersonation attacks. Existing research on Deepfakes mostly focuses on binary detection to distinguish between real and fake videos. However, it is also important to determine the specific generation model for a fake video, which can help attribute it to the source for forensic investigation. In this paper, we fill this gap by studying the model attribution problem of Deepfake videos. We first introduce a new dataset with DeepFakes from Different Models (DFDM) based on several Autoencoder models. Specifically, five generation models with variations in encoder, decoder, intermediate layer, input resolution, and compression ratio have been used to generate a total of 6,450 Deepfake videos based on the same input. Then we take Deepfakes model attribution as a multiclass classification task and propose a spatial and temporal attention based method to explore the differences among Deepfakes in the new dataset. Experimental evaluation shows that most existing Deepfakes detection methods failed in Deepfakes model attribution, while the proposed method achieved over 70% accuracy on the high-quality DFDM dataset.
abstract_zh: 人工智能制作的换脸视频，俗称 Deepfakes，作为强大的冒充攻击而引起了广泛关注。现有的 Deepfakes 研究主要集中在二进制检测以区分真假视频。然而，确定虚假视频的具体生成模型也很重要，这有助于将其归因于取证调查的来源。在本文中，我们通过研究 Deepfake 视频的模型归因问题来填补这一空白。我们首先引入基于多个自动编码器模型的 DeepFakes from Different Models (DFDM) 的新数据集。具体来说，使用编码器、解码器、中间层、输入分辨率和压缩比各不相同的五代模型，基于相同的输入生成了总共 6,450 个 Deepfake 视频。然后，我们将 Deepfakes 模型归因作为多类分类任务，并提出一种基于空间和时间注意力的方法来探索新数据集中 Deepfakes 之间的差异。实验评估表明，大多数现有的 Deepfakes 检测方法在 Deepfakes 模型归因中失败，而本文提出的方法在高质量 DFDM 数据集上实现了 70% 以上的准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文研究深度伪造视频的模型归属问题，提出基于空间和时间注意力机制的方法，并构建了包含不同模型生成的深度伪造视频的数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注真假视频的二分类检测，但确定伪造视频的具体生成模型对法证调查至关重要，而这一问题尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 构建了基于多种自编码器模型的DFDM数据集，提出结合空间和时间注意力机制的多分类方法，探索不同模型生成的深度伪造视频差异。
AI.result: 实验表明现有检测方法在模型归属任务中表现不佳，而所提方法在高质量DFDM数据集上达到70%以上的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法有效解决了深度伪造视频的模型归属问题，凸显了该任务的重要性，并为后续研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Xiaoxi Wei,A. Aldo Faisal,Moritz Grosse-Wentrup,Alexandre Gramfort,Sylvain Chevallier,Vinay Jayaram,Camille Jeunet,Stylianos Bakas,Siegfried Ludwig,Konstantinos Barmpas,Mehdi Bahri,Yannis Panagakis,Nikolaos Laskaris,Dimitrios A. Adamos,Stefanos Zafeiriou,William C. Duong,Stephen M. Gordon,Vernon J. Lawhern,Maciej Śliwowski,Vincent Rouanne,Piotr Tempczyk
title: 2021 BEETL Competition: Advancing Transfer Learning for Subject Independence & Heterogenous EEG Data Sets
title_zh: 2021 BEETLE 竞赛：推进主体独立性和异构脑电图数据集的迁移学习
comment: PrePrint of the NeurIPS2021 BEETL Competition Submitted to Proceedings of Machine Learning Research (PMLR)
comments: PrePrint of the NeurIPS2021 BEETL Competition Submitted to Proceedings of Machine Learning Research (PMLR)
abstract: Transfer learning and meta-learning offer some of the most promising avenues to unlock the scalability of healthcare and consumer technologies driven by biosignal data. This is because current methods cannot generalise well across human subjects' data and handle learning from different heterogeneously collected data sets, thus limiting the scale of training data. On the other side, developments in transfer learning would benefit significantly from a real-world benchmark with immediate practical application. Therefore, we pick electroencephalography (EEG) as an exemplar for what makes biosignal machine learning hard. We design two transfer learning challenges around diagnostics and Brain-Computer-Interfacing (BCI), that have to be solved in the face of low signal-to-noise ratios, major variability among subjects, differences in the data recording sessions and techniques, and even between the specific BCI tasks recorded in the dataset. Task 1 is centred on the field of medical diagnostics, addressing automatic sleep stage annotation across subjects. Task 2 is centred on Brain-Computer Interfacing (BCI), addressing motor imagery decoding across both subjects and data sets. The BEETL competition with its over 30 competing teams and its 3 winning entries brought attention to the potential of deep transfer learning and combinations of set theory and conventional machine learning techniques to overcome the challenges. The results set a new state-of-the-art for the real-world BEETL benchmark.

This is because current methods cannot generalise well across human subjects' data and handle learning from different heterogeneously collected data sets, thus limiting the scale of training data. On the other side, developments in transfer learning would benefit significantly from a real-world benchmark with immediate practical application. Therefore, we pick electroencephalography (EEG) as an exemplar for what makes biosignal machine learning hard. We design two transfer learning challenges around diagnostics and Brain-Computer-Interfacing (BCI), that have to be solved in the face of low signal-to-noise ratios, major variability among subjects, differences in the data recording sessions and techniques, and even between the specific BCI tasks recorded in the dataset. Task 1 is centred on the field of medical diagnostics, addressing automatic sleep stage annotation across subjects. Task 2 is centred on Brain-Computer Interfacing (BCI), addressing motor imagery decoding across both subjects and data sets. The BEETL competition with its over 30 competing teams and its 3 winning entries brought attention to the potential of deep transfer learning and combinations of set theory and conventional machine learning techniques to overcome the challenges. The results set a new state-of-the-art for the real-world BEETL benchmark.
abstract_zh: 迁移学习和元学习提供了一些最有前途的途径来释放生物信号数据驱动的医疗保健和消费者技术的可扩展性。这是因为当前的方法不能很好地泛化人类受试者的数据并处理来自不同异构收集的数据集的学习，从而限制了训练数据的规模。另一方面，迁移学习的发展将大大受益于具有直接实际应用的现实世界基准。因此，我们选择脑电图（EEG）作为生物信号机器学习困难的一个例子。我们围绕诊断和脑机接口 (BCI) 设计了两个迁移学习挑战，必须在低信噪比、受试者之间存在较大差异、数据记录会话和技术的差异，甚至数据集中记录的特定 BCI 任务之间存在差异的情况下解决这些挑战。任务 1 以医疗诊断领域为中心，解决跨受试者的自动睡眠阶段注释问题。任务 2 的重点是脑机接口 (BCI)，解决跨受试者和数据集的运动想象解码问题。 BEETL 竞赛有 30 多个参赛团队和 3 个获奖作品，引起了人们对深度迁移学习以及集合论和传统机器学习技术相结合克服挑战的潜力的关注。结果为现实世界的 BEETL 基准设定了新的最先进水平。

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了2021年BEETL竞赛，旨在通过迁移学习解决脑电图（EEG）数据的跨被试独立性和异构数据集挑战，设计了医疗诊断与脑机接口两项任务。
AI.motivation: 当前方法难以跨被试泛化且处理异构数据集，限制了训练数据规模，亟需真实场景基准推动迁移学习发展。
AI.method: 设计两项挑战任务（睡眠阶段标注与运动想象解码），结合深度迁移学习与集合论及传统机器学习方法，通过竞赛验证技术效果。
AI.result: 竞赛吸引30余支队伍参与，三支优胜团队成果将BEETL基准推向新状态，证明迁移学习在真实场景中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: BEETL竞赛展示了深度迁移学习与混合方法在解决EEG数据挑战中的潜力，为生物信号机器学习提供了实践方向。

search_text: 2021 BEETL Competition: Advancing Transfer Learning for Subject Independence & Heterogenous EEG Data Sets 2021 BEETLE 竞赛：推进主体独立性和异构脑电图数据集的迁移学习 Transfer learning and meta-learning offer some of the most promising avenues to unlock the scalability of healthcare and consumer technologies driven by biosignal data. This is because current methods cannot generalise well across human subjects' data and handle learning from different heterogeneously collected data sets, thus limiting the scale of training data. On the other side, developments in transfer learning would benefit significantly from a real-world benchmark with immediate practical application. Therefore, we pick electroencephalography (EEG) as an exemplar for what makes biosignal machine learning hard. We design two transfer learning challenges around diagnostics and Brain-Computer-Interfacing (BCI), that have to be solved in the face of low signal-to-noise ratios, major variability among subjects, differences in the data recording sessions and techniques, and even between the specific BCI tasks recorded in the dataset. Task 1 is centred on the field of medical diagnostics, addressing automatic sleep stage annotation across subjects. Task 2 is centred on Brain-Computer Interfacing (BCI), addressing motor imagery decoding across both subjects and data sets. The BEETL competition with its over 30 competing teams and its 3 winning entries brought attention to the potential of deep transfer learning and combinations of set theory and conventional machine learning techniques to overcome the challenges. The results set a new state-of-the-art for the real-world BEETL benchmark. 迁移学习和元学习提供了一些最有前途的途径来释放生物信号数据驱动的医疗保健和消费者技术的可扩展性。这是因为当前的方法不能很好地泛化人类受试者的数据并处理来自不同异构收集的数据集的学习，从而限制了训练数据的规模。另一方面，迁移学习的发展将大大受益于具有直接实际应用的现实世界基准。因此，我们选择脑电图（EEG）作为生物信号机器学习困难的一个例子。我们围绕诊断和脑机接口 (BCI) 设计了两个迁移学习挑战，必须在低信噪比、受试者之间存在较大差异、数据记录会话和技术的差异，甚至数据集中记录的特定 BCI 任务之间存在差异的情况下解决这些挑战。任务 1 以医疗诊断领域为中心，解决跨受试者的自动睡眠阶段注释问题。任务 2 的重点是脑机接口 (BCI)，解决跨受试者和数据集的运动想象解码问题。 BEETL 竞赛有 30 多个参赛团队和 3 个获奖作品，引起了人们对深度迁移学习以及集合论和传统机器学习技术相结合克服挑战的潜力的关注。结果为现实世界的 BEETL 基准设定了新的最先进水平。 该论文介绍了2021年BEETL竞赛，旨在通过迁移学习解决脑电图（EEG）数据的跨被试独立性和异构数据集挑战，设计了医疗诊断与脑机接口两项任务。 Xiaoxi Wei,A. title: Multi-View Fusion Transformer for Sensor-Based Human Activity Recognition
title_zh: 用于基于传感器的人体活动识别的多视图融合变压器
abstract: As a fundamental problem in ubiquitous computing and machine learning, sensor-based human activity recognition (HAR) has drawn extensive attention and made great progress in recent years. HAR aims to recognize human activities based on the availability of rich time-series data collected from multi-modal sensors such as accelerometers and gyroscopes. However, recent deep learning methods are focusing on one view of the data, i.e., the temporal view, while shallow methods tend to utilize the hand-craft features for recognition, e.g., the statistics view. In this paper, to extract a better feature for advancing the performance, we propose a novel method, namely multi-view fusion transformer (MVFT) along with a novel attention mechanism. First, MVFT encodes three views of information, i.e., the temporal, frequent, and statistical views to generate multi-view features. Second, the novel attention mechanism uncovers inner- and cross-view clues to catalyze mutual interactions between three views for detailed relation modeling. Moreover, extensive experiments on two datasets illustrate the superiority of our methods over several state-of-the-art methods.
summary: As a fundamental problem in ubiquitous computing and machine learning, sensor-based human activity recognition (HAR) has drawn extensive attention and made great progress in recent years. HAR aims to recognize human activities based on the availability of rich time-series data collected from multi-modal sensors such as accelerometers and gyroscopes. However, recent deep learning methods are focusing on one view of the data, i.e., the temporal view, while shallow methods tend to utilize the hand-craft features for recognition, e.g., the statistics view. In this paper, to extract a better feature for advancing the performance, we propose a novel method, namely multi-view fusion transformer (MVFT) along with a novel attention mechanism. First, MVFT encodes three views of information, i.e., the temporal, frequent, and statistical views to generate multi-view features. Second, the novel attention mechanism uncovers inner- and cross-view clues to catalyze mutual interactions between three views for detailed relation modeling. Moreover, extensive experiments on two datasets illustrate the superiority of our methods over several state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 作为普适计算和机器学习的一个基本问题，基于传感器的人体活动识别（HAR）近年来引起了广泛的关注并取得了长足的进展。 HAR 旨在根据从加速度计和陀螺仪等多模态传感器收集的丰富时间序列数据来识别人类活动。然而，最近的深度学习方法侧重于数据的一种视图，即时间视图，而浅层方法倾向于利用手工特征进行识别，例如统计视图。在本文中，为了提取更好的特征来提高性能，我们提出了一种新方法，即多视图融合变换器（MVFT）以及一种新的注意机制。首先，MVFT 对信息的三个视图（即时间​​视图、频繁视图和统计视图）进行编码，以生成多视图特征。其次，新颖的注意力机制揭示了内部和跨视图线索，以催化三个视图之间的相互交互，以进行详细的关系建模。此外，对两个数据集的广泛实验说明了我们的方法相对于几种最先进方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多视角融合Transformer（MVFT）方法，通过结合时间、频率和统计三个视角的传感器数据，提升人类活动识别（HAR）的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法仅关注单一数据视角（如时间视角），而传统方法依赖手工特征（如统计视角），难以充分利用多视角信息，导致HAR性能受限。
AI.method: MVFT通过编码时间、频率和统计三个视角的信息生成多视角特征，并设计新型注意力机制挖掘视角内及跨视角的关联，增强多视角交互与关系建模。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上的实验表明，MVFT优于多种先进方法，验证了其在HAR任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多视角融合与注意力机制的结合显著提升了传感器数据驱动的HAR性能，为未来研究提供了新方向。

title: A Therapeutic Stress Ball to Monitor Hand Dexterity and Electrodermal Activity
title_zh: 用于监测手部灵活性和皮肤电活动的治疗性压力球
abstract: This work presents a triboelectric nanogenerator-based (TENG) therapeutic stress ball to provide gesture monitoring and physiological data on patients requiring physical therapy of various degrees. The device utilizes a 5-layer stack of silicone and braided silver-coated nylon rope electrodes to create a sensor network that monitors 40-points across the surface of a semi-spherical prototype. A modified version of a standard ECG circuit was utilized to provide proper loading, noise rejection, filtering, and phase of the TENG signals along with multiplexing of the many electrodes. All system components were selected with a final embedded system in mind. Testing of the device was conducted utilizing an Arduino Uno and an EVAL-AD5940BIOZ evaluation board for electrodermal activity for stress and/or pain after exercise. An accelerometer was included for device activation and hand tremor detection. Upon testing, the self-powered TENG sensors produce positive impulses upon contact and negative impulses upon release of contact from the surface of the ball. Furthermore, finger removal detection was demonstrated by capturing the associated negative impulse by maintaining the bipolar signal in our conditioning circuit. EDA results indicate silver-coated nylon as a potentially good dry-electrode which can be used with even more electrodes for bio-impedance or ECG capture to further expand the device functionality. A MATLAB-based GUI was designed to provide the user with data tracking and visual monitoring of the data via serial communication from the microcontrollers. Finally, it should be noted that this provides a means for low-cost low-power gesture tracking without the use of flexible capacitive grid arrays and provides the user with a pleasant tactile experience that one expects form a stress ball due to its unique material design.

A MATLAB-based GUI was designed to provide the user with data tracking and visual monitoring of the data via serial communication from the microcontrollers. Finally, it should be noted that this provides a means for low-cost low-power gesture tracking without the use of flexible capacitive grid arrays and provides the user with a pleasant tactile experience that one expects form a stress ball due to its unique material design.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种基于摩擦纳米发电机（TENG）的治疗压力球，可为需要不同程度物理治疗的患者提供手势监测和生理数据。该设备利用 5 层硅树脂和编织镀银尼龙绳电极堆叠来创建一个传感器网络，可监控半球形原型表面的 40 个点。使用标准 ECG 电路的修改版本来提供适当的负载、噪声抑制、滤波和 TENG 信号相位以及多个电极的复用。所有系统组件的选择都考虑到最终的嵌入式系统。该设备的测试是利用 Arduino Uno 和 EVAL-AD5940BIOZ 评估板进行的，用于针对运动后压力和/或疼痛的皮肤电活动。加速度计用于设备激活和手部颤抖检测。经测试，自供电 TENG 传感器在接触球表面时产生正脉冲，在与球表面释放接触时产生负脉冲。此外，通过在我们的调节电路中保持双极性信号来捕获相关的负脉冲，从而演示了手指移除检测。 EDA 结果表明，镀银尼龙是一种潜在的良好干电极，可以与更多电极一起使用，用于生物阻抗或心电图捕获，以进一步扩展设备功能。基于 MATLAB 的 GUI 旨在通过微控制器的串行通信为用户提供数据跟踪和数据可视化监控。最后，应该指出的是，这提供了一种无需使用灵活的电容网格阵列即可进行低成本低功耗手势跟踪的方法，并为用户提供了令人愉悦的触觉体验，由于其独特的材料设计，人们期望形成压力球。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于摩擦纳米发电机（TENG）的治疗性减压球，用于监测手部灵巧度和电生理活动，结合干电极技术实现低成本、低功耗的康复监测。
AI.motivation: 传统康复设备成本高且依赖复杂传感器，需开发一种自供电、低成本且能同时监测运动和生理信号的便携式装置，以辅助物理治疗和压力管理。
AI.method: 采用5层硅胶与银包覆尼龙绳电极堆叠结构构建传感器网络，结合改进ECG电路处理TENG信号，通过Arduino Uno和AD5940评估板采集EDA数据，并设计MATLAB GUI进行数据可视化。
AI.result: TENG传感器可检测接触/脱离产生的正负脉冲，银包覆尼龙作为干电极有效获取EDA信号，系统实现手部动作追踪与震颤检测，且具备良好的触觉反馈体验。
AI.conclusion: 该减压球提供了一种无需柔性电容阵列的低成本解决方案，兼具康复监测与心理减压功能，未来可扩展至生物阻抗或ECG信号采集。

search_text: A Therapeutic Stress Ball to Monitor Hand Dexterity and Electrodermal Activity 用于监测手部灵活性和皮肤电活动的治疗性压力球 This work presents a triboelectric nanogenerator-based (TENG) therapeutic stress ball to provide gesture monitoring and physiological data on patients requiring physical therapy of various degrees. The device utilizes a 5-layer stack of silicone and braided silver-coated nylon rope electrodes to create a sensor network that monitors 40-points across the surface of a semi-spherical prototype. A modified version of a standard ECG circuit was utilized to provide proper loading, noise rejection, filtering, and phase of the TENG signals along with multiplexing of the many electrodes. All system components were selected with a final embedded system in mind. Testing of the device was conducted utilizing an Arduino Uno and an EVAL-AD5940BIOZ evaluation board for electrodermal activity for stress and/or pain after exercise. An accelerometer was included for device activation and hand tremor detection. Upon testing, the self-powered TENG sensors produce positive impulses upon contact and negative impulses upon release of contact from the surface of the ball. Furthermore, finger removal detection was demonstrated by capturing the associated negative impulse by maintaining the bipolar signal in our conditioning circuit. EDA results indicate silver-coated nylon as a potentially good dry-electrode which can be used with even more electrodes for bio-impedance or ECG capture to further expand the device functionality. A MATLAB-based GUI was designed to provide the user with data tracking and visual monitoring of the data via serial communication from the microcontrollers. Finally, it should be noted that this provides a means for low-cost low-power gesture tracking without the use of flexible capacitive grid arrays and provides the user with a pleasant tactile experience that one expects form a stress ball due to its unique material design. 这项工作提出了一种基于摩擦纳米发电机（TENG）的治疗压力球，可为需要不同程度物理治疗的患者提供手势监测和生理数据。该设备利用 5 层硅树脂和编织镀银尼龙绳电极堆叠来创建一个传感器网络，可监控半球形原型表面的 40 个点。使用标准 ECG 电路的修改版本来提供适当的负载、噪声抑制、滤波和 TENG 信号相位以及多个电极的复用。所有系统组件的选择都考虑到最终的嵌入式系统。该设备的测试是利用 Arduino Uno 和 EVAL-AD5940BIOZ 评估板进行的，用于针对运动后压力和/或疼痛的皮肤电活动。加速度计用于设备激活和手部颤抖检测。经测试，自供电 TENG 传感器在接触球表面时产生正脉冲，在与球表面释放接触时产生负脉冲。此外，通过在我们的调节电路中保持双极性信号来捕获相关的负脉冲，从而演示了手指移除检测。 EDA 结果表明，镀银尼龙是一种潜在的良好干电极，可以与更多电极一起使用，用于生物阻抗或心电图捕获，以进一步扩展设备功能。基于 MATLAB 的 GUI 旨在通过微控制器的串行通信为用户提供数据跟踪和数据可视化监控。最后，应该指出的是，这提供了一种无需使用灵活的电容网格阵列即可进行低成本低功耗手势跟踪的方法，并为用户提供了令人愉悦的触觉体验，由于其独特的材料设计，人们期望形成压力球。 本文提出了一种基于摩擦纳米发电机（TENG）的治疗性减压球，用于监测手部灵巧度和电生理活动，结合干电极技术实现低成本、低功耗的康复监测。 Fereshteh Shahmiri,Steven Schwartz,Can Usanmaz physics.med-ph,cs.HC

authors_text: Simiao Ren,Wei Hu,Kyle Bradbury,Dylan Harrison-Atlas,Laura Malaguzzi Valeri,Brian Murray,Jordan M. Malof
title: Automated Extraction of Energy Systems Information from Remotely Sensed Data: A Review and Analysis
title_zh: 从遥感数据中自动提取能源系统信息：回顾与分析
comment: This is only an Arxived version. For actual publication please refer to https://doi.org/10.1016/j.apenergy.2022.119876
comments: This is only an Arxived version. For actual publication please refer to https://doi.org/10.1016/j.apenergy.2022.119876
abstract: High quality energy systems information is a crucial input to energy systems research, modeling, and decision-making. Unfortunately, actionable information about energy systems is often of limited availability, incomplete, or only accessible for a substantial fee or through a non-disclosure agreement. Recently, remotely sensed data (e.g., satellite imagery, aerial photography) have emerged as a potentially rich source of energy systems information. However, the use of these data is frequently challenged by its sheer volume and complexity, precluding manual analysis. Recent breakthroughs in machine learning have enabled automated and rapid extraction of useful information from remotely sensed data, facilitating large-scale acquisition of critical energy system variables. Here we present a systematic review of the literature on this emerging topic, providing an in-depth survey and review of papers published within the past two decades. We first taxonomize the existing literature into ten major areas, spanning the energy value chain. Within each research area, we distill and critically discuss major features that are relevant to energy researchers, including, for example, key challenges regarding the accessibility and reliability of the methods. We then synthesize our findings to identify limitations and trends in the literature as a whole, and discuss opportunities for innovation. These include the opportunity to extend the methods beyond electricity to broader energy systems and wider geographic areas; and the ability to expand the use of these methods in research and decision making as satellite data become cheaper and easier to access. We also find that there are persistent challenges: limited standardization and rigor of performance assessments; limited sharing of code, which would improve replicability; and a limited consideration of the ethics and privacy of data.

Unfortunately, actionable information about energy systems is often of limited availability, incomplete, or only accessible for a substantial fee or through a non-disclosure agreement. Recently, remotely sensed data (e.g., satellite imagery, aerial photography) have emerged as a potentially rich source of energy systems information. However, the use of these data is frequently challenged by its sheer volume and complexity, precluding manual analysis. Recent breakthroughs in machine learning have enabled automated and rapid extraction of useful information from remotely sensed data, facilitating large-scale acquisition of critical energy system variables. Here we present a systematic review of the literature on this emerging topic, providing an in-depth survey and review of papers published within the past two decades. We first taxonomize the existing literature into ten major areas, spanning the energy value chain. Within each research area, we distill and critically discuss major features that are relevant to energy researchers, including, for example, key challenges regarding the accessibility and reliability of the methods. We then synthesize our findings to identify limitations and trends in the literature as a whole, and discuss opportunities for innovation. These include the opportunity to extend the methods beyond electricity to broader energy systems and wider geographic areas; and the ability to expand the use of these methods in research and decision making as satellite data become cheaper and easier to access. We also find that there are persistent challenges: limited standardization and rigor of performance assessments; limited sharing of code, which would improve replicability; and a limited consideration of the ethics and privacy of data.
abstract_zh: 高质量的能源系统信息是能源系统研究、建模和决策的重要输入。不幸的是，有关能源系统的可操作信息通常可用性有限、不完整，或者需要支付大量费用或通过保密协议才能获取。最近，遥感数据（例如卫星图像、航空摄影）已成为潜在的丰富能源系统信息来源。然而，这些数据的使用经常因其数量和复杂性而受到挑战，无法进行手动分析。机器学习的最新突破使得能够从遥感数据中自动快速提取有用信息，从而促进关键能源系统变量的大规模获取。在这里，我们对这一新兴主题的文献进行了系统回顾，对过去二十年发表的论文进行了深入的调查和回顾。我们首先将现有文献分为十个主要领域，涵盖能源价值链。在每个研究领域中，我们提炼并批判性地讨论与能源研究人员相关的主要特征，包括例如有关方法的可访问性和可靠性的关键挑战。然后，我们综合我们的研究结果，以确定整个文献的局限性和趋势，并讨论创新机会。其中包括将这些方法扩展到电力以外的更广泛的能源系统和更广泛的地理区域的机会；随着卫星数据变得更便宜、更容易获取，能够扩大这些方法在研究和决策中的使用。我们还发现持续存在的挑战：绩效评估的标准化和严格性有限；有限的代码共享，这将提高可复制性；对道德和数据隐私的考虑有限。

AI.tldr: 本文系统回顾了过去二十年利用遥感数据自动提取能源系统信息的文献，分析其方法、挑战与未来方向。
AI.motivation: 能源系统研究缺乏高质量数据，而遥感数据结合机器学习可能提供解决方案，但存在数据复杂性与标准化不足等挑战。
AI.method: 对文献进行分类整理，按能源价值链划分十大领域，分析方法特征、挑战及趋势，并总结局限性与创新机会。
AI.result: 发现方法扩展至更广能源系统与地理区域的潜力，但存在性能评估不统一、代码共享不足及伦理隐私问题。
AI.conclusion: 需加强标准化、代码共享与伦理考量，同时利用成本降低的卫星数据推动研究与决策应用。

We also find that there are persistent challenges: limited standardization and rigor of performance assessments; limited sharing of code, which would improve replicability; and a limited consideration of the ethics and privacy of data. 高质量的能源系统信息是能源系统研究、建模和决策的重要输入。不幸的是，有关能源系统的可操作信息通常可用性有限、不完整，或者需要支付大量费用或通过保密协议才能获取。最近，遥感数据（例如卫星图像、航空摄影）已成为潜在的丰富能源系统信息来源。然而，这些数据的使用经常因其数量和复杂性而受到挑战，无法进行手动分析。机器学习的最新突破使得能够从遥感数据中自动快速提取有用信息，从而促进关键能源系统变量的大规模获取。在这里，我们对这一新兴主题的文献进行了系统回顾，对过去二十年发表的论文进行了深入的调查和回顾。我们首先将现有文献分为十个主要领域，涵盖能源价值链。在每个研究领域中，我们提炼并批判性地讨论与能源研究人员相关的主要特征，包括例如有关方法的可访问性和可靠性的关键挑战。然后，我们综合我们的研究结果，以确定整个文献的局限性和趋势，并讨论创新机会。其中包括将这些方法扩展到电力以外的更广泛的能源系统和更广泛的地理区域的机会；随着卫星数据变得更便宜、更容易获取，能够扩大这些方法在研究和决策中的使用。我们还发现持续存在的挑战：绩效评估的标准化和严格性有限；有限的代码共享，这将提高可复制性；对道德和数据隐私的考虑有限。 本文系统回顾了过去二十年利用遥感数据自动提取能源系统信息的文献，分析其方法、挑战与未来方向。 Simiao Ren,Wei Hu,Kyle Bradbury,Dylan Harrison-Atlas,Laura Malaguzzi Valeri,Brian Murray,Jordan M. Malof eess.SP,cs.AI

title: An Evaluation of the EEG alpha-to-theta and theta-to-alpha band Ratios as Indexes of Mental Workload
title_zh: 脑电图 α 与 θ 和 θ 与 α 波段比率作为脑力负荷指标的评估
abstract: Many research works indicate that EEG bands, specifically the alpha and theta bands, have been potentially helpful cognitive load indicators. However, minimal research exists to validate this claim. This study aims to assess and analyze the impact of the alpha-to-theta and the theta-to-alpha band ratios on supporting the creation of models capable of discriminating self-reported perceptions of mental workload. A dataset of raw EEG data was utilized in which 48 subjects performed a resting activity and an induced task demanding exercise in the form of a multitasking SIMKAP test. Band ratios were devised from frontal and parietal electrode clusters. Building and model testing was done with high-level independent features from the frequency and temporal domains extracted from the computed ratios over time. Target features for model training were extracted from the subjective ratings collected after resting and task demand activities. Models were built by employing Logistic Regression, Support Vector Machines and Decision Trees and were evaluated with performance measures including accuracy, recall, precision and f1-score. The results indicate high classification accuracy of those models trained with the high-level features extracted from the alpha-to-theta ratios and theta-to-alpha ratios. Preliminary results also show that models trained with logistic regression and support vector machines can accurately classify self-reported perceptions of mental workload. This research contributes to the body of knowledge by demonstrating the richness of the information in the temporal, spectral and statistical domains extracted from the alpha-to-theta and theta-to-alpha EEG band ratios for the discrimination of self-reported perceptions of mental workload.

However, minimal research exists to validate this claim. abstract_zh: 许多研究工作表明，脑电图波段，特别是 α 和 θ 波段，可能是有用的认知负荷指标。然而，验证这一说法的研究却很少。本研究旨在评估和分析 α 与 θ 以及 θ 与 α 波段比率对支持创建能够区分自我报告的脑力负荷感知的模型的影响。使用原始脑电图数据集，其中 48 名受试者以多任务 SIMKAP 测试的形式进行休息活动和诱导任务要求锻炼。带比是根据额叶和顶叶电极簇设计的。构建和模型测试是使用从计算的随时间变化的比率中提取的频域和时域的高级独立特征来完成的。从休息和任务需求活动后收集的主观评分中提取模型训练的目标特征。模型是通过采用逻辑回归、支持向量机和决策树构建的，并使用准确性、召回率、精度和 f1 分数等性能指标进行评估。结果表明，使用从 alpha-theta 比率和 theta-alpha 比率提取的高级特征进行训练的模型具有较高的分类准确性。初步结果还表明，用逻辑回归和支持向量机训练的模型可以准确地对自我报告的脑力负荷感知进行分类。这项研究通过展示从 α-θ 和 θ-α 脑电图带比中提取的时间、频谱和统计域信息的丰富性，为知识体系做出了贡献，用于区分自我报告的脑力负荷感知。

AI.tldr: 评估EEG的alpha-to-theta和theta-to-alpha波段比率作为心理负荷指标的有效性
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究表明alpha和theta波段可能与认知负荷相关，但缺乏验证其有效性的研究，因此需通过模型验证其作为心理负荷指标的潜力
AI.method: 采集48名受试者在静息状态和多任务SIMKAP测试中的EEG数据，提取额叶和顶叶电极簇的波段比率，结合时域和频域特征构建逻辑回归、支持向量机和决策树模型进行分类验证
AI.result: 基于波段比率的高阶特征训练模型达到高分类准确率，逻辑回归和SVM模型能有效区分自评心理负荷状态
AI.conclusion: alpha-to-theta和theta-to-alpha比率在时域、频域及统计学特征中蕴含丰富信息，可有效用于心理负荷的判别建模

authors_text: Ravikiran Parameshwara,Soujanya Narayana,Murugappan Murugappan,Ramanathan Subramanian,Ibrahim Radwan,Roland Goecke
title: Automated Parkinson's Disease Detection and Affective Analysis from Emotional EEG Signals
title_zh: 根据情绪脑电图信号自动检测帕金森病和情感分析
abstract: While Parkinson's disease (PD) is typically characterized by motor disorder, there is evidence of diminished emotion perception in PD patients. This study examines the utility of affective Electroencephalography (EEG) signals to understand emotional differences between PD vs Healthy Controls (HC), and for automated PD detection. Employing traditional machine learning and deep learning methods, we explore (a) dimensional and categorical emotion recognition, and (b) PD vs HC classification from emotional EEG signals. Our results reveal that PD patients comprehend arousal better than valence, and amongst emotion categories, \textit{fear}, \textit{disgust} and \textit{surprise} less accurately, and \textit{sadness} most accurately. Mislabeling analyses confirm confounds among opposite-valence emotions with PD data. Emotional EEG responses also achieve near-perfect PD vs HC recognition. {Cumulatively, our study demonstrates that (a) examining \textit{implicit} responses alone enables (i) discovery of valence-related impairments in PD patients, and (ii) differentiation of PD from HC, and (b) emotional EEG analysis is an ecologically-valid, effective, facile and sustainable tool for PD diagnosis vis-á-vis self reports, expert assessments and resting-state analysis.}
summary: While Parkinson's disease (PD) is typically characterized by motor disorder, there is evidence of diminished emotion perception in PD patients. This study examines the utility of affective Electroencephalography (EEG) signals to understand emotional differences between PD vs Healthy Controls (HC), and for automated PD detection. Employing traditional machine learning and deep learning methods, we explore (a) dimensional and categorical emotion recognition, and (b) PD vs HC classification from emotional EEG signals. Our results reveal that PD patients comprehend arousal better than valence, and amongst emotion categories, \textit{fear}, \textit{disgust} and \textit{surprise} less accurately, and \textit{sadness} most accurately. Mislabeling analyses confirm confounds among opposite-valence emotions with PD data. Emotional EEG responses also achieve near-perfect PD vs HC recognition. {Cumulatively, our study demonstrates that (a) examining \textit{implicit} responses alone enables (i) discovery of valence-related impairments in PD patients, and (ii) differentiation of PD from HC, and (b) emotional EEG analysis is an ecologically-valid, effective, facile and sustainable tool for PD diagnosis vis-á-vis self reports, expert assessments and resting-state analysis.}
abstract_zh: 虽然帕金森病 (PD) 的典型特征是运动障碍，但有证据表明帕金森病患者的情绪感知能力减弱。本研究探讨了情感脑电图 (EEG) 信号的效用，以了解帕金森病与健康对照 (HC) 之间的情绪差异，以及自动帕金森病检测。采用传统的机器学习和深度学习方法，我们探索 (a) 维度和分类情绪识别，以及 (b) 根据情绪 EEG 信号进行 PD 与 HC 分类。我们的结果表明，PD 患者对唤醒的理解比效价更好，在情绪类别中，\textit{恐惧}、\textit{厌恶} 和 \textit{惊讶} 不太准确，而 \textit{悲伤} 最准确。错误标签分析证实了相反价情绪与 PD 数据之间的混淆。情绪脑电图反应也实现了近乎完美的 PD 与 HC 识别。 {总的来说，我们的研究表明，(a) 仅检查 \textit{隐式} 反应就可以 (i) 发现 PD 患者的效价相关损伤，(ii) 将 PD 与 HC 区分开，以及 (b) 情绪脑电图分析相对于自我报告、专家评估和静息态分析来说是一种生态上有效、有效、简便和可持续的 PD 诊断工具。}

AI.tldr: 该论文研究利用情感EEG信号进行帕金森病（PD）的自动化检测与情绪分析，通过对比PD患者与健康对照组（HC）的情绪识别差异，探索其作为诊断工具的可行性。
AI.motivation: 帕金森病患者存在情绪感知能力下降的问题，传统诊断方法（如自我报告、专家评估）存在局限性，需寻找生态效度更高的客观检测手段。
AI.method: 采用传统机器学习与深度学习方法，分析情感EEG信号在维度（唤醒度、效价）和类别（恐惧、厌恶、惊讶、悲伤等）情绪识别中的表现，并进行PD与HC的分类任务。
AI.result: PD患者对唤醒度识别能力较强，但对恐惧、厌恶、惊讶等情绪识别准确率较低，悲伤识别最准确；PD与HC分类准确率接近完美；情绪EEG响应可有效区分PD与HC。
AI.conclusion: 隐性情绪EEG响应分析能揭示PD患者效价相关障碍，并有效区分PD与HC，证明情感EEG分析是一种生态效度高、可持续的PD诊断工具，优于传统方法。

conclusion: 隐性情绪EEG响应分析能揭示PD患者效价相关障碍，并有效区分PD与HC，证明情感EEG分析是一种生态效度高、可持续的PD诊断工具，优于传统方法。
search_text: Automated Parkinson's Disease Detection and Affective Analysis from Emotional EEG Signals 根据情绪脑电图信号自动检测帕金森病和情感分析 While Parkinson's disease (PD) is typically characterized by motor disorder, there is evidence of diminished emotion perception in PD patients. This study examines the utility of affective Electroencephalography (EEG) signals to understand emotional differences between PD vs Healthy Controls (HC), and for automated PD detection. Employing traditional machine learning and deep learning methods, we explore (a) dimensional and categorical emotion recognition, and (b) PD vs HC classification from emotional EEG signals. Our results reveal that PD patients comprehend arousal better than valence, and amongst emotion categories, \textit{fear}, \textit{disgust} and \textit{surprise} less accurately, and \textit{sadness} most accurately. Mislabeling analyses confirm confounds among opposite-valence emotions with PD data. Emotional EEG responses also achieve near-perfect PD vs HC recognition. {Cumulatively, our study demonstrates that (a) examining \textit{implicit} responses alone enables (i) discovery of valence-related impairments in PD patients, and (ii) differentiation of PD from HC, and (b) emotional EEG analysis is an ecologically-valid, effective, facile and sustainable tool for PD diagnosis vis-á-vis self reports, expert assessments and resting-state analysis.} 虽然帕金森病 (PD) 的典型特征是运动障碍，但有证据表明帕金森病患者的情绪感知能力减弱。本研究探讨了情感脑电图 (EEG) 信号的效用，以了解帕金森病与健康对照 (HC) 之间的情绪差异，以及自动帕金森病检测。采用传统的机器学习和深度学习方法，我们探索 (a) 维度和分类情绪识别，以及 (b) 根据情绪 EEG 信号进行 PD 与 HC 分类。我们的结果表明，PD 患者对唤醒的理解比效价更好，在情绪类别中，\textit{恐惧}、\textit{厌恶} 和 \textit{惊讶} 不太准确，而 \textit{悲伤} 最准确。错误标签分析证实了相反价情绪与 PD 数据之间的混淆。情绪脑电图反应也实现了近乎完美的 PD 与 HC 识别。 {总的来说，我们的研究表明，(a) 仅检查 \textit{隐式} 反应就可以 (i) 发现 PD 患者的效价相关损伤，(ii) 将 PD 与 HC 区分开，以及 (b) 情绪脑电图分析相对于自我报告、专家评估和静息态分析来说是一种生态上有效、有效、简便和可持续的 PD 诊断工具。} 该论文研究利用情感EEG信号进行帕金森病（PD）的自动化检测与情绪分析，通过对比PD患者与健康对照组（HC）的情绪识别差异，探索其作为诊断工具的可行性。 Ravikiran Parameshwara,Soujanya Narayana,Murugappan Murugappan,Ramanathan Subramanian,Ibrahim Radwan,Roland Goecke eess.SP,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Semi-Supervised Learning and Data Augmentation in Wearable-based Momentary Stress Detection in the Wild
title_zh: 野外基于可穿戴设备的瞬时压力检测中的半监督学习和数据增强
abstract: Physiological and behavioral data collected from wearable or mobile sensors have been used to estimate self-reported stress levels. Since the stress annotation usually relies on self-reports during the study, a limited amount of labeled data can be an obstacle in developing accurate and generalized stress predicting models. On the other hand, the sensors can continuously capture signals without annotations. This work investigates leveraging unlabeled wearable sensor data for stress detection in the wild. We first applied data augmentation techniques on the physiological and behavioral data to improve the robustness of supervised stress detection models. Using an auto-encoder with actively selected unlabeled sequences, we pre-trained the supervised model structure to leverage the information learned from unlabeled samples. Then, we developed a semi-supervised learning framework to leverage the unlabeled data sequences. We combined data augmentation techniques with consistency regularization, which enforces the consistency of prediction output based on augmented and original unlabeled data. We validated these methods using three wearable/mobile sensor datasets collected in the wild. Our results showed that combining the proposed methods improved stress classification performance by 7.7% to 13.8% on the evaluated datasets, compared to the baseline supervised learning models.
summary: Physiological and behavioral data collected from wearable or mobile sensors have been used to estimate self-reported stress levels. Since the stress annotation usually relies on self-reports during the study, a limited amount of labeled data can be an obstacle in developing accurate and generalized stress predicting models. On the other hand, the sensors can continuously capture signals without annotations. This work investigates leveraging unlabeled wearable sensor data for stress detection in the wild. We first applied data augmentation techniques on the physiological and behavioral data to improve the robustness of supervised stress detection models. Using an auto-encoder with actively selected unlabeled sequences, we pre-trained the supervised model structure to leverage the information learned from unlabeled samples. Then, we developed a semi-supervised learning framework to leverage the unlabeled data sequences. We combined data augmentation techniques with consistency regularization, which enforces the consistency of prediction output based on augmented and original unlabeled data. We validated these methods using three wearable/mobile sensor datasets collected in the wild. Our results showed that combining the proposed methods improved stress classification performance by 7.7% to 13.8% on the evaluated datasets, compared to the baseline supervised learning models.
abstract_zh: 从可穿戴或移动传感器收集的生理和行为数据已用于估计自我报告的压力水平。由于研究过程中的压力注释通常依赖于自我报告，因此有限的标记数据可能会成为开发准确和通用的压力预测模型的障碍。另一方面，传感器可以连续捕获信号而无需注释。这项工作研究利用未标记的可穿戴传感器数据进行野外压力检测。我们首先在生理和行为数据上应用数据增强技术，以提高监督压力检测模型的稳健性。使用具有主动选择的未标记序列的自动编码器，我们预训练了监督模型结构，以利用从未标记样本中学到的信息。然后，我们开发了一个半监督学习框架来利用未标记的数据序列。我们将数据增强技术与一致性正则化相结合，这增强了基于增强数据和原始未标记数据的预测输出的一致性。我们使用在野外收集的三个可穿戴/移动传感器数据集验证了这些方法。我们的结果表明，与基线监督学习模型相比，结合所提出的方法将评估数据集上的压力分类性能提高了 7.7% 至 13.8%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用半监督学习和数据增强技术，解决可穿戴设备在真实环境中进行压力检测时标记数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 压力检测依赖自我报告导致标记数据有限，而传感器可连续采集未标注数据，需有效利用未标注数据提升模型性能。
AI.method: 结合数据增强技术与自编码器预训练，开发半监督学习框架，通过一致性正则化约束未标注数据的预测一致性。
AI.result: 在三个真实环境数据集上，方法使压力分类准确率提升7.7%至13.8%。
AI.conclusion: 半监督学习与数据增强结合有效提升压力检测性能，为真实场景下的模型开发提供新思路。

authors_text: Daniel Cummings,Sharath Nittur Sridhar,Anthony Sarah,Maciej Szankin
title: Accelerating Neural Architecture Exploration Across Modalities Using Genetic Algorithms
title_zh: 使用遗传算法加速跨模态的神经架构探索
abstract: Neural architecture search (NAS), the study of automating the discovery of optimal deep neural network architectures for tasks in domains such as computer vision and natural language processing, has seen rapid growth in the machine learning research community. While there have been many recent advancements in NAS, there is still a significant focus on reducing the computational cost incurred when validating discovered architectures by making search more efficient. Evolutionary algorithms, specifically genetic algorithms, have a history of usage in NAS and continue to gain popularity versus other optimization approaches as a highly efficient way to explore the architecture objective space. Most NAS research efforts have centered around computer vision tasks and only recently have other modalities, such as the rapidly growing field of natural language processing, been investigated in depth. In this work, we show how genetic algorithms can be paired with lightly trained objective predictors in an iterative cycle to accelerate multi-objective architectural exploration in a way that works in the modalities of both machine translation and image classification.
summary: Neural architecture search (NAS), the study of automating the discovery of optimal deep neural network architectures for tasks in domains such as computer vision and natural language processing, has seen rapid growth in the machine learning research community. While there have been many recent advancements in NAS, there is still a significant focus on reducing the computational cost incurred when validating discovered architectures by making search more efficient. Evolutionary algorithms, specifically genetic algorithms, have a history of usage in NAS and continue to gain popularity versus other optimization approaches as a highly efficient way to explore the architecture objective space. Most NAS research efforts have centered around computer vision tasks and only recently have other modalities, such as the rapidly growing field of natural language processing, been investigated in depth. In this work, we show how genetic algorithms can be paired with lightly trained objective predictors in an iterative cycle to accelerate multi-objective architectural exploration in a way that works in the modalities of both machine translation and image classification.
abstract_zh: 神经架构搜索 (NAS) 是一项针对计算机视觉和自然语言处理等领域的任务自动发现最佳深度神经网络架构的研究，在机器学习研究社区中得到了快速发展。尽管 NAS 最近取得了许多进展，但仍然重点关注通过提高搜索效率来降低验证已发现架构时产生的计算成本。进化算法，特别是遗传算法，在 NAS 中有着悠久的使用历史，并且与其他优化方法相比，作为探索架构目标空间的高效方法，它继续受到欢迎。大多数 NAS 研究工作都集中在计算机视觉任务上，直到最近才对其他模式（例如快速发展的自然语言处理领域）进行了深入研究。在这项工作中，我们展示了遗传算法如何在迭代周期中与经过轻度训练的目标预测器配合使用，以适用于机器翻译和图像分类模式的方式加速多目标架构探索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用遗传算法结合轻量训练的目标预测器，加速跨模态（如机器翻译和图像分类）的神经架构探索。
AI.motivation: 神经架构搜索（NAS）的计算成本高昂，且现有研究多集中于计算机视觉，缺乏对自然语言处理等其他模态的高效探索方法。
AI.method: 通过迭代循环将遗传算法与轻量训练的目标预测器结合，实现跨模态的多目标架构探索。
AI.result: 在机器翻译和图像分类任务中，该方法有效加速了多目标架构搜索过程。
AI.conclusion: 遗传算法与预测器的结合为跨模态NAS提供了高效解决方案，未来可扩展至更多模态领域。

title: OptGAN: Optimizing and Interpreting the Latent Space of the Conditional Text-to-Image GANs
title_zh: OptGAN：优化和解释条件文本到图像 GAN 的潜在空间
abstract: Text-to-image generation intends to automatically produce a photo-realistic image, conditioned on a textual description. It can be potentially employed in the field of art creation, data augmentation, photo-editing, etc. Although many efforts have been dedicated to this task, it remains particularly challenging to generate believable, natural scenes. To facilitate the real-world applications of text-to-image synthesis, we focus on studying the following three issues: 1) How to ensure that generated samples are believable, realistic or natural? 2) How to exploit the latent space of the generator to edit a synthesized image? 3) How to improve the explainability of a text-to-image generation framework? In this work, we constructed two novel data sets (i.e., the Good & Bad bird and face data sets) consisting of successful as well as unsuccessful generated samples, according to strict criteria. To effectively and efficiently acquire high-quality images by increasing the probability of generating Good latent codes, we use a dedicated Good/Bad classifier for generated images. It is based on a pre-trained front end and fine-tuned on the basis of the proposed Good & Bad data set. After that, we present a novel algorithm which identifies semantically-understandable directions in the latent space of a conditional text-to-image GAN architecture by performing independent component analysis on the pre-trained weight values of the generator. Furthermore, we develop a background-flattening loss (BFL), to improve the background appearance in the edited image. Subsequently, we introduce linear interpolation analysis between pairs of keywords. This is extended into a similar triangular `linguistic' interpolation in order to take a deep look into what a text-to-image synthesis model has learned within the linguistic embeddings. Our data set is available at https://zenodo.org/record/6283798#.YhkN_ujMI2w.
summary: Text-to-image generation intends to automatically produce a photo-realistic image, conditioned on a textual description. It can be potentially employed in the field of art creation, data augmentation, photo-editing, etc. Although many efforts have been dedicated to this task, it remains particularly challenging to generate believable, natural scenes. To facilitate the real-world applications of text-to-image synthesis, we focus on studying the following three issues: 1) How to ensure that generated samples are believable, realistic or natural? 2) How to exploit the latent space of the generator to edit a synthesized image? 3) How to improve the explainability of a text-to-image generation framework? In this work, we constructed two novel data sets (i.e., the Good & Bad bird and face data sets) consisting of successful as well as unsuccessful generated samples, according to strict criteria. To effectively and efficiently acquire high-quality images by increasing the probability of generating Good latent codes, we use a dedicated Good/Bad classifier for generated images. It is based on a pre-trained front end and fine-tuned on the basis of the proposed Good & Bad data set. After that, we present a novel algorithm which identifies semantically-understandable directions in the latent space of a conditional text-to-image GAN architecture by performing independent component analysis on the pre-trained weight values of the generator. Furthermore, we develop a background-flattening loss (BFL), to improve the background appearance in the edited image. Subsequently, we introduce linear interpolation analysis between pairs of keywords. This is extended into a similar triangular `linguistic' interpolation in order to take a deep look into what a text-to-image synthesis model has learned within the linguistic embeddings. Our data set is available at https://zenodo.org/record/6283798#.YhkN_ujMI2w.
abstract_zh: 文本到图像生成旨在根据文本描述自动生成逼真的图像。它可以潜在地应用于艺术创作、数据增强、照片编辑等领域。尽管人们为这项任务付出了许多努力，但生成可信的自然场景仍然特别具有挑战性。为了促进文本到图像合成的实际应用，我们重点研究以下三个问题：1）如何确保生成的样本可信、真实或自然？ 2）如何利用生成器的潜在空间来编辑合成图像？ 3）如何提高文本到图像生成框架的可解释性？在这项工作中，我们根据严格的标准构建了两个新颖的数据集（即好与坏的鸟和人脸数据集），其中包含成功和不成功的生成样本。为了通过增加生成良好潜在代码的概率来有效且高效地获取高质量图像，我们对生成的图像使用专用的好/坏分类器。它基于预先训练的前端，并根据建议的好与坏数据集进行微调。之后，我们提出了一种新颖的算法，通过对生成器的预训练权重值执行独立分量分析，识别条件文本到图像 GAN 架构的潜在空间中语义可理解的方向。此外，我们开发了背景平坦化损失（BFL），以改善编辑图像中的背景外观。随后，我们引入关键词对之间的线性插值分析。这被扩展到类似的三角形“语言”插值，以便深入研究文本到图像合成模型在语言嵌入中学到的内容。我们的数据集可在 https://zenodo.org/record/6283798#.YhkN_ujMI2w 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OptGAN框架，通过优化条件文本到图像生成模型的潜在空间，提升生成图像的真实性、可编辑性及可解释性。
AI.motivation: 文本到图像生成在现实应用中面临生成图像不够真实、潜在空间难以编辑及模型可解释性不足等挑战，需系统性解决这些问题以推动实际应用。
AI.method: 构建包含成功与失败样本的数据集，训练Good/Bad分类器筛选高质量潜在码；通过独立成分分析提取潜在空间语义方向；设计背景平滑损失函数优化编辑效果；利用关键词插值分析语言嵌入空间。
AI.result: 分类器有效提升图像质量，潜在空间语义方向识别算法实现可控编辑，背景平滑损失改善编辑图像背景，语言插值揭示模型对文本语义的学习机制。
AI.conclusion: OptGAN通过多维度优化显著提升生成效果与可解释性，为文本到图像生成的实用化提供了新方法与工具。

title: Refining Self-Supervised Learning in Imaging: Beyond Linear Metric
title_zh: 完善成像中的自我监督学习：超越线性度量
abstract: We introduce in this paper a new statistical perspective, exploiting the Jaccard similarity metric, as a measure-based metric to effectively invoke non-linear features in the loss of self-supervised contrastive learning. Specifically, our proposed metric may be interpreted as a dependence measure between two adapted projections learned from the so-called latent representations. This is in contrast to the cosine similarity measure in the conventional contrastive learning model, which accounts for correlation information. To the best of our knowledge, this effectively non-linearly fused information embedded in the Jaccard similarity, is novel to self-supervision learning with promising results. The proposed approach is compared to two state-of-the-art self-supervised contrastive learning methods on three image datasets. We not only demonstrate its amenable applicability in current ML problems, but also its improved performance and training efficiency.
summary: We introduce in this paper a new statistical perspective, exploiting the Jaccard similarity metric, as a measure-based metric to effectively invoke non-linear features in the loss of self-supervised contrastive learning. Specifically, our proposed metric may be interpreted as a dependence measure between two adapted projections learned from the so-called latent representations. This is in contrast to the cosine similarity measure in the conventional contrastive learning model, which accounts for correlation information. To the best of our knowledge, this effectively non-linearly fused information embedded in the Jaccard similarity, is novel to self-supervision learning with promising results. The proposed approach is compared to two state-of-the-art self-supervised contrastive learning methods on three image datasets. We not only demonstrate its amenable applicability in current ML problems, but also its improved performance and training efficiency.
abstract_zh: 我们在本文中引入了一种新的统计视角，利用杰卡德相似性度量作为基于测量的度量来有效地调用自监督对比学习损失中的非线性特征。具体来说，我们提出的度量可以解释为从所谓的潜在表示中学习的两个适应投影之间的依赖性度量。这与传统对比学习模型中的余弦相似性度量形成对比，后者考虑了相关信息。据我们所知，这种嵌入杰卡德相似度中的有效非线性融合信息对于自监督学习来说是新颖的，并且具有良好的结果。所提出的方法与三个图像数据集上的两种最先进的自监督对比学习方法进行了比较。我们不仅展示了它在当前机器学习问题中的适用性，而且还展示了它改进的性能和训练效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Jaccard相似度的新度量方法，用于改进自监督对比学习中的非线性特征提取。
AI.motivation: 传统余弦相似度仅能捕捉相关性信息，而Jaccard相似度能更有效融合非线性特征，提升自监督学习性能。
AI.method: 利用Jaccard相似度作为依赖度量，通过潜在表示的两个适应性投影计算非线性特征，替代传统余弦相似度。
AI.result: 在三个图像数据集上验证，新方法在性能和训练效率上优于两种先进自监督对比学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自监督学习提供了新颖的非线性融合方式，具有广泛适用性和改进潜力。

title: Learning English with Peppa Pig
title_zh: 和小猪佩奇一起学英语
abstract: Recent computational models of the acquisition of spoken language via grounding in perception exploit associations between the spoken and visual modalities and learn to represent speech and visual data in a joint vector space. A major unresolved issue from the point of ecological validity is the training data, typically consisting of images or videos paired with spoken descriptions of what is depicted. Such a setup guarantees an unrealistically strong correlation between speech and the visual data. In the real world the coupling between the linguistic and the visual modality is loose, and often confounded by correlations with non-semantic aspects of the speech signal. Here we address this shortcoming by using a dataset based on the children's cartoon Peppa Pig. We train a simple bi-modal architecture on the portion of the data consisting of dialog between characters, and evaluate on segments containing descriptive narrations. Despite the weak and confounded signal in this training data our model succeeds at learning aspects of the visual semantics of spoken language.
summary: Recent computational models of the acquisition of spoken language via grounding in perception exploit associations between the spoken and visual modalities and learn to represent speech and visual data in a joint vector space. A major unresolved issue from the point of ecological validity is the training data, typically consisting of images or videos paired with spoken descriptions of what is depicted. Such a setup guarantees an unrealistically strong correlation between speech and the visual data. In the real world the coupling between the linguistic and the visual modality is loose, and often confounded by correlations with non-semantic aspects of the speech signal. Here we address this shortcoming by using a dataset based on the children's cartoon Peppa Pig. We train a simple bi-modal architecture on the portion of the data consisting of dialog between characters, and evaluate on segments containing descriptive narrations. Despite the weak and confounded signal in this training data our model succeeds at learning aspects of the visual semantics of spoken language.
abstract_zh: 最近通过感知基础获取口语的计算模型利用口语和视觉模态之间的关联，并学习在联合向量空间中表示语音和视觉数据。从生态有效性的角度来看，一个未解决的主要问题是训练数据，通常由图像或视频以及所描绘内容的口头描述组成。这样的设置保证了语音和视觉数据之间不切实际的强相关性。在现实世界中，语言和视觉模态之间的耦合是松散的，并且经常因与语音信号的非语义方面的相关性而混淆。在这里，我们通过使用基于儿童卡通片《小猪佩奇》的数据集来解决这个缺点。我们在由角色之间的对话组成的数据部分上训练一个简单的双模态架构，并对包含描述性叙述的片段进行评估。尽管训练数据中的信号微弱且混杂，但我们的模型成功地学习了口语视觉语义的各个方面。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过使用儿童动画《小猪佩奇》的数据集，训练双模态模型以学习口语语言的视觉语义表示，解决现有模型中语音与视觉数据关联过强的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有计算模型中语音与视觉数据的关联过于紧密，缺乏现实场景中松散且易受非语义因素干扰的耦合关系，需更贴近真实环境的数据进行训练。
AI.method: 采用《小猪佩奇》动画中的对话片段训练双模态网络，并在描述性旁白片段上评估模型，利用动画中较弱且混杂的信号模拟真实语言环境。
AI.result: 模型成功学习到口语语言的视觉语义，即使训练数据中语音与视觉的关联较弱且存在干扰因素，仍能有效捕捉语义信息。
AI.conclusion: 使用《小猪佩奇》等动画数据可提升模型在生态效度上的表现，为语言习得研究提供更贴近现实的训练框架。

ai_content.tldr: 该论文通过使用儿童动画《小猪佩奇》的数据集，训练双模态模型以学习口语语言的视觉语义表示，解决现有模型中语音与视觉数据关联过强的问题。

search_text: Learning English with Peppa Pig 和小猪佩奇一起学英语 Recent computational models of the acquisition of spoken language via grounding in perception exploit associations between the spoken and visual modalities and learn to represent speech and visual data in a joint vector space. A major unresolved issue from the point of ecological validity is the training data, typically consisting of images or videos paired with spoken descriptions of what is depicted. Such a setup guarantees an unrealistically strong correlation between speech and the visual data. In the real world the coupling between the linguistic and the visual modality is loose, and often confounded by correlations with non-semantic aspects of the speech signal. Here we address this shortcoming by using a dataset based on the children's cartoon Peppa Pig. We train a simple bi-modal architecture on the portion of the data consisting of dialog between characters, and evaluate on segments containing descriptive narrations. Despite the weak and confounded signal in this training data our model succeeds at learning aspects of the visual semantics of spoken language. 最近通过感知基础获取口语的计算模型利用口语和视觉模态之间的关联，并学习在联合向量空间中表示语音和视觉数据。从生态有效性的角度来看，一个未解决的主要问题是训练数据，通常由图像或视频以及所描绘内容的口头描述组成。这样的设置保证了语音和视觉数据之间不切实际的强相关性。在现实世界中，语言和视觉模态之间的耦合是松散的，并且经常因与语音信号的非语义方面的相关性而混淆。在这里，我们通过使用基于儿童卡通片《小猪佩奇》的数据集来解决这个缺点。我们在由角色之间的对话组成的数据部分上训练一个简单的双模态架构，并对包含描述性叙述的片段进行评估。尽管训练数据中的信号微弱且混杂，但我们的模型成功地学习了口语视觉语义的各个方面。 该论文通过使用儿童动画《小猪佩奇》的数据集，训练双模态模型以学习口语语言的视觉语义表示，解决现有模型中语音与视觉数据关联过强的问题。 Mitja Nikolaus,Afra Alishahi,Grzegorz Chrupała cs.CL,cs.AI,eess.AS,eess.IV

title: Designing Trustworthy User Interfaces
title_zh: 设计值得信赖的用户界面
comment: Peer-reviewed version accepted for publication in the proceedings of the 33rd Australian Conference on Human-Computer Interaction (OzCHI '21)
comments: Peer-reviewed version accepted for publication in the proceedings of the 33rd Australian Conference on Human-Computer Interaction (OzCHI '21)
abstract: Interface design can directly influence trustworthiness of a software. Thereby, it affects users' intention to use a tool. Previous research on user trust has not comprehensively addressed user interface design, though. We lack an understanding of what makes interfaces trustworthy (1), as well as actionable measures to improve trustworthiness (2). We contribute to this by addressing both gaps. Based on a systematic literature review, we give a thorough overview over the theory on user trust and provide a taxonomy of factors influencing user interface trustworthiness. Then, we derive concrete measures to address these factors in interface design. We use the results to create a proof of concept interface. In a preliminary evaluation, we compare a variant designed to elicit trust with one designed to reduce it. Our results show that the measures we apply can be effective in fostering trust in users.
summary: Interface design can directly influence trustworthiness of a software. Thereby, it affects users' intention to use a tool. Previous research on user trust has not comprehensively addressed user interface design, though. We lack an understanding of what makes interfaces trustworthy (1), as well as actionable measures to improve trustworthiness (2). We contribute to this by addressing both gaps. Based on a systematic literature review, we give a thorough overview over the theory on user trust and provide a taxonomy of factors influencing user interface trustworthiness. Then, we derive concrete measures to address these factors in interface design. We use the results to create a proof of concept interface. In a preliminary evaluation, we compare a variant designed to elicit trust with one designed to reduce it. Our results show that the measures we apply can be effective in fostering trust in users.
abstract_zh: 界面设计可以直接影响软件的可信度。从而影响用户使用工具的意愿。不过，之前关于用户信任的研究并未全面解决用户界面设计问题。我们缺乏对接口值得信赖的因素 (1) 以及提高可信度的可行措施 (2) 的了解。我们通过解决这两个差距来为此做出贡献。基于系统的文献综述，我们对用户信任理论进行了全面概述，并提供了影响用户界面可信度的因素的分类。然后，我们在界面设计中得出解决这些因素的具体措施。我们使用结果来创建概念验证界面。在初步评估中，我们将旨在引起信任的变体与旨在减少信任的变体进行比较。我们的结果表明，我们采取的措施可以有效地培养用户的信任。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在设计可信的用户界面，并探讨影响用户界面可信度的因素及改进措施。
AI.motivation: 界面设计直接影响软件的可信度，进而影响用户的使用意愿。然而，现有研究尚未全面探讨用户界面设计对可信度的影响，缺乏对可信界面的设计要素和改进措施的理解。
AI.method: 通过系统文献综述，本文总结了用户信任的理论，并提出了影响用户界面可信度的因素分类。然后，根据这些因素推导出具体的界面设计措施，并开发了一个概念验证界面进行初步评估。
AI.result: 评估结果表明，所提出的设计措施在提升用户信任方面是有效的。
AI.conclusion: 本文填补了用户界面可信度设计的研究空白，为设计更可信的用户界面提供了理论框架和实践指导。
