authors_text: Ruinian Xu,Hongyi Chen,Yunzhi Lin,Patricio A. Vela
title: SGL: Symbolic Goal Learning in a Hybrid, Modular Framework for Human Instruction Following
title_zh: SGL：用于人类指令遵循的混合模块化框架中的符号目标学习
abstract: This paper investigates robot manipulation based on human instruction with ambiguous requests. The intent is to compensate for imperfect natural language via visual observations. Early symbolic methods, based on manually defined symbols, built modular framework consist of semantic parsing and task planning for producing sequences of actions from natural language requests. Modern connectionist methods employ deep neural networks to automatically learn visual and linguistic features and map to a sequence of low-level actions, in an endto-end fashion. These two approaches are blended to create a hybrid, modular framework: it formulates instruction following as symbolic goal learning via deep neural networks followed by task planning via symbolic planners. Connectionist and symbolic modules are bridged with Planning Domain Definition Language. The vision-and-language learning network predicts its goal representation, which is sent to a planner for producing a task-completing action sequence. For improving the flexibility of natural language, we further incorporate implicit human intents with explicit human instructions. To learn generic features for vision and language, we propose to separately pretrain vision and language encoders on scene graph parsing and semantic textual similarity tasks. Benchmarking evaluates the impacts of different components of, or options for, the vision-and-language learning model and shows the effectiveness of pretraining strategies. Manipulation experiments conducted in the simulator AI2THOR show the robustness of the framework to novel scenarios.
summary: This paper investigates robot manipulation based on human instruction with ambiguous requests. The intent is to compensate for imperfect natural language via visual observations. Early symbolic methods, based on manually defined symbols, built modular framework consist of semantic parsing and task planning for producing sequences of actions from natural language requests. Modern connectionist methods employ deep neural networks to automatically learn visual and linguistic features and map to a sequence of low-level actions, in an endto-end fashion. These two approaches are blended to create a hybrid, modular framework: it formulates instruction following as symbolic goal learning via deep neural networks followed by task planning via symbolic planners. Connectionist and symbolic modules are bridged with Planning Domain Definition Language. The vision-and-language learning network predicts its goal representation, which is sent to a planner for producing a task-completing action sequence. For improving the flexibility of natural language, we further incorporate implicit human intents with explicit human instructions. To learn generic features for vision and language, we propose to separately pretrain vision and language encoders on scene graph parsing and semantic textual similarity tasks. Benchmarking evaluates the impacts of different components of, or options for, the vision-and-language learning model and shows the effectiveness of pretraining strategies. abstract_zh: 本文研究了基于具有模糊请求的人类指令的机器人操作。目的是通过视觉观察来补偿不完美的自然语言。早期的符号方法基于手动定义的符号，构建了由语义解析和任务规划组成的模块化框架，用于根据自然语言请求生成动作序列。现代联结主义方法采用深度神经网络来自动学习视觉和语言特征，并以端到端的方式映射到一系列低级动作。这两种方法相结合，创建了一个混合的模块化框架：它通过深度神经网络将指令遵循为符号目标学习，然后通过符号规划器进行任务规划。连接主义和符号模块通过规划领域定义语言进行桥接。视觉和语言学习网络预测其目标表示，并将其发送给规划器以生成完成任务的动作序列。为了提高自然语言的灵活性，我们进一步将隐含的人类意图与明确的人类指令结合起来。为了学习视觉和语言的通用特征，我们建议在场景图解析和语义文本相似性任务上单独预训练视觉和语言编码器。基准测试评估视觉和语言学习模型的不同组成部分或选项的影响，并显示预训练策略的有效性。在模拟器 AI2THOR 中进行的操作实验显示了该框架对新场景的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种混合模块化框架SGL，通过结合深度神经网络与符号规划器，解决机器人执行模糊人类指令时的视觉与语言理解问题。
AI.motivation: 传统符号方法依赖人工定义符号，灵活性不足；现代连接主义方法虽端到端但缺乏可解释性。需融合两者优势以提升对模糊指令的鲁棒性与泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计混合框架：神经网络学习符号目标表示，通过PDDL与符号规划器生成动作序列；分别预训练视觉与语言编码器，结合显式指令与隐式意图增强自然语言灵活性。
AI.result: 基准测试验证了预训练策略的有效性，AI2THOR模拟器实验表明框架在新场景中具有鲁棒性，优于纯符号或纯神经网络方法。
AI.conclusion: 混合框架通过神经符号协同显著提升了机器人对模糊人类指令的理解与执行能力，为复杂场景下的指令跟随提供了新思路。

result: 基准测试验证了预训练策略的有效性，AI2THOR模拟器实验表明框架在新场景中具有鲁棒性，优于纯符号或纯神经网络方法。
conclusion: 混合框架通过神经符号协同显著提升了机器人对模糊人类指令的理解与执行能力，为复杂场景下的指令跟随提供了新思路。
search_text: SGL: Symbolic Goal Learning in a Hybrid, Modular Framework for Human Instruction Following SGL：用于人类指令遵循的混合模块化框架中的符号目标学习 This paper investigates robot manipulation based on human instruction with ambiguous requests. The intent is to compensate for imperfect natural language via visual observations. Early symbolic methods, based on manually defined symbols, built modular framework consist of semantic parsing and task planning for producing sequences of actions from natural language requests. Modern connectionist methods employ deep neural networks to automatically learn visual and linguistic features and map to a sequence of low-level actions, in an endto-end fashion. These two approaches are blended to create a hybrid, modular framework: it formulates instruction following as symbolic goal learning via deep neural networks followed by task planning via symbolic planners. Connectionist and symbolic modules are bridged with Planning Domain Definition Language. The vision-and-language learning network predicts its goal representation, which is sent to a planner for producing a task-completing action sequence. For improving the flexibility of natural language, we further incorporate implicit human intents with explicit human instructions. To learn generic features for vision and language, we propose to separately pretrain vision and language encoders on scene graph parsing and semantic textual similarity tasks. Benchmarking evaluates the impacts of different components of, or options for, the vision-and-language learning model and shows the effectiveness of pretraining strategies. Manipulation experiments conducted in the simulator AI2THOR show the robustness of the framework to novel scenarios. 本文研究了基于具有模糊请求的人类指令的机器人操作。目的是通过视觉观察来补偿不完美的自然语言。早期的符号方法基于手动定义的符号，构建了由语义解析和任务规划组成的模块化框架，用于根据自然语言请求生成动作序列。现代联结主义方法采用深度神经网络来自动学习视觉和语言特征，并以端到端的方式映射到一系列低级动作。这两种方法相结合，创建了一个混合的模块化框架：它通过深度神经网络将指令遵循为符号目标学习，然后通过符号规划器进行任务规划。连接主义和符号模块通过规划领域定义语言进行桥接。视觉和语言学习网络预测其目标表示，并将其发送给规划器以生成完成任务的动作序列。为了提高自然语言的灵活性，我们进一步将隐含的人类意图与明确的人类指令结合起来。为了学习视觉和语言的通用特征，我们建议在场景图解析和语义文本相似性任务上单独预训练视觉和语言编码器。基准测试评估视觉和语言学习模型的不同组成部分或选项的影响，并显示预训练策略的有效性。在模拟器 AI2THOR 中进行的操作实验显示了该框架对新场景的鲁棒性。 本文提出了一种混合模块化框架SGL，通过结合深度神经网络与符号规划器，解决机器人执行模糊人类指令时的视觉与语言理解问题。 Ruinian Xu,Hongyi Chen,Yunzhi Lin,Patricio A. Vela cs.RO

title: Photonic reinforcement learning based on optoelectronic reservoir computing
title_zh: 基于光电储层计算的光子强化学习
abstract: Reinforcement learning has been intensively investigated and developed in artificial intelligence in the absence of training data, such as autonomous driving vehicles, robot control, internet advertising, and elastic optical networks. However, the computational cost of reinforcement learning with deep neural networks is extremely high and reducing the learning cost is a challenging issue. We propose a photonic on-line implementation of reinforcement learning using optoelectronic delay-based reservoir computing, both experimentally and numerically. In the proposed scheme, we accelerate reinforcement learning at a rate of several megahertz because there is no required learning process for the internal connection weights in reservoir computing. We perform two benchmark tasks, CartPole-v0 and MountanCar-v0 tasks, to evaluate the proposed scheme. Our results represent the first hardware implementation of reinforcement learning based on photonic reservoir computing and pave the way for fast and efficient reinforcement learning as a novel photonic accelerator.
summary: Reinforcement learning has been intensively investigated and developed in artificial intelligence in the absence of training data, such as autonomous driving vehicles, robot control, internet advertising, and elastic optical networks. However, the computational cost of reinforcement learning with deep neural networks is extremely high and reducing the learning cost is a challenging issue. We propose a photonic on-line implementation of reinforcement learning using optoelectronic delay-based reservoir computing, both experimentally and numerically. In the proposed scheme, we accelerate reinforcement learning at a rate of several megahertz because there is no required learning process for the internal connection weights in reservoir computing. We perform two benchmark tasks, CartPole-v0 and MountanCar-v0 tasks, to evaluate the proposed scheme. Our results represent the first hardware implementation of reinforcement learning based on photonic reservoir computing and pave the way for fast and efficient reinforcement learning as a novel photonic accelerator.
abstract_zh: 强化学习在缺乏训练数据的情况下在人工智能领域得到了深入的研究和发展，例如自动驾驶车辆、机器人控制、互联网广告、弹性光网络等。然而，深度神经网络强化学习的计算成本非常高，降低学习成本是一个具有挑战性的问题。我们提出了一种使用基于光电延迟的储层计算的强化学习的光子在线实现，无论是实验还是数值。在所提出的方案中，我们以几兆赫兹的速度加速强化学习，因为在储层计算中不需要内部连接权重的学习过程。我们执行两个基准任务 CartPole-v0 和 MountanCar-v0 任务来评估所提出的方案。我们的结果代表了基于光子存储计算的强化学习的首次硬件实现，并为快速高效的强化学习作为新型光子加速器铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于光电延迟型储备池计算的光子强化学习系统，旨在降低传统深度神经网络强化学习的计算成本。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习依赖深度神经网络，计算成本极高，亟需高效替代方案以实现快速学习。
AI.method: 利用光电延迟储备池计算硬件架构，无需训练内部连接权重，实现数兆赫兹级的实时强化学习加速。
AI.result: 首次在硬件上实现光子储备池计算强化学习，在CartPole-v0和MountainCar-v0任务中验证了方案有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方案为未来高速低耗的光子强化学习加速器提供了新路径，具有重要应用前景。

title: Meta-Learning for Simple Regret Minimization
title_zh: 用于简单遗憾最小化的元学习
abstract: We develop a meta-learning framework for simple regret minimization in bandits. In this framework, a learning agent interacts with a sequence of bandit tasks, which are sampled i.i.d.\ from an unknown prior distribution, and learns its meta-parameters to perform better on future tasks. We propose the first Bayesian and frequentist meta-learning algorithms for this setting. The Bayesian algorithm has access to a prior distribution over the meta-parameters and its meta simple regret over $m$ bandit tasks with horizon $n$ is mere $\tilde{O}(m / \sqrt{n})$. On the other hand, the meta simple regret of the frequentist algorithm is $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{m} n + m/ \sqrt{n})$. While its regret is worse, the frequentist algorithm is more general because it does not need a prior distribution over the meta-parameters. It can also be analyzed in more settings. We instantiate our algorithms for several classes of bandit problems. Our algorithms are general and we complement our theory by evaluating them empirically in several environments.
summary: We develop a meta-learning framework for simple regret minimization in bandits. In this framework, a learning agent interacts with a sequence of bandit tasks, which are sampled i.i.d.\ from an unknown prior distribution, and learns its meta-parameters to perform better on future tasks. We propose the first Bayesian and frequentist meta-learning algorithms for this setting. The Bayesian algorithm has access to a prior distribution over the meta-parameters and its meta simple regret over $m$ bandit tasks with horizon $n$ is mere $\tilde{O}(m / \sqrt{n})$. On the other hand, the meta simple regret of the frequentist algorithm is $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{m} n + m/ \sqrt{n})$. While its regret is worse, the frequentist algorithm is more general because it does not need a prior distribution over the meta-parameters. It can also be analyzed in more settings. We instantiate our algorithms for several classes of bandit problems. Our algorithms are general and we complement our theory by evaluating them empirically in several environments.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了一个元学习框架，用于简单地最小化强盗的遗憾。在此框架中，学习代理与一系列老虎机任务进行交互，这些任务是从未知的先验分布中独立同分布采样的，并学习其元参数以更好地执行未来的任务。我们为此设置提出了第一个贝叶斯和频率主义元学习算法。贝叶斯算法可以访问元参数的先验分布，并且其对水平线为 $n$ 的 $m$ bandit 任务的元简单遗憾仅为 $\tilde{O}(m / \sqrt{n})$。另一方面，频率主义算法的元简单遗憾是$\tilde{O}(\sqrt{m} n + m/ \sqrt{n})$。虽然它的遗憾更严重，但频率论算法更通用，因为它不需要对元参数进行先验分布。还可以在更多设置中进行分析。我们针对几类老虎机问题实例化了我们的算法。我们的算法是通用的，我们通过在多种环境中对它们进行实证评估来补充我们的理论。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于多臂老虎机问题中简单遗憾最小化的元学习框架，通过学习元参数来提升未来任务的表现。
AI.motivation: 传统老虎机算法无法有效跨任务迁移知识，导致在新任务中表现不佳。元学习可通过学习元参数提升跨任务适应能力，但现有方法缺乏理论保障。
AI.method: 设计了贝叶斯和频率学派元学习算法。贝叶斯方法利用元参数先验分布，频率学派方法无需先验。两种算法均通过分析m个任务的累积遗憾来优化元参数。
AI.result: 贝叶斯算法的简单遗憾界为~O(m/√n)，频率学派算法为~O(√m n + m/√n)。频率学派算法更通用，且在多种老虎机场景中验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在理论和实验上均验证了元学习在老虎机任务中的有效性，贝叶斯方法在特定场景更优，而频率学派方法具有更广的适用性。

authors_text: Alexander Zlokapa,Andrew K. Tan,John M. Martyn,Ila R. Fiete,Max Tegmark,Isaac L. Chuang
title: Fault-Tolerant Neural Networks from Biological Error Correction Codes
title_zh: 来自生物纠错码的容错神经网络
abstract: It has been an open question in deep learning if fault-tolerant computation is possible: can arbitrarily reliable computation be achieved using only unreliable neurons? In the grid cells of the mammalian cortex, analog error correction codes have been observed to protect states against neural spiking noise, but their role in information processing is unclear. Here, we use these biological error correction codes to develop a universal fault-tolerant neural network that achieves reliable computation if the faultiness of each neuron lies below a sharp threshold; remarkably, we find that noisy biological neurons fall below this threshold. The discovery of a phase transition from faulty to fault-tolerant neural computation suggests a mechanism for reliable computation in the cortex and opens a path towards understanding noisy analog systems relevant to artificial intelligence and neuromorphic computing.
summary: It has been an open question in deep learning if fault-tolerant computation is possible: can arbitrarily reliable computation be achieved using only unreliable neurons? In the grid cells of the mammalian cortex, analog error correction codes have been observed to protect states against neural spiking noise, but their role in information processing is unclear. Here, we use these biological error correction codes to develop a universal fault-tolerant neural network that achieves reliable computation if the faultiness of each neuron lies below a sharp threshold; remarkably, we find that noisy biological neurons fall below this threshold. The discovery of a phase transition from faulty to fault-tolerant neural computation suggests a mechanism for reliable computation in the cortex and opens a path towards understanding noisy analog systems relevant to artificial intelligence and neuromorphic computing.
abstract_zh: 容错计算是否可能成为深度学习中的一个悬而未决的问题：是否可以仅使用不可靠的神经元来实现任意可靠的计算？在哺乳动物皮层的网格细胞中，已经观察到模拟纠错码可以保护状态免受神经尖峰噪声的影响，但它们在信息处理中的作用尚不清楚。在这里，我们使用这些生物纠错码来开发一个通用的容错神经网络，如果每个神经元的错误低于一个尖锐的阈值，该网络就可以实现可靠的计算；值得注意的是，我们发现嘈杂的生物神经元低于这个阈值。从错误神经计算到容错神经计算的相变的发现提出了一种在皮层中进行可靠计算的机制，并为理解与人工智能和神经形态计算相关的噪声模拟系统开辟了一条道路。

AI.tldr: 本文利用生物体内的模拟纠错码机制，设计出一种能够在神经元故障率低于特定阈值时实现可靠计算的容错神经网络。
AI.motivation: 深度学习领域长期存在如何利用不可靠神经元实现可靠计算的难题，而生物神经系统中的纠错机制可能提供关键启示。
AI.method: 通过分析哺乳动物皮层网格细胞中的生物纠错码特性，构建具有容错能力的神经网络模型并验证其阈值特性。
AI.result: 发现当神经元故障率低于特定阈值时网络可实现可靠计算，且生物神经元天然满足该阈值条件，存在从故障到容错的相变现象。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了生物皮层可靠计算的潜在机制，为噪声环境下的AI系统设计和神经形态计算提供了新思路。

title: Learning to Identify Perceptual Bugs in 3D Video Games
title_zh: 学习识别 3D 视频游戏中的感知错误
abstract: Automated Bug Detection (ABD) in video games is composed of two distinct but complementary problems: automated game exploration and bug identification. Automated game exploration has received much recent attention, spurred on by developments in fields such as reinforcement learning. The complementary problem of identifying the bugs present in a player's experience has for the most part relied on the manual specification of rules. Although it is widely recognised that many bugs of interest cannot be identified with such methods, little progress has been made in this direction. In this work we show that it is possible to identify a range of perceptual bugs using learning-based methods by making use of only the rendered game screen as seen by the player. To support our work, we have developed World of Bugs (WOB) an open platform for testing ABD methods in 3D game environments.
summary: Automated Bug Detection (ABD) in video games is composed of two distinct but complementary problems: automated game exploration and bug identification. Automated game exploration has received much recent attention, spurred on by developments in fields such as reinforcement learning. The complementary problem of identifying the bugs present in a player's experience has for the most part relied on the manual specification of rules. Although it is widely recognised that many bugs of interest cannot be identified with such methods, little progress has been made in this direction. In this work we show that it is possible to identify a range of perceptual bugs using learning-based methods by making use of only the rendered game screen as seen by the player. To support our work, we have developed World of Bugs (WOB) an open platform for testing ABD methods in 3D game environments.
abstract_zh: 视频游戏中的自动错误检测 (ABD) 由两个不同但互补的问题组成：自动游戏探索和错误识别。受强化学习等领域发展的推动，自动化游戏探索最近受到了广泛关注。识别玩家体验中存在的错误的补充问题在很大程度上依赖于规则的手动规范。尽管人们普遍认识到许多感兴趣的错误无法用此类方法识别，但在这方面进展甚微。在这项工作中，我们表明，通过仅使用玩家所看到的渲染游戏屏幕，可以使用基于学习的方法来识别一系列感知错误。为了支持我们的工作，我们开发了 World of Bugs (WOB)，一个开放平台，用于在 3D 游戏环境中测试 ABD 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究如何通过学习方法，仅利用玩家视角的渲染游戏画面来识别3D视频游戏中的感知错误。
AI.motivation: 现有错误识别方法依赖手动规则，难以有效检测复杂多样的感知错误，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 采用基于深度学习的视觉识别方法，仅通过玩家视角的渲染游戏画面作为输入，训练模型自动检测感知错误。
AI.result: 成功开发了World of Bugs（WOB）开放平台，用于测试和评估自动化错误检测方法在3D游戏环境中的效果。
AI.conclusion: 证明了基于视觉的学习方法在识别感知错误中的可行性，并为未来研究提供了开放测试平台。

authors_text: Matthew Groh,Aruna Sankaranarayanan,Nikhil Singh,Dong Young Kim,Andrew Lippman,Rosalind Picard
title: Human Detection of Political Speech Deepfakes across Transcripts, Audio, and Video
title_zh: 人工检测抄本、音频和视频中的政治言论 Deepfake
abstract: Recent advances in technology for hyper-realistic visual and audio effects provoke the concern that deepfake videos of political speeches will soon be indistinguishable from authentic video recordings. The conventional wisdom in communication theory predicts people will fall for fake news more often when the same version of a story is presented as a video versus text. We conduct 5 pre-registered randomized experiments with 2,215 participants to evaluate how accurately humans distinguish real political speeches from fabrications across base rates of misinformation, audio sources, question framings, and media modalities. We find base rates of misinformation minimally influence discernment and deepfakes with audio produced by the state-of-the-art text-to-speech algorithms are harder to discern than the same deepfakes with voice actor audio. Moreover across all experiments, we find audio and visual information enables more accurate discernment than text alone: human discernment relies more on how something is said, the audio-visual cues, than what is said, the speech content.
summary: Recent advances in technology for hyper-realistic visual and audio effects provoke the concern that deepfake videos of political speeches will soon be indistinguishable from authentic video recordings. The conventional wisdom in communication theory predicts people will fall for fake news more often when the same version of a story is presented as a video versus text. We conduct 5 pre-registered randomized experiments with 2,215 participants to evaluate how accurately humans distinguish real political speeches from fabrications across base rates of misinformation, audio sources, question framings, and media modalities. We find base rates of misinformation minimally influence discernment and deepfakes with audio produced by the state-of-the-art text-to-speech algorithms are harder to discern than the same deepfakes with voice actor audio. Moreover across all experiments, we find audio and visual information enables more accurate discernment than text alone: human discernment relies more on how something is said, the audio-visual cues, than what is said, the speech content.
abstract_zh: 超现实视觉和音频效果技术的最新进展引发了人们的担忧，即政治演讲的深度伪造视频很快将与真实的视频录音无法区分。传播理论中的传统智慧预测，当同一版本的故事以视频而非文本形式呈现时，人们会更容易陷入假新闻。我们对 2,215 名参与者进行了 5 项预先注册的随机实验，以评估人类在错误信息、音频来源、问题框架和媒体模式的基本比率上如何准确地区分真实的政治言论和捏造的言论。我们发现错误信息的基本比率对辨别的影响最小，并且由最先进的文本到语音算法生成的音频的深度伪造比配音演员音频的相同深度伪造更难辨别。此外，在所有实验中，我们发现音频和视觉信息比单独的文本能够实现更准确的辨别：人类的辨别更多地依赖于说话的方式，即视听线索，而不是所说的内容，即语音内容。

AI.tldr: 该论文评估人类在不同媒体形式下识别政治演讲深度伪造视频的能力。
AI.motivation: 随着深度伪造技术的发展，政治演讲的虚假视频可能难以与真实视频区分，传统传播理论认为视频形式比文本更容易让人相信虚假信息。
AI.method: 通过5个预注册随机实验，共2215名参与者，测试不同错误信息基础率、音频来源、问题框架和媒体形式对人类识别深度伪造的影响。
AI.result: 错误信息基础率影响较小，使用最新文本到语音算法生成的音频比配音演员音频更难被识别；音频和视觉信息比文本单独使用更能提高识别准确性。
AI.conclusion: 人类识别深度伪造依赖于音频视觉线索而非内容本身，且先进语音合成技术显著降低识别难度。

conclusion: 人类识别深度伪造依赖于音频视觉线索而非内容本身，且先进语音合成技术显著降低识别难度。
search_text: Human Detection of Political Speech Deepfakes across Transcripts, Audio, and Video 人工检测抄本、音频和视频中的政治言论 Deepfake Recent advances in technology for hyper-realistic visual and audio effects provoke the concern that deepfake videos of political speeches will soon be indistinguishable from authentic video recordings. The conventional wisdom in communication theory predicts people will fall for fake news more often when the same version of a story is presented as a video versus text. We conduct 5 pre-registered randomized experiments with 2,215 participants to evaluate how accurately humans distinguish real political speeches from fabrications across base rates of misinformation, audio sources, question framings, and media modalities. We find base rates of misinformation minimally influence discernment and deepfakes with audio produced by the state-of-the-art text-to-speech algorithms are harder to discern than the same deepfakes with voice actor audio. Moreover across all experiments, we find audio and visual information enables more accurate discernment than text alone: human discernment relies more on how something is said, the audio-visual cues, than what is said, the speech content. 超现实视觉和音频效果技术的最新进展引发了人们的担忧，即政治演讲的深度伪造视频很快将与真实的视频录音无法区分。传播理论中的传统智慧预测，当同一版本的故事以视频而非文本形式呈现时，人们会更容易陷入假新闻。我们对 2,215 名参与者进行了 5 项预先注册的随机实验，以评估人类在错误信息、音频来源、问题框架和媒体模式的基本比率上如何准确地区分真实的政治言论和捏造的言论。我们发现错误信息的基本比率对辨别的影响最小，并且由最先进的文本到语音算法生成的音频的深度伪造比配音演员音频的相同深度伪造更难辨别。此外，在所有实验中，我们发现音频和视觉信息比单独的文本能够实现更准确的辨别：人类的辨别更多地依赖于说话的方式，即视听线索，而不是所说的内容，即语音内容。 该论文评估人类在不同媒体形式下识别政治演讲深度伪造视频的能力。 Matthew Groh,Aruna Sankaranarayanan,Nikhil Singh,Dong Young Kim,Andrew Lippman,Rosalind Picard cs.HC,cs.AI

authors_text: Yang Xiao,Jinlan Fu,Weizhe Yuan,Vijay Viswanathan,Zhoumianze Liu,Yixin Liu,Graham Neubig,Pengfei Liu
title: DataLab: A Platform for Data Analysis and Intervention
title_zh: DataLab：数据分析和干预平台
abstract: Despite data's crucial role in machine learning, most existing tools and research tend to focus on systems on top of existing data rather than how to interpret and manipulate data. In this paper, we propose DataLab, a unified data-oriented platform that not only allows users to interactively analyze the characteristics of data, but also provides a standardized interface for different data processing operations. Additionally, in view of the ongoing proliferation of datasets, \toolname has features for dataset recommendation and global vision analysis that help researchers form a better view of the data ecosystem. So far, DataLab covers 1,715 datasets and 3,583 of its transformed version (e.g., hyponyms replacement), where 728 datasets support various analyses (e.g., with respect to gender bias) with the help of 140M samples annotated by 318 feature functions. DataLab is under active development and will be supported going forward. We have released a web platform, web API, Python SDK, PyPI published package and online documentation, which hopefully, can meet the diverse needs of researchers.
summary: Despite data's crucial role in machine learning, most existing tools and research tend to focus on systems on top of existing data rather than how to interpret and manipulate data. In this paper, we propose DataLab, a unified data-oriented platform that not only allows users to interactively analyze the characteristics of data, but also provides a standardized interface for different data processing operations. Additionally, in view of the ongoing proliferation of datasets, \toolname has features for dataset recommendation and global vision analysis that help researchers form a better view of the data ecosystem. So far, DataLab covers 1,715 datasets and 3,583 of its transformed version (e.g., hyponyms replacement), where 728 datasets support various analyses (e.g., with respect to gender bias) with the help of 140M samples annotated by 318 feature functions. DataLab is under active development and will be supported going forward. We have released a web platform, web API, Python SDK, PyPI published package and online documentation, which hopefully, can meet the diverse needs of researchers.
abstract_zh: 尽管数据在机器学习中发挥着至关重要的作用，但大多数现有工具和研究往往侧重于现有数据之上的系统，而不是如何解释和操作数据。在本文中，我们提出了DataLab，一个面向数据的统一平台，不仅允许用户交互式地分析数据的特征，而且还为不同的数据处理操作提供标准化的接口。此外，鉴于数据集的不断激增，\toolname 具有数据集推荐和全局视觉分析功能，可帮助研究人员更好地了解数据生态系统。到目前为止，DataLab 涵盖了 1,715 个数据集和 3,583 个转换版本（例如，下位词替换），其中 728 个数据集借助 318 个特征函数注释的 1.4 亿个样本支持各种分析（例如，性别偏见）。 DataLab 正在积极开发中，并将在未来得到支持。我们发布了Web平台、Web API、Python SDK、PyPI发布包和在线文档，希望能够满足研究人员的多样化需求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DataLab平台，旨在提供数据解析、处理及干预的统一解决方案，并支持数据集推荐与全局分析。
AI.motivation: 现有工具和研究多聚焦于数据之上的系统构建，而缺乏对数据本身解读与操作的深入支持，难以应对数据生态的复杂性。
AI.method: 构建支持交互式数据分析的统一平台，提供标准化数据处理接口，集成数据集推荐与全局视图分析功能，并覆盖大量数据集及标注样本。
AI.result: DataLab涵盖1,715个数据集及3,583个变体，支持728个数据集的多维度分析，基于1.4亿标注样本和318个特征函数。
AI.conclusion: DataLab通过多形态工具（网页平台、API、SDK等）持续发展，致力于满足研究者在数据生态中的多样化需求。

authors_text: Adarsh Jagan Sathyamoorthy,Kasun Weerakoon,Tianrui Guan,Jing Liang,Dinesh Manocha
title: TerraPN: Unstructured Terrain Navigation using Online Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: TerraPN：使用在线自我监督学习的非结构化地形导航
abstract: We present TerraPN, a novel method that learns the surface properties (traction, bumpiness, deformability, etc.) of complex outdoor terrains directly from robot-terrain interactions through self-supervised learning, and uses it for autonomous robot navigation. Our method uses RGB images of terrain surfaces and the robot's velocities as inputs, and the IMU vibrations and odometry errors experienced by the robot as labels for self-supervision. Our method computes a surface cost map that differentiates smooth, high-traction surfaces (low navigation costs) from bumpy, slippery, deformable surfaces (high navigation costs). We compute the cost map by non-uniformly sampling patches from the input RGB image by detecting boundaries between surfaces resulting in low inference times (47.27% lower) compared to uniform sampling and existing segmentation methods. We present a novel navigation algorithm that accounts for a surface's cost, computes cost-based acceleration limits for the robot, and dynamically feasible, collision-free trajectories. TerraPN's surface cost prediction can be trained in ~25 minutes for five different surfaces, compared to several hours for previous learning-based segmentation methods. In terms of navigation, our method outperforms previous works in terms of success rates (up to 35.84% higher), vibration cost of the trajectories (up to 21.52% lower), and slowing the robot on bumpy, deformable surfaces (up to 46.76% slower) in different scenarios.
summary: We present TerraPN, a novel method that learns the surface properties (traction, bumpiness, deformability, etc.) of complex outdoor terrains directly from robot-terrain interactions through self-supervised learning, and uses it for autonomous robot navigation. Our method uses RGB images of terrain surfaces and the robot's velocities as inputs, and the IMU vibrations and odometry errors experienced by the robot as labels for self-supervision. Our method computes a surface cost map that differentiates smooth, high-traction surfaces (low navigation costs) from bumpy, slippery, deformable surfaces (high navigation costs). We compute the cost map by non-uniformly sampling patches from the input RGB image by detecting boundaries between surfaces resulting in low inference times (47.27% lower) compared to uniform sampling and existing segmentation methods. We present a novel navigation algorithm that accounts for a surface's cost, computes cost-based acceleration limits for the robot, and dynamically feasible, collision-free trajectories. TerraPN's surface cost prediction can be trained in ~25 minutes for five different surfaces, compared to several hours for previous learning-based segmentation methods. In terms of navigation, our method outperforms previous works in terms of success rates (up to 35.84% higher), vibration cost of the trajectories (up to 21.52% lower), and slowing the robot on bumpy, deformable surfaces (up to 46.76% slower) in different scenarios.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 TerraPN，这是一种新颖的方法，可以通过自监督学习直接从机器人与地形的交互中学习复杂室外地形的表面特性（牵引力、凹凸度、变形性等），并将其用于自主机器人导航。我们的方法使用地形表面的 RGB 图像和机器人的速度作为输入，并将机器人经历的 IMU 振动和里程计误差作为自我监督的标签。我们的方法计算一个表面成本图，该图将光滑、高牵引力表面（低导航成本）与崎岖、光滑、可变形表面（高导航成本）区分开来。我们通过检测表面之间的边界，对输入 RGB 图像中的补丁进行非均匀采样来计算成本图，从而与均匀采样和现有分割方法相比，推理时间较短（降低 47.27%）。我们提出了一种新颖的导航算法，该算法考虑了表面的成本，计算机器人基于成本的加速度限制，以及动态可行的无碰撞轨迹。 TerraPN 的表面成本预测可以在大约 25 分钟内针对五个不同的表面进行训练，而之前基于学习的分割方法需要几个小时。在导航方面，我们的方法在不同场景下的成功率（最高提高了 35.84%）、轨迹振动成本（降低了 21.52%）以及在崎岖不平、可变形表面上减慢机器人速度（最高减慢了 46.76%）方面均优于以前的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TerraPN的新方法，通过自监督学习直接从机器人与地形的交互中学习复杂户外地形的表面属性，用于自主机器人导航。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在户外地形导航中存在训练时间长、导航成功率低、轨迹振动成本高以及无法有效减缓机器人在崎岖地形上的速度等问题。
AI.method: TerraPN使用RGB图像和机器人速度作为输入，通过IMU振动和里程计误差作为自监督标签，计算表面成本图，并采用非均匀采样方法提高推理速度。此外，还提出了一种基于表面成本的导航算法，以动态可行且无碰撞的轨迹进行导航。
AI.result: TerraPN在五种不同表面上的训练时间仅为约25分钟，相比之前的方法减少了数小时。在导航任务中，其成功率提高了35.84%，轨迹振动成本降低了21.52%，并且在崎岖地形上减缓了机器人速度达46.76%。
AI.conclusion: TerraPN通过自监督学习有效提升了机器人在复杂户外地形中的导航性能，具有较高的实用价值。

We present a novel navigation algorithm that accounts for a surface's cost, computes cost-based acceleration limits for the robot, and dynamically feasible, collision-free trajectories. In terms of navigation, our method outperforms previous works in terms of success rates (up to 35.84% higher), vibration cost of the trajectories (up to 21.52% lower), and slowing the robot on bumpy, deformable surfaces (up to 46.76% slower) in different scenarios. 我们提出了 TerraPN，这是一种新颖的方法，可以通过自监督学习直接从机器人与地形的交互中学习复杂室外地形的表面特性（牵引力、凹凸度、变形性等），并将其用于自主机器人导航。我们的方法使用地形表面的 RGB 图像和机器人的速度作为输入，并将机器人经历的 IMU 振动和里程计误差作为自我监督的标签。我们的方法计算一个表面成本图，该图将光滑、高牵引力表面（低导航成本）与崎岖、光滑、可变形表面（高导航成本）区分开来。我们通过检测表面之间的边界，对输入 RGB 图像中的补丁进行非均匀采样来计算成本图，从而与均匀采样和现有分割方法相比，推理时间较短（降低 47.27%）。我们提出了一种新颖的导航算法，该算法考虑了表面的成本，计算机器人基于成本的加速度限制，以及动态可行的无碰撞轨迹。 TerraPN 的表面成本预测可以在大约 25 分钟内针对五个不同的表面进行训练，而之前基于学习的分割方法需要几个小时。在导航方面，我们的方法在不同场景下的成功率（最高提高了 35.84%）、轨迹振动成本（降低了 21.52%）以及在崎岖不平、可变形表面上减慢机器人速度（最高减慢了 46.76%）方面均优于以前的工作。 本文提出了一种名为TerraPN的新方法，通过自监督学习直接从机器人与地形的交互中学习复杂户外地形的表面属性，用于自主机器人导航。 Adarsh Jagan Sathyamoorthy,Kasun Weerakoon,Tianrui Guan,Jing Liang,Dinesh Manocha cs.RO

title: Learning to Schedule Heuristics for the Simultaneous Stochastic Optimization of Mining Complexes
title_zh: 学习调度启发式采矿综合体的同时随机优化
comment: Accepted at the AAAI-22 Workshop on Machine Learning for Operations Research (ML4OR). Long version under review
comments: Accepted at the AAAI-22 Workshop on Machine Learning for Operations Research (ML4OR). Long version under review
abstract: The simultaneous stochastic optimization of mining complexes (SSOMC) is a large-scale stochastic combinatorial optimization problem that simultaneously manages the extraction of materials from multiple mines and their processing using interconnected facilities to generate a set of final products, while taking into account material supply (geological) uncertainty to manage the associated risk. Although simulated annealing has been shown to outperform comparing methods for solving the SSOMC, early performance might dominate recent performance in that a combination of the heuristics' performance is used to determine which perturbations to apply. This work proposes a data-driven framework for heuristic scheduling in a fully self-managed hyper-heuristic to solve the SSOMC. The proposed learn-to-perturb (L2P) hyper-heuristic is a multi-neighborhood simulated annealing algorithm. The L2P selects the heuristic (perturbation) to be applied in a self-adaptive manner using reinforcement learning to efficiently explore which local search is best suited for a particular search point. Several state-of-the-art agents have been incorporated into L2P to better adapt the search and guide it towards better solutions. By learning from data describing the performance of the heuristics, a problem-specific ordering of heuristics that collectively finds better solutions faster is obtained. L2P is tested on several real-world mining complexes, with an emphasis on efficiency, robustness, and generalization capacity. Results show a reduction in the number of iterations by 30-50% and in the computational time by 30-45%.

Although simulated annealing has been shown to outperform comparing methods for solving the SSOMC, early performance might dominate recent performance in that a combination of the heuristics' performance is used to determine which perturbations to apply. This work proposes a data-driven framework for heuristic scheduling in a fully self-managed hyper-heuristic to solve the SSOMC. The proposed learn-to-perturb (L2P) hyper-heuristic is a multi-neighborhood simulated annealing algorithm. The L2P selects the heuristic (perturbation) to be applied in a self-adaptive manner using reinforcement learning to efficiently explore which local search is best suited for a particular search point. Several state-of-the-art agents have been incorporated into L2P to better adapt the search and guide it towards better solutions. By learning from data describing the performance of the heuristics, a problem-specific ordering of heuristics that collectively finds better solutions faster is obtained. L2P is tested on several real-world mining complexes, with an emphasis on efficiency, robustness, and generalization capacity. Results show a reduction in the number of iterations by 30-50% and in the computational time by 30-45%.
abstract_zh: 采矿综合体同时随机优化 (SSOMC) 是一个大规模随机组合优化问题，它同时管理从多个矿山提取材料并使用互连设施进行加工以生成一组最终产品，同时考虑材料供应（地质）不确定性以管理相关风险。尽管模拟退火已被证明优于求解 SSOMC 的比较方法，但早期性能可能会主导最近的性能，因为启发式性能的组合用于确定要应用哪些扰动。这项工作提出了一种数据驱动的启发式调度框架，以完全自我管理的超启发式来解决 SSOMC。所提出的学习扰动（L2P）超启发式是一种多邻域模拟退火算法。 L2P 使用强化学习以自适应方式选择启发式（扰动），以有效地探索哪个局部搜索最适合特定搜索点。 L2P 中已整合了几种最先进的代理，以更好地适应搜索并引导其找到更好的解决方案。通过从描述启发式性能的数据中学习，获得特定于问题的启发式排序，从而更快地共同找到更好的解决方案。 L2P 在多个现实世界的采矿综合体上进行了测试，重点是效率、稳健性和泛化能力。结果显示迭代次数减少了 30-50%，计算时间减少了 30-45%。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于强化学习的自适应超启发式框架，用于解决采矿综合体的同时随机优化问题，以提高效率和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在解决SSOMC时存在早期性能主导后续优化的问题，需更高效的启发式调度策略以应对地质不确定性。
AI.method: 提出L2P超启发式框架，结合多邻域模拟退火与强化学习，通过数据驱动选择最优扰动策略，实现自适应搜索。
AI.result: 在多个实际采矿案例中，L2P减少了30-50%的迭代次数和30-45%的计算时间，提升效率与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: L2P框架有效提升了SSOMC求解效率，验证了数据驱动启发式调度在复杂优化问题中的可行性。

This work proposes a data-driven framework for heuristic scheduling in a fully self-managed hyper-heuristic to solve the SSOMC. The proposed learn-to-perturb (L2P) hyper-heuristic is a multi-neighborhood simulated annealing algorithm. The L2P selects the heuristic (perturbation) to be applied in a self-adaptive manner using reinforcement learning to efficiently explore which local search is best suited for a particular search point. Several state-of-the-art agents have been incorporated into L2P to better adapt the search and guide it towards better solutions. By learning from data describing the performance of the heuristics, a problem-specific ordering of heuristics that collectively finds better solutions faster is obtained. L2P is tested on several real-world mining complexes, with an emphasis on efficiency, robustness, and generalization capacity. Results show a reduction in the number of iterations by 30-50% and in the computational time by 30-45%. 采矿综合体同时随机优化 (SSOMC) 是一个大规模随机组合优化问题，它同时管理从多个矿山提取材料并使用互连设施进行加工以生成一组最终产品，同时考虑材料供应（地质）不确定性以管理相关风险。尽管模拟退火已被证明优于求解 SSOMC 的比较方法，但早期性能可能会主导最近的性能，因为启发式性能的组合用于确定要应用哪些扰动。这项工作提出了一种数据驱动的启发式调度框架，以完全自我管理的超启发式来解决 SSOMC。所提出的学习扰动（L2P）超启发式是一种多邻域模拟退火算法。 L2P 使用强化学习以自适应方式选择启发式（扰动），以有效地探索哪个局部搜索最适合特定搜索点。 L2P 中已整合了几种最先进的代理，以更好地适应搜索并引导其找到更好的解决方案。通过从描述启发式性能的数据中学习，获得特定于问题的启发式排序，从而更快地共同找到更好的解决方案。 L2P 在多个现实世界的采矿综合体上进行了测试，重点是效率、稳健性和泛化能力。结果显示迭代次数减少了 30-50%，计算时间减少了 30-45%。 提出一种基于强化学习的自适应超启发式框架，用于解决采矿综合体的同时随机优化问题，以提高效率和鲁棒性。 Yassine Yaakoubi,Roussos Dimitrakopoulos math.OC,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Dynamic size counting in population protocols
title_zh: 群体协议中的动态大小计数
abstract: The population protocol model describes a network of anonymous agents that interact asynchronously in pairs chosen at random. Each agent starts in the same initial state $s$. We introduce the *dynamic size counting* problem: approximately counting the number of agents in the presence of an adversary who at any time can remove any number of agents or add any number of new agents in state $s$. A valid solution requires that after each addition/removal event, resulting in population size $n$, with high probability each agent "quickly" computes the same constant-factor estimate of the value $\log_2 n$ (how quickly is called the *convergence* time), which remains the output of every agent for as long as possible (the *holding* time). Since the adversary can remove agents, the holding time is necessarily finite: even after the adversary stops altering the population, it is impossible to *stabilize* to an output that never again changes. We first show that a protocol solves the dynamic size counting problem if and only if it solves the *loosely-stabilizing counting* problem: that of estimating $\log n$ in a *fixed-size* population, but where the adversary can initialize each agent in an arbitrary state, with the same convergence time and holding time. We then show a protocol solving the loosely-stabilizing counting problem with the following guarantees: if the population size is $n$, $M$ is the largest initial estimate of $\log n$, and s is the maximum integer initially stored in any field of the agents' memory, we have expected convergence time $O(\log n + \log M)$, expected polynomial holding time, and expected memory usage of $O(\log^2 (s) + (\log \log n)^2)$ bits. Interpreted as a dynamic size counting protocol, when changing from population size $n_{prev}$ to $n_{next}$, the convergence time is $O(\log n_{next} + \log \log n_{prev})$.

We introduce the *dynamic size counting* problem: approximately counting the number of agents in the presence of an adversary who at any time can remove any number of agents or add any number of new agents in state $s$. A valid solution requires that after each addition/removal event, resulting in population size $n$, with high probability each agent "quickly" computes the same constant-factor estimate of the value $\log_2 n$ (how quickly is called the *convergence* time), which remains the output of every agent for as long as possible (the *holding* time). Since the adversary can remove agents, the holding time is necessarily finite: even after the adversary stops altering the population, it is impossible to *stabilize* to an output that never again changes. We first show that a protocol solves the dynamic size counting problem if and only if it solves the *loosely-stabilizing counting* problem: that of estimating $\log n$ in a *fixed-size* population, but where the adversary can initialize each agent in an arbitrary state, with the same convergence time and holding time. We then show a protocol solving the loosely-stabilizing counting problem with the following guarantees: if the population size is $n$, $M$ is the largest initial estimate of $\log n$, and s is the maximum integer initially stored in any field of the agents' memory, we have expected convergence time $O(\log n + \log M)$, expected polynomial holding time, and expected memory usage of $O(\log^2 (s) + (\log \log n)^2)$ bits. Interpreted as a dynamic size counting protocol, when changing from population size $n_{prev}$ to $n_{next}$, the convergence time is $O(\log n_{next} + \log \log n_{prev})$.
abstract_zh: 群体协议模型描述了一个匿名代理网络，这些代理以随机选择的配对方式异步交互。每个代理都以相同的初始状态 $s$ 开始。我们引入“动态大小计数”问题：在对手存在的情况下大约计算代理的数量，对手可以随时删除任意数量的代理或在状态 $s$ 中添加任意数量的新代理。一个有效的解决方案要求在每次添加/删除事件之后，导致种群大小 $n$，每个智能体很有可能“快速”计算值 $\log_2 n$ 的相同常数因子估计值（多快称为*收敛*时间），该值尽可能长时间地保留每个智能体的输出（*保持*时间）。由于对手可以移除代理，因此保持时间必然是有限的：即使在对手停止改变群体之后，也不可能“稳定”到不再改变的输出。我们首先表明，当且仅当协议解决了“松散稳定计数”问题时，它才能解决动态大小计数问题：在“固定大小”群体中估计$\log n$，但对手可以在任意状态下初始化每个代理，并具有相同的收敛时间和保持时间。然后，我们展示了一个解决松散稳定计数问题的协议，并具有以下保证：如果总体大小为 $n$，$M$ 是 $\log n$ 的最大初始估计，并且 s 是最初存储在代理内存的任何字段中的最大整数，我们预期收敛时间 $O(\log n + \log M)$，预期多项式保持时间，以及 $O(\log^2 (s) + (\log \log n)^2)$ 位的预期内存使用量。解释为动态大小计数协议，当从种群大小 $n_{prev}$ 更改为 $n_{next}$ 时，收敛时间为 $O(\log n_{next} + \log \log n_{prev})$。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在存在对抗性动态变化的群体规模下，如何通过群体协议快速估计对数规模的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统群体协议难以应对动态变化的群体规模，尤其在对抗性攻击下无法稳定维护准确的规模估计。
AI.method: 将动态规模计数问题转化为松散稳定计数问题，设计协议保证收敛时间和持有时间，并分析内存使用量。
AI.result: 协议在规模n下具有O(log n + log M)收敛时间、多项式持有时间，内存使用为O(log²s + (log log n)²)位。
AI.conclusion: 提出的协议有效解决了动态规模计数问题，在对抗性环境下实现了对数规模的快速估计与稳定维护。

Interpreted as a dynamic size counting protocol, when changing from population size $n_{prev}$ to $n_{next}$, the convergence time is $O(\log n_{next} + \log \log n_{prev})$. 群体协议模型描述了一个匿名代理网络，这些代理以随机选择的配对方式异步交互。每个代理都以相同的初始状态 $s$ 开始。我们引入“动态大小计数”问题：在对手存在的情况下大约计算代理的数量，对手可以随时删除任意数量的代理或在状态 $s$ 中添加任意数量的新代理。一个有效的解决方案要求在每次添加/删除事件之后，导致种群大小 $n$，每个智能体很有可能“快速”计算值 $\log_2 n$ 的相同常数因子估计值（多快称为*收敛*时间），该值尽可能长时间地保留每个智能体的输出（*保持*时间）。由于对手可以移除代理，因此保持时间必然是有限的：即使在对手停止改变群体之后，也不可能“稳定”到不再改变的输出。我们首先表明，当且仅当协议解决了“松散稳定计数”问题时，它才能解决动态大小计数问题：在“固定大小”群体中估计$\log n$，但对手可以在任意状态下初始化每个代理，并具有相同的收敛时间和保持时间。然后，我们展示了一个解决松散稳定计数问题的协议，并具有以下保证：如果总体大小为 $n$，$M$ 是 $\log n$ 的最大初始估计，并且 s 是最初存储在代理内存的任何字段中的最大整数，我们预期收敛时间 $O(\log n + \log M)$，预期多项式保持时间，以及 $O(\log^2 (s) + (\log \log n)^2)$ 位的预期内存使用量。解释为动态大小计数协议，当从种群大小 $n_{prev}$ 更改为 $n_{next}$ 时，收敛时间为 $O(\log n_{next} + \log \log n_{prev})$。 本文研究了在存在对抗性动态变化的群体规模下，如何通过群体协议快速估计对数规模的问题。 David Doty,Mahsa Eftekhari cs.DC,cs.DS

authors_text: Rishabh Saumil Thakkar,Aryaman Singh Samyal,David Fridovich-Keil,Zhe Xu,Ufuk Topcu
title: Hierarchical Control for Head-to-Head Autonomous Racing
title_zh: 面对面自动赛车的分层控制
abstract: We develop a hierarchical controller for head-to-head autonomous racing. We first introduce a formulation of a racing game with realistic safety and fairness rules. A high-level planner approximates the original formulation as a discrete game with simplified state, control, and dynamics to easily encode the complex safety and fairness rules and calculates a series of target waypoints. The low-level controller takes the resulting waypoints as a reference trajectory and computes high-resolution control inputs by solving an alternative formulation approximation with simplified objectives and constraints. We consider two approaches for the low-level planner, constructing two hierarchical controllers. One approach uses multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), and the other solves a linear-quadratic Nash game (LQNG) to produce control inputs. The controllers are compared against three baselines: an end-to-end MARL controller, a MARL controller tracking a fixed racing line, and an LQNG controller tracking a fixed racing line. Quantitative results show that the proposed hierarchical methods outperform their respective baseline methods in terms of head-to-head race wins and abiding by the rules. The hierarchical controller using MARL for low-level control consistently outperformed all other methods by winning over 90% of head-to-head races and more consistently adhered to the complex racing rules. Qualitatively, we observe the proposed controllers mimicking actions performed by expert human drivers such as shielding/blocking, overtaking, and long-term planning for delayed advantages. We show that hierarchical planning for game-theoretic reasoning produces competitive behavior even when challenged with complex rules and constraints.

A high-level planner approximates the original formulation as a discrete game with simplified state, control, and dynamics to easily encode the complex safety and fairness rules and calculates a series of target waypoints. The low-level controller takes the resulting waypoints as a reference trajectory and computes high-resolution control inputs by solving an alternative formulation approximation with simplified objectives and constraints. We consider two approaches for the low-level planner, constructing two hierarchical controllers. One approach uses multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), and the other solves a linear-quadratic Nash game (LQNG) to produce control inputs. The controllers are compared against three baselines: an end-to-end MARL controller, a MARL controller tracking a fixed racing line, and an LQNG controller tracking a fixed racing line. Quantitative results show that the proposed hierarchical methods outperform their respective baseline methods in terms of head-to-head race wins and abiding by the rules. The hierarchical controller using MARL for low-level control consistently outperformed all other methods by winning over 90% of head-to-head races and more consistently adhered to the complex racing rules. Qualitatively, we observe the proposed controllers mimicking actions performed by expert human drivers such as shielding/blocking, overtaking, and long-term planning for delayed advantages. We show that hierarchical planning for game-theoretic reasoning produces competitive behavior even when challenged with complex rules and constraints.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了一种用于面对面自动驾驶赛车的分层控制器。我们首先介绍具有现实安全性和公平性规则的赛车游戏的制定。高级规划器将原始公式近似为具有简化状态、控制和动力学的离散博弈，以轻松编码复杂的安全和公平规则并计算一系列目标航路点。低级控制器将所得航路点作为参考轨迹，并通过求解具有简化目标和约束的替代公式近似来计算高分辨率控制输入。我们考虑低级规划器的两种方法，构建两个层次控制器。一种方法使用多智能体强化学习（MARL），另一种方法解决线性二次纳什博弈（LQNG）以产生控制输入。将控制器与三个基线进行比较：端到端 MARL 控制器、跟踪固定赛车线的 MARL 控制器以及跟踪固定赛车线的 LQNG 控制器。定量结果表明，所提出的分层方法在正面比赛获胜和遵守规则方面优于各自的基线方法。使用 MARL 进行低级控制的分层控制器始终优于所有其他方法，赢得了超过 90% 的面对面比赛，并且更一致地遵守复杂的比赛规则。定性地，我们观察到所提出的控制器模仿人类专家驾驶员执行的动作，例如屏蔽/阻挡、超车以及延迟优势的长期规划。我们证明，即使面临复杂的规则和约束的挑战，博弈论推理的分层规划也会产生竞争行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层控制器用于头对头自动驾驶赛车，结合高阶规划与低阶控制策略以应对复杂规则。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在满足安全与公平规则的同时实现高效赛车策略，需设计兼顾规则遵守与竞技性能的控制框架。
AI.method: 构建分层架构：高阶规划器离散化赛车游戏规则生成路径点，低阶控制器采用MARL和LQNG两种方法计算控制输入。
AI.result: 分层方法在规则遵守率和比赛胜率上优于基线方法，MARL低阶控制器赢得90%以上比赛并更贴近人类驾驶行为。
AI.conclusion: 分层规划结合博弈论推理能有效处理复杂规则约束，为自动驾驶赛车提供竞争性控制方案。

authors_text: Maksym Andriushchenko,Xiaoyang Rebecca Li,Geoffrey Oxholm,Thomas Gittings,Tu Bui,Nicolas Flammarion,John Collomosse
title: ARIA: Adversarially Robust Image Attribution for Content Provenance
title_zh: ARIA：内容来源的对抗性鲁棒图像归因
abstract: Image attribution -- matching an image back to a trusted source -- is an emerging tool in the fight against online misinformation. Deep visual fingerprinting models have recently been explored for this purpose. However, they are not robust to tiny input perturbations known as adversarial examples. First we illustrate how to generate valid adversarial images that can easily cause incorrect image attribution. Then we describe an approach to prevent imperceptible adversarial attacks on deep visual fingerprinting models, via robust contrastive learning. The proposed training procedure leverages training on $\ell_\infty$-bounded adversarial examples, it is conceptually simple and incurs only a small computational overhead. The resulting models are substantially more robust, are accurate even on unperturbed images, and perform well even over a database with millions of images. In particular, we achieve 91.6% standard and 85.1% adversarial recall under $\ell_\infty$-bounded perturbations on manipulated images compared to 80.1% and 0.0% from prior work. We also show that robustness generalizes to other types of imperceptible perturbations unseen during training. Finally, we show how to train an adversarially robust image comparator model for detecting editorial changes in matched images.
summary: Image attribution -- matching an image back to a trusted source -- is an emerging tool in the fight against online misinformation. Deep visual fingerprinting models have recently been explored for this purpose. However, they are not robust to tiny input perturbations known as adversarial examples. First we illustrate how to generate valid adversarial images that can easily cause incorrect image attribution. Then we describe an approach to prevent imperceptible adversarial attacks on deep visual fingerprinting models, via robust contrastive learning. The proposed training procedure leverages training on $\ell_\infty$-bounded adversarial examples, it is conceptually simple and incurs only a small computational overhead. The resulting models are substantially more robust, are accurate even on unperturbed images, and perform well even over a database with millions of images. In particular, we achieve 91.6% standard and 85.1% adversarial recall under $\ell_\infty$-bounded perturbations on manipulated images compared to 80.1% and 0.0% from prior work. We also show that robustness generalizes to other types of imperceptible perturbations unseen during training. Finally, we show how to train an adversarially robust image comparator model for detecting editorial changes in matched images.
abstract_zh: 图像归属——将图像与可信来源进行匹配——是打击在线错误信息的新兴工具。最近为此目的探索了深度视觉指纹识别模型。然而，它们对于称为对抗性示例的微小输入扰动并不鲁棒。首先，我们说明如何生成有效的对抗性图像，这些图像很容易导致错误的图像归因。然后，我们描述了一种通过稳健的对比学习来防止对深度视觉指纹识别模型进行难以察觉的对抗性攻击的方法。所提出的训练过程利用了对 $\ell_\infty$ 有限对抗样本的训练，它在概念上很简单，并且只产生很小的计算开销。由此产生的模型更加稳健，即使在未受干扰的图像上也很准确，并且即使在包含数百万图像的数据库上也表现良好。特别是，我们在处理图像的 $\ell_\infty$ 有限扰动下实现了 91.6% 的标准召回率和 85.1% 的对抗召回率，而之前的工作分别为 80.1% 和 0.0%。我们还表明，鲁棒性可以推广到训练期间未见的其他类型的难以察觉的扰动。最后，我们展示了如何训练一个具有对抗性的鲁棒图像比较器模型来检测匹配图像中的编辑变化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ARIA方法，通过鲁棒对比学习提升深度视觉指纹模型在对抗样本下的图像归属鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有图像归属模型易受微小对抗扰动攻击，导致内容溯源失效，需提升模型对抗鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于ℓ∞有界对抗样本的鲁棒对比学习训练，通过引入对抗扰动提升模型鲁棒性，仅增加少量计算开销。
AI.result: 在对抗扰动下实现91.6%标准召回率和85.1%对抗召回率，较先前工作提升显著，并泛化至未见过的扰动类型。
AI.conclusion: ARIA方法有效增强图像归属模型的对抗鲁棒性，适用于大规模图像数据库的内容溯源场景。

In particular, we achieve 91.6% standard and 85.1% adversarial recall under $\ell_\infty$-bounded perturbations on manipulated images compared to 80.1% and 0.0% from prior work. We also show that robustness generalizes to other types of imperceptible perturbations unseen during training. Finally, we show how to train an adversarially robust image comparator model for detecting editorial changes in matched images. 图像归属——将图像与可信来源进行匹配——是打击在线错误信息的新兴工具。最近为此目的探索了深度视觉指纹识别模型。然而，它们对于称为对抗性示例的微小输入扰动并不鲁棒。首先，我们说明如何生成有效的对抗性图像，这些图像很容易导致错误的图像归因。然后，我们描述了一种通过稳健的对比学习来防止对深度视觉指纹识别模型进行难以察觉的对抗性攻击的方法。所提出的训练过程利用了对 $\ell_\infty$ 有限对抗样本的训练，它在概念上很简单，并且只产生很小的计算开销。由此产生的模型更加稳健，即使在未受干扰的图像上也很准确，并且即使在包含数百万图像的数据库上也表现良好。特别是，我们在处理图像的 $\ell_\infty$ 有限扰动下实现了 91.6% 的标准召回率和 85.1% 的对抗召回率，而之前的工作分别为 80.1% 和 0.0%。我们还表明，鲁棒性可以推广到训练期间未见的其他类型的难以察觉的扰动。最后，我们展示了如何训练一个具有对抗性的鲁棒图像比较器模型来检测匹配图像中的编辑变化。 本文提出ARIA方法，通过鲁棒对比学习提升深度视觉指纹模型在对抗样本下的图像归属鲁棒性。 Maksym Andriushchenko,Xiaoyang Rebecca Li,Geoffrey Oxholm,Thomas Gittings,Tu Bui,Nicolas Flammarion,John Collomosse cs.CV,cs.LG

title: A Robust Multi-Objective Bayesian Optimization Framework Considering Input Uncertainty
title_zh: 考虑输入不确定性的鲁棒多目标贝叶斯优化框架
abstract: Bayesian optimization is a popular tool for data-efficient optimization of expensive objective functions. In real-life applications like engineering design, the designer often wants to take multiple objectives as well as input uncertainty into account to find a set of robust solutions. While this is an active topic in single-objective Bayesian optimization, it is less investigated in the multi-objective case. We introduce a novel Bayesian optimization framework to efficiently perform multi-objective optimization considering input uncertainty. We propose a robust Gaussian Process model to infer the Bayes risk criterion to quantify robustness, and we develop a two-stage Bayesian optimization process to search for a robust Pareto frontier. The complete framework supports various distributions of the input uncertainty and takes full advantage of parallel computing. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the framework through numerical benchmarks.
summary: Bayesian optimization is a popular tool for data-efficient optimization of expensive objective functions. In real-life applications like engineering design, the designer often wants to take multiple objectives as well as input uncertainty into account to find a set of robust solutions. While this is an active topic in single-objective Bayesian optimization, it is less investigated in the multi-objective case. We introduce a novel Bayesian optimization framework to efficiently perform multi-objective optimization considering input uncertainty. We propose a robust Gaussian Process model to infer the Bayes risk criterion to quantify robustness, and we develop a two-stage Bayesian optimization process to search for a robust Pareto frontier. The complete framework supports various distributions of the input uncertainty and takes full advantage of parallel computing. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the framework through numerical benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯优化是一种流行的工具，用于对昂贵的目标函数进行数据高效的优化。在工程设计等现实应用中，设计人员通常希望考虑多个目标以及输入不确定性，以找​​到一组可靠的解决方案。虽然这是单目标贝叶斯优化中的一个活跃主题，但在多目标情况下研究较少。我们引入了一种新颖的贝叶斯优化框架，可以在考虑输入不确定性的情况下有效地执行多目标优化。我们提出了一个稳健的高斯过程模型来推断贝叶斯风险标准来量化鲁棒性，并且我们开发了一个两阶段贝叶斯优化过程来搜索稳健的帕累托前沿。完整的框架支持输入不确定性的各种分布，并充分利用并行计算。我们通过数值基准证明了该框架的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种考虑输入不确定性的多目标贝叶斯优化框架，以高效寻找鲁棒的帕累托前沿。
AI.motivation: 在工程设计等实际应用中，多目标优化需同时考虑输入不确定性，但现有研究对多目标场景下的鲁棒性优化关注不足。
AI.method: 提出鲁棒高斯过程模型量化贝叶斯风险准则，并设计两阶段贝叶斯优化流程，支持多种输入分布及并行计算。
AI.result: 通过数值基准测试验证了框架在处理输入不确定性下的多目标优化问题的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为多目标优化提供了考虑输入不确定性的高效鲁棒解决方案，拓展了贝叶斯优化的应用场景。

title: Building a 3-Player Mahjong AI using Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用深度强化学习构建 3 人麻将人工智能
abstract: Mahjong is a popular multi-player imperfect-information game developed in China in the late 19th-century, with some very challenging features for AI research. Sanma, being a 3-player variant of the Japanese Riichi Mahjong, possesses unique characteristics including fewer tiles and, consequently, a more aggressive playing style. It is thus challenging and of great research interest in its own right, but has not yet been explored. In this paper, we present Meowjong, an AI for Sanma using deep reinforcement learning. We define an informative and compact 2-dimensional data structure for encoding the observable information in a Sanma game. We pre-train 5 convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for Sanma's 5 actions -- discard, Pon, Kan, Kita and Riichi, and enhance the major action's model, namely the discard model, via self-play reinforcement learning using the Monte Carlo policy gradient method. Meowjong's models achieve test accuracies comparable with AIs for 4-player Mahjong through supervised learning, and gain a significant further enhancement from reinforcement learning. Being the first ever AI in Sanma, we claim that Meowjong stands as a state-of-the-art in this game.
summary: Mahjong is a popular multi-player imperfect-information game developed in China in the late 19th-century, with some very challenging features for AI research. Sanma, being a 3-player variant of the Japanese Riichi Mahjong, possesses unique characteristics including fewer tiles and, consequently, a more aggressive playing style. It is thus challenging and of great research interest in its own right, but has not yet been explored. In this paper, we present Meowjong, an AI for Sanma using deep reinforcement learning. We define an informative and compact 2-dimensional data structure for encoding the observable information in a Sanma game. We pre-train 5 convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for Sanma's 5 actions -- discard, Pon, Kan, Kita and Riichi, and enhance the major action's model, namely the discard model, via self-play reinforcement learning using the Monte Carlo policy gradient method. Meowjong's models achieve test accuracies comparable with AIs for 4-player Mahjong through supervised learning, and gain a significant further enhancement from reinforcement learning. Being the first ever AI in Sanma, we claim that Meowjong stands as a state-of-the-art in this game.
abstract_zh: 麻将是 19 世纪末在中国开发的一种流行的多人不完全信息游戏，具有一些对人工智能研究来说非常具有挑战性的特征。三麻是日本立直麻将的 3 人变种，拥有独特的特点，包括更少的牌，因此更具侵略性的游戏风格。因此，它本身就具有挑战性并且具有很大的研究兴趣，但尚未得到探索。在本文中，我们介绍了 Meowjong，一种使用深度强化学习的 Sanma 人工智能。我们定义了一个信息丰富且紧凑的二维数据结构，用于编码 Sanma 游戏中的可观察信息。我们为 Sanma 的 5 个动作（discard、Pon、Kan、Kita 和 Riichi）预训练 5 个卷积神经网络（CNN），并使用蒙特卡罗策略梯度方法通过自对弈强化学习增强主要动作的模型，即丢弃模型。 Meowjong 的模型通过监督学习实现了与 4 人麻将 AI 相当的测试精度，并通过强化学习获得了显着的进一步增强。作为 Sanma 中的第一个 AI，我们声称 Meowjong 是这款游戏中最先进的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的3人麻将AI——Meowjong，用于解决Sanma（日本立直麻将3人变种）的AI研究空白问题。
AI.motivation: Sanma因牌数更少、玩法更具攻击性而具有独特的研究价值，但此前缺乏专门的AI研究，且其信息不完全特性对AI构成挑战。
AI.method: 设计二维数据结构编码可观测信息，预训练5个卷积神经网络对应5种动作（打牌、碰、杠、吃、立直），并通过自博弈强化学习优化核心的打牌模型。
AI.result: 模型在监督学习下达到与4人麻将AI相当的测试准确率，经强化学习后性能显著提升，成为首个Sanma领域的AI并达到SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: Meowjong验证了深度强化学习在Sanma中的有效性，为3人麻将AI研究树立了新标杆。

authors_text: Praveen Kumar Rajendran,Sumit Mishra,Luiz Felipe Vecchietti,Dongsoo Har
title: RelMobNet: End-to-end relative camera pose estimation using a robust two-stage training
title_zh: RelMobNet：使用稳健的两阶段训练进行端到端相对相机姿态估计
comment: 15 pages, 7 figures, 2 tables - RelMobNet revised draft
comments: 15 pages, 7 figures, 2 tables - RelMobNet revised draft
abstract: Relative camera pose estimation, i.e. estimating the translation and rotation vectors using a pair of images taken in different locations, is an important part of systems in augmented reality and robotics. In this paper, we present an end-to-end relative camera pose estimation network using a siamese architecture that is independent of camera parameters. The network is trained using the Cambridge Landmarks data with four individual scene datasets and a dataset combining the four scenes. To improve generalization, we propose a novel two-stage training that alleviates the need of a hyperparameter to balance the translation and rotation loss scale. The proposed method is compared with one-stage training CNN-based methods such as RPNet and RCPNet and demonstrate that the proposed model improves translation vector estimation by 16.11%, 28.88%, and 52.27% on the Kings College, Old Hospital, and St Marys Church scenes, respectively. For proving texture invariance, we investigate the generalization of the proposed method augmenting the datasets to different scene styles, as ablation studies, using generative adversarial networks. Also, we present a qualitative assessment of epipolar lines of our network predictions and ground truth poses.
summary: Relative camera pose estimation, i.e. estimating the translation and rotation vectors using a pair of images taken in different locations, is an important part of systems in augmented reality and robotics. In this paper, we present an end-to-end relative camera pose estimation network using a siamese architecture that is independent of camera parameters. The network is trained using the Cambridge Landmarks data with four individual scene datasets and a dataset combining the four scenes. To improve generalization, we propose a novel two-stage training that alleviates the need of a hyperparameter to balance the translation and rotation loss scale. The proposed method is compared with one-stage training CNN-based methods such as RPNet and RCPNet and demonstrate that the proposed model improves translation vector estimation by 16.11%, 28.88%, and 52.27% on the Kings College, Old Hospital, and St Marys Church scenes, respectively. For proving texture invariance, we investigate the generalization of the proposed method augmenting the datasets to different scene styles, as ablation studies, using generative adversarial networks. Also, we present a qualitative assessment of epipolar lines of our network predictions and ground truth poses.
abstract_zh: 相对相机位姿估计，即使用在不同位置拍摄的一对图像来估计平移和旋转向量，是增强现实和机器人系统的重要组成部分。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用独立于相机参数的孪生架构的端到端相对相机姿态估计网络。该网络使用剑桥地标数据进行训练，其中包含四个单独的场景数据集和一个组合四个场景的数据集。为了提高泛化能力，我们提出了一种新颖的两阶段训练，可以减轻超参数平衡平移和旋转损失规模的需要。将所提出的方法与基于 CNN 的一阶段训练方法（例如 RPNet 和 RCPNet）进行比较，结果表明所提出的模型在 Kings College、Old Hospital 和 St Marys Church 场景中分别将平移向量估计提高了 16.11%、28.88% 和 52.27%。为了证明纹理不变性，我们研究了所提出的方法的泛化，将数据集增强到不同的场景风格，作为消融研究，使用生成对抗网络。此外，我们还对网络预测的极线和地面真实姿势进行了定性评估。

AI.tldr: 提出RelMobNet网络，利用两阶段训练进行端到端的相对相机位姿估计，提升AR和机器人系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖相机参数且需手动平衡损失函数超参数，泛化能力不足，需改进模型鲁棒性和跨场景适应性。
AI.method: 基于Siamese架构设计端到端网络，采用两阶段训练消除损失尺度平衡需求，并用对抗网络生成多风格数据验证纹理不变性。
AI.result: 在三个场景中平移估计分别提升16.11%、28.88%、52.27%，定性评估显示极线预测与真实位姿一致。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段训练有效提升模型精度与泛化能力，证明RelMobNet在复杂场景下具有鲁棒性。

search_text: RelMobNet: End-to-end relative camera pose estimation using a robust two-stage training RelMobNet：使用稳健的两阶段训练进行端到端相对相机姿态估计 Relative camera pose estimation, i.e. estimating the translation and rotation vectors using a pair of images taken in different locations, is an important part of systems in augmented reality and robotics. In this paper, we present an end-to-end relative camera pose estimation network using a siamese architecture that is independent of camera parameters. The network is trained using the Cambridge Landmarks data with four individual scene datasets and a dataset combining the four scenes. To improve generalization, we propose a novel two-stage training that alleviates the need of a hyperparameter to balance the translation and rotation loss scale. The proposed method is compared with one-stage training CNN-based methods such as RPNet and RCPNet and demonstrate that the proposed model improves translation vector estimation by 16.11%, 28.88%, and 52.27% on the Kings College, Old Hospital, and St Marys Church scenes, respectively. For proving texture invariance, we investigate the generalization of the proposed method augmenting the datasets to different scene styles, as ablation studies, using generative adversarial networks. Also, we present a qualitative assessment of epipolar lines of our network predictions and ground truth poses. 相对相机位姿估计，即使用在不同位置拍摄的一对图像来估计平移和旋转向量，是增强现实和机器人系统的重要组成部分。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用独立于相机参数的孪生架构的端到端相对相机姿态估计网络。该网络使用剑桥地标数据进行训练，其中包含四个单独的场景数据集和一个组合四个场景的数据集。为了提高泛化能力，我们提出了一种新颖的两阶段训练，可以减轻超参数平衡平移和旋转损失规模的需要。将所提出的方法与基于 CNN 的一阶段训练方法（例如 RPNet 和 RCPNet）进行比较，结果表明所提出的模型在 Kings College、Old Hospital 和 St Marys Church 场景中分别将平移向量估计提高了 16.11%、28.88% 和 52.27%。为了证明纹理不变性，我们研究了所提出的方法的泛化，将数据集增强到不同的场景风格，作为消融研究，使用生成对抗网络。此外，我们还对网络预测的极线和地面真实姿势进行了定性评估。 提出RelMobNet网络，利用两阶段训练进行端到端的相对相机位姿估计，提升AR和机器人系统的性能。 Praveen Kumar Rajendran,Sumit Mishra,Luiz Felipe Vecchietti,Dongsoo Har cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Sewon Min,Xinxi Lyu,Ari Holtzman,Mikel Artetxe,Mike Lewis,Hannaneh Hajishirzi,Luke Zettlemoyer
title: Rethinking the Role of Demonstrations: What Makes In-Context Learning Work?
title_zh: 重新思考演示的作用：什么使情境学习发挥作用？
comment: 17 pages; 12 figures. Published as a conference paper at EMNLP 2022 (long). Code available at https://github.com/Alrope123/rethinking-demonstrations
comments: 17 pages; 12 figures. Published as a conference paper at EMNLP 2022 (long). Code available at https://github.com/Alrope123/rethinking-demonstrations
abstract: Large language models (LMs) are able to in-context learn -- perform a new task via inference alone by conditioning on a few input-label pairs (demonstrations) and making predictions for new inputs. However, there has been little understanding of how the model learns and which aspects of the demonstrations contribute to end task performance. In this paper, we show that ground truth demonstrations are in fact not required -- randomly replacing labels in the demonstrations barely hurts performance on a range of classification and multi-choce tasks, consistently over 12 different models including GPT-3. Instead, we find that other aspects of the demonstrations are the key drivers of end task performance, including the fact that they provide a few examples of (1) the label space, (2) the distribution of the input text, and (3) the overall format of the sequence. Together, our analysis provides a new way of understanding how and why in-context learning works, while opening up new questions about how much can be learned from large language models through inference alone.
summary: Large language models (LMs) are able to in-context learn -- perform a new task via inference alone by conditioning on a few input-label pairs (demonstrations) and making predictions for new inputs. However, there has been little understanding of how the model learns and which aspects of the demonstrations contribute to end task performance. In this paper, we show that ground truth demonstrations are in fact not required -- randomly replacing labels in the demonstrations barely hurts performance on a range of classification and multi-choce tasks, consistently over 12 different models including GPT-3. Instead, we find that other aspects of the demonstrations are the key drivers of end task performance, including the fact that they provide a few examples of (1) the label space, (2) the distribution of the input text, and (3) the overall format of the sequence. Together, our analysis provides a new way of understanding how and why in-context learning works, while opening up new questions about how much can be learned from large language models through inference alone.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LM) 能够在上下文中学习 - 通过仅通过推理来执行新任务，通过调节一些输入标签对（演示）并对新输入进行预测。然而，人们对模型如何学习以及演示的哪些方面有助于最终任务性能知之甚少。在本文中，我们表明实际上不需要地面实况演示——在演示中随机替换标签几乎不会影响一系列分类和多选任务的性能，在包括 GPT-3 在内的 12 种不同模型中始终如此。相反，我们发现演示的其他方面是最终任务性能的关键驱动因素，包括它们提供了一些示例：(1) 标签空间，(2) 输入文本的分布，以及 (3) 序列的整体格式。总之，我们的分析提供了一种新的方式来理解上下文学习如何以及为何起作用，同时提出了新的问题：仅通过推理可以从大型语言模型中学到多少东西。

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视了示例在上下文学习中的作用，探讨了哪些因素真正影响了大语言模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型能通过上下文学习完成新任务，但现有研究对模型如何学习以及示例中哪些因素影响性能的理解不足。
AI.method: 通过在12种模型（包括GPT-3）中随机替换示例标签，验证标签准确性是否关键，并分析其他因素如标签空间、输入分布和序列格式的影响。
AI.result: 随机替换标签对性能影响较小，表明标签准确性并非关键；而标签空间、输入分布和序列格式是影响性能的核心因素。
AI.conclusion: 上下文学习的效果更多依赖于示例的结构特征而非标签准确性，这为理解模型如何通过推理学习提供了新视角，并引发对纯推理学习潜力的进一步思考。

title: A multi-domain VNE algorithm based on multi-objective optimization for IoD architecture in Industry 4.0
title_zh: 工业4.0中基于IoD架构多目标优化的多域VNE算法
abstract: Unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) has a broad application prospect in the future, especially in the Industry 4.0. The development of Internet of Drones (IoD) makes UAV operation more autonomous. Network virtualization technology is a promising technology to support IoD, so the allocation of virtual resources becomes a crucial issue in IoD. How to rationally allocate potential material resources has become an urgent problem to be solved. The main work of this paper is presented as follows: (1) In order to improve the optimization performance and reduce the computation time, we propose a multi-domain virtual network embedding algorithm (MP-VNE) adopting the centralized hierarchical multi-domain architecture. The proposed algorithm can avoid the local optimum through incorporating the genetic variation factor into the traditional particle swarm optimization process. (2) In order to simplify the multi-objective optimization problem, we transform the multi-objective problem into a single-objective problem through weighted summation method. The results prove that the proposed algorithm can rapidly converge to the optimal solution. (3) In order to reduce the mapping cost, we propose an algorithm for selecting candidate nodes based on the estimated mapping cost. Each physical domain calculates the estimated mapping cost of all nodes according to the formula of the estimated mapping cost, and chooses the node with the lowest estimated mapping cost as the candidate node. The simulation results show that the proposed MP-VNE algorithm has better performance than MC-VNM, LID-VNE and other algorithms in terms of delay, cost and comprehensive indicators.
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) has a broad application prospect in the future, especially in the Industry 4.0. The development of Internet of Drones (IoD) makes UAV operation more autonomous. Network virtualization technology is a promising technology to support IoD, so the allocation of virtual resources becomes a crucial issue in IoD. How to rationally allocate potential material resources has become an urgent problem to be solved. The main work of this paper is presented as follows: (1) In order to improve the optimization performance and reduce the computation time, we propose a multi-domain virtual network embedding algorithm (MP-VNE) adopting the centralized hierarchical multi-domain architecture. The proposed algorithm can avoid the local optimum through incorporating the genetic variation factor into the traditional particle swarm optimization process. (2) In order to simplify the multi-objective optimization problem, we transform the multi-objective problem into a single-objective problem through weighted summation method. The results prove that the proposed algorithm can rapidly converge to the optimal solution. (3) In order to reduce the mapping cost, we propose an algorithm for selecting candidate nodes based on the estimated mapping cost. Each physical domain calculates the estimated mapping cost of all nodes according to the formula of the estimated mapping cost, and chooses the node with the lowest estimated mapping cost as the candidate node. The simulation results show that the proposed MP-VNE algorithm has better performance than MC-VNM, LID-VNE and other algorithms in terms of delay, cost and comprehensive indicators.
abstract_zh: 无人机（UAV）未来具有广阔的应用前景，特别是在工业4.0领域。无人机互联网（IoD）的发展使得无人机操作更加自主。网络虚拟化技术是一种很有前景的支持IoD的技术，因此虚拟资源的分配成为IoD的关键问题。如何合理配置潜在的物质资源已成为迫切需要解决的问题。本文的主要工作如下：（1）为了提高优化性能并减少计算时间，我们提出了一种采用集中式分层多域架构的多域虚拟网络嵌入算法（MP-VNE）。该算法通过将遗传变异因素纳入传统的粒子群优化过程中，可以避免局部最优。 (2)为了简化多目标优化问题，通过加权求和的方法将多目标问题转化为单目标问题。结果证明该算法能够快速收敛到最优解。 (3)为了降低映射成本，我们提出了一种基于估计映射成本选择候选节点的算法。每个物理域根据估计映射代价公式计算所有节点的估计映射代价，并选择估计映射代价最低的节点作为候选节点。仿真结果表明，所提出的MP-VNE算法在时延、成本和综合指标方面均优于MC-VNM、LID-VNE等算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多目标优化的多域虚拟网络嵌入算法（MP-VNE），旨在优化工业4.0中物联网无人机（IoD）架构下的虚拟资源分配。
AI.motivation: 无人机在工业4.0中应用广泛，但如何高效分配虚拟资源以满足IoD的自主化需求并降低计算成本是亟待解决的问题。
AI.method: 采用集中式分层多域架构，结合遗传变异因子改进粒子群优化算法；通过加权求和法将多目标问题转化为单目标问题；基于预估映射成本选择候选节点以降低映射成本。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，MP-VNE在时延、成本及综合指标上优于MC-VNM、LID-VNE等现有算法，且能快速收敛到最优解。
AI.conclusion: MP-VNE算法有效解决了IoD架构下虚拟资源分配的优化难题，为工业4.0中的无人机网络提供了高效可靠的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多目标优化的多域虚拟网络嵌入算法（MP-VNE），旨在优化工业4.0中物联网无人机（IoD）架构下的虚拟资源分配。
ai_content.motivation: 无人机在工业4.0中应用广泛，但如何高效分配虚拟资源以满足IoD的自主化需求并降低计算成本是亟待解决的问题。
ai_content.method: 采用集中式分层多域架构，结合遗传变异因子改进粒子群优化算法；通过加权求和法将多目标问题转化为单目标问题；基于预估映射成本选择候选节点以降低映射成本。

search_text: A multi-domain VNE algorithm based on multi-objective optimization for IoD architecture in Industry 4.0 工业4.0中基于IoD架构多目标优化的多域VNE算法 Unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) has a broad application prospect in the future, especially in the Industry 4.0. The development of Internet of Drones (IoD) makes UAV operation more autonomous. Network virtualization technology is a promising technology to support IoD, so the allocation of virtual resources becomes a crucial issue in IoD. How to rationally allocate potential material resources has become an urgent problem to be solved. The main work of this paper is presented as follows: (1) In order to improve the optimization performance and reduce the computation time, we propose a multi-domain virtual network embedding algorithm (MP-VNE) adopting the centralized hierarchical multi-domain architecture. The proposed algorithm can avoid the local optimum through incorporating the genetic variation factor into the traditional particle swarm optimization process. (2) In order to simplify the multi-objective optimization problem, we transform the multi-objective problem into a single-objective problem through weighted summation method. The results prove that the proposed algorithm can rapidly converge to the optimal solution. (3) In order to reduce the mapping cost, we propose an algorithm for selecting candidate nodes based on the estimated mapping cost. Each physical domain calculates the estimated mapping cost of all nodes according to the formula of the estimated mapping cost, and chooses the node with the lowest estimated mapping cost as the candidate node. The simulation results show that the proposed MP-VNE algorithm has better performance than MC-VNM, LID-VNE and other algorithms in terms of delay, cost and comprehensive indicators. 无人机（UAV）未来具有广阔的应用前景，特别是在工业4.0领域。无人机互联网（IoD）的发展使得无人机操作更加自主。网络虚拟化技术是一种很有前景的支持IoD的技术，因此虚拟资源的分配成为IoD的关键问题。如何合理配置潜在的物质资源已成为迫切需要解决的问题。本文的主要工作如下：（1）为了提高优化性能并减少计算时间，我们提出了一种采用集中式分层多域架构的多域虚拟网络嵌入算法（MP-VNE）。该算法通过将遗传变异因素纳入传统的粒子群优化过程中，可以避免局部最优。 (2)为了简化多目标优化问题，通过加权求和的方法将多目标问题转化为单目标问题。结果证明该算法能够快速收敛到最优解。 (3)为了降低映射成本，我们提出了一种基于估计映射成本选择候选节点的算法。每个物理域根据估计映射代价公式计算所有节点的估计映射代价，并选择估计映射代价最低的节点作为候选节点。仿真结果表明，所提出的MP-VNE算法在时延、成本和综合指标方面均优于MC-VNM、LID-VNE等算法。 本文提出了一种基于多目标优化的多域虚拟网络嵌入算法（MP-VNE），旨在优化工业4.0中物联网无人机（IoD）架构下的虚拟资源分配。 Peiying Zhang,Chao Wang,Zeyu Qin,Haotong Cao cs.NE,cs.AI

title: Convergence of a New Learning Algorithm
title_zh: 新学习算法的收敛
abstract: A new learning algorithm proposed by Brandt and Lin for neural network [1], [2] has been shown to be mathematically equivalent to the conventional back-propagation learning algorithm, but has several advantages over the backpropagation algorithm, including feedback-network-free implementation and biological plausibility. In this paper, we investigate the convergence of the new algorithm. A necessary and sufficient condition for the algorithm to converge is derived. A convergence measure is proposed to measure the convergence rate of the new algorithm. Simulation studies are conducted to investigate the convergence of the algorithm with respect to the number of neurons, the connection distance, the connection density, the ratio of excitatory/inhibitory synapses, the membrane potentials, and the synapse strengths.
summary: A new learning algorithm proposed by Brandt and Lin for neural network [1], [2] has been shown to be mathematically equivalent to the conventional back-propagation learning algorithm, but has several advantages over the backpropagation algorithm, including feedback-network-free implementation and biological plausibility. In this paper, we investigate the convergence of the new algorithm. A necessary and sufficient condition for the algorithm to converge is derived. A convergence measure is proposed to measure the convergence rate of the new algorithm. Simulation studies are conducted to investigate the convergence of the algorithm with respect to the number of neurons, the connection distance, the connection density, the ratio of excitatory/inhibitory synapses, the membrane potentials, and the synapse strengths.
abstract_zh: Brandt 和 Lin 提出的一种新的神经网络学习算法 [1]、[2] 已被证明在数学上与传统的反向传播学习算法等效，但比反向传播算法具有多个优点，包括无反馈网络实现和生物学合理性。在本文中，我们研究了新算法的收敛性。推导了算法收敛的充要条件。提出了收敛度量来衡量新算法的收敛速度。进行模拟研究以研究算法在神经元数量、连接距离、连接密度、兴奋/抑制突触比率、膜电位和突触强度方面的收敛性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究Brandt和Lin提出的新学习算法的收敛性，推导其收敛的充要条件，提出收敛度量，并通过仿真分析不同因素对收敛的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管新算法在实现和生物合理性上优于传统反向传播，但其收敛性尚未明确，需进行系统分析以验证其有效性。
AI.method: 通过数学推导确定收敛的充要条件，设计收敛速率度量，并进行仿真实验，考察神经元数量、连接距离、密度、突触比例、膜电位及强度等因素的影响。
AI.result: 仿真结果揭示了不同网络参数和突触特性对算法收敛速度和稳定性的影响，验证了理论推导的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 新算法在满足特定条件下收敛，提出的度量有效，且网络结构和突触参数显著影响收敛性，为优化算法应用提供理论依据。

authors_text: Yuheng Jiang,Suyi Jiang,Guoxing Sun,Zhuo Su,Kaiwen Guo,Minye Wu,Jingyi Yu,Lan Xu
title: NeuralHOFusion: Neural Volumetric Rendering under Human-object Interactions
title_zh: NeuralHOFusion：人与物体交互下的神经体积渲染
abstract: 4D modeling of human-object interactions is critical for numerous applications. However, efficient volumetric capture and rendering of complex interaction scenarios, especially from sparse inputs, remain challenging. In this paper, we propose NeuralHOFusion, a neural approach for volumetric human-object capture and rendering using sparse consumer RGBD sensors. It marries traditional non-rigid fusion with recent neural implicit modeling and blending advances, where the captured humans and objects are layerwise disentangled. For geometry modeling, we propose a neural implicit inference scheme with non-rigid key-volume fusion, as well as a template-aid robust object tracking pipeline. Our scheme enables detailed and complete geometry generation under complex interactions and occlusions. Moreover, we introduce a layer-wise human-object texture rendering scheme, which combines volumetric and image-based rendering in both spatial and temporal domains to obtain photo-realistic results. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of our approach in synthesizing photo-realistic free-view results under complex human-object interactions.
summary: 4D modeling of human-object interactions is critical for numerous applications. However, efficient volumetric capture and rendering of complex interaction scenarios, especially from sparse inputs, remain challenging. In this paper, we propose NeuralHOFusion, a neural approach for volumetric human-object capture and rendering using sparse consumer RGBD sensors. It marries traditional non-rigid fusion with recent neural implicit modeling and blending advances, where the captured humans and objects are layerwise disentangled. For geometry modeling, we propose a neural implicit inference scheme with non-rigid key-volume fusion, as well as a template-aid robust object tracking pipeline. Our scheme enables detailed and complete geometry generation under complex interactions and occlusions. Moreover, we introduce a layer-wise human-object texture rendering scheme, which combines volumetric and image-based rendering in both spatial and temporal domains to obtain photo-realistic results. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of our approach in synthesizing photo-realistic free-view results under complex human-object interactions.
abstract_zh: 人与物体交互的 4D 建模对于许多应用至关重要。然而，复杂交互场景的有效体积捕获和渲染，尤其是稀疏输入，仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了 NeuralHOFusion，这是一种使用稀疏消费者 RGBD 传感器进行体积人体对象捕获和渲染的神经方法。它将传统的非刚性融合与最近的神经隐式建模和混合进步相结合，其中捕获的人和物体被分层解开。对于几何建模，我们提出了一种具有非刚性关键卷融合的神经隐式推理方案，以及一个模板辅助的鲁棒对象跟踪管道。我们的方案能够在复杂的交互和遮挡下生成详细且完整的几何图形。此外，我们引入了一种分层的人体纹理渲染方案，该方案将空间和时间域中的体积渲染和基于图像的渲染相结合，以获得照片般逼真的结果。大量的实验证明了我们的方法在复杂的人与物体交互下合成逼真的自由视图结果的有效性和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NeuralHOFusion方法，利用稀疏RGBD传感器实现复杂人-物交互场景的神经体积渲染。
AI.motivation: 现有技术难以高效捕捉和渲染稀疏输入下的复杂人-物交互场景，尤其在几何重建和纹理渲染方面存在挑战。
AI.method: 融合传统非刚性融合与神经隐式建模技术，通过分层解耦人与物体、模板辅助跟踪及时空域渲染方案实现几何与纹理重建。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能生成复杂交互场景下高质量的逼真自由视角渲染结果，几何完整性和纹理真实性显著提升。
AI.conclusion: NeuralHOFusion通过神经隐式建模与传统方法结合，有效解决了稀疏输入下人-物交互的4D建模难题。
