Our scheme enables detailed and complete geometry generation under complex interactions and occlusions. Moreover, we introduce a layer-wise human-object texture rendering scheme, which combines volumetric and image-based rendering in both spatial and temporal domains to obtain photo-realistic results. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of our approach in synthesizing photo-realistic free-view results under complex human-object interactions. 人与物体交互的 4D 建模对于许多应用至关重要。然而，复杂交互场景的有效体积捕获和渲染，尤其是稀疏输入，仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了 NeuralHOFusion，这是一种使用稀疏消费者 RGBD 传感器进行体积人体对象捕获和渲染的神经方法。它将传统的非刚性融合与最近的神经隐式建模和混合进步相结合，其中捕获的人和物体被分层解开。对于几何建模，我们提出了一种具有非刚性关键卷融合的神经隐式推理方案，以及一个模板辅助的鲁棒对象跟踪管道。我们的方案能够在复杂的交互和遮挡下生成详细且完整的几何图形。此外，我们引入了一种分层的人体纹理渲染方案，该方案将空间和时间域中的体积渲染和基于图像的渲染相结合，以获得照片般逼真的结果。大量的实验证明了我们的方法在复杂的人与物体交互下合成逼真的自由视图结果的有效性和效率。 本文提出NeuralHOFusion方法，利用稀疏RGBD传感器实现复杂人-物交互场景的神经体积渲染。 Yuheng Jiang,Suyi Jiang,Guoxing Sun,Zhuo Su,Kaiwen Guo,Minye Wu,Jingyi Yu,Lan Xu cs.CV

authors_text: Atsushi Takada,Daichi Yamazaki,Likun Liu,Yudai Yoshida,Nyamkhuu Ganbat,Takayuki Shimotomai,Taiga Yamamoto,Daisuke Sakurai,Naoki Hamada
title: GenéLive! Generating Rhythm Actions in Love Live!
title_zh: 基因直播！在 Love Live! 中生成节奏动作！
comment: 15 pages, 13 figures, to appear at AAAI-23
comments: 15 pages, 13 figures, to appear at AAAI-23
abstract: This article presents our generative model for rhythm action games together with applications in business operations. Rhythm action games are video games in which the player is challenged to issue commands at the right timings during a music session. The timings are rendered in the chart, which consists of visual symbols, called notes, flying through the screen. We introduce our deep generative model, GenéLive!, which outperforms the state-of-the-art model by taking into account musical structures through beats and temporal scales. Thanks to its favorable performance, GenéLive! was put into operation at KLab Inc., a Japan-based video game developer, and reduced the business cost of chart generation by as much as half. The application target included the phenomenal "Love Live!," which has more than 10 million users across Asia and beyond, and is one of the few rhythm action franchises that has led the online era of the genre. In this article, we evaluate the generative performance of GenéLive! using production datasets at KLab as well as open datasets for reproducibility, while the model continues to operate in their business. Our code and the model, tuned and trained using a supercomputer, are publicly available.
summary: This article presents our generative model for rhythm action games together with applications in business operations. Rhythm action games are video games in which the player is challenged to issue commands at the right timings during a music session. The timings are rendered in the chart, which consists of visual symbols, called notes, flying through the screen. We introduce our deep generative model, GenéLive!, which outperforms the state-of-the-art model by taking into account musical structures through beats and temporal scales. Thanks to its favorable performance, GenéLive! was put into operation at KLab Inc., a Japan-based video game developer, and reduced the business cost of chart generation by as much as half. The application target included the phenomenal "Love Live!," which has more than 10 million users across Asia and beyond, and is one of the few rhythm action franchises that has led the online era of the genre. In this article, we evaluate the generative performance of GenéLive! using production datasets at KLab as well as open datasets for reproducibility, while the model continues to operate in their business. Our code and the model, tuned and trained using a supercomputer, are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了我们的节奏动作游戏生成模型以及在业务运营中的应用。节奏动作游戏是一种视频游戏，玩家需要在音乐会话期间在正确的时间发出命令。时间显示在图表中，图表由视觉符号（称为注释）组成，在屏幕上飞舞。我们介绍了我们的深度生成模型 GenéLive!，它通过节拍和时间音阶考虑音乐结构，其性能优于最先进的模型。得益于其良好的性能，GenéLive!日本视频游戏开发商KLab Inc.投入运营，图表生成业务成本降低了一半之多。应用目标包括现象级的《Love Live!》，该游戏在亚洲及其他地区拥有超过 1000 万用户，是少数引领该类型在线时代的节奏动作系列游戏之一。在本文中，我们评估了 GenéLive! 的生成性能！使用 KLab 的生产数据集以及开放数据集来实现可重复性，同时模型继续在其业务中运行。我们的代码和模型是通过超级计算机进行调整和训练的，并且是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GenéLive!的深度生成模型，用于生成节奏动作游戏中的节奏图表，并成功应用于《Love Live!》等游戏，显著降低了制作成本。
AI.motivation: 节奏动作游戏的节奏图表制作依赖人工，耗时耗力且成本高昂。现有模型未能有效结合音乐结构特征，限制了生成效率与质量。
AI.method: 基于深度学习构建GenéLive!模型，通过捕捉音乐中的节拍与时间尺度等结构特征，结合超算训练及公开数据集验证，实现自动化图表生成。
AI.result: 模型在KLab公司实际应用中使图表生成成本降低50%，并成功部署于千万级用户游戏《Love Live!》，代码与训练模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: GenéLive!通过融合音乐结构特征显著提升了节奏图表生成的效率与质量，为游戏行业提供了可复用的生成解决方案。

title: Improving generalization with synthetic training data for deep learning based quality inspection
title_zh: 利用基于深度学习的质量检查的合成训练数据提高泛化能力
abstract: Automating quality inspection with computer vision techniques is often a very data-demanding task. Specifically, supervised deep learning requires a large amount of annotated images for training. In practice, collecting and annotating such data is not only costly and laborious, but also inefficient, given the fact that only a few instances may be available for certain defect classes. If working with video frames can increase the number of these instances, it has a major disadvantage: the resulting images will be highly correlated with one another. As a consequence, models trained under such constraints are expected to be very sensitive to input distribution changes, which may be caused in practice by changes in the acquisition system (cameras, lights), in the parts or in the defects aspect. In this work, we demonstrate the use of randomly generated synthetic training images can help tackle domain instability issues, making the trained models more robust to contextual changes. We detail both our synthetic data generation pipeline and our deep learning methodology for answering these questions.
summary: Automating quality inspection with computer vision techniques is often a very data-demanding task. Specifically, supervised deep learning requires a large amount of annotated images for training. In practice, collecting and annotating such data is not only costly and laborious, but also inefficient, given the fact that only a few instances may be available for certain defect classes. If working with video frames can increase the number of these instances, it has a major disadvantage: the resulting images will be highly correlated with one another. As a consequence, models trained under such constraints are expected to be very sensitive to input distribution changes, which may be caused in practice by changes in the acquisition system (cameras, lights), in the parts or in the defects aspect. In this work, we demonstrate the use of randomly generated synthetic training images can help tackle domain instability issues, making the trained models more robust to contextual changes. We detail both our synthetic data generation pipeline and our deep learning methodology for answering these questions.
abstract_zh: 利用计算机视觉技术实现自动化质量检测通常是一项对数据要求非常高的任务。具体来说，有监督深度学习需要大量带注释的图像进行训练。在实践中，考虑到对于某些缺陷类别可能只有少数实例可用，收集和注释此类数据不仅成本高昂、费力，而且效率低下。如果使用视频帧可以增加这些实例的数量，那么它有一个主要缺点：生成的图像将彼此高度相关。因此，在此类约束下训练的模型预计对输入分布变化非常敏感，这在实践中可能是由采集系统（相机、灯光）、零件或缺陷方面的变化引起的。在这项工作中，我们证明使用随机生成的合成训练图像可以帮助解决域不稳定问题，使训练后的模型对上下文变化更加鲁棒。我们详细介绍了我们的合成数据生成流程和深度学习方法来回答这些问题。

AI.tldr: 本论文探讨如何利用合成训练数据提升基于深度学习的质检模型泛化能力，以解决实际数据不足和领域变化导致的模型性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 实际质检场景中缺陷样本稀缺且采集数据易受设备、光照等因素影响，导致模型泛化能力差，亟需提升对领域变化的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建随机生成的合成数据生成管道，结合深度学习方法训练模型，通过合成数据扩充样本并缓解领域不稳定问题。
AI.result: 实验表明合成数据能有效提升模型在不同领域场景下的鲁棒性，减少因输入分布变化导致的性能波动。
AI.conclusion: 合成训练数据可作为解决质检领域数据不足和领域适应问题的有效方案，为实际工业应用提供可行路径。

authors_text: Aykut İşleyen,Nathan van de Wouw,Ömür Arslan
title: From Low to High Order Motion Planners: Safe Robot Navigation using Motion Prediction and Reference Governor
title_zh: 从低阶到高阶运动规划器：使用运动预测和参考调速器的安全机器人导航
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures, extended version of a paper submitted to a journal publication
comments: 9 pages, 4 figures, extended version of a paper submitted to a journal publication
abstract: Safe navigation around obstacles is a fundamental challenge for highly dynamic robots. The state-of-the-art approach for adapting simple reference path planners to complex robot dynamics using trajectory optimization and tracking control is brittle and requires significant replanning cycles. In this paper, we introduce a novel feedback motion planning framework that extends the applicability of low-order (e.g. position-/velocity-controlled) reference motion planners to high-order (e.g., acceleration-/jerk-controlled) robot models using motion prediction and reference governors. We use predicted robot motion range for safety assessment and establish a bidirectional interface between high-level planning and low-level control via a reference governor. We describe the generic fundamental building blocks of our feedback motion planning framework and give specific example constructions for motion control, prediction, and reference planning. We prove the correctness of our planning framework and demonstrate its performance in numerical simulations. We conclude that accurate motion prediction is crucial for closing the gap between high-level planning and low-level control.
summary: Safe navigation around obstacles is a fundamental challenge for highly dynamic robots. The state-of-the-art approach for adapting simple reference path planners to complex robot dynamics using trajectory optimization and tracking control is brittle and requires significant replanning cycles. In this paper, we introduce a novel feedback motion planning framework that extends the applicability of low-order (e.g. position-/velocity-controlled) reference motion planners to high-order (e.g., acceleration-/jerk-controlled) robot models using motion prediction and reference governors. We use predicted robot motion range for safety assessment and establish a bidirectional interface between high-level planning and low-level control via a reference governor. We describe the generic fundamental building blocks of our feedback motion planning framework and give specific example constructions for motion control, prediction, and reference planning. We prove the correctness of our planning framework and demonstrate its performance in numerical simulations. We conclude that accurate motion prediction is crucial for closing the gap between high-level planning and low-level control.
abstract_zh: 围绕障碍物的安全导航是高动态机器人面临的基本挑战。使用轨迹优化和跟踪控制使简单参考路径规划器适应复杂机器人动力学的最先进方法很脆弱，并且需要大量的重新规划周期。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的反馈运动规划框架，该框架使用运动预测和参考调节器将低阶（例如位置/速度控制）参考运动规划器的适用性扩展到高阶（例如加速度/加加速度控制）机器人模型。我们使用预测的机器人运动范围进行安全评估，并通过参考调节器在高层规划和低层控制之间建立双向接口。我们描述了反馈运动规划框架的通用基本构建块，并给出了运动控制、预测和参考规划的具体示例结构。我们证明了规划框架的正确性，并在数值模拟中展示了其性能。我们的结论是，准确的运动预测对于缩小高层规划和低层控制之间的差距至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于运动预测和参考 governors 的反馈运动规划框架，将低阶参考路径规划器扩展至高阶机器人模型，以实现安全导航。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹优化与跟踪控制方法在适应复杂机器人动力学时存在鲁棒性差、需频繁重规划的问题，亟需弥合高层规划与底层控制间的差距。
AI.method: 构建包含运动预测、安全评估与双向接口的反馈框架，通过参考 governors 实现高阶动力学模型与低阶规划器的协同，并给出具体实现模块。
AI.result: 理论证明框架正确性，数值仿真验证其有效性，表明准确运动预测对提升系统安全性和规划效率具有关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 精确的运动预测是实现高层规划与底层控制有效衔接的核心，为动态环境下的安全导航提供新思路。

search_text: From Low to High Order Motion Planners: Safe Robot Navigation using Motion Prediction and Reference Governor 从低阶到高阶运动规划器：使用运动预测和参考调速器的安全机器人导航 Safe navigation around obstacles is a fundamental challenge for highly dynamic robots. The state-of-the-art approach for adapting simple reference path planners to complex robot dynamics using trajectory optimization and tracking control is brittle and requires significant replanning cycles. In this paper, we introduce a novel feedback motion planning framework that extends the applicability of low-order (e.g. position-/velocity-controlled) reference motion planners to high-order (e.g., acceleration-/jerk-controlled) robot models using motion prediction and reference governors. We use predicted robot motion range for safety assessment and establish a bidirectional interface between high-level planning and low-level control via a reference governor. We describe the generic fundamental building blocks of our feedback motion planning framework and give specific example constructions for motion control, prediction, and reference planning. We prove the correctness of our planning framework and demonstrate its performance in numerical simulations. We conclude that accurate motion prediction is crucial for closing the gap between high-level planning and low-level control. 围绕障碍物的安全导航是高动态机器人面临的基本挑战。使用轨迹优化和跟踪控制使简单参考路径规划器适应复杂机器人动力学的最先进方法很脆弱，并且需要大量的重新规划周期。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的反馈运动规划框架，该框架使用运动预测和参考调节器将低阶（例如位置/速度控制）参考运动规划器的适用性扩展到高阶（例如加速度/加加速度控制）机器人模型。我们使用预测的机器人运动范围进行安全评估，并通过参考调节器在高层规划和低层控制之间建立双向接口。我们描述了反馈运动规划框架的通用基本构建块，并给出了运动控制、预测和参考规划的具体示例结构。我们证明了规划框架的正确性，并在数值模拟中展示了其性能。我们的结论是，准确的运动预测对于缩小高层规划和低层控制之间的差距至关重要。 本文提出一种基于运动预测和参考 governors 的反馈运动规划框架，将低阶参考路径规划器扩展至高阶机器人模型，以实现安全导航。 Aykut İşleyen,Nathan van de Wouw,Ömür Arslan cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Kerry He,Rhys Newbury,Tin Tran,Jesse Haviland,Ben Burgess-Limerick,Dana Kulić,Peter Corke,Akansel Cosgun
title: Visibility Maximization Controller for Robotic Manipulation
title_zh: 用于机器人操作的可见度最大化控制器
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, 7 tables, submitted to RA-L and IROS 2022
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures, 7 tables, submitted to RA-L and IROS 2022
abstract: Occlusions caused by a robot's own body is a common problem for closed-loop control methods employed in eye-to-hand camera setups. We propose an optimization-based reactive controller that minimizes self-occlusions while achieving a desired goal pose. The approach allows coordinated control between the robot's base, arm and head by encoding the line-of-sight visibility to the target as a soft constraint along with other task-related constraints, and solving for feasible joint and base velocities. The generalizability of the approach is demonstrated in simulated and real-world experiments, on robots with fixed or mobile bases, with moving or fixed objects, and multiple objects. The experiments revealed a trade-off between occlusion rates and other task metrics. While a planning-based baseline achieved lower occlusion rates than the proposed controller, it came at the expense of highly inefficient paths and a significant drop in the task success. On the other hand, the proposed controller is shown to improve visibility to the line target object(s) without sacrificing too much from the task success and efficiency. Videos and code can be found at: rhys-newbury.github.io/projects/vmc/.

We propose an optimization-based reactive controller that minimizes self-occlusions while achieving a desired goal pose. The approach allows coordinated control between the robot's base, arm and head by encoding the line-of-sight visibility to the target as a soft constraint along with other task-related constraints, and solving for feasible joint and base velocities. The generalizability of the approach is demonstrated in simulated and real-world experiments, on robots with fixed or mobile bases, with moving or fixed objects, and multiple objects. The experiments revealed a trade-off between occlusion rates and other task metrics. While a planning-based baseline achieved lower occlusion rates than the proposed controller, it came at the expense of highly inefficient paths and a significant drop in the task success. On the other hand, the proposed controller is shown to improve visibility to the line target object(s) without sacrificing too much from the task success and efficiency. Videos and code can be found at: rhys-newbury.github.io/projects/vmc/.
abstract_zh: 由机器人自身身体引起的遮挡是眼对手相机设置中采用的闭环控制方法的常见问题。我们提出了一种基于优化的反应控制器，可以最大限度地减少自遮挡，同时实现所需的目标姿势。该方法通过将目标的视线可见性编码为软约束以及其他与任务相关的约束，并求解可行的关节和底座速度，实现机器人底座、手臂和头部之间的协调控制。该方法的普遍性在模拟和现实世界的实验中得到了证明，在具有固定或移动底座、移动或固定物体以及多个物体的机器人上进行。实验揭示了遮挡率和其他任务指标之间的权衡。虽然基于规划的基线实现了比提议的控制器更低的遮挡率，但它是以高度低效的路径和任务成功率的显着下降为代价的。另一方面，所提出的控制器被证明可以提高线目标对象的可见性，而不会过多地牺牲任务的成功和效率。视频和代码可以在以下位置找到：rhys-newbury.github.io/projects/vmc/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于优化的反应式控制器，通过减少机器人自身遮挡来提升机械臂操作的可见性。
AI.motivation: 眼手相机系统中机器人本体遮挡会干扰闭环控制，传统方法难以兼顾遮挡减少与任务效率。
AI.method: 将视线可见性编码为软约束，结合任务约束求解关节与底盘速度，实现基座、臂和头部的协同控制。
AI.result: 实验表明该控制器在模拟与真实场景中均有效，相比规划基线方法在保持任务成功率与效率的同时显著降低遮挡率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的控制器在可见性与任务性能间取得平衡，适用于不同移动性与目标场景的机器人系统。

title: 6D Rotation Representation For Unconstrained Head Pose Estimation
title_zh: 无约束头部姿势估计的 6D 旋转表示
abstract: In this paper, we present a method for unconstrained end-to-end head pose estimation. We address the problem of ambiguous rotation labels by introducing the rotation matrix formalism for our ground truth data and propose a continuous 6D rotation matrix representation for efficient and robust direct regression. This way, our method can learn the full rotation appearance which is contrary to previous approaches that restrict the pose prediction to a narrow-angle for satisfactory results. In addition, we propose a geodesic distance-based loss to penalize our network with respect to the SO(3) manifold geometry. Experiments on the public AFLW2000 and BIWI datasets demonstrate that our proposed method significantly outperforms other state-of-the-art methods by up to 20\%. We open-source our training and testing code along with our pre-trained models: https://github.com/thohemp/6DRepNet.
summary: In this paper, we present a method for unconstrained end-to-end head pose estimation. We address the problem of ambiguous rotation labels by introducing the rotation matrix formalism for our ground truth data and propose a continuous 6D rotation matrix representation for efficient and robust direct regression. This way, our method can learn the full rotation appearance which is contrary to previous approaches that restrict the pose prediction to a narrow-angle for satisfactory results. In addition, we propose a geodesic distance-based loss to penalize our network with respect to the SO(3) manifold geometry. Experiments on the public AFLW2000 and BIWI datasets demonstrate that our proposed method significantly outperforms other state-of-the-art methods by up to 20\%. We open-source our training and testing code along with our pre-trained models: https://github.com/thohemp/6DRepNet.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种无约束端到端头部姿态估计的方法。我们通过为地面实况数据引入旋转矩阵形式来解决旋转标签不明确的问题，并提出一种连续的 6D 旋转矩阵表示，以实现高效且稳健的直接回归。这样，我们的方法可以学习完整的旋转外观，这与之前将姿势预测限制在窄角度以获得满意结果的方法相反。此外，我们提出了一种基于测地距离的损失来惩罚我们的网络相对于 SO(3) 流形几何形状。在公共 AFLW2000 和 BIWI 数据集上的实验表明，我们提出的方法明显优于其他最先进的方法高达 20%。我们开源了我们的训练和测试代码以及​​我们的预训练模型：https://github.com/thohemp/6DRepNet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无约束端到端头部姿态估计方法，通过6D旋转矩阵表示和测地距离损失函数提升姿态预测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因旋转标签模糊和角度限制导致姿态预测不够准确，需解决旋转表示的连续性和几何约束问题。
AI.method: 采用旋转矩阵形式构建真实数据，提出连续6D旋转矩阵表示，并设计基于SO(3)流形几何的测地距离损失函数进行优化。
AI.result: 在AFLW2000和BIWI数据集上相较其他方法提升最高达20%，并开源代码与预训练模型。
AI.conclusion: 6D旋转表示与几何感知损失函数有效提升姿态估计精度和鲁棒性，为无约束场景提供新思路。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 6D旋转表示与几何感知损失函数有效提升姿态估计精度和鲁棒性，为无约束场景提供新思路。

tldr: 本文提出一种无约束端到端头部姿态估计方法，通过6D旋转矩阵表示和测地距离损失函数提升姿态预测精度。
motivation: 现有方法因旋转标签模糊和角度限制导致姿态预测不够准确，需解决旋转表示的连续性和几何约束问题。
method: 采用旋转矩阵形式构建真实数据，提出连续6D旋转矩阵表示，并设计基于SO(3)流形几何的测地距离损失函数进行优化。
result: 在AFLW2000和BIWI数据集上相较其他方法提升最高达20%，并开源代码与预训练模型。
conclusion: 6D旋转表示与几何感知损失函数有效提升姿态估计精度和鲁棒性，为无约束场景提供新思路。
search_text: 6D Rotation Representation For Unconstrained Head Pose Estimation 无约束头部姿势估计的 6D 旋转表示 In this paper, we present a method for unconstrained end-to-end head pose estimation. We address the problem of ambiguous rotation labels by introducing the rotation matrix formalism for our ground truth data and propose a continuous 6D rotation matrix representation for efficient and robust direct regression. This way, our method can learn the full rotation appearance which is contrary to previous approaches that restrict the pose prediction to a narrow-angle for satisfactory results. In addition, we propose a geodesic distance-based loss to penalize our network with respect to the SO(3) manifold geometry. Experiments on the public AFLW2000 and BIWI datasets demonstrate that our proposed method significantly outperforms other state-of-the-art methods by up to 20\%. We open-source our training and testing code along with our pre-trained models: https://github.com/thohemp/6DRepNet. 在本文中，我们提出了一种无约束端到端头部姿态估计的方法。我们通过为地面实况数据引入旋转矩阵形式来解决旋转标签不明确的问题，并提出一种连续的 6D 旋转矩阵表示，以实现高效且稳健的直接回归。这样，我们的方法可以学习完整的旋转外观，这与之前将姿势预测限制在窄角度以获得满意结果的方法相反。此外，我们提出了一种基于测地距离的损失来惩罚我们的网络相对于 SO(3) 流形几何形状。在公共 AFLW2000 和 BIWI 数据集上的实验表明，我们提出的方法明显优于其他最先进的方法高达 20%。我们开源了我们的训练和测试代码以及​​我们的预训练模型：https://github.com/thohemp/6DRepNet。 本文提出一种无约束端到端头部姿态估计方法，通过6D旋转矩阵表示和测地距离损失函数提升姿态预测精度。 Thorsten Hempel,Ahmed A. Abdelrahman,Ayoub Al-Hamadi cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.RO

title: Reachability analysis in stochastic directed graphs by reinforcement learning
title_zh: 通过强化学习进行随机有向图的可达性分析
comment: in IEEE Transactions on Automatic Control, 2023
comments: in IEEE Transactions on Automatic Control, 2023
abstract: We characterize the reachability probabilities in stochastic directed graphs by means of reinforcement learning methods. In particular, we show that the dynamics of the transition probabilities in a stochastic digraph can be modeled via a difference inclusion, which, in turn, can be interpreted as a Markov decision process. Using the latter framework, we offer a methodology to design reward functions to provide upper and lower bounds on the reachability probabilities of a set of nodes for stochastic digraphs. The effectiveness of the proposed technique is demonstrated by application to the diffusion of epidemic diseases over time-varying contact networks generated by the proximity patterns of mobile agents.
summary: We characterize the reachability probabilities in stochastic directed graphs by means of reinforcement learning methods. In particular, we show that the dynamics of the transition probabilities in a stochastic digraph can be modeled via a difference inclusion, which, in turn, can be interpreted as a Markov decision process. Using the latter framework, we offer a methodology to design reward functions to provide upper and lower bounds on the reachability probabilities of a set of nodes for stochastic digraphs. The effectiveness of the proposed technique is demonstrated by application to the diffusion of epidemic diseases over time-varying contact networks generated by the proximity patterns of mobile agents.
abstract_zh: 我们通过强化学习方法来表征随机有向图中的可达概率。特别是，我们证明了随机有向图中转移概率的动态可以通过差异包含来建模，而差异包含又可以解释为马尔可夫决策过程。使用后一个框架，我们提供了一种设计奖励函数的方法，以提供随机有向图的一组节点的可达概率的上限和下限。该技术的有效性通过应用于流行病在由移动代理的邻近模式生成的时变接触网络上的传播来证明。

AI.tldr: 利用强化学习方法分析随机有向图中的节点可达概率，并设计奖励函数以估算其上下界。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理动态网络中的可达性分析存在局限，需更有效的手段应对时间变化的接触网络。
AI.method: 将随机有向图的转移概率建模为差分包含，转化为马尔可夫决策过程，设计奖励函数以计算可达概率的上下界。
AI.result: 成功应用于时间变化的接触网络中的传染病扩散模型，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习为动态网络中的可达性分析提供了有效框架，尤其适用于复杂时间变化的接触网络。

title: Oscillatory Neural Network as Hetero-Associative Memory for Image Edge Detection
title_zh: 振荡神经网络作为图像边缘检测的异联想存储器
comment: ef:NICE '22: The 9th Neuro-Inspired Computational Elements workshop, Mar 2022, New York (Virtual), United States
comments: ef:NICE '22: The 9th Neuro-Inspired Computational Elements workshop, Mar 2022, New York (Virtual), United States
abstract: The increasing amount of data to be processed on edge devices, such as cameras, has motivated Artificial Intelligence (AI) integration at the edge. Typical image processing methods performed at the edge, such as feature extraction or edge detection, use convolutional filters that are energy, computation, and memory hungry algorithms. But edge devices and cameras have scarce computational resources, bandwidth, and power and are limited due to privacy constraints to send data over to the cloud. Thus, there is a need to process image data at the edge. Over the years, this need has incited a lot of interest in implementing neuromorphic computing at the edge. Neuromorphic systems aim to emulate the biological neural functions to achieve energy-efficient computing. Recently, Oscillatory Neural Networks (ONN) present a novel brain-inspired computing approach by emulating brain oscillations to perform autoassociative memory types of applications. To speed up image edge detection and reduce its power consumption, we perform an in-depth investigation with ONNs. We propose a novel image processing method by using ONNs as a hetero-associative memory (HAM) for image edge detection. We simulate our ONN-HAM solution using first, a Matlab emulator, and then a fully digital ONN design. We show results on gray scale square evaluation maps, also on black and white and gray scale 28x28 MNIST images and finally on black and white 512x512 standard test images. We compare our solution with standard edge detection filters such as Sobel and Canny. Finally, using the fully digital design simulation results, we report on timing and resource characteristics, and evaluate its feasibility for real-time image processing applications. Our digital ONN-HAM solution can process images with up to 120x120 pixels (166 MHz system frequency) respecting real-time camera constraints. This work is the first to explore ONNs as hetero-associative memory for image processing applications.

abstract_zh: 摄像头等边缘设备需要处理的数据量不断增加，推动了边缘人工智能 (AI) 的集成。在边缘执行的典型图像处理方法（例如特征提取或边缘检测）使用卷积滤波器，这些滤波器是一种消耗能量、计算和内存的算法。但边缘设备和摄像头的计算资源、带宽和功率稀缺，并且由于隐私限制而将数据发送到云端的能力受到限制。因此，需要对边缘的图像数据进行处理。多年来，这种需求激发了人们对在边缘实施神经形态计算的浓厚兴趣。神经形态系统旨在模拟生物神经功能以实现节能计算。最近，振荡神经网络（ONN）提出了一种新颖的受大脑启发的计算方法，通过模拟大脑振荡来执行自动联想记忆类型的应用程序。为了加快图像边缘检测速度并降低功耗，我们对 ONN 进行了深入研究。我们提出了一种新颖的图像处理方法，使用 ONN 作为异联想存储器（HAM）进行图像边缘检测。我们首先使用 Matlab 仿真器模拟我们的 ONN-HAM 解决方案，然后使用全数字 ONN 设计。我们在灰度方形评估图上显示结果，也在黑白和灰度 28x28 MNIST 图像上显示结果，最后在黑白 512x512 标准测试图像上显示结果。我们将我们的解决方案与标准边缘检测滤波器（例如 Sobel 和 Canny）进行比较。最后，利用全数字设计仿真结果，我们报告时序和资源特性，并评估其对于实时图像处理应用的可行性。我们的数字 ONN-HAM 解决方案可以处理高达 120x120 像素（166 MHz 系统频率）的图像，同时考虑到实时相机的限制。这项工作首次探索 ONN 作为图像处理应用的异联想存储器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将振荡神经网络（ONN）作为异联想记忆（HAM）用于图像边缘检测，以提升边缘设备的处理效率。
AI.motivation: 边缘设备计算资源有限，传统卷积滤波算法能耗高且难以满足实时性需求，需探索新型神经形态计算方案。
AI.method: 设计基于ONN的HAM模型，通过Matlab仿真和全数字电路模拟验证，对比Sobel、Canny等经典边缘检测算法。
AI.result: ONN-HAM在灰度图像和MNIST数据集上表现优异，数字设计实现120x120像素实时处理（166MHz频率），资源占用合理。
AI.conclusion: 首次将ONN应用于图像处理的异联想记忆任务，验证了其在边缘计算场景下的可行性与优势。

authors_text: Numan Saeed,Roba Al Majzoub,Ikboljon Sobirov,Mohammad Yaqub
title: An Ensemble Approach for Patient Prognosis of Head and Neck Tumor Using Multimodal Data
title_zh: 使用多模态数据预测头颈肿瘤患者预后的综合方法
abstract: Accurate prognosis of a tumor can help doctors provide a proper course of treatment and, therefore, save the lives of many. Traditional machine learning algorithms have been eminently useful in crafting prognostic models in the last few decades. Recently, deep learning algorithms have shown significant improvement when developing diagnosis and prognosis solutions to different healthcare problems. However, most of these solutions rely solely on either imaging or clinical data. Utilizing patient tabular data such as demographics and patient medical history alongside imaging data in a multimodal approach to solve a prognosis task has started to gain more interest recently and has the potential to create more accurate solutions. The main issue when using clinical and imaging data to train a deep learning model is to decide on how to combine the information from these sources. We propose a multimodal network that ensembles deep multi-task logistic regression (MTLR), Cox proportional hazard (CoxPH) and CNN models to predict prognostic outcomes for patients with head and neck tumors using patients' clinical and imaging (CT and PET) data. Features from CT and PET scans are fused and then combined with patients' electronic health records for the prediction. The proposed model is trained and tested on 224 and 101 patient records respectively. Experimental results show that our proposed ensemble solution achieves a C-index of 0.72 on The HECKTOR test set that saved us the first place in prognosis task of the HECKTOR challenge. The full implementation based on PyTorch is available on \url{https://github.com/numanai/BioMedIA-Hecktor2021}.
summary: Accurate prognosis of a tumor can help doctors provide a proper course of treatment and, therefore, save the lives of many. Traditional machine learning algorithms have been eminently useful in crafting prognostic models in the last few decades. Recently, deep learning algorithms have shown significant improvement when developing diagnosis and prognosis solutions to different healthcare problems. However, most of these solutions rely solely on either imaging or clinical data. Utilizing patient tabular data such as demographics and patient medical history alongside imaging data in a multimodal approach to solve a prognosis task has started to gain more interest recently and has the potential to create more accurate solutions. The main issue when using clinical and imaging data to train a deep learning model is to decide on how to combine the information from these sources. We propose a multimodal network that ensembles deep multi-task logistic regression (MTLR), Cox proportional hazard (CoxPH) and CNN models to predict prognostic outcomes for patients with head and neck tumors using patients' clinical and imaging (CT and PET) data. Features from CT and PET scans are fused and then combined with patients' electronic health records for the prediction. The proposed model is trained and tested on 224 and 101 patient records respectively. Experimental results show that our proposed ensemble solution achieves a C-index of 0.72 on The HECKTOR test set that saved us the first place in prognosis task of the HECKTOR challenge. The full implementation based on PyTorch is available on \url{https://github.com/numanai/BioMedIA-Hecktor2021}.
abstract_zh: 肿瘤的准确预后可以帮助医生提供适当的治疗方案，从而挽救许多人的生命。在过去的几十年里，传统的机器学习算法在构建预测模型方面非常有用。最近，深度学习算法在开发针对不同医疗保健问题的诊断和预后解决方案时显示出显着的改进。然而，这些解决方案大多数仅依赖于成像或临床数据。利用患者人口统计数据和患者病史等表格数据以及多模式方法中的成像数据来解决预后任务最近已开始引起更多兴趣，并且有可能创建更准确的解决方案。使用临床和影像数据训练深度学习模型时的主要问题是决定如何组合这些来源的信息。我们提出了一个多模态网络，集成了深度多任务逻辑回归 (MTLR)、Cox 比例风险 (CoxPH) 和 CNN 模型，利用患者的临床和影像（CT 和 PET）数据来预测头颈肿瘤患者的预后结果。 CT 和 PET 扫描的特征被融合，然后与患者的电子健康记录相结合进行预测。所提出的模型分别在 224 份和 101 份患者记录上进行了训练和测试。实验结果表明，我们提出的集成解决方案在 HECKTOR 测试集上的 C 指数达到 0.72，这使我们在 HECKTOR 挑战的预测任务中保住了第一名。基于 PyTorch 的完整实现可在 \url{https://github.com/numanai/BioMedIA-Hecktor2021} 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合临床数据和影像数据的集成模型，用于预测头颈肿瘤患者的预后。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习和深度学习方法在肿瘤预后预测中存在单一数据源（影像或临床）的局限性，而多模态数据融合可能提升预测准确性。
AI.method: 集成多任务逻辑回归（MTLR）、Cox比例风险（CoxPH）模型和卷积神经网络（CNN），融合CT/PET影像特征与电子健康记录进行预测。
AI.result: 在HECKTOR测试集上达到C-index 0.72，获得HECKTOR挑战赛预后任务第一名，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 多模态数据融合与模型集成能有效提升肿瘤预后预测性能，为临床决策提供支持。

authors_text: M. Jílek,K. Stránská,M. Somr,M. Kulich,J. Zeman,L. Přeučil
title: Self-Stabilizing Self-Assembly
title_zh: 自稳定自组装
comment: 7 pages, 14 figures, 1 table; incorporates referees' and editor's comments
comments: 7 pages, 14 figures, 1 table; incorporates referees' and editor's comments
abstract: The emerging field of passive macro-scale tile-based self-assembly (TBSA) shows promise in enabling effective manufacturing processes by harnessing TBSA's intrinsic parallelism. However, current TBSA methodologies still do not fulfill their potentials, largely because such assemblies are often prone to errors, and the size of an individual assembly is limited due to insufficient mechanical stability. Moreover, the instability issue worsens as assemblies grow in size. Using a novel type of magnetically-bonded tiles carried by bristle-bot drives, we propose here a framework that reverses this tendency; i.e., as an assembly grows, it becomes more stable. Stability is achieved by introducing two sets of tiles that move in opposite directions, thus zeroing the assembly net force. Using physics-based computational experiments, we compare the performance of the proposed approach with the common orbital shaking method, proving that the proposed system of tiles indeed possesses self-stabilizing characteristics. Our approach enables assemblies containing hundreds of tiles to be built, while the shaking approach is inherently limited to a few tens of tiles. Our results indicate that one of the primary limitations of mechanical, agitation-based TBSA approaches, instability, might be overcome by employing a swarm of free-running, sensorless mobile robots, herein represented by passive tiles at the macroscopic scale.
summary: The emerging field of passive macro-scale tile-based self-assembly (TBSA) shows promise in enabling effective manufacturing processes by harnessing TBSA's intrinsic parallelism. However, current TBSA methodologies still do not fulfill their potentials, largely because such assemblies are often prone to errors, and the size of an individual assembly is limited due to insufficient mechanical stability. Moreover, the instability issue worsens as assemblies grow in size. Using a novel type of magnetically-bonded tiles carried by bristle-bot drives, we propose here a framework that reverses this tendency; i.e., as an assembly grows, it becomes more stable. Stability is achieved by introducing two sets of tiles that move in opposite directions, thus zeroing the assembly net force. Using physics-based computational experiments, we compare the performance of the proposed approach with the common orbital shaking method, proving that the proposed system of tiles indeed possesses self-stabilizing characteristics. Our approach enables assemblies containing hundreds of tiles to be built, while the shaking approach is inherently limited to a few tens of tiles. Our results indicate that one of the primary limitations of mechanical, agitation-based TBSA approaches, instability, might be overcome by employing a swarm of free-running, sensorless mobile robots, herein represented by passive tiles at the macroscopic scale.
abstract_zh: 新兴的无源宏观规模基于瓦片的自组装 (TBSA) 领域显示出通过利用 TBSA 固有的并行性实现有效制造流程的希望。然而，当前的 TBSA 方法仍然没有发挥其潜力，主要是因为此类组件经常容易出错，并且由于机械稳定性不足，单个组件的尺寸受到限制。此外，随着组件规模的增大，不稳定问题会变得更加严重。使用由鬃毛机器人驱动器承载的新型磁力粘合瓷砖，我们在这里提出了一个扭转这种趋势的框架；也就是说，随着程序集的增长，它会变得更加稳定。通过引入两组沿相反方向移动的瓷砖来实现稳定性，从而使装配净力为零。使用基于物理的计算实验，我们将所提出的方法与常见的轨道振动方法的性能进行了比较，证明所提出的瓦片系统确实具有自稳定特性。我们的方法可以构建包含数百块瓷砖的组件，而摇动方法本质上仅限于几十块瓷砖。我们的结果表明，机械式、基于搅拌的 TBSA 方法的主要局限性之一，即不稳定性，可以通过采用一群自由运行、无传感器的移动机器人来克服，这些机器人在本文中以宏观尺度的被动瓷砖为代表。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于磁性瓷砖和刷子机器人驱动的自稳定自组装框架，解决传统自组装方法中规模受限和稳定性差的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统宏观尺度瓷砖自组装（TBSA）方法在规模扩大时易出现机械不稳定性和错误，限制了其应用潜力。
AI.method: 设计双向运动的磁性瓷砖组，通过相反方向运动抵消净力，结合物理仿真验证自稳定特性，并与传统摇晃方法对比。
AI.result: 实现包含数百块瓷砖的稳定组装，而传统方法仅限几十块；证明系统具备自稳定特性。
AI.conclusion: 采用无传感器移动机器人（宏观尺度被动瓷砖）可克服机械搅拌式TBSA的不稳定性限制。

Using physics-based computational experiments, we compare the performance of the proposed approach with the common orbital shaking method, proving that the proposed system of tiles indeed possesses self-stabilizing characteristics. Our approach enables assemblies containing hundreds of tiles to be built, while the shaking approach is inherently limited to a few tens of tiles. Our results indicate that one of the primary limitations of mechanical, agitation-based TBSA approaches, instability, might be overcome by employing a swarm of free-running, sensorless mobile robots, herein represented by passive tiles at the macroscopic scale. 新兴的无源宏观规模基于瓦片的自组装 (TBSA) 领域显示出通过利用 TBSA 固有的并行性实现有效制造流程的希望。然而，当前的 TBSA 方法仍然没有发挥其潜力，主要是因为此类组件经常容易出错，并且由于机械稳定性不足，单个组件的尺寸受到限制。此外，随着组件规模的增大，不稳定问题会变得更加严重。使用由鬃毛机器人驱动器承载的新型磁力粘合瓷砖，我们在这里提出了一个扭转这种趋势的框架；也就是说，随着程序集的增长，它会变得更加稳定。通过引入两组沿相反方向移动的瓷砖来实现稳定性，从而使装配净力为零。使用基于物理的计算实验，我们将所提出的方法与常见的轨道振动方法的性能进行了比较，证明所提出的瓦片系统确实具有自稳定特性。我们的方法可以构建包含数百块瓷砖的组件，而摇动方法本质上仅限于几十块瓷砖。我们的结果表明，机械式、基于搅拌的 TBSA 方法的主要局限性之一，即不稳定性，可以通过采用一群自由运行、无传感器的移动机器人来克服，这些机器人在本文中以宏观尺度的被动瓷砖为代表。 本文提出一种基于磁性瓷砖和刷子机器人驱动的自稳定自组装框架，解决传统自组装方法中规模受限和稳定性差的问题。 M. Jílek,K. Stránská,M. Somr,M. Kulich,J. Zeman,L. Přeučil cs.RO,cond-mat.soft,cs.ET

authors_text: Yue Liu,Sihang Zhou,Xinwang Liu,Wenxuan Tu,Xihong Yang
title: Improved Dual Correlation Reduction Network
title_zh: 改进的双相关降低网络
abstract: Deep graph clustering, which aims to reveal the underlying graph structure and divide the nodes into different clusters without human annotations, is a fundamental yet challenging task. However, we observed that the existing methods suffer from the representation collapse problem and easily tend to encode samples with different classes into the same latent embedding. Consequently, the discriminative capability of nodes is limited, resulting in sub-optimal clustering performance. To address this problem, we propose a novel deep graph clustering algorithm termed Improved Dual Correlation Reduction Network (IDCRN) through improving the discriminative capability of samples. Specifically, by approximating the cross-view feature correlation matrix to an identity matrix, we reduce the redundancy between different dimensions of features, thus improving the discriminative capability of the latent space explicitly. Meanwhile, the cross-view sample correlation matrix is forced to approximate the designed clustering-refined adjacency matrix to guide the learned latent representation to recover the affinity matrix even across views, thus enhancing the discriminative capability of features implicitly. Moreover, we avoid the collapsed representation caused by the over-smoothing issue in Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) through an introduced propagation regularization term, enabling IDCRN to capture the long-range information with the shallow network structure. Extensive experimental results on six benchmarks have demonstrated the effectiveness and the efficiency of IDCRN compared to the existing state-of-the-art deep graph clustering algorithms.
summary: Deep graph clustering, which aims to reveal the underlying graph structure and divide the nodes into different clusters without human annotations, is a fundamental yet challenging task. However, we observed that the existing methods suffer from the representation collapse problem and easily tend to encode samples with different classes into the same latent embedding. Consequently, the discriminative capability of nodes is limited, resulting in sub-optimal clustering performance. To address this problem, we propose a novel deep graph clustering algorithm termed Improved Dual Correlation Reduction Network (IDCRN) through improving the discriminative capability of samples. Specifically, by approximating the cross-view feature correlation matrix to an identity matrix, we reduce the redundancy between different dimensions of features, thus improving the discriminative capability of the latent space explicitly. Meanwhile, the cross-view sample correlation matrix is forced to approximate the designed clustering-refined adjacency matrix to guide the learned latent representation to recover the affinity matrix even across views, thus enhancing the discriminative capability of features implicitly. Moreover, we avoid the collapsed representation caused by the over-smoothing issue in Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) through an introduced propagation regularization term, enabling IDCRN to capture the long-range information with the shallow network structure. Extensive experimental results on six benchmarks have demonstrated the effectiveness and the efficiency of IDCRN compared to the existing state-of-the-art deep graph clustering algorithms.
abstract_zh: 深度图聚类旨在揭示底层图结构并将节点划分为不同的簇而无需人工注释，是一项基本但具有挑战性的任务。然而，我们观察到现有的方法存在表示崩溃问题，并且很容易将不同类别的样本编码到相同的潜在嵌入中。因此，节点的判别能力受到限制，导致聚类性能次优。为了解决这个问题，我们通过提高样本的判别能力，提出了一种新的深度图聚类算法，称为改进的双相关减少网络（IDCRN）。具体来说，通过将跨视图特征相关矩阵近似为单位矩阵，我们减少了不同维度特征之间的冗余，从而显着提高了潜在空间的判别能力。同时，跨视图样本相关矩阵被迫逼近设计的聚类细化邻接矩阵，以指导学习的潜在表示甚至跨视图恢复亲和力矩阵，从而隐式增强特征的判别能力。此外，我们通过引入传播正则化项，避免了图卷积网络（GCN）中过度平滑问题导致的崩溃表示，使IDCRN能够利用浅层网络结构捕获长程信息。六个基准的大量实验结果证明了 IDCRN 与现有最先进的深度图聚类算法相比的有效性和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的双相关性减少网络（IDCRN），以解决深度图聚类中表示崩溃和判别能力不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度图聚类方法存在表示崩溃问题，导致不同类别样本被编码为相似潜在嵌入，限制节点判别能力，影响聚类效果。
AI.method: 通过逼近跨视图特征相关矩阵为单位矩阵减少特征冗余，强制跨视图样本相关矩阵逼近聚类优化邻接矩阵，并引入传播正则化项缓解GCN过平滑问题。
AI.result: 在六个基准数据集上实验表明，IDCRN在效果和效率上优于现有最先进的深度图聚类算法。
AI.conclusion: IDCRN通过显式提升潜在空间判别性与隐式优化亲和矩阵，有效解决了表示崩溃问题，增强了图聚类性能。

title: Embedded Soft Sensing in Soft Ring Actuator for Aiding with theSelf-Organisation of the In-Hand Rotational Manipulation
title_zh: 软环执行器中的嵌入式软传感有助于手持旋转操纵的自组织
comment: The papaer is accepted but not published
comments: The papaer is accepted but not published
abstract: This paper proposes a soft sensor embedded in a soft ring actuator with five fingers as a soft hand to identify the bifurcation of manipulated objects during the in-hand manipulation process. The manipulation is performed by breaking the symmetry method with an underactuated control system by bifurcating the object to clockwise or counter-clockwise rotations. Two soft sensors are embedded in parallel over a single soft finger, and the difference in the resistance measurements is compared when the finger is displaced or bent in a particular direction, which can identify the bifurcation direction and aid in the break of symmetry approach without the need of external tracking devices. The sensors performance is also characterised by extending and bending the finger without an object interaction. During an experiment that performs a break of symmetry, manipulated objects turn clockwise and counter-clockwise depending on the perturbation and actuation frequency, sensors can track the direction of rotation. The embedded sensors provide a self-sensing capability for implementing a closed-loop control in future work. The soft ring actuator performance presents a self-organisation behaviour with soft fingers rotating an object without a required control for rotating the object. Therefore, the soft fingers are an underactuated system with complex behaviour when interacting with objects that serve in-hand manipulation field.
summary: This paper proposes a soft sensor embedded in a soft ring actuator with five fingers as a soft hand to identify the bifurcation of manipulated objects during the in-hand manipulation process. The manipulation is performed by breaking the symmetry method with an underactuated control system by bifurcating the object to clockwise or counter-clockwise rotations. Two soft sensors are embedded in parallel over a single soft finger, and the difference in the resistance measurements is compared when the finger is displaced or bent in a particular direction, which can identify the bifurcation direction and aid in the break of symmetry approach without the need of external tracking devices. The sensors performance is also characterised by extending and bending the finger without an object interaction. During an experiment that performs a break of symmetry, manipulated objects turn clockwise and counter-clockwise depending on the perturbation and actuation frequency, sensors can track the direction of rotation. The embedded sensors provide a self-sensing capability for implementing a closed-loop control in future work. The soft ring actuator performance presents a self-organisation behaviour with soft fingers rotating an object without a required control for rotating the object. Therefore, the soft fingers are an underactuated system with complex behaviour when interacting with objects that serve in-hand manipulation field.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种嵌入软环执行器中的软传感器，具有五个手指作为软手，以在手部操纵过程中识别被操纵物体的分叉。该操纵是通过使用欠驱动控制系统打破对称方法来执行的，通过将物体分叉为顺时针或逆时针旋转。将两个软传感器并行嵌入单个软手指上，当手指在特定方向上移位或弯曲时，比较电阻测量值的差异，这可以识别分叉方向并帮助打破对称方法，而无需外部跟踪设备。传感器性能的另一个特点是在没有物体交互的情况下伸展和弯曲手指。在执行对称性破缺的实验期间，被操纵的物体根据扰动和驱动频率顺时针和逆时针旋转，传感器可以跟踪旋转方向。嵌入式传感器提供了自感知能力，可以在未来的工作中实现闭环控制。软环致动器的性能呈现出自组织行为，软手指旋转物体，而无需旋转物体所需的控制。因此，软手指是一个欠驱动系统，在与手内操作领域的物体交互时具有复杂的行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种嵌入式软传感器，用于软环执行器中的在手旋转操作，通过检测物体旋转方向辅助对称性破坏方法。
AI.motivation: 传统软体机器人需要外部追踪设备来实现闭环控制，缺乏自感知能力，限制了其在复杂操作中的应用。
AI.method: 在单个软指上并行嵌入两个软传感器，通过比较弯曲或位移时的电阻差异，识别物体旋转方向，无需外部设备。
AI.result: 实验验证传感器可准确跟踪物体顺时针/逆时针旋转方向，软指在无控制指令下实现自组织旋转操作。
AI.conclusion: 嵌入式软传感器为软体机器人闭环控制提供自感知能力，软环执行器在交互中表现出复杂自组织行为。

title: A Novel Hand Gesture Detection and Recognition system based on ensemble-based Convolutional Neural Network
title_zh: 一种基于集成卷积神经网络的新型手势检测与识别系统
abstract: Nowadays, hand gesture recognition has become an alternative for human-machine interaction. It has covered a large area of applications like 3D game technology, sign language interpreting, VR (virtual reality) environment, and robotics. But detection of the hand portion has become a challenging task in computer vision and pattern recognition communities. Deep learning algorithm like convolutional neural network (CNN) architecture has become a very popular choice for classification tasks, but CNN architectures suffer from some problems like high variance during prediction, overfitting problem and also prediction errors. To overcome these problems, an ensemble of CNN-based approaches is presented in this paper. Firstly, the gesture portion is detected by using the background separation method based on binary thresholding. After that, the contour portion is extracted, and the hand region is segmented. Then, the images have been resized and fed into three individual CNN models to train them in parallel. In the last part, the output scores of CNN models are averaged to construct an optimal ensemble model for the final prediction. Two publicly available datasets (labeled as Dataset-1 and Dataset-2) containing infrared images and one self-constructed dataset have been used to validate the proposed system. Experimental results are compared with the existing state-of-the-art approaches, and it is observed that our proposed ensemble model outperforms other existing proposed methods.

abstract_zh: 如今，手势识别已成为人机交互的替代方案。涵盖了3D游戏技术、手语翻译、VR（虚拟现实）环境、机器人等广泛应用领域。但手部的检测已成为计算机视觉和模式识别领域的一项具有挑战性的任务。卷积神经网络 (CNN) 架构等深度学习算法已成为分类任务的热门选择，但 CNN 架构存在预测过程中的高方差、过拟合问题和预测误差等问题。为了克服这些问题，本文提出了一系列基于 CNN 的方法。首先，采用基于二值阈值的背景分离方法检测手势部分。之后，提取轮廓部分，并分割手部区域。然后，这些图像被调整大小并输入到三个单独的 CNN 模型中以并行训练它们。在最后一部分中，对 CNN 模型的输出分数进行平均，以构建最终预测的最佳集成模型。两个包含红外图像的公开数据集（标记为 Dataset-1 和 Dataset-2）和一个自行构建的数据集已用于验证所提出的系统。将实验结果与现有的最先进方法进行比较，观察到我们提出的集成模型优于其他现有提出的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于集成卷积神经网络（CNN）的新手势检测与识别系统，旨在解决传统CNN在手势识别中的高方差、过拟合和预测误差问题。
AI.motivation: 手势识别在人机交互中具有广泛应用，但现有方法在手部区域检测和CNN模型的预测稳定性方面存在挑战，需改进模型鲁棒性与准确性。
AI.method: 采用二值阈值法分离背景并提取手部轮廓区域，通过三个并行训练的CNN模型处理分割后的图像，最终通过平均模型输出分数构建集成模型。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集和一个自建数据集上验证，实验结果表明该集成模型优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 集成CNN方法有效提升了手势识别的准确率和稳定性，为复杂场景下的手部检测提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Hanxiao Zhang,Liang Chen,Xiao Gu,Minghui Zhang,Yulei Qin,Feng Yao,Zhexin Wang,Yun Gu,Guang-Zhong Yang
title: Faithful learning with sure data for lung nodule diagnosis
title_zh: 忠实学习，数据可靠，肺结节诊断
abstract: Recent evolution in deep learning has proven its value for CT-based lung nodule classification. Most current techniques are intrinsically black-box systems, suffering from two generalizability issues in clinical practice. First, benign-malignant discrimination is often assessed by human observers without pathologic diagnoses at the nodule level. We termed these data as "unsure data". Second, a classifier does not necessarily acquire reliable nodule features for stable learning and robust prediction with patch-level labels during learning. In this study, we construct a sure dataset with pathologically-confirmed labels and propose a collaborative learning framework to facilitate sure nodule classification by integrating unsure data knowledge through nodule segmentation and malignancy score regression. A loss function is designed to learn reliable features by introducing interpretability constraints regulated with nodule segmentation maps. Furthermore, based on model inference results that reflect the understanding from both machine and experts, we explore a new nodule analysis method for similar historical nodule retrieval and interpretable diagnosis. Detailed experimental results demonstrate that our approach is beneficial for achieving improved performance coupled with faithful model reasoning for lung cancer prediction. Extensive cross-evaluation results further illustrate the effect of unsure data for deep-learning-based methods in lung nodule classification.
summary: Recent evolution in deep learning has proven its value for CT-based lung nodule classification. Most current techniques are intrinsically black-box systems, suffering from two generalizability issues in clinical practice. First, benign-malignant discrimination is often assessed by human observers without pathologic diagnoses at the nodule level. We termed these data as "unsure data". Second, a classifier does not necessarily acquire reliable nodule features for stable learning and robust prediction with patch-level labels during learning. In this study, we construct a sure dataset with pathologically-confirmed labels and propose a collaborative learning framework to facilitate sure nodule classification by integrating unsure data knowledge through nodule segmentation and malignancy score regression. A loss function is designed to learn reliable features by introducing interpretability constraints regulated with nodule segmentation maps. Furthermore, based on model inference results that reflect the understanding from both machine and experts, we explore a new nodule analysis method for similar historical nodule retrieval and interpretable diagnosis. Detailed experimental results demonstrate that our approach is beneficial for achieving improved performance coupled with faithful model reasoning for lung cancer prediction. Extensive cross-evaluation results further illustrate the effect of unsure data for deep-learning-based methods in lung nodule classification.
abstract_zh: 深度学习的最新发展已经证明了其对于基于 CT 的肺结节分类的价值。目前大多数技术本质上都是黑盒系统，在临床实践中存在两个普遍性问题。首先，良恶性鉴别通常由人类观察者进行评估，而无需结节水平的病理诊断。我们将这些数据称为“不确定数据”。其次，分类器不一定需要在学习过程中获得可靠的结节特征来进行稳定的学习和使用补丁级标签进行稳健的预测。在本研究中，我们构建了一个具有病理确认标签的确定数据集，并提出了一个协作学习框架，通过结节分割和恶性肿瘤评分回归整合不确定的数据知识，以促进确定的结节分类。损失函数旨在通过引入用结节分割图调节的可解释性约束来学习可靠的特征。此外，基于反映机器和专家理解的模型推理结果，我们探索了一种新的结节分析方法，用于相似的历史结节检索和可解释的诊断。详细的实验结果表明，我们的方法有利于实现性能的提高以及肺癌预测的忠实模型推理。广泛的交叉评估结果进一步说明了不确定数据对基于深度学习的方法在肺结节分类中的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合确诊数据与不确定数据的协同学习框架，用于改进基于CT的肺结节良恶性分类模型的可解释性与诊断性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在肺结节分类中存在黑箱特性，依赖未经病理确诊的不确定数据，且难以从局部标签中学习稳定特征，导致临床泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 构建病理确诊的『确定性数据集』，设计融合分割图谱的可解释性约束损失函数，通过结节分割与恶性评分回归整合不确定数据知识，并基于模型推理结果实现历史结节检索与可解释诊断。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在提升肺结节分类性能的同时增强了模型推理可信度，交叉验证证实不确定数据对深度学习方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过确定性数据与不确定数据知识的协同学习，可有效提升肺结节分类模型的诊断准确性与临床可解释性。

title: TeachAugment: Data Augmentation Optimization Using Teacher Knowledge
title_zh: TeachAugment：利用教师知识进行数据增强优化
comment: To appear in CVPR2022 (Oral presentation) Code: https://github.com/DensoITLab/TeachAugment
comments: To appear in CVPR2022 (Oral presentation) Code: https://github.com/DensoITLab/TeachAugment
abstract: Optimization of image transformation functions for the purpose of data augmentation has been intensively studied. In particular, adversarial data augmentation strategies, which search augmentation maximizing task loss, show significant improvement in the model generalization for many tasks. However, the existing methods require careful parameter tuning to avoid excessively strong deformations that take away image features critical for acquiring generalization. In this paper, we propose a data augmentation optimization method based on the adversarial strategy called TeachAugment, which can produce informative transformed images to the model without requiring careful tuning by leveraging a teacher model. Specifically, the augmentation is searched so that augmented images are adversarial for the target model and recognizable for the teacher model. We also propose data augmentation using neural networks, which simplifies the search space design and allows for updating of the data augmentation using the gradient method. We show that TeachAugment outperforms existing methods in experiments of image classification, semantic segmentation, and unsupervised representation learning tasks.
summary: Optimization of image transformation functions for the purpose of data augmentation has been intensively studied. In particular, adversarial data augmentation strategies, which search augmentation maximizing task loss, show significant improvement in the model generalization for many tasks. However, the existing methods require careful parameter tuning to avoid excessively strong deformations that take away image features critical for acquiring generalization. In this paper, we propose a data augmentation optimization method based on the adversarial strategy called TeachAugment, which can produce informative transformed images to the model without requiring careful tuning by leveraging a teacher model. Specifically, the augmentation is searched so that augmented images are adversarial for the target model and recognizable for the teacher model. We also propose data augmentation using neural networks, which simplifies the search space design and allows for updating of the data augmentation using the gradient method. We show that TeachAugment outperforms existing methods in experiments of image classification, semantic segmentation, and unsupervised representation learning tasks.
abstract_zh: 以数据增强为目的的图像变换函数的优化已经得到深入研究。特别是，对抗性数据增强策略（搜索增强最大化任务损失）在许多任务的模型泛化方面显示出显着改进。然而，现有方法需要仔细调整参数，以避免过度强烈的变形，从而消除对获取泛化至关重要的图像特征。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于称为 TeachAugment 的对抗策略的数据增强优化方法，该方法可以为模型生成信息丰富的转换图像，而无需利用教师模型进行仔细调整。具体来说，搜索增强，使得增强图像对于目标模型是对抗性的并且对于教师模型是可识别的。我们还提出使用神经网络进行数据增强，这简化了搜索空间设计并允许使用梯度方法更新数据增强。我们证明 TeachAugment 在图像分类、语义分割和无监督表示学习任务的实验中优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TeachAugment的数据增强优化方法，通过利用教师模型的知识来生成对模型有信息量的变换图像，无需手动调整参数。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗性数据增强方法需要仔细调整参数以避免过度变形破坏图像关键特征，而TeachAugment通过教师模型指导增强过程，减少人工干预需求。
AI.method: 基于对抗策略设计TeachAugment，使增强图像对目标模型具有对抗性但对教师模型可识别；同时提出神经网络驱动的数据增强方法，简化搜索空间设计并支持梯度更新。
AI.result: 在图像分类、语义分割和无监督表征学习任务中，TeachAugment均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: TeachAugment通过教师模型有效优化数据增强过程，在提升模型泛化能力的同时降低了参数调优难度。

search_text: TeachAugment: Data Augmentation Optimization Using Teacher Knowledge TeachAugment：利用教师知识进行数据增强优化 Optimization of image transformation functions for the purpose of data augmentation has been intensively studied. In particular, adversarial data augmentation strategies, which search augmentation maximizing task loss, show significant improvement in the model generalization for many tasks. However, the existing methods require careful parameter tuning to avoid excessively strong deformations that take away image features critical for acquiring generalization. In this paper, we propose a data augmentation optimization method based on the adversarial strategy called TeachAugment, which can produce informative transformed images to the model without requiring careful tuning by leveraging a teacher model. Specifically, the augmentation is searched so that augmented images are adversarial for the target model and recognizable for the teacher model. We also propose data augmentation using neural networks, which simplifies the search space design and allows for updating of the data augmentation using the gradient method. We show that TeachAugment outperforms existing methods in experiments of image classification, semantic segmentation, and unsupervised representation learning tasks. 以数据增强为目的的图像变换函数的优化已经得到深入研究。特别是，对抗性数据增强策略（搜索增强最大化任务损失）在许多任务的模型泛化方面显示出显着改进。然而，现有方法需要仔细调整参数，以避免过度强烈的变形，从而消除对获取泛化至关重要的图像特征。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于称为 TeachAugment 的对抗策略的数据增强优化方法，该方法可以为模型生成信息丰富的转换图像，而无需利用教师模型进行仔细调整。具体来说，搜索增强，使得增强图像对于目标模型是对抗性的并且对于教师模型是可识别的。我们还提出使用神经网络进行数据增强，这简化了搜索空间设计并允许使用梯度方法更新数据增强。我们证明 TeachAugment 在图像分类、语义分割和无监督表示学习任务的实验中优于现有方法。 本文提出了一种名为TeachAugment的数据增强优化方法，通过利用教师模型的知识来生成对模型有信息量的变换图像，无需手动调整参数。 Teppei Suzuki cs.CV

title: RRL:Regional Rotation Layer in Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: RRL：卷积神经网络中的区域旋转层
abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) perform very well in image classification and object detection in recent years, but even the most advanced models have limited rotation invariance. Known solutions include the enhancement of training data and the increase of rotation invariance by globally merging the rotation equivariant features. These methods either increase the workload of training or increase the number of model parameters. To address this problem, this paper proposes a module that can be inserted into the existing networks, and directly incorporates the rotation invariance into the feature extraction layers of the CNNs. This module does not have learnable parameters and will not increase the complexity of the model. At the same time, only by training the upright data, it can perform well on the rotated testing set. These advantages will be suitable for fields such as biomedicine and astronomy where it is difficult to obtain upright samples or the target has no directionality. Evaluate our module with LeNet-5, ResNet-18 and tiny-yolov3, we get impressive results.
summary: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) perform very well in image classification and object detection in recent years, but even the most advanced models have limited rotation invariance. Known solutions include the enhancement of training data and the increase of rotation invariance by globally merging the rotation equivariant features. These methods either increase the workload of training or increase the number of model parameters. To address this problem, this paper proposes a module that can be inserted into the existing networks, and directly incorporates the rotation invariance into the feature extraction layers of the CNNs. This module does not have learnable parameters and will not increase the complexity of the model. At the same time, only by training the upright data, it can perform well on the rotated testing set. These advantages will be suitable for fields such as biomedicine and astronomy where it is difficult to obtain upright samples or the target has no directionality. Evaluate our module with LeNet-5, ResNet-18 and tiny-yolov3, we get impressive results.
abstract_zh: 近年来，卷积神经网络（CNN）在图像分类和目标检测方面表现非常出色，但即使是最先进的模型也具有有限的旋转不变性。已知的解决方案包括通过全局合并旋转等变特征来增强训练数据和增加旋转不变性。这些方法要么增加训练的工作量，要么增加模型参数的数量。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一个可以插入现有网络的模块，并将旋转不变性直接合并到 CNN 的特征提取层中。该模块没有可学习的参数，不会增加模型的复杂度。同时，仅通过训​​练直立数据，就可以在旋转测试集上表现良好。这些优点将适用于生物医学、天文学等难以获得直立样本或目标无方向性的领域。使用 LeNet-5、ResNet-18 和tiny-yolov3 评估我们的模块，我们得到了令人印象深刻的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需可学习参数的区域旋转层模块，直接增强卷积神经网络的旋转不变性。
AI.motivation: 现有旋转不变性方法存在训练负担大或参数增加的问题，而该模块无需参数且能适应生物医学等难以获取直立样本的领域。
AI.method: 设计可插入现有网络的区域旋转层，在特征提取阶段直接引入旋转不变性，仅通过直立数据训练即可应对旋转测试集。
AI.result: 在LeNet-5、ResNet-18和tiny-yolov3上验证，模块有效提升旋转不变性表现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法以低复杂度实现旋转不变性增强，适用于样本获取受限或目标无方向性的实际场景。

authors_text: Yinghao Zhao,Li Yan,Yu Chen,Hong Xie,Bo Xu
title: FAEP: Fast Autonomous Exploration Planner for UAV Equipped with Limited FOV Sensor
title_zh: FAEP：配备有限视场传感器的无人机快速自主探索规划器
abstract: Autonomous exploration is one of the important parts to achieve the autonomous operation of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs). To improve the efficiency of the exploration process, a fast and autonomous exploration planner (FAEP) is proposed in this paper. We firstly design a novel frontiers exploration sequence generation method to obtain a more reasonable exploration path, which considers not only the flight-level but frontier-level factors into TSP. According to the exploration sequence and the distribution of frontiers, a two-stage heading planning strategy is proposed to cover more frontiers by heading change during an exploration journey. To improve the stability of path searching, a guided kinodynamic path searching based on a guiding path is devised. In addition, a dynamic start point selection method for replanning is also adopted to increase the fluency of flight. We present sufficient benchmark and real-world experiments. Experimental results show the superiority of the proposed exploration planner compared with typical and state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Autonomous exploration is one of the important parts to achieve the autonomous operation of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs). To improve the efficiency of the exploration process, a fast and autonomous exploration planner (FAEP) is proposed in this paper. We firstly design a novel frontiers exploration sequence generation method to obtain a more reasonable exploration path, which considers not only the flight-level but frontier-level factors into TSP. According to the exploration sequence and the distribution of frontiers, a two-stage heading planning strategy is proposed to cover more frontiers by heading change during an exploration journey. To improve the stability of path searching, a guided kinodynamic path searching based on a guiding path is devised. In addition, a dynamic start point selection method for replanning is also adopted to increase the fluency of flight. We present sufficient benchmark and real-world experiments. Experimental results show the superiority of the proposed exploration planner compared with typical and state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 自主探索是实现无人机自主运行的重要环节之一。为了提高探索过程的效率，本文提出了一种快速自主探索规划器（FAEP）。我们首先设计了一种新颖的前沿探索序列生成方法，以获得更合理的探索路径，该方法在 TSP 中不仅考虑了飞行层面的因素，还考虑了前沿层面的因素。根据勘探顺序和前沿分布，提出了两阶段航向规划策略，通过在勘探旅程中改变航向来覆盖更多前沿。为了提高路径搜索的稳定性，设计了一种基于引导路径的引导运动动力学路径搜索。此外，还采用动态起点选择重新规划的方法，增加飞行的流畅度。我们提供了足够的基准和真实世界的实验。实验结果表明，与典型和最先进的方法相比，所提出的勘探规划器具有优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FAEP的快速自主探索规划器，用于配备有限视野传感器的无人机，以提高探索效率。
AI.motivation: 自主探索是无人机实现自主操作的重要组成部分，但现有方法在探索效率和路径稳定性方面存在不足，因此需要一种更高效的探索规划方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的前沿探索序列生成方法，考虑飞行层和前沿层因素，结合TSP问题生成更合理的探索路径；还提出了一种两阶段航向规划策略，以及基于引导路径的引导运动学路径搜索和动态起点选择方法。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的探索规划器在基准测试和实际场景中均优于典型和最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: FAEP方法在提高无人机探索效率和路径稳定性方面表现出色，具有较高的实用价值。

search_text: FAEP: Fast Autonomous Exploration Planner for UAV Equipped with Limited FOV Sensor FAEP：配备有限视场传感器的无人机快速自主探索规划器 Autonomous exploration is one of the important parts to achieve the autonomous operation of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs). To improve the efficiency of the exploration process, a fast and autonomous exploration planner (FAEP) is proposed in this paper. We firstly design a novel frontiers exploration sequence generation method to obtain a more reasonable exploration path, which considers not only the flight-level but frontier-level factors into TSP. According to the exploration sequence and the distribution of frontiers, a two-stage heading planning strategy is proposed to cover more frontiers by heading change during an exploration journey. To improve the stability of path searching, a guided kinodynamic path searching based on a guiding path is devised. In addition, a dynamic start point selection method for replanning is also adopted to increase the fluency of flight. We present sufficient benchmark and real-world experiments. Experimental results show the superiority of the proposed exploration planner compared with typical and state-of-the-art methods. 自主探索是实现无人机自主运行的重要环节之一。为了提高探索过程的效率，本文提出了一种快速自主探索规划器（FAEP）。我们首先设计了一种新颖的前沿探索序列生成方法，以获得更合理的探索路径，该方法在 TSP 中不仅考虑了飞行层面的因素，还考虑了前沿层面的因素。根据勘探顺序和前沿分布，提出了两阶段航向规划策略，通过在勘探旅程中改变航向来覆盖更多前沿。为了提高路径搜索的稳定性，设计了一种基于引导路径的引导运动动力学路径搜索。此外，还采用动态起点选择重新规划的方法，增加飞行的流畅度。我们提供了足够的基准和真实世界的实验。实验结果表明，与典型和最先进的方法相比，所提出的勘探规划器具有优越性。 本文提出了一种名为FAEP的快速自主探索规划器，用于配备有限视野传感器的无人机，以提高探索效率。 Yinghao Zhao,Li Yan,Yu Chen,Hong Xie,Bo Xu cs.RO

title: Consolidated Adaptive T-soft Update for Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 用于深度强化学习的整合自适应 T-soft 更新
abstract: Demand for deep reinforcement learning (DRL) is gradually increased to enable robots to perform complex tasks, while DRL is known to be unstable. As a technique to stabilize its learning, a target network that slowly and asymptotically matches a main network is widely employed to generate stable pseudo-supervised signals. Recently, T-soft update has been proposed as a noise-robust update rule for the target network and has contributed to improving the DRL performance. However, the noise robustness of T-soft update is specified by a hyperparameter, which should be tuned for each task, and is deteriorated by a simplified implementation. This study develops adaptive T-soft (AT-soft) update by utilizing the update rule in AdaTerm, which has been developed recently. In addition, the concern that the target network does not asymptotically match the main network is mitigated by a new consolidation for bringing the main network back to the target network. This so-called consolidated AT-soft (CAT-soft) update is verified through numerical simulations.
summary: Demand for deep reinforcement learning (DRL) is gradually increased to enable robots to perform complex tasks, while DRL is known to be unstable. As a technique to stabilize its learning, a target network that slowly and asymptotically matches a main network is widely employed to generate stable pseudo-supervised signals. Recently, T-soft update has been proposed as a noise-robust update rule for the target network and has contributed to improving the DRL performance. However, the noise robustness of T-soft update is specified by a hyperparameter, which should be tuned for each task, and is deteriorated by a simplified implementation. This study develops adaptive T-soft (AT-soft) update by utilizing the update rule in AdaTerm, which has been developed recently. In addition, the concern that the target network does not asymptotically match the main network is mitigated by a new consolidation for bringing the main network back to the target network. This so-called consolidated AT-soft (CAT-soft) update is verified through numerical simulations.
abstract_zh: 为了使机器人能够执行复杂的任务，对深度强化学习（DRL）的需求逐渐增加，但众所周知，DRL 是不稳定的。作为一种稳定其学习的技术，缓慢且渐近地匹配主网络的目标网络被广泛采用来生成稳定的伪监督信号。最近，T-soft 更新被提出作为目标网络的噪声鲁棒更新规则，并有助于提高 DRL 性能。然而，T-soft 更新的噪声鲁棒性是由超参数指定的，该超参数应该针对每个任务进行调整，并且会因简化的实现而恶化。本研究利用最近开发的AdaTerm中的更新规则来开发自适应T-soft（AT-soft）更新。此外，通过将主网络带回到目标网络的新合并，可以缓解对目标网络与主网络不渐近匹配的担忧。这种所谓的综合 AT-soft (CAT-soft) 更新通过数值模拟进行了验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CAT-soft的更新方法，通过自适应调整和网络整合机制提升深度强化学习的稳定性。
AI.motivation: 传统T-soft更新方法依赖手动调参且简化实现会降低噪声鲁棒性，导致目标网络与主网络匹配不足，影响DRL性能。
AI.method: 结合AdaTerm的自适应更新规则开发AT-soft，并引入新整合机制使主网络回归目标网络，形成CAT-soft更新框架。
AI.result: 数值模拟验证CAT-soft有效提升了目标网络匹配度和DRL算法的稳定性与性能。
AI.conclusion: CAT-soft通过自适应参数调整和网络整合机制，解决了传统方法的调参依赖和匹配不足问题，为DRL提供了更稳健的更新策略。

authors_text: Kun Han,Shanlin sun,Xiangyi Yan,Chenyu You,Hao Tang,Junayed Naushad,Haoyu Ma,Deying Kong,Xiaohui Xie
title: Diffeomorphic Image Registration with Neural Velocity Field
title_zh: 神经速度场的微分同胚图像配准
abstract: Diffeomorphic image registration, offering smooth transformation and topology preservation, is required in many medical image analysis tasks.Traditional methods impose certain modeling constraints on the space of admissible transformations and use optimization to find the optimal transformation between two images. Specifying the right space of admissible transformations is challenging: the registration quality can be poor if the space is too restrictive, while the optimization can be hard to solve if the space is too general. Recent learning-based methods, utilizing deep neural networks to learn the transformation directly, achieve fast inference, but face challenges in accuracy due to the difficulties in capturing the small local deformations and generalization ability. Here we propose a new optimization-based method named DNVF (Diffeomorphic Image Registration with Neural Velocity Field) which utilizes deep neural network to model the space of admissible transformations. A multilayer perceptron (MLP) with sinusoidal activation function is used to represent the continuous velocity field and assigns a velocity vector to every point in space, providing the flexibility of modeling complex deformations as well as the convenience of optimization. Moreover, we propose a cascaded image registration framework (Cas-DNVF) by combining the benefits of both optimization and learning based methods, where a fully convolutional neural network (FCN) is trained to predict the initial deformation, followed by DNVF for further refinement. Experiments on two large-scale 3D MR brain scan datasets demonstrate that our proposed methods significantly outperform the state-of-the-art registration methods.
summary: Diffeomorphic image registration, offering smooth transformation and topology preservation, is required in many medical image analysis tasks.Traditional methods impose certain modeling constraints on the space of admissible transformations and use optimization to find the optimal transformation between two images. Specifying the right space of admissible transformations is challenging: the registration quality can be poor if the space is too restrictive, while the optimization can be hard to solve if the space is too general. Recent learning-based methods, utilizing deep neural networks to learn the transformation directly, achieve fast inference, but face challenges in accuracy due to the difficulties in capturing the small local deformations and generalization ability. Here we propose a new optimization-based method named DNVF (Diffeomorphic Image Registration with Neural Velocity Field) which utilizes deep neural network to model the space of admissible transformations. A multilayer perceptron (MLP) with sinusoidal activation function is used to represent the continuous velocity field and assigns a velocity vector to every point in space, providing the flexibility of modeling complex deformations as well as the convenience of optimization. Moreover, we propose a cascaded image registration framework (Cas-DNVF) by combining the benefits of both optimization and learning based methods, where a fully convolutional neural network (FCN) is trained to predict the initial deformation, followed by DNVF for further refinement. Experiments on two large-scale 3D MR brain scan datasets demonstrate that our proposed methods significantly outperform the state-of-the-art registration methods.
abstract_zh: 许多医学图像分析任务都需要微分同胚图像配准，提供平滑变换和拓扑保存。传统方法对可接受的变换空间施加一定的建模约束，并使用优化来找到两幅图像之间的最佳变换。指定可接受变换的正确空间具有挑战性：如果空间限制太多，配准质量可能会很差，而如果空间太笼统，则优化可能很难解决。最近的基于学习的方法利用深度神经网络直接学习变换，实现了快速推理，但由于难以捕获微小的局部变形和泛化能力，因此在准确性方面面临挑战。在这里，我们提出了一种名为 DNVF（神经速度场微分图像配准）的新的基于优化的方法，该方法利用深度神经网络对可接受的变换空间进行建模。采用具有正弦激活函数的多层感知器（MLP）来表示连续速度场，并将速度矢量分配给空间中的每个点，提供了复杂变形建模的灵活性以及优化的便利性。此外，我们提出了一种级联图像配准框架（Cas-DNVF），结合了优化和基于学习的方法的优点，其中训练全卷积神经网络（FCN）来预测初始变形，然后通过 DNVF 进行进一步细化。对两个大型 3D MR 脑扫描数据集的实验表明，我们提出的方法明显优于最先进的配准方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经速度场的微分同胚图像配准方法（DNVF），并结合优化与学习方法构建了级联配准框架（Cas-DNVF）。
AI.motivation: 传统的图像配准方法在建模变换空间时面临挑战，而基于学习的方法在捕捉局部变形和泛化能力上存在不足。
AI.method: 本文使用带正弦激活函数的多层感知机（MLP）建模连续速度场，并结合全卷积神经网络（FCN）预测初始变形，再通过DNVF进一步优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，本文提出的方法在两个大规模3D脑部MRI数据集上显著优于现有最先进的配准方法。
AI.conclusion: DNVF和Cas-DNVF框架在图像配准任务中展示了优越的性能，为医学图像分析提供了新的解决方案。
